title_abstract: Tunnel lining technology and device The invention discloses a tunnel lining technology. The tunnel lining technology is characterized by comprising the steps that a lining reinforcement cage is divided into a plurality of reinforcementsplicing blocks which are machined and formed outside a tunnel and then conveyed into the tunnel; a lining form board is divided into a plurality of form board pipe segments which are machined and formed outside a tunnel and then conveyed into the tunnel; the reinforcement splicing blocks and the form board pipe segments are spliced; a corresponding number of concrete pouring work surfaces of thecorresponding dimensions are arranged according to the working period requirement and the splicing speed of the reinforcement splicing blocks and form board splicing blocks; and the lining form boardpipe segments are disassembled after lining concrete reaches the strength allowing the lining form board to be disassembled, and tunnel lining is completed. The splicing blocks of the lining reinforcement cage and the splicing blocks of a lining form board pipe are machined outside the tunnel and then are sliced in the tunnel, the tunnel lining efficiency can be effectively improved, and the working environment in the tunnel is greatly improved while the construction quality is ensured. In addition, the invention further discloses a tunnel lining device.
title_abstract_original: 隧洞衬砌工艺及装置 本发明公开了一种隧洞衬砌工艺，其特征在于，包括：将衬砌钢筋笼分为多个钢筋拼接块，所述钢筋拼接块于隧洞外加工成型后输送至隧洞内；将衬砌模板分为多个模板管片，所述模板管片于隧洞外加工成型后输送至隧洞内；对所述钢筋拼接块和所述模板管片进行拼接；根据工期要求及钢筋拼接块和模板拼接块的拼装速度布置相应尺寸和数量的混凝土浇筑作业面；衬砌混凝土达到拆卸衬砌模板的强度后将衬砌模板管片拆除，完成隧洞衬砌。在隧洞外实现衬砌钢筋笼和衬砌模板管的拼接块的加工，然后再在隧洞内拼接，可有效提升隧洞衬砌效率，既保证施工质量的同时又大大改善洞内工作环境。此外，本发明还公开了一种隧洞衬砌装置。

УСТРОЙСТВО ДЛЯ ВЫРАВНИВАНИЯ ПРИТОКА НЕФТЯНОЙ СКВАЖИНЫ Полезная модель относится к области добычи углеводородов и может быть применено для эксплуатации скважин, в частности для выравнивания профиля притока флюида по длине горизонтальной скважины. Задачей создания полезной модели является обеспечение возможности регулировки перепада давления в сети каналов и на регуляторе притока, а также снижение трудоемкости изготовления и сборки устройства. Решение указанных задач достигнуто за счет того, что устройство для выравнивания притока нефтяной скважины, содержащее несущую трубу, на которой между фиксирующими кольцами установлен фильтрующий элемент, соединенный сетью каналов с отверстием в трубе, сеть каналов для обеспечения высокого гидравлического сопротивления выполнена с многократным изменением направления движения потока жидкости и/или с многократным сужением и расширением потока, на внутренней поверхности удерживающего фильтрующий элемент фиксирующего кольца со стороны сети каналов выполнены пазы для прохождения добываемого продукта, сеть каналов выполнена на кольцах, установленных на несущей трубе в количестве, необходимом для создания нужного гидравлического сопротивления, причем на торцах колец выполнены выступы и впадины, обеспечивающие радиальную ориентацию колец относительно друг друга, а перед и после колец с сетью каналов на трубе установлены переходные кольца с отверстиями для прохождения добываемого продукта. Кольца с сетью каналов закрыты кожухом, зафиксированным ступенчатым кольцом, на внутренней поверхности которого выполнены пазы для прохождения добываемого продукта. За ступенчатым кольцом в отверстии для прохождения добываемого продукта в несущую трубу на резьбе установлен регулятор притока, выполненный с проходным отверстием, диаметр которого подбирается в зависимости от интенсивности притока в месте установки устройства. Регулятор притока закрыт крышкой, которая зафиксирована на трубе винтами. Крышка, кожух и регулятор притока уплотнены резиновыми кольцами. 1 н. и 4 з. п., 9 ил.

새로운 인간 N-아세틸글루코사민 전이효소 V 유전자 및 이를이용한 활성형 효소의 제조방법 본 발명은 새로운 N아세틸글루코사민 전이효소 V (N-acetylglucosaminyl transferase V) 유전자 및 이를 이용한 N-아세틸글루코사민 전이효소의 제조 방법 에 관한 것이다. 구체적으로, 본 발명은 정상세포에서는 발현되지 않고 전이성이 강한 암세포에서만 발현되는 N-아세틸글루코사민 전이효소 V 의 새로운 유전자 및 이를 막통과 영역 (transmembrane domain)을 포함하는 형태로 대장균에서 대량 발현시켜 활성화된 효소 형태로 정제하는 방법에 관한 것으로서, 상기 효소는 암을 진단하는 항체의 생산 및 암을 치료하는 특이적인 활성 저해제의 개발에 유용하게 사용될 수 있다.

Aufbereitungsverfahren von Biomasse mit einer Zugabe mindestens eines Aktivators Ein Aufbereitungsverfahren von Biomasse, die nachfolgend einer Biogasanlage für das Erzeugen von Biogas zugeführt werden soll, umfasst die Schritte: Bereitstellen von aufzubereitender Biomasse und Zugabe mindestens eines Aktivators zur bereitgestellten Biomasse, der zur biochemischen Aufbereitung der Biomasse führt. Dabei wird als der mindestens eine Aktivator ein Essigsäurebildungsaktivator zugegeben.

VERFAHREN ZUR HERSTELLUNG VON TREMELLA ZUSAMMENSETZUNG UND TREMELLA ZUSAMMENSETZUNG Die vorliegende Erfindung betrifft ein Verfahren zur Herstellung einer Tremella-Zusammensetzung, bestehend aus einem Tremella-Dehydrierungsschritt zur Dehydrierung frischer Tremella, einem ersten Mahlvorgang zum Mahlen der dehydrierten Tremella, einem zweiten Mahlvorgang zum Mahlen von Ballaststoffen, einem ersten Mischschritt zur Zugabe von Stärke zu den gemahlenen Ballaststoffen für eine gleichmäßige Mischung, einem zweiten Mischschritt zur Zugabe von Ballaststoffen zu gemahlener Tremella und Protein, einem dritten Mischschritt der Zugabe von Nukleinsäurelösung zur Tremella, von Protein- und Ballaststoffen, einem Abkochungsschritt zur Erwärmung der oben genannten gemischten Tremella, mit Protein- und Ballaststoffgehalt für eine vorbestimmte Zeit, einem PH Einstellungsschritt zur Anpassung des pH-Wertes der genannten Tremella, mit Protein- und Ballaststoffgehalt nach dem Erhitzen, um die Tremella-Zusammensetzung zu erhalten, und einem Nachweisschritt zum Nachweis der menschlichen Zellreparaturwirkung der Tremella-Zusammensetzung.
Verfahren zur Herstellung eines Diastase enthaltenden Produktes.

Werkwijze voor het genereren en voorzien van een digitaal informatiepakket voor een locatie en een digitaal informatiepakket voor een locatie De huidige uitvinding betreft in een eerste aspect een computer-geïmplementeerde werkwijze voor het genereren en voorzien van een informatiepakket voor een locatie, en in een tweede aspect een objectief informatiepakket voor een locatie.

Método de inovulação transcervical não cirúrgica em animais de pequeno porte Método de inovulação transcervical não cirúrgica em animais de pequeno porte. A presente invenção refere-se a um método de inovulação transcervical não cirúrgica em animais de pequeno porte que abrange as etapas de preparo das fêmeas doadoras.seguida de lavagem uterina e coleta de embriões via cervical; seleção de embriões preparo do dispositivo contendo os embriões selecionad6s e transferência dos embriões às fêmeas receptoras. A presente tecnologia propõe um particular preparo das fêmeas doadoras, de forma que o método como um todo contribua para a rápida multiplicação de animais portadores de características desejáveis, por meio do incremento de aproveitamento de uma fêmea durante a sua vida reprodutiva. Adicionalmente, no contexto da importância do desenvolvimento de tecnologias para coleta e transferência de embriões, a técnica de inovulação transcervical não cirúrgica visa ainda evitar complicações sequelas às fêmeas receptoras. Comuns nas técnicas cirúrgicas. Dessa forma, o método visa permitir a difusão de técnicas não cirúrgicas em programas de transferência de embriões. O método é voltado à inovulação transcervícal em caprinos,mas pode ser adaptado para outros animais de pequeno porte

Установка для одновременно раздельной эксплуатации двух пластов Предложение относится к нефтяной промышленности, а именно: к одновременно раздельной эксплуатации двух пластов насосными установками.Установка для одновременно раздельной эксплуатации двух пластов, включающая устьевой привод, канатную тягу, соединенную с рабочим механизмом привода, и канатную подвеску с верхней и нижней траверсами, оснащенными соосными отверстиями под колонну штаг, которая зафиксирована узлом соединения в канатной подвеске и спущена в соответствующую лифтовую колонну для соединения с плунжером глубинного насоса. Траверсы снабжены дополнительными соосными отверстиями с дополнительным узлом соединения с дополнительной колонной штанг. Отверстия и дополнительные отверстия выполнены симметрично относительно поперечной оси симметрии траверс и на расстоянии между осями, примерно равном расстоянию между осями соответствующих лифтовых колонн, в которые спущены с соответствующими колоннами штанг основной и дополнительный глубинные насосы.Предлагаемая установка для одновременно раздельной эксплуатации двух пластов проста в работе и обслуживании и позволяет одним устьевым приводом поднимать на поверхность продукцию двух пластов благодаря траверсе под две колонны штанг. 2 ил.
Unità e metodo per il trasporto di scarti di articoli da fumo, in particolare sigarette e macchina per la realizzazione di articoli da fumo.

基于二维码的客户入网方法及装置、介质、设备 本发明提供一种基于二维码的客户入网方法及装置、介质、设备，方法包括：生成一个二维码；生成所述二维码的密钥，将所述密钥存储到缓存中，并为所述缓存中的密钥设置有效时长；将所述二维码提供至客户，以使在所述客户扫描所述二维码后若所述二维码处于有效状态则进入入网申请界面，使所述客户通过所述入网申请界面实现入网；当所述密钥在所述缓存中的存储时长超出所述有效时长后，清除所述密钥，以使对应的二维码失效。本发明极大的提高了客户入网的效率，并且节省人力成本和时间成本，降低了人工录入信息错误的概率，也方便系统记录原始客户入网的准确时间。

一种快速人脸识别方法、系统 本申请涉及人脸识别的技术领域，尤其涉及一种快速人脸识别方法、系统。本申请通过采集用户的移动速度并设置第一预设值，当用户的移动速度不小于第一预设值时，先通过获取已连接MAC地址对应的人脸轮廓，然后人脸识别装置基于目标人脸图像提取出目标人脸轮廓，在确定已连接MAC地址对应的人脸轮廓中存在用户的目标人脸轮廓时，确定人脸识别通过。本申请通过移动终端的MAC地址保障了识别的精确度，从而使连接上预设WiFi的用户在运动过程中能够快速进行人脸识别。

Verfahren zur fermentativen Herstellung von C4-Produkten und dafür geeignete Mikroorganismenstämme Verfahren zur fermentativen Herstellung von C4-Produkten aus Zuckern, die aus Lignozellulose-haltiger Biomasse gewonnenen werden mittels eines Mikrorganismenstammes der Art Raoultella terrigena enthaltend eine durch ein pflB Gen kodierte Pyruvat-Formiatlyase dadurch gekennzeichnet, dass die Fermentation unter aeroben Bedingungen durchgeführt wird, der Zucker Xylose ist und die Pyruvat-Formiatlyase in einer nicht funktionsfähigen, enzymatisch inaktiven Form vorliegt.

Механизм для формования изделий из теста с начинкой Полезная модель относится к устройствам для изготовления полуфабрикатов из теста с начинкой и может быть использована на предприятиях мясной, рыбной промышленности и предприятиях общественного питания. Механизм содержит корпус, состоящий из опорных стенок 1 и 2, скрепленных нижней 3 и верхней 4 плитами. Внутри корпуса расположены, с возможностью синхронного вращения навстречу друг другу посредством шестеренчатого привода, формующие барабаны 5 и 6 с формовочными ячейками 7, выполненные с одинаковыми диаметрами, закрепленные на нижнем 8 и верхнем 9 валах, взаимодействующие со смахивающими щетками 10. Формующие барабаны 5 и 6 снабжены пневматическими сбрасывателями изделия из формовочных ячеек 7. Шестеренчатый привод механизма выполнен с ведущим и вспомогательным шестеренчатыми блоками, расположенными по разным сторонам снаружи корпуса. Ведущий шестеренчатый блок состоит из ведущей нижней шестерни 13, приводимой в движение от приводного вала 14 с шестерней привода механизма 15 от устройства для изготовления полуфабрикатов. Ведущая нижняя шестерня 13 закреплена на нижнем валу 8 с помощью подшипника 16 и взаимодействует с верхней шестерней 17. Верхняя шестерня 17 закреплена на верхнем валу 9 с помощью шпонки 18. Вращение от верхней шестерни 17 основного блока через верхний вал 9 передается на верхнюю 19 шестерню вспомогательного блока и далее на нижнюю 20 шестерню вспомогательного блока. Формовочные ячейки 7 выполнены в виде двух частично пересекающихся между собой полусферических углублений с круглыми сечениями, образуя основной 44 и головной 45 сегменты. Предлагаемый механизм позволяет повысить качество изделий с возможностью придания изделиям новых необычных форм, обеспечивает возможность регулирования производительности, путем изменения скорости вращения формующих барабанов с точной синхронизацией.

RÉNOVATION ÉNERGÉTIQUE DE BATIMENTS Le document décrit des dispositifs et des procédés pour l’aide à la décision en matière de rénovation énergétique de bâtiments. Après des étapes de collecte de données, par capture de données sur Internet et/ou par des capteurs distribués dans l’espace, fixes ou mobiles (e.g. par téléphone portable ou par drone), le procédé permet d’estimer de manière quantitative et/ou qualitative les consommations d’énergie de logements individuels ou bâtiments entiers. Par la suite, des options d’affichage sélectif et multi-échelles de données, y compris en réalité augmentée et/ou virtuelle, améliorent l’aide à la décision. Des développements de l’invention détaillent des critères de décision, décrivent l’emploi de compteurs intelligents et/ou de drones, la mise en œuvre de chaines de blocs et de contrats intelligents. Des méthodes d’apprentissage automatique sur de fortes volumétries de données sont aussi décrites. Des aspects de logiciels et de systèmes sont également décrits. Figure pour l’abrégé : Fig. 5

title_abstract: SYSTEMS AND METHODS FOR DETERMINING BUILDING DAMAGE A damage assessment (DA) computing device for determining building damage may be provided. The DA computing device may retrieve historical damage data associated with roof damage from a historical damage database, generate a damage model based upon the retrieved historical damage data, identify an building for a roof damage assessment, retrieve damage data associated with the building, compare the damage data associated with the roof to the damage model, and/or determine a damage status of the roof based upon the comparison.
title_abstract_original: SYSTEMS AND METHODS FOR DETERMINING BUILDING DAMAGE A damage assessment (DA) computing device for determining building damage may be provided. The DA computing device may retrieve historical damage data associated with roof damage from a historical damage database, generate a damage model based upon the retrieved historical damage data, identify an building for a roof damage assessment, retrieve damage data associated with the building, compare the damage data associated with the roof to the damage model, and/or determine a damage status of the roof based upon the comparison.

title_abstract: SYSTEMS AND METHODS FOR DETERMINING BUILDING DAMAGE A damage assessment (DA) computing device for determining building damage may be provided. The DA computing device may train a machine learning damage model using historical damage data, identify a plurality of buildings that are susceptible to potential damage from an upcoming weather event, the plurality of buildings including the building, input data associated with a roof of the building to the trained damage model, receive a model output from the trained damage model, the model output including a damage status of the roof representing the predicted extent of damage to the roof, when the predicted extent of damage to the roof exceeds a threshold, automatically generate a claim initiation message including a link that, upon selection thereof, causes initiation an insurance claim for the roof based upon the model output and the parameters associated with the building, and/or transmit the claim initiation message to a user.
title_abstract_original: SYSTEMS AND METHODS FOR DETERMINING BUILDING DAMAGE A damage assessment (DA) computing device for determining building damage may be provided. title_abstract_original: METHOD AND ARRANGEMENT IN ROCK DRILLING RIG

title_abstract: Method and arrangement in rock drilling rig A rock drilling rig (1) is provided with a rock drilling machine (6) comprising an impact device (4), a feed device (9) and a tool (7) with a drill bit (8) at the end thereof for breaking rock. The impact device is arranged to cause a stress wave to the tool and from there further to the rock to be drilled. During drilling at least some of the compressive stress wave (si) caused to the tool is reflected as a stress wave (sr) from the rock back to the tool. The method comprises determining a momentum ( Pr ) of the stress wave ( sr) reflected from the rock to the tool and adjusting the operation of the impact device and/or that of the feed device on the basis of the momentum.

Metodo para controlar un equipo roca en donde se mide el reflejo de la onda de esfuerzo reflejada desde la roca hacia la herramienta determinandose el impulso de la onda de esfuerzo con lo cual se ajusta la operacion del dispositivo de perforacion y disposicion relacionada con un equipo para perforar roca. UN EQUIPO PARA PERFORAR ROCA (1) ESTA PROVISTO DE UNA MAQUINA PERFORADORA DE ROCA (6) QUE COMPRENDE UN DISPOSITIVO DE IMPACTO (4), UN DISPOSITIVO ALIMENTADOR (9) Y UNA HERRAMIENTA (7) CON UNA BROCA (8) EN EL EXTREMO DE ESTA PARA ROMPER LA ROCA. EL DISPOSITIVO DE IMPACTO ESTA DISPUESTO PARA PRODUCIR UNA ONDA DE ESFUERZO EN LA HERRAMIENTA Y QUE CONTINUA DESDE ELLA HASTA LA ROCA QUE SE VA A PERDORAR. DURANTE LA PERFORACION POR LO MENOS UNA PARTE DE LA ONDA DE ESFUERZO DE COMPRESION (OI) CAUSADA EN LA HERRAMIENTA ES REFLEJADA COMO UNA ONDA DE ESFUERZO (OR) QUE VUELVE DESDE LA ROCA HACIA LA HERRAMIENTA. EL METODO COMPRENDE DETERMINAR EL IMPULSO (PR) DE LA ONDA DE ESFUERZO (OR) REFLEJADA DESDE LA ROCA HACIA LA HERRAMIENTA Y AJUSTAR LA OPERACIÓN DEL DISPOSITIVO DE IMPACTO Y/O AQUELLA DEL DISPOSITIVO ALIMENTADOR BASANDOSE EN EL IMPULSO.

title_abstract: Cherry fruit wine and brewing method thereof The invention relates to the field of fruit wine beverage processing, in particular to cherry fruit wine and a brewing method thereof.The cherry fruit wine is obtained by compounding cherry raw wine fermentation liquor, cherry raw stock enzymatic hydrolysate and cherry normal juice and then conducting instantaneous high-pressure treatment through an ultrahigh-pressure homogenizer. The mixing volume ratio of the raw cherry wine fermentation liquor to the raw cherry pulp enzymatic hydrolysate to the raw cherry juice is (10: 1.5)-(2.5: 1), the pressure is adjusted to be 100-200 MPa during instantaneous high-pressure treatment, circular treatment is performed for 2-3 times, the treatment flow rate is 4-6 L/h, and the wine temperature is 15-25 DEG C. According to the method, the original flavor of cherries can be reserved, meanwhile, expected esterification chemical reaction can be completed, the fragrance of the cherry fruit wine is improved, the color and luster quality of the wine body is kept, the taste is good, and the wine liquid is clear, transparent and free of turbidity.
title_abstract_original: 一种樱桃果酒及其酿造方法 本发明涉及果酒饮料加工领域，具体涉及一种樱桃果酒及其酿造方法，该樱桃果酒由樱桃原酒发酵液、樱桃原浆酶解液和樱桃原汁复配后，经超高压均质机进行瞬时高压处理后所得。樱桃原酒发酵液、樱桃原浆酶解液和樱桃原汁的混合体积比为10：1.5～2.5:1，瞬时高压处理时，调节压力为100～200 MPa，循环处理2～3次，处理流速为4～6L/h，酒液温度为15～25℃。本发明在可以保留樱桃原有的风味的同时，可完成预期的酯化化学反应，提升樱桃果酒的香气，保持酒体的色泽品质，口感好，酒液清亮透明无浑浊。

title_abstract: POWDER-SMELL-MASKING YEAST EXTRACT [Problem] To mask the powder smell of either a powdery processed food or a food containing the same without exerting an influence on the taste of the food. It is preferable that the additive to be used for this purpose is a general food having high safety. [Solution] It has been found that the powder smell of a powdery processed food can be masked by adding, to the food, a proper amount of yeast extract which has a peptide content of 5wt% or more, an RNA content of 5wt% or more and a free amino acid content of 4wt% or less.
title_abstract_original: EXTRAIT DE LEVURE MASQUANT L'ODEUR DE POUDRE [Problème] L'invention vise à masquer l'odeur de poudre d'un produit alimentaire transformé en poudre ou d'un produit alimentaire le contenant sans que le goût du produit alimentaire ne s'en trouve modifié. L'additif utilisé à ces fins est de préférence un produit alimentaire courant présentant très peu de risques. [Solution] On a découvert que l'odeur de poudre d'un produit alimentaire transformé en poudre peut être masquée en ajoutant audit produit alimentaire une quantité appropriée d'extrait de levure présentant une teneur en peptides supérieure ou égale à 5 % en poids, une teneur en ARN supérieure ou égale à 5 % en poids et une teneur en acides aminés libres inférieure ou égale à 4 % en poids.

НЕВРАЩАЮЩИЙСЯ ПРОТЕКТОР ДЛЯ БУРИЛЬНЫХ КОЛОНН Полезная модель относится к устройствам, предназначенным для защиты от износа бурильных труб и обсадных колонн от взаимного истирания при бурении наклонных и горизонтальных нефтяных и газовых скважин.Предлагается невращающийся протектор для бурильных колонн, который содержит цилиндрический корпус и два упорных кольца, устанавливаемых по обе стороны от протектора. Корпус выполнен из двух одинаковых частей, представляющих собой полимерные полукольца со спиральными ребрами снаружи. Полимерные полукольца имеют армирующий каркас с петлями. С одной стороны полимерные полукольца соединены подвижно с помощью петель и оси, а с другой стороны выполнено разъемное соединение, осуществляемое при помощи петель и клина. Каждое упорное кольцо состоит из двух металлических полуколец. С одной стороны металлические полукольца соединены подвижно с помощью пластин и болтов, а с другой стороны выполнено разъемное соединение, осуществляемое при помощи болтов. Армирующий каркас с петлями каждого полимерного кольца выполнен в виде единой гнутой листовой детали и полностью покрыт полимерным материалом.Технический результат, на достижение которого направлена предлагаемая полезная модель, заключается в повышении надежности и срока службы невращающегося протектора для бурильных колонн за счет защиты соединений в корпусе протектора и способа изготовления каркаса, а также повышении технологичности изготовления протектора.

基于同步挤压小波变换的通信信号码元速率盲估计方法 本发明公开了一种基于同步挤压小波变换的通信信号码元速率盲估计方法，方法包括：将输入的通信信号数据截断为一个拍长；对得到的一个拍长的截断数据s(t)进行小波变换得到信号时频图；对信号时频图进行同步挤压运算以细化局部特征；判断是否达到通信信号数据的终点，若尚未达到终点，则将同步挤压运算后的信号时频图进行累加，然后跳转将输入的通信信号数据截断为一个拍长的步骤；否则，针对累加后的信号时频图根据拍数求平均；提取求平均后的信号时频图中突变频率点的二维截面，得到二维截面图；搜索二维截面图中的相邻脉冲间距最小值作为码元宽度，根据码元宽度估计得到码元速率。本发明具有精度高、计算快的特点。

title_abstract: Building-sale reception management method based on positioning of customers The invention discloses a building-sale reception management method based on positioning of customers. The building-sale reception management method based on positioning of customers includes the following steps: a reservation unit uploads the reservation information to a data server; a navigation unit generates a navigation map according to the current position and the center position of a building center; a processing module respectively sends the floor number and the prompt information to an elevator central processing unit and a salesman terminal; the processing module sends the parking stall position and the apartment position to a mobile terminal app; the navigation unit generates a navigation map according to the parking stall position and the apartment position; and the elevator central processing unit controls the elevator to rise to the target floor through a frequency converter after obtaining a closure signal sent from a door magnetic sensor. The building-sale reception management method based on positioning of customers acquires the customer position information through the mobile terminal app, provides an automatic reception experience for the customers, and is intelligent and convenient in system, thus being convenient for the customers and providing certain convenience for building sale at the same time.
title_abstract_original: 种基于客户位置定位的售楼接待管理方法 本发明公开了种基于客户位置定位的售楼接待管理方法，该方法包括如下步骤：预约单元将预约信息上传至数据服务器；导航单元根据当前位置和售楼中心位置生成导航地图；处理模块将楼层编号和提醒信息分别发送至电梯中央处理器和业务员终端；处理模块发送停车位位置和所述单元楼位置至移动终端app；导航单元根据停车位位置和单元楼位置生成导航地图；电梯中央处理器获取门磁传感器发送的关闭信号后通过变频器控制电梯上升至目标楼层。本发明通过移动端app采集客户位置信息，为客户提供种全自动接待体验，系统智能方便，方便客户的同时也为楼盘销售提供定的便利。

БУРОВОЕ ДОЛОТО ДЛЯ УДАРНО-ВРАЩАТЕЛЬНОГО БУРЕНИЯ Полезная модель относится к области создания бурового породоразрушающего инструмента для ударно-вращательного бурения скважин. Буровое долото для ударно-вращательного бурения содержит хвостовик и полусферическую головку с размещенными на ее рабочей поверхности породоразрушающими элементами. На торцевой части хвостовика установлена с возможностью углового поворота в вертикальной плоскости торовая шайба с эксцентричным выступом на нижнем торце, а подвижная полусферическая часть головки имеет шарнирный элемент, обеспечивающий возможность ее поворота относительно хвостовика в плоскости размещения эксцентричного выступа в противоположном от него направлении. Подвижная полусферическая часть головки с противоположной стороны от эксцентричного выступа шайбы оснащена упругим элементом. Пространство между торовой шайбой и ее посадочным местом в хвостовике долота заполнено упругим материалом. Эксцентричный выступ на нижнем торце торовой шайбы поверхностно упрочнен токами высокой частоты и выполнен в виде шарового сегмента радиусом, где R' - радиус шарового слоя торовой шайбы; Н - высота торовой шайбы; Е - эксцентриситет приложения удара; d - высота сегмента. Полезная модель направлена на повышение прочности и долговечности эксцентричного выступа торовой шайбы, уменьшение колебаний торовой шайбы при передаче ударного импульса и вероятности ее перекоса. 2 ил.

Vorrichtung zum Erzeugen von Hochdruck-Impulsen Vorrichtung (1) zum Erzeugen von Hochdruck-Impulsen, umfassend ein Gehäuse (2) mit einer Druckkammer (8), die über eine Hochdruck-Zuleitung mit einem Fluid unter Druck befüllbar ist, wobei das Gehäuse (2) zumindest eine Auslassöffnung (10) aufweist, die von der Druckkammer (8) zur Umgebung führt, eine Ventileinheit (14), die in Abhängigkeit von einem Druck innerhalb der Druckkammer (8) zwischen einer ersten Schaltstellung, in der sie die Auslassöffnung (10) verschließt, und einer zweiten Schaltstellung, in der sie die Auslassöffnung (10) öffnet, bewegbar ist, wobei in der zweiten Schaltstellung der Ventileinheit (14) zumindest eine Teilmenge des Fluids aus der Druckkammer (8) durch die geöffnete Auslassöffnung (10) unter Druck an die Umgebung auslassbar ist, so dass dadurch ein insbesondere hydraulischer Hochdruck-Impuls erzeugt wird, dadurch gekennzeichnet, dass die Ventileinheit (14) im Wesentlichen vollständig innerhalb der Druckkammer (8) angeordnet ist

节流装置、页岩气开采设备、开采方法、系统及存储介质 本发明公开了一种节流装置、页岩气开采设备、开采方法、系统及存储介质，该节流装置设置于页岩气井筒的井腔中并包括：支架；套设于支架上的弹性套筒，弹性套筒的内壁与支架的外壁之间形成第一腔体，弹性套筒的外壁随第一腔体的膨胀而与井腔的内壁贴合，以阻断井腔中位于弹性套筒上方的液体与井腔中位于弹性套筒下方的液体之间的流通；设置于支架上的第一抽吸装置，第一抽吸装置的抽液端位于弹性套筒下方并与井腔连通，第一抽吸装置的排液端与第一腔体连通；设置于支架上的第二抽吸装置，第二抽吸装置的抽液端与第一腔体连通，第二抽吸装置的排液端位于弹性套筒上方并与井腔连通。本发明公开的节流装置可解决当前页岩气排采效率低的技术问题。

title_abstract: Intermittent shared house system According to the invention, except for self-accommodation, the remaining time is put into the leasing market, and the use value of the house is maximized. The lease contract of the system is divided into a long-term lease contract and a short-term lease contract. The leasee of the long-renting contract can put the effective renting right into the platform for transaction. House sharing is realized through a market replacement function.
title_abstract_original: 间歇式共享房屋系统 本发明主要解决除自我住宿外，将剩余时间投入租赁市场，最大化房屋的使用价值。本系统的租赁合同分为长租合同和短租合同。长租合同的租赁方可以将有效租赁权投入平台进行交易。通过市场置换功能实现房屋共享。

Netzwerk, mobiles Endgerät und Verfahren zum Betreiben eines Netzwerkes Die Erfindung betrifft unter anderem ein Netzwerk (10), insbesondere Intercom Netzwerk, umfassend wenigstens einen mobilen Teilnehmer (11a, 11b), der über einen ersten Signalpfad (P1) mit einer ersten Antenne (21a) verbindbar ist, und der über einen zweiten Signalpfad (P2) mit einer zweiten Antenne (21b) verbindbar ist. Die Besonderheit besteht unter anderem darin, dass dem mobilen Teilnehmer (11a, 11b) eine Einrichtung (29) zugeordnet ist, die den ersten Signalpfad (P1) mit dem zweiten Signalpfad (P2) vergleicht, und die bei Durchführung des Vergleiches einen ersten Parameter (X) der beiden Signalpfade (P1, P2) und einen zweiten Parameter (Y) der beiden Signalpfade (P1, P2) berücksichtigt.

title_abstract: Methods and apparatus for selecting multicast IP data transmitted in broadcast streams Through the association of an IP address with each data stream, a single system may be used by a network card or a tuner to select multicast IP data. Each data stream is identified by a unique IP address. More particularly, a locator adapted for identifying a data stream is associated with one of a plurality of data streams. The locator is then mapped to an IP address. When it is determined that the IP address corresponds to a data stream locator associated with a data stream, a tuner is instructed to read the data stream associated with the data stream locator. However, when it is determined that the IP address does not correspond to a data stream locator, a network card identified by the IP address is instructed to read data from the associated network. Since each data stream may be associated with a plurality of multicast IP addresses, a multicast group address is specified to identify the appropriate multicast IP data transmitted in the data stream. Packets addressed to the multicast group address may then be received by either a tuner or a network interface card.

title_abstract: A FLAVOURING MATERIAL PREPARED FROM ONIONS 1,241,101. Onion flavour. DRAGOCO SPEZIALFABRIK KONZ. R I E C H - U AROMA-STOFFE GERBERDING & CO. G.m.b.H. 5 Aug., 1969 [16 Aug., 1968], No. 39150/69. Heading A2B. A flavouring material is obtained from onions by expression the juice from onions, immediately and abruptly heating the expressed juice to 140-160‹C, cooling within seconds to about 40‹C, and vacuumevaporating to at least 72% dry matter. The vapours produced during the distillation may be condensed and flavouring materials recovered therefrom by extraction, for example by solvent extraction, and these materials may be incorporated in the residue obtained from the vacuum evaporation.

Küchengerät für die Herstellung von Teigwaren, insbesondere zur Herstellung von Spätzle Bekannte Küchengeräte zur Herstellung von Teigwaren, insbesondere zur Herstellung von Spätzle, haben einen Teigbehälter zur Aufnahme einer Teigmasse, und einen Schaufelkörper, der über einem drehfesten und mit Formlöchern durchsetzten Lochboden um eine Drehachse drehbar gelagert ist. Um hiervon ausgehend ein vergleichsweise einfach handhabbares Küchengerät bereitzustellen, wird vorgeschlagen, dass der Lochboden in einem Lochteil ausgebildet ist, in das der Teigbehälter drehbar hineinragt, wobei der Teigbehälter mit dem Schaufelkörper drehfest verbunden ist.

Küchengerät für die Herstellung von Teigwaren, insbesondere zur Herstellung von Spätzle, sowie Erweiterungs-Set für eine Küchenmaschine Küchengerät zur Herstellung von Teigwaren, insbesondere zur Herstellung von Spätzle, umfassend(a) einen Teigbehälter (1) zur Aufnahme einer Teigmasse, und(b) einen Schaufelkörper (3), der über einem drehfesten und mit Formlöchern (7a; 7b) durchsetzten Lochboden (7) um eine Drehachse (12) drehbar gelagert ist, dadurch gekennzeichnet, dass der Lochboden (7) in einem Lochteil (2; 21; 22) ausgebildet ist, in das der Teigbehälter (1) drehbar hineinragt, wobei der Teigbehälter (1) mit dem Schaufelkörper (3) drehfest verbunden ist.

Küchengerät für die Herstellung von Teigwaren, insbesondere zur Herstellung von Spätzle Küchengerät zur Herstellung von Teigwaren, insbesondere zur Herstellung von Spätzle, umfassend(a) einen Teigbehälter (1) zur Aufnahme einer Teigmasse, und(b) einen Schaufelkörper (3), der über einem drehfesten und mit Formlöchern (7a; 7b) durchsetzten Lochboden (7) um eine Drehachse (12) drehbar gelagert ist, dadurch gekennzeichnet, dass der Lochboden (7) in einem Lochteil (2) ausgebildet ist, in das der Teigbehälter (1) drehbar hineinragt, wobei der Teigbehälter (1) mit dem Schaufelkörper (3) drehfest verbunden ist.

title_abstract: Channel management method and system The embodiment of the invention provides a channel management method and system, belonging to the data processing field. The method comprises the following steps: obtaining a reporting request from achannel broker terminal device, wherein the reporting request includes basic information of a reporting user and basic information of a channel broker; obtaining the distance between the channel broker terminal equipment and the building disk based on the request for submission and standby; obtaining a first judgment result for characterizing whether the distance is greater than a preset distancebased on the distance and the preset distance; when the first determination result is yes, determining that the backup request is successful. By judging whether the distance between the channel brokerterminal and the building is greater than the preset distance, when yes, it is judged that the reporting request sent by the channel broker terminal is successful, so that the authenticity of the reporting request sent by the channel broker terminal can be accurately judged, and the channel broker can be prevented from defrauding the commission by reporting the naturally visited customer in the channel reporting manner.
title_abstract_original: 渠道管理方法及系统 本发明实施例提供种渠道管理方法及系统，属于数据处理领域，所述方法包括：从渠道经纪人终端设备获取报备请求，其中，所述报备请求包括：报备客户的基本信息、渠道经纪人的基本信息；基于所述报备请求，获取所述渠道经纪人终端设备与楼盘之间的距离；基于所述距离和预设距离，获取用于表征所述距离是否大于预设距离的第判断结果；在所述第判断结果为是时，判定所述报备请求成功。通过判断所述渠道经纪人终端与楼盘之间的距离是否大于预设距离，在为是时，判定所述渠道经纪人终端发送的报备请求成功，因此，能够准确地判定所述渠道经纪人终端发送的报备请求的真实性，防止渠道经纪人通过将自然到访的客户以渠道报备的方式上报来骗取佣金。

title_abstract: LANDSCAPE MAINTENANCE AND MANAGEMENT SYSTEM Systems and methods are provided for managing and monitoring landscape service providers, contractors, and others, for delivery of appropriate services and/or products to a subject residential or commercial property. A computer implemented electronic system having a number of modules and/or components, including a central computer portal, a secure user interface for a potential service provider (landscape service provider, contractor) in electronic communication with the central computer portal, a consumer/customer portal linked to access information concerning service provided (accessible to a property manager, property owner, residential customer) in electronic communication with a central computer portal, and an integrated network of electronic data-collecting sensors (such as at/on a subject property of interest/subject property), is provided. The systems and methods include a number of integrated modules fashioned to perform particular tasks as part of an overall property management system, including a request for qualifications (RFQ) generating module, a procurement module, a contact compliance and monitoring module, an asset management module, a water management module and a mechanical maintenance module.

title_abstract: Off-Market Real Estate A potential buyer of a piece of real estate may desire specified criteria which may not be on the market. Specified criteria may include a style of home, such as a craftsman or modern, for example, house size, lot size, number of bedrooms, location, school district, neighborhood, or any other features. If an off-market house meets the desired criteria, an owner of the house may be approached and provided with an offer to purchase.

SYSTEME DE GESTION DE BIENS IMMOBILIERS, KIT ET METHODE ASSOCIES L'invention concerne un système de gestion (1) de biens immobiliers (2), le système comprenant - des serrures connectées (4) équipant au moins un accès (5) de chacun desdits biens immobiliers (2), et - une plateforme (7) connectée en réseau aux serrures connectées (4), comprenant un module de connexion (8a) pour des pourvoyeurs (3) et des requérants (6), caractérisé en ce que le système comprend en outre - un module de qualification (8b) de requérant configuré pour recueillir des données personnelles de requérant (6), et déterminer si le requérant (6) est qualifié pour le bien (2) considéré, - un module de génération de code temporaire (8c) pour la serrure connectée (4) correspondante, activable par un pourvoyeur (3) pour un requérant (6) qualifié, - un module d'agenda (8d) pour déterminer une plage de visite, le système (1) étant configuré pour que ledit code temporaire soit actif pendant ladite plage de visite. L'invention concerne en outre un kit de gestion et une méthode de gestion correspondants.

title_abstract: Method for immobilizing microbial cells by aid of styrene-isoprene-styrene block copolymers (SIS) and application The invention belongs to the field of biotechnologies, and particularly relates to a method for immobilizing microbial cells by the aid of styrene-isoprene-styrene block copolymers (SIS) and application. The method includes carrying out epoxidation reaction on SIS to prepared modified SIS materials; preparing the immobilized cells by the aid of modified SIS by embedding processes; converting arginine into L-ornithine by the aid of the immobilized cells. The SIS is used as a raw material. The modified SIS is used as a carrier. The method and the application have the advantages that the method includes simple processes, and the immobilized cells are long in service life; the L-ornithine can be produced by the aid of the method, the content of the L-ornithine in conversion solution is 20-60 g/l, and the molar conversion rate of the arginine can reach 98.5%.
title_abstract_original: 种利用苯乙烯‑异戊二烯‑苯乙烯嵌段共聚物（SIS）固定化微生物细胞的方法及应用 本发明属于生物技术领域，特别涉及种利用苯乙烯‑异戊二烯‑苯乙烯嵌段共聚物（SIS）固定化微生物细胞的方法及应用。本发明以SIS为原料，通过环氧化反应制备改性SIS材料，以改性SIS为载体采用包埋法制备固定化细胞，并利用固定化细胞转化精氨酸为L‑鸟氨酸。本发明工艺简单，固定化细胞寿命长，采用本发明生产L‑鸟氨酸，转化液中L‑鸟氨酸的含量为20‑60g/l，精氨酸摩尔转化率可达到98.5%。

title_abstract: Marsh gas generator with built-in microorganism enrichment mechanism The invention discloses a marsh gas generator with a built-in microorganism enrichment mechanism, and relates to the technical field of marsh gas manufacturing equipment. The marsh gas generator comprises a tank, a sealing cover, a microorganism enrichment mechanism and a stirring mechanism, wherein the upper end of the tank is opened, the tank is provided with a feed pipe and a discharge pipe, the sealing cover is connected with the upper end of the tank, the sealing cover is provided with a marsh gas pipe, and the feed pipe, the discharge pipe and the marsh gas pipe respectively communicatewith an inner cavity of the tank; and the microorganism enrichment mechanism and the stirring mechanism are both located in the inner cavity of the tank, the microorganism enrichment mechanism is connected with the upper part of the tank, and the stirring mechanism is connected with the sealing cover. The marsh gas generator can improve the fermentation efficiency of marsh gas raw materials in scum layers, and improve the production efficiency of the marsh gas.
title_abstract_original: 一种内置微生物富集机构的沼气发生器 本发明公开了一种内置微生物富集机构的沼气发生器，涉及沼气制造设备技术领域。包括罐体、密封盖、微生物富集机构、搅拌机构，罐体的上端敞口，罐体设有进料管和出料管，密封盖与罐体的上端连接，密封盖设有沼气管，进料管、出料管、沼气管均与罐体的内腔连通，微生物富集机构和搅拌机构均设于罐体的内腔中，微生物富集机构与罐体的上部连接，搅拌机构与密封盖连接。本发明能够提高浮渣层中的沼气原料的发酵效率，提高沼气的生产效率。

title_abstract: Radio wave propagation simulator
title_abstract_original: Radio wave propagation simulator

title_abstract: Radio wave propagation simulator The correction value of the propagation curve for every predetermined orientation is obtained from the difference between the measured data of the received signal code power of a desired signal and the propagation curve; the propagation curve is corrected through the use of the correction values; and the state of the radio wave propagation is simulated through the use of the propagation curve after the correction. Further, a relative value is calculated on the basis of the difference of the calculated values of the received power density ratio within a band before and after the modification of the radio parameter settings, and the calculated relative value is added to the measured data of the received power density ratio within a band, and the received power density ratio within a band after the modification of the radio parameter settings is estimated.

title_abstract:
RADIO WAVE PROPAGATION SIMULATOR

PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To provide a radio wave propagation simulator which makes study and evaluation possible for all radio service area, and is good using for radio area tuning.

SOLUTION: The simulator stores measured data for desired wave received power, obtains correction values for every predetermined directions of a propagation curve from difference of the measured data and the propagation curve, corrects the correction curve using the correction values, and simulates radio wave propagation status using the propagation curve after the correction. Furthermore, a relative value is calculated from difference of calculation values for inband received power density ratios before correction and after correction of the radio parameter, and the inband receiving power density ratio after correction of the radio parameter is presumed adding the relative value to the measured data of the inband receiving power density ratio.

RADIO WAVE PROPAGATION SIMULATOR

PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To provide a radio wave propagation simulator which makes study and evaluation possible for all radio service area, and is good using for radio area tuning.

SOLUTION: The simulator stores measured data for desired wave received power, obtains correction values for every predetermined directions of a propagation curve from difference of the measured data and the propagation curve, corrects the correction curve using the correction values, and simulates radio wave propagation status using the propagation curve after the correction. Furthermore, a relative value is calculated from difference of calculation values for inband received power density ratios before correction and after correction of the radio parameter, and the inband receiving power density ratio after correction of the radio parameter is presumed adding the relative value to the measured data of the inband receiving power density ratio.

title_abstract: Radio wave propagation simulator The correction value of the propagation curve for every predetermined orientation is obtained from the difference between the measured data of the received signal code power of a desired signal and the propagation curve; the propagation curve is corrected through the use of the correction values; and the state of the radio wave propagation is simulated through the use of the propagation curve after the correction. Further, a relative value is calculated on the basis of the difference of the calculated values of the received power density ratio within a band before and after the modification of the radio parameter settings, and the calculated relative value is added to the measured data of the received power density ratio within a band, and the received power density ratio within a band after the modification of the radio parameter settings is estimated.
title_abstract_original: Radio wave propagation simulator The correction value of the propagation curve for every predetermined orientation is obtained from the difference between the measured data of the received signal code power of a desired signal and the propagation curve; the propagation curve is corrected through the use of the correction values; and the state of the radio wave propagation is simulated through the use of the propagation curve after the correction. Further, a relative value is calculated on the basis of the difference of the calculated values of the received power density ratio within a band before and after the modification of the radio parameter settings, and the calculated relative value is added to the measured data of the received power density ratio within a band, and the received power density ratio within a band after the modification of the radio parameter settings is estimated.

Radiobolgeutbredelsessimulator Korreksjonsverdien av utbredelseskurven for hver forutbestemte orientering oppnås ut fra forskjellen mellom målte data for et mottatt signals kodeeffekt av et ønsket signal og utbredelseskurven. Utbredelseskurven korrigeres ved å bruke korreksjonsverdier og tilstanden av radiobølgeutbredelsen simuleres ved å bruke utbredelseskurven etter korreksjonen. Videre beregnes en relativ verdi på grunnlag av forskjellen mellom de beregnede verdier av det mottatte effekttetthetsforhold innen et bånd før og etter modifisering av radioparameterinnstillingene og den beregnede relative verdi legges til de målte data for det mottatte effekttetthetsforhold innen båndet, og det mottatte effekttetthetsforhold innen båndet estimeres etter modifisering av radioparameterinnstillingene.

title_abstract: Method, system and apparatus for transferring information The present invention provides a method of information transmission, including: receiving uplink synchronization channel information carrying with detection information; executing corresponding detection processing operation according to the uplink synchronization channel information, generating detection result information; transmitting the detection result information to a wireless network controller. The invention also provides a system of information transmission, and a base station and a wireless network controller. The mutual transmission of the uplink synchronization channel information between the base station and the wireless network controller is realized by adding uplink synchronization channel information position ability information to a structure of resource state indication information and audit response information, adding detection window length information intrusively detected by uplink synchronization channel to public measurement initialization information structure, adding uplink synchronization channel detection window length information to reconfiguration request information structure of the public transmission channel.
title_abstract_original: Method, system and apparatus for transferring information The present invention provides a method of information transmission, including: receiving uplink synchronization channel information carrying with detection information; executing corresponding detection processing operation according to the uplink synchronization channel information, generating detection result information; transmitting the detection result information to a wireless network controller. The invention also provides a system of information transmission, and a base station and a wireless network controller. The mutual transmission of the uplink synchronization channel information between the base station and the wireless network controller is realized by adding uplink synchronization channel information position ability information to a structure of resource state indication information and audit response information, adding detection window length information intrusively detected by uplink synchronization channel to public measurement initialization information structure, adding uplink synchronization channel detection window length information to reconfiguration request information structure of the public transmission channel.

title_abstract: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR TRANSFERRING INFORMATION, METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR CONFIGURING UPPCH A method for transferring information is provided. The method includes: receiving the information of UpPCH carried with detecting information; according to the information of UpPCH, performing the relating detecting process operation, and generating the detecting result information; sending the detecting result information to RNC. A system for transferring information, a base station and a radio network controller are also provided. According to adding a position ability information of UpPCH to the structures of the resource state indication information and the audit responding information, and according to adding the detecting window size information about UpPCH interference detection to the common measuring initialization message's structure, and according to adding the detecting window size information about UpPCH to the structure of the common transfer channel re-configure request message, so that the inter-transfer of the information of UpPCH between the base station and the RNC is achieved.
title_abstract_original: PROCÉDÉ ET APPAREIL DE TRANSFERT D'INFORMATIONS, PROCÉDÉ ET APPAREIL DE CONFIGURATION DE CANAL UPPCH L'invention porte sur un procédé de transfert d'informations. Le procédé comprend : la réception des informations de canal UpPCH transportées avec des informations de détection ; selon les informations de UpPCH, l'exécution de l'opération de traitement de détection en rapport, et la génération des informations de résultat de détection ; l'envoi des informations de résultat de détection au contrôleur de réseau radio (RNC). L'invention porte également sur un système de transfert d'informations, sur une station de base et sur un contrôleur de réseau radio. Conformément à l'ajout d'informations de capacité de position de UpPCH aux structures des informations d'indication d'état de ressource et des informations de réponse à l'audit, et conformément à l'ajout des informations de taille de fenêtre de détection concernant une détection de brouillage de UpPCH à la structure de message d'initialisation de mesure commun, et conformément à l'ajout des informations de taille de fenêtre de détection concernant UpPCH à la structure du message de requête de reconfiguration de canal de transfert commun, l'inter-transfert des informations de UpPCH entre la station de base et le RNC est réalisé.

title_abstract: Account creation method, Internet of Things multi-tenant system, device, program and medium The invention provides an account creation method, an Internet of Things multi-tenant system, equipment, a program and a medium, belongs to the technical field of Internet of Things, is applied to an Internet of Things multi-tenant platform, and comprises the steps that an account creation request is received, and the account creation request at least comprises an account identifier and a database instance identifier; creating a target tenant database corresponding to the account identifier in a database server according to a database instance corresponding to the database instance identifier, the database instance being a database instance corresponding to an existing tenant database in the database server; and after the target tenant database is created, outputting an account creation success notification corresponding to the account identifier.
title_abstract_original: 账号创建方法、物联网多租户系统、设备、程序和介质 本公开提供的账号创建方法、物联网多租户系统、设备、程序和介质，属于物联网技术领域，应用于物联网多租户平台，所述方法包括：接收账号创建请求，所述账号创建请求至少包括：账号标识、数据库实例标识；根据所述数据库实例标识相对应的数据库实例在数据库服务器中创建所述账号标识相对应的目标租户数据库，其中，所述数据库实例是所述数据库服务器中已有租户数据库相对应的数据库实例；在所述目标租户数据库创建完成后，输出所述账号标识相对应的账号创建成功通知。

ЯС ГИДРАВЛИЧЕСКИЙ Полезная модель относится к устройствам для бурения нефтяных и газовых скважин, а именно к ясу гидравлическому бурильному двустороннего действия. Яс гидравлический состоит из соединенных между собой шлицевым зацеплением трубчатого составного корпуса и полого составного штока с поршнями, между которыми находится рабочая жидкость, ударников и наковален, двух кольцевых клапанов, подпружиненного механизма защелки. Трубчатый составной корпус, создающий с поршнем границу разделения внутренней полости устройства с буровым раствором, включает втулку из нержавеющей стали твердостью не менее 38 HRC. Предлагаемая конструкция яса гидравлического повышает ресурс, надежность яса за счет применения подвижного полого штока при неподвижном составном корпусе, использования верхнего и нижнего переводников с поясом пониженной жесткости, втулки составного корпуса из антикоррозионного материала, что повышает технико-экономические показатели бурения и предупреждает осложнения и аварии бурильного инструмента.
HPV的L1蛋白的定量检测方法 本发明涉及病毒学领域。特别地，本发明涉及用于定量检测HPV16 L1蛋白和HPV18 L1蛋白的特征肽，以及一种定量检测HPV16 L1蛋白和HPV18 L1蛋白的方法。

基于模拟多并发STA的AP性能检测方法及检测系统 本发明公开了一种基于模拟多并发STA的AP性能检测方法及检测系统，属于无线局域网技术领域。AP性能检测方法，包括：基于软件模拟平台，生成多个STA对象，每一个STA对象独立执行CSMA/CA的无线接入过程，所有STA对象共享一个无线信道，所有STA对象叠加自身当前状态至无线信道上，所述状态包括信道监听状态和发送状态；本发明不仅可以进行信令仿真，还可以在这个过程中同时执行空口性能的仿真，即本发明能够模拟空口竞争过程，并且通过空口传递信令的过程，具备完整的无线接入过程，从而仿真更加真实有效，本发明能够分析AP侧最大承载无线逻辑连接数量的同时，测量空口接入速率，空口接入延迟，空口冲突情况等参数。

fermentado alcoólico seco de cajá-manga (spondias dulcis) - vinho seco de cajá-manga fermentado alcoólico seco de cajá-manga (spondias dulcis) — vinho seco de cajá manga. de uma forma mais simples, o vinho é definido como uma bebida alcoólica produzida após o processo de fermentação do sumo de uva. a utilização da uva ocorre devido ao fato de ela permitir que esta fermente sem que seja necessário adicionar ao meio açucares, ácidos, enzimas ou outros nutrientes. alguns outros frutos, tendo como exemplo a maça e outras bagas, também são caracterizados dessa forma, ou seja, não é algo especifico. sendo esses vinhos conhecidos genericamente como vinhos de frutas ou fermentados. para produção da bebida a fruta escolhida foi a cajá-manga (spondias dulcis), sendo conhecida, também, popularmente como: cajá, cajarana, taperebá-do-sertão e cajá anão. podendo ser encontrado em todo território brasileiro, esse fruto é originário do arquipélago da sociedade no oceano pacifico. o cajá manga é uma fruta com uma concentração de vitaminas a e c, fibras, fósforo e cálcio, essenciais para a manutenção e funcionamento correto do organismo. para obtenção da bebida é necessário submeter a polpa do fruto por uma fermentação, que é um processo bioquímico, o qual é realizado por microrganismos que convertem moléculas de carboidratos (açucares) em álcool, gás carbônico e energia. no caso do vinho esses microrganismos são do tipo leveduras (fungos formados por apenas uma célula).
Polythérapie avec un anticorps anti-ang 2 et un agoniste cd40 La présente invention concerne la polythérapie avec un anticorps qui se lie à l'angiopoïétine 2 humaine (ang -2) avec un agoniste cd40.
Polythérapie avec un anticorps anti-ang 2 et un agoniste cd40 La présente invention concerne la polythérapie avec un anticorps qui se lie à l'angiopoïétine 2 humaine (ang -2) avec un agoniste cd40.

TERAPIA COMBINADA CON UN ANTICUERPO ANTI-ANG2 Y UN AGONISTA DE CD40 La presente se refiere a la terapia combinada de un anticuerpo que se une a angiopoyetina humana 2 (ANG-2) con un agonista de CD40 (proteína de superficie celular).

title_abstract: Digital processing system and digital processing method for house records The invention provides a digital processing system and processing method for house records, and the system comprises an online filing module which is used for calling a B/S page and displaying the B/Spage in a CS system, so that business data captured online is directly processed into a record; a processing module used for assigning the received archives to workers; a centralized management module used for transferring and backing up data; and a system management module used for maintaining a house record digital processing system. The processing method is carried out by adopting the processing system. A C/S mode is used, the whole process of file processing and the whole process of file receiving and transferring are integrated, and the complete life cycle of files from nothing to nothing and from case receiving to file generation to final file utilization is truly achieved.
title_abstract_original: 一种房籍档案数字化加工系统及加工方法 本发明提供了一种房籍档案数字化加工系统及加工方法，系统包括在线归档模块，用于调用B/S页面展示在CS系统，使在线抓取的业务数据可直接加工成档案；加工模块，用于将接收到的档案分派给工作人员；集中管理模块，用于对对数据进行移交和备份；系统管理模块，用于对房籍档案数字化加工系统进行维护。加工方法采用该加工系统进行。本发明使用C/S模式，集成了档案加工的整套流程和档案接收移交的整套流程，真正的实现了档案从无到有、从接收案件到生成档案到最后档案利用完整的生命周期。

Verfahren zum Ausrichten eines Strebausbaus sowie Anordnung zur Bestimmung der Position von Schreitausbauen eines Strebausbaus Die Erfindung betrifft ein Verfahren zum Ausrichten eines Strebausbaus 1 mit Hilfe von Vorschubeinrichtungen, wobei nach einem Abbaufortschritt ein Schreitausbau S1-4 in Abbaurichtung um eine Solllage gerückt wird, und wobei eine Messeinrichtung 5, 6 einen Messwert erfasst, der an ein Steuerungssystem übermittelt wird, wobei der Messwert es dem Steuerungssystem ermöglicht, die neue Position des Schreitausbaus S1-4 zu bestimmen, wobei eine durch Schreiten verursachte Winkeländerung zwischen zwei benachbarten Schreitausbauen S1-4 des Strebausbaues 1 mittels der Messeinrichtung 5, 6 erfasst wird, wobei der Schreitvorgang gestoppt wird, wenn eine der Solllage entsprechende Winkelveränderung erreicht wurde.

Verfahren zum Ausrichten eines Strebausbaus sowie Anordnung zur Bestimmung der Position von Schreitausbauen eines Strebausbaus Verfahren zum Ausrichten eines Strebausbaus (1) mit Hilfe von Vorschubeinrichtungen, wobei nach einem Abbaufortschritt ein Schreitausbau (S1 - 4) in Abbaurichtung durch Nachziehen an einem Strebförderer um eine Solllage gerückt wird, und wobei eine Messeinrichtung (5, 6) einen Messwert erfasst, der an ein Steuerungssystem übermittelt wird, wobei der Messwert es dem Steuerungssystem ermöglicht, die neue Position des Schreitausbaus (S1-4) zu bestimmen, dadurch gekennzeichnet, dass eine durch Schreiten verursachte Winkeländerung zwischen zwei benachbarten Schreitausbauen (S1-4) des Strebausbaues (1) mittels der Messeinrichtung (5, 6) erfasst wird, wobei der Schreitvorgang gestoppt wird, wenn eine der Solllage entsprechende Winkelveränderung erreicht wurde, wobei die Winkelveränderung dadurch gemessen wird, dass wenigstens ein Ende eines vorgespanntes Zugmittels (8) mit einer Messeinrichtung (5, 6) verbunden wird, wobei die Verlagerung des Zugmittels (8) relativ zu der an dem Schreitausbau (S1-4) befestigten Messeinrichtung (5, 6) gemessen wird.

Tabelas para definição de cota imobiliária para utilização de propriedade fraccionada Tabelas para definição de cota imobiliária para utilização de propriedade fraccionada, que foi desenvolvido com a finalidade de proporcionar tabelas que permitam organizar de forma racional os períodos variáveis anualmente, da utilização de um imóvel fraccionado onde se define as datas de utilização da propriedade por cada cotista.

一种OQPSK信号解调的相位偏差估计与补偿方法 本发明请求保护一种OQPSK信号解调的相位偏差估计与补偿方法，涉及移动通信技术领域。为了实现OQPSK调制信号准确载波相位同步，本发明方法包括：依据相位偏差估计方法，对频偏估计补偿后的信号进行四次方去调制，实现相位偏差初步估计；取相位偏差初步估计值进行实际相位区间变换；利用前一段实际相位值和本段实际相位值进行剩余频偏估算，消除剩余频偏影响；对消除剩余频偏影响的相位值进行段间相位跳变点检测，对产生相位跳变的段数进行相位校正，实现相位偏差准确估计。本发明为突发时间较长的OQPSK信号，段与段之间相位跳变校正提供一种简单有效的解决方案。

title_abstract: Phase deviation estimating and compensating method for OQPSK signal demodulation The invention claims a phase deviation estimating and compensating method for OQPSK signal demodulation, and relates to the technical field of mobile communication, in order to realize accurate carrier phase synchronization of OQPSK modulation signals. The method includes the steps of carrying out biquadrate demodulation of the signals after the estimation and compensation of frequency deviation according to a phase deviation estimation method to realize the preliminary estimation of the phase deviation, conducting actual phase interval transformation with the preliminary phase deviation estimated value, estimating the residual frequency deviation by using the actual phase value of a front segment and the actual phase value of the present segment to estimate the residual frequency deviation, detecting inter-segment phase hopping points for the phase value with the influence of the residual frequency deviation being eliminated, conducting pai/2 phase correction for the phase hopping segment number to realize accurate estimation of phase deviation. The invention provides a simple and effective solution for inter-segment phase hopping correction for OQPSK signals with long bursting time.
title_abstract_original: 种OQPSK信号解调的相位偏差估计与补偿方法 本发明请求保护种OQPSK信号解调的相位偏差估计与补偿方法，涉及移动通信技术领域。为了实现OQPSK调制信号准确载波相位同步，本发明方法包括：依据相位偏差估计方法，对频偏估计补偿后的信号进行四次方去调制，实现相位偏差初步估计；取相位偏差初步估计值进行实际相位区间变换；利用前段实际相位值和本段实际相位值进行剩余频偏估算，消除剩余频偏影响；对消除剩余频偏影响的相位值进行段间相位跳变点检测，对产生相位跳变的段数进行相位校正，实现相位偏差准确估计。本发明为突发时间较长的OQPSK信号，段与段之间相位跳变校正提供种简单有效的解决方案。

title_abstract: FOOD USING BROCCOLI PURPOSE: A food product such as noodles or bread obtained using broccoli is provided which is rich in β-carotene, fibrous material and vitamin C and has an effect on preventing the occurrence of cancer such as breast cancer, large intestinal cancer and stomach cancer by compounds such as sulforaphane, indole or the like contained in broccoli. CONSTITUTION: To produce needles, 8±2% by weight of broccoli powder is blended with 80±5% by weight of wheat flour, 8±2% by weight of wheat starch and 8±2% by weight of purified salt. About 8±2% by weight of broccoli powder is also added to conventional material for general noodles to produce general noodles.
