About 8±2% by weight of broccoli powder is also added to conventional material for general noodles to produce general noodles.

title_abstract: Improvements in beverages 534,582. Beverages. MUSHER, S. Oct. 2, 1939, No. 27041. [Class 14 (ii)] Spirits, wines, beers and unfermented beverages are matured or improved in flavour by treatment with flour obtained by grinding the press cake obtained after extracting oil from sesame or peanuts. The undissolved portions of the flour are removed by filtration, centrifuging, &c. A filter aid may be added. A portion of the beverage or alcohol may be used to form an extract which may be concentrated by evaporation and added to the beverage.
title_abstract_original: Improvements in beverages 534,582. Beverages. MUSHER, S. Oct. 2, 1939, No. 27041. [Class 14 (ii)] Spirits, wines, beers and unfermented beverages are matured or improved in flavour by treatment with flour obtained by grinding the press cake obtained after extracting oil from sesame or peanuts. The undissolved portions of the flour are removed by filtration, centrifuging, &c. A filter aid may be added. A portion of the beverage or alcohol may be used to form an extract which may be concentrated by evaporation and added to the beverage.

title_abstract: Stored grain pest controlling agent containing spinetoram and eucalyptus oil The invention relates to a stored grain pest controlling agent containing spinetoram and eucalyptus oil. Effective components of the stored grain pest controlling agent comprise spinetoram and eucalyptus oil, wherein the weight ratio of spinetoram to eucalyptus oil is (1-2) to (1-10). The stored grain pest controlling agent is high in effect and low in toxicity, is safe and reliable, and is capable of effectively preventing and killing the stored grain pests and reducing the loss caused by the pests in the stored grains to a maximum limit.
title_abstract_original: 种含乙基多杀菌素和桉叶油的储粮害虫防治剂 本发明涉及种含乙基多杀菌素和桉叶油的储粮害虫防治剂，有效成分由乙基多杀菌素和桉叶油组成，乙基多杀菌素和桉叶油的重量比为1‑2:1‑10。本发明高效低毒、安全可靠，能有效的预防和杀灭储粮害虫，最大限度的减少贮粮中因虫害而造成的损失。

title_abstract: Fruit food preservative The invention discloses a fruit food preservative. The preservative is prepared from the following components in parts by weight: 30-35 parts of honey, 10-20 parts of ferric pyrophosphate, 5-15 parts of glycine, 20-30 parts of ferrous sulfate, 5-10 parts of sodium hydroxide, 1-2 parts of lysozyme and 0.02-0.2 part of food antiseptics. The fruit food preservative has the advantages of long freshness preservation period and no toxicity or harm, can be used as a food additive, and has a remarkable antiseptic effect.
title_abstract_original: 种水果类食品保鲜剂 本发明公开种水果类食品保鲜剂，所述保鲜剂由下列重量份的成分组成：蜜糖30‑35份；焦磷酸铁10‑20份；甘氨酸5‑15份；硫酸亚铁20‑30份；氢氧化钠5‑10份；溶菌酶1‑2份；食品防腐剂0.02‑0.2份。本发明保鲜期长，无毒无害，可作为食品添加剂，防腐效果亦显著。

title_abstract: Construction method and auxiliary device for passing mine tunneling method tunnel through shield empty push The invention relates to a construction method and auxiliary device for passing a mine tunneling method tunnel through shield empty push, and belongs to the field of shield tunnel engineering. The method pours a concrete guide table at the bottom of the mine tunneling method tunnel, pre-buries a track of shield sliding and a counter-force beam slot in the guide table, uses the slot and an empty push assist device to achieve the rapid empty push construction of a shield machine in the mine tunneling method tunnel, reduces the risk, saves the cost, shortens the construction period, provides similar engineering construction with favorable technical support in the future, and has a large promotion value and significant benefits.
title_abstract_original: 种盾构空推通过矿山法隧道的施工方法及辅助装置 本发明涉及种盾构空推通过矿山法隧道的施工方法及辅助装置，属于盾构隧道工程领域，本发明通过在矿山法隧道底部浇筑混凝土导台，并在导台上预埋盾体滑行的轨道和反力横梁插槽，利用插槽和空推辅助装置实现盾构机在矿山法隧道内的快速空推施工，降低了风险，节约了成本，缩短了工期，为今后类似工程施工提供了有利的技术支撑，具有较大的推广价值，且效益显著。

title_abstract: DRIED SEAFOOD CONTAINING WATER-SOLUBLE CHITOSAN AND MANUFACTURING METHOD THEREOF
title_abstract_original: DRIED SEAFOOD CONTAINING WATER-SOLUBLE CHITOSAN AND MANUFACTURING METHOD THEREOF

title_abstract: Dried seafood containing water-soluble chitosan and manufacturing method thereof
title_abstract_original: Dried seafood containing water-soluble chitosan and manufacturing method thereof

title_abstract: Combined RFI rejection and intergrating two-section filter A combined RFI filter and low pass filter includes two sections, both of which serve as both radio frequency interference filters and low pass filters, or dc integrators. Both sections have substantially equal time constants and employ non-polarized capacitors.
title_abstract_original: Combined RFI rejection and intergrating two-section filter A combined RFI filter and low pass filter includes two sections, both of which serve as both radio frequency interference filters and low pass filters, or dc integrators. Both sections have substantially equal time constants and employ non-polarized capacitors.

title_abstract: House information processing method and system, and computer equipment The invention discloses a house information processing method and system, and computer equipment. The house information processing method comprises the steps of acquiring uploaded house information; acquiring house owner information according to the house information; judging whether the house owner information is matched with the house information or not; and when the house owner information is matched with the house information, binding the house information with the house owner information. The house information processing system comprises a house information acquisition module, a house owner information acquisition module, a house owner information authentication module and a house information binding module. According to the method and the system, the problems of tediousness and inconvenience due to the fact that a house owner needs to perform information collection and filling again when a house state is changed during release of house rental information at present are solved.
title_abstract_original: 房屋信息处理方法、系统及计算机设备 本申请公开了种房屋信息处理方法、系统及计算机设备。该房屋信息处理方法包括：获取上传的房屋信息；根据所述房屋信息获取房主信息；判断所述房主信息是否与所述房屋信息相匹配；当所述房主信息与所述房屋信息相匹配时，将所述房屋信息与所述房主信息进行绑定。该房屋信息处理系统包括：房屋信息获取模块、房主信息获取模块、房主信息认证模块以及房屋信息绑定模块。本申请解决了现有发布租房信息时当房屋状态发生变化，房主都要重新进行信息的采集和填写，造成的繁琐和不便的问题。

title_abstract: System and Method for Drafting Real-Estate Contracts A system and method prepare real-estate contracts by gather information using simple questions. Based on the answers, contract clauses are selected and added to the contract. Information such as legal description, tax information, and realtor information can be pulled from outside databases and included in the contract. Signature collection is automated and recorded. Effective dates of the contract are calculated based on the signatures. The system can export deadlines and contract information to closing agents. The result is “hard” contracts that do no fail for lack of signature, improper legal description, or being improperly filled-out.
title_abstract_original: System and Method for Drafting Real-Estate Contracts A system and method prepare real-estate contracts by gather information using simple questions. Based on the answers, contract clauses are selected and added to the contract. Information such as legal description, tax information, and realtor information can be pulled from outside databases and included in the contract. Signature collection is automated and recorded. Effective dates of the contract are calculated based on the signatures. The system can export deadlines and contract information to closing agents. The result is “hard” contracts that do no fail for lack of signature, improper legal description, or being improperly filled-out.

Verfahren zur interaktiven Konfiguration von Schließanlagen Die Erfindung betrifft ein Verfahren zur interaktiven Konfiguration von Schließanlagen bestehend aus unterschiedlichen Schließsystemen, Einzelteil-, Zylinder- und Schlüsselvarianten verschiedener Anbieter. Das Verfahren ermöglicht dem Anwender ohne weitergehendes fachliches Wissen eine einfache und schnelle Konfiguration von Schließanlagen mit einer übersichtlichen, leicht handhabbaren Variantenübersicht. Die Aufgabe der Erfindung besteht in der Schaffung eines Verfahrens zur Konfiguration von Schließanlagen, das weniger zeitaufwändig ist, keine fachlichen Vorkenntnisse beim Anwender erfordert, einen übersichtlichen Variantenvergleich ermöglicht und mit dem die Gesamtkosten optimiert werden können. Gelöst wird diese Aufgabe durch das geschaffene Verfahren, nach dem a) nach der Erstellung des Schließplanes durch Benennung der Türen, der Festlegung der Schließberechtigungen für die Schlüssel, der Schlüsselbezeichnungen und Festlegung der Stückzahlen für die Zylinder und Schlüssel, b) softwaregestützt die Schließanlagen- und Schlüsselfunktionen (Hauptschlüssel, Anlagenschlüssel) ermittelt sowie die erforderlichen Datenbankverbindungen für Preisvergleiche hergestellt werden und c) danach die Festlegung der Zylindertypen und Längen sowie die Einstellung der Not- und Gefahrfunktion vorgenommen wird. Vorteilhaft wird nach der Erstellung des Schließplanes eine softwaregestützte Verbindung zu den Datenbanken der Hersteller aufgebaut und die Daten der Hersteller den jeweiligen Datenarten zugeordnet sowie diese in einer Übersicht zwecks Auswahl angezeigt.

title_abstract: Planting method based on intelligent fishing villa The invention belongs to the technical field of Internet of Things, and provides a planting method based on an intelligent fishing villa, on the basis of not violating the legal use of rural land, a user side user (such as an urban consumer) obtains the decision-making right of operating land based on cooperation cost, and a land ownership side (such as a farmer) serves the user side user based on operating reward, so that the efficiency is improved. Therefore, a local ownership party is changed from a producer to a server, agriculture is transformed and upgraded from a first industry to a third industry, information sharing is realized, diversified planting cooperation requirements of users at a user side are met, and the users at the user side realize consumption-to-production, consumption-to-investment and consumption-to-experience. In addition, consumers using the intelligent fishing villa can use the fishing platform to fish, are clean and sanitary, can use a living room to rest, have a comfortable landing ground, and can use the network module to communicate and surf the internet. The intelligent fishing villa is comfortable and environmentally friendly, rural water resources and land are reasonably integrated, efficient and accurate butt joint of land information and urban consumption information is achieved, and rural land resources are activated.
title_abstract_original: 一种基于智能渔墅的种植方法 本发明属于物联网技术领域，提出的基于智能渔墅的种植方法，在不违背农村土地合法用途的基础上，让用户端用户(如城市消费者)基于合作费用获得经营土地的决策权，让土地权属方(如农民)基于经营报酬服务用户端用户，从而使得土地权属方从生产者变为服务者，让农业从第一产业向第三产业转型升级，同时实现信息共享，满足用户端用户多元化种植合作需求，让用户端用户实现消费即生产，消费即投资，消费即体验。另外，使用智能渔墅的消费者，能够利用钓台钓鱼，干净卫生，利用居室休息，有个舒适落脚地，利用网络模块通信上网等。智能渔墅舒适环保，将农村水资源与土地合理整合，实现土地信息与城市消费信息的高效精准对接，盘活农村土地资源。

title_abstract: Real Estate Investment System and Method of Controlling a Commercial System by Generating Key Investment Indicators A commerce system is controlled by collecting information related to property assets from members of the commerce system, storing the information in a database, determining a plurality of sale transaction values for the property asset based upon the information stored in the database, determining a plurality of key investment indicators from the sale transaction values, determining an investment rating based on the key investment indicators, and utilizing the key investment indicators and investment rating to control a decision to conduct a sale transaction for the property asset within the commerce system. The sale transaction values include offer price, fair market rent, taxes, Mello-Roos, insurance, homeowner association fees, property management fees, total expenses, downpayment, loan type, interest rate, and mortgage payment. The key investment indicators include net operating income, capitalization rate, debt service ratio, cash flow, cash-on-cash return, and return on investment.
title_abstract_original: Real Estate Investment System and Method of Controlling a Commercial System by Generating Key Investment Indicators A commerce system is controlled by collecting information related to property assets from members of the commerce system, storing the information in a database, determining a plurality of sale transaction values for the property asset based upon the information stored in the database, determining a plurality of key investment indicators from the sale transaction values, determining an investment rating based on the key investment indicators, and utilizing the key investment indicators and investment rating to control a decision to conduct a sale transaction for the property asset within the commerce system. The sale transaction values include offer price, fair market rent, taxes, Mello-Roos, insurance, homeowner association fees, property management fees, total expenses, downpayment, loan type, interest rate, and mortgage payment. The key investment indicators include net operating income, capitalization rate, debt service ratio, cash flow, cash-on-cash return, and return on investment.

title_abstract: House value prediction method, apparatus, compute device and storage medium The application relates to that field of smart city technology, The invention relates to a housing value forecasting method, a device, a computer equipment and a storage medium, which are applied tothe real estate industry. On the one hand, based on a housing price forecasting factor system, the housing value index and the housing value index which affect the housing value are accurately obtained and quantified and standardized to ensure the accuracy of variables and samples; On the other hand, we choose different machine learning training methods to construct forecasting model of house price, and choose the forecasting model of house price corresponding to the machine learning method with minimum average error as the optimal forecasting model of house price, so as to achieve accurate forecasting of house value.
title_abstract_original: 房屋价值预测方法、装置、计算机设备和存储介质 本申请涉及智慧城市技术领域，应用于房地产行业，特别涉及种房屋价值预测方法、装置、计算机设备和存储介质，其方面基于房价前瞻预测因子体系，准确获取影响房屋价值的指标以及房屋价值指数，并进行量化和标准化，确保变量和样本的准确；另方面，选择不同的机器学习方法训练构建房价前瞻预测模型，并选择平均误差最小的机器学习方法预测模型对应的房价前瞻预测模型为最优房价前瞻预测模型，实现对房屋价值的准确预测。

一种基于BSVC方法的城市土地利用变化模拟元胞自动机方法 本发明涉及一种基于BSVC方法的城市土地利用变化模拟元胞自动机方法。包括：1)对遥感影像进行监督分类，获得城市土地利用分类图；2)获取城市土地利用变化驱动因子数据，进行预处理；通过随机分层抽样方法获取土地利用图和驱动因子的有效样本点；3)利用贝叶斯空间变系数(BSVC)方法，对有效样本点进行训练获取元胞自动机的转化规则；4)根据BSVC已经建立的CA转化规则，获取城市土地利用转化概率；5)建立基于BSVC的CA模型(CABSVC)；6)利用CABSVC模型对城市土地利用进行模拟应用和验证分析，通过总体精度(OA)和图形优度(FOM)实现评估；7)输出并保存模拟结果。与现有技术相比，本发明具有更高的模拟精度和更好的城市土地利用变化模拟能力。

title_abstract: Real estate customer extension method and device and server The invention provides a real estate customer extension method and device and a server, and the method comprises the steps of obtaining a customer information library accessing a target building according to a set screening condition, and screening customers meeting the screening condition from the customer information library to serve as seed customers; screening out clients meeting screening conditions from a second client information base of the reference building to serve as a first expansion client set; taking each seed client and at least part of clients in the second client informationbase as a first to-be-processed client set, and performing clustering processing on the first to-be-processed client set according to a clustering algorithm to obtain K types of client sets; aiming atthe K types of client sets, determining a client set containing seed clients as a second client set to be processed, and taking other clients except the seed clients in the second client set to be processed as a second extended client set; and determining a target expansion client according to the first expansion client set and the second expansion client set. According to the present invention,the client expansion of the target building is realized, and the client resource utilization rate can be maximized.
title_abstract_original: 房地产拓客方法、装置及服务器 本发明提供种房地产拓客方法、装置及服务器，通过根据设定的筛选条件，获取访问过目标楼盘的客户信息库，从客户信息库中筛选出满足筛选条件的客户作为种子客户；从参考楼盘的第二客户信息库中，筛选出满足筛选条件的客户作为第拓展客户集；将各种子客户与第二客户信息库中的至少部分客户作为第待处理客户集，按照聚类算法对第待处理客户集进行聚类处理，得到K类客户集；针对K类客户集，确定包含种子客户的客户集作为第二待处理客户集，将第二待处理客户集中除种子客户外的其他客户作为第二拓展客户集；根据第拓展客户集与第二拓展客户集，确定目标拓展客户。实现了对目标楼盘的客户拓展，有利于客户资源利用率最大化。

title_abstract: Data distribution method and device, terminal and storage medium The embodiment of the invention provides a data distribution method and device, a terminal and a storage medium. The data distribution method comprises the steps of receiving data; responding to a preset operation event, pre-distributing the data; and in response to another preset operation event, allocating data or cancelling pre-allocation of the data. By adoption of the method disclosed by theinvention, the problem of preoccupation in traditional order grabbing can be avoided, it is ensured that the client is contacted and served at the first time, the user experience of the client in theplatform is improved, and the probability of conversion into a transaction is also improved.
title_abstract_original: 数据分配方法、装置、终端及存储介质 本公开的实施例提供了一种数据分配方法、装置、终端及存储介质。数据分配方法包括：接收数据；响应于预设操作事件，对数据进行预分配；响应于另一预设操作事件，对数据进行分配或取消预分配。通过采用本公开的方法，可以避免传统抢单中预占的问题，保证客户在第一时间被联系和服务，有助于提升客户在平台中的用户体验，也有利于提升转化成交的概率。

title_abstract: SYSTEM AND METHOD OF CALCULATING AN ACTUAL TRANSACTION MARKET CAPITALIZATION INDEX OF APARTMENT The present invention provides a method for calculating a market capitalization index of actual transaction prices of apartments to calculate an index capable of tracking a current market situation. According to the present invention, the method comprises: a first step of receiving actual transaction prices of a corresponding time of first apartments and calculating utility cost for each floor of the first apartments and second apartments; a second step of calculating available transaction prices of the second apartments by the formula of available transaction price of the second apartment = real transaction price of a corresponding time of the first apartment x (utility cost for each floor of the second apartment/corresponding utility cost for each floor of the first apartment); a third step of updating the actual transaction prices of a corresponding time of the first apartments with prices of the corresponding time of the first apartments, updating the available transaction prices of the corresponding time of the second apartments with values of the corresponding time of the second apartments, maintaining the values of a time just before the corresponding time of third apartments as the values of the corresponding time without modification, and summing the values of the corresponding time of index forming apartments to calculate the total value of the corresponding time; and a fourth step of calculating a ratio of the total values of the corresponding time to the total values of a reference time (t_1) of the index forming apartments as a market capitalization index of actual transactions price of the apartments.
title_abstract_original: 아파트 실거래 시가총액지수 산출 시스템 및 방법 상기 아파트 실거래가 시가총액지수지수 산출 방법은, 제1아파트들의 당해 시점 실거래가들을 입력 받고, 상기 제1아파트들 및 상기 제2아파트들의 층별효용비들을 산출하는 제1단계; 상기 제2아파트들의 거래가능가격들을 다음의 식에 의하여 산출하는 제2단계, 제2아파트의 거래가능가격 = 대응되는 당해 시점 제1아파트의 실거래가 * (제2아파트의 층별효용비/대응되는 제1아파트의 층별효용비); 상기 제1아파트들의 상기 당해 시점 실거래가들을 상기 제1아파트들의 상기 당해 시점의 가치로 업데이트하고, 상기 제2아파트들의 거래가능가격들을 상기 제2아파트들의 상기 당해 시점의 가치로 업데이트하고, 상기 제3아파트들의 상기 당해 시점 직전의 시점의 가치들을 상기 당해 시점의 가치로 그대로 유지하고, 상기 지수구성아파트들의 상기 당해 시점의 가치들을 합산하여 상기 당해 시점의 가치총액을 산출하는 제3단계; 및 상기 지수구성아파트들의 기준 시점(t1)의 가치총액 대비 당해 시점의 가치총액의 비를 상기 아파트 실거래가 시가총액지수지수로 산출하는 제4단계를; 포함하는 아파트 실거래가 시가총액지수지수 산출 방법을 제공할 수 있다.

title_abstract: METHOD FOR PROVIDING COLLATERALIZED LOAN PRODUCT DETERMINED USING USER INFORMATION, SERVER FOR PROVIDING COLLATERALIZED LOAN PRODUCT USING SAME, AND USER TERMINAL THEREFOR The present invention relates to a method for providing a collateralized loan product determined using user information, the method comprising the steps of: (a) in response to the purpose of a loan and the type of specific real estate to be provided as collateral, acquiring collateral information corresponding to the specific real estate; (b) in response to information of a user, acquiring the user's credit information and the user's income information; (c) generating user collateralized loan application information by referring to at least one of the type of specific real estate, the collateral information, the user's credit information, the user's income information, and a loan application amount; and (d) when at least one collateralized loan product, which is obtained by referring to the user collateralized loan application information and is providable to the user, is acquired from at least one financial institution terminal, transmitting the at least one collateralized loan product to the user terminal.
title_abstract_original: 사용자 정보를 이용하여 결정된 담보대출 상품을 제공하여 주는 방법 및 이를 이용한 담보대출 상품 제공 서버, 사용자 단말 사용자 정보를 이용하여 결정된 담보대출 상품을 제공하여 주는 방법에 있어서, (a) 대출목적 및 담보로 제공할 특정 부동산의 종류에 대응하여 상기 특정 부동산에 대응되는 담보 정보를 획득하는 단계; (b) 사용자 정보에 대응하여 상기 사용자의 신용 정보 및 상기 사용자의 소득 정보를 획득하는 단계; (c) 상기 특정 부동산의 종류, 상기 담보 정보, 상기 사용자의 신용 정보, 상기 사용자의 소득 정보, 및 상기 대출신청 금액 중 적어도 하나를 참조하여 사용자 담보대출 신청 정보를 생성하는 단계; 및 (d) 상기 사용자 담보대출 신청 정보를 참조한 상기 사용자에게 제공 가능한 적어도 하나의 담보대출 상품이 적어도 하나의 금융 기관 단말들로부터 획득되면, 상기 적어도 하나의 담보대출 상품을 상기 사용자 단말로 전송하여 주는 단계; 를 포함하는 방법에 관한 것이다.

title_abstract: METHOD FOR PROVIDING A SECURED LOAN DETERMINED BY USING USER INFORMATION AND SERVER AND USER TERMINAL BY USING SAME The present invention relates to a method for providing a secured loan determined by using user information to provide a secured loan suitable for a condition of a lender. According to the present invention, the method comprises the following steps: acquiring secure information corresponding to predetermined real estate; acquiring credit and income information of a user; generating secured loan application information of the user; and enabling the user to refer to at least one secured loan to select a desired secured loan.
title_abstract_original: 사용자 정보를 이용하여 결정된 담보대출 상품을 제공하여 주는 방법 및 이를 이용한 담보대출 상품 제공 서버, 사용자 단말 사용자 정보를 이용하여 결정된 담보대출 상품을 제공하여 주는 방법에 있어서, (a) 사용자 단말로부터 대출목적 및 담보로 제공할 특정 부동산의 종류가 획득되면, 담보대출 상품 제공 서버가, (i) 상기 특정 부동산의 종류가 부동산 시세 제공 서버에서 부동산 시세가 제공되는 종류인지 여부를 확인하여, (i-1) 상기 특정 부동산의 종류가 상기 부동산 시세 제공 서버에서 부동산 시세가 제공되는 종류일 경우에는, 상기 사용자 단말로 상기 특정 부동산의 특정 위치 정보 및 상기 특정 부동산의 특정 상세 정보를 요청하고, 상기 사용자 단말로부터 획득되는 상기 특정 위치 정보 및 상기 특정 상세 정보를 참조하여 상기 부동산 시세 제공 서버로부터 상기 특정 부동산의 특정 부동산 시세를 획득하고, (i-2) 상기 특정 부동산의 종류가 상기 부동산 시세 제공 서버에서 상기 부동산 시세가 제공되는 종류가 아닐 경우에는, 상기 사용자 단말로 상기 특정 위치 정보, 상기 특정 상세 정보, 및 상기 특정 부동산의 예상 부동산 시세를 요청하여 상기 사용자 단말로부터 상기 특정 위치 정보, 상기 특정 상세 정보, 및 상기 예상 부동산 시세를 획득하며, (ii) 상기 사용자 단말로 상기 특정 부동산에 대응되는 채권 정보를 요청하여 상기 사용자 단말로부터 상기 채권 정보를 획득함으로써, 상기 특정 부동산에 대응되는 담보 정보를 획득하는 단계; (b) 상기 사용자 단말로부터 사용자 정보가 획득되면, 상기 담보대출 상품 제공 서버가, 상기 사용자 정보를 이용하여 사용자의 신용 정보 및 상기 사용자의 기대출 정보를 확인하며, 상기 사용자 단말로 대출신청 금액을 요청하여 상기 사용자 단말로부터 상기 사용자가 원하는 대출신청 금액을 획득하고, 상기 사용자 단말로 기설정된 직업군 중 상기 사용자의 직업을 선택하도록 요청하며, 상기 사용자 단말로부터 상기 사용자의 특정 직업이 획득되면, 상기 사용자 단말로 상기 특정 직업에 대응되는 소득 정보를 요청하여 상기 사용자 단말로부터 상기 사용자의 소득 정보를 획득함으로써, 상기 사용자의 신용 정보 및 상기 사용자의 소득 정보를 획득하는 단계; (c) 상기 담보대출 상품 제공 서버가, 상기 특정 부동산의 종류, 상기 담보 정보, 상기 사용자의 신용 정보, 상기 사용자의 소득 정보, 및 상기 대출신청 금액 중 적어도 하나를 참조하여 사용자 담보대출 신청 정보를 생성하는 단계; 및 (d) 상기 사용자 담보대출 신청 정보를 참조한 상기 사용자에게 제공 가능한 적어도 하나의 담보대출 상품이 적어도 하나의 금융 기관 단말들로부터 획득되면, 상기 담보대출 상품 제공 서버가, 상기 적어도 하나의 담보대출 상품을 상기 사용자 단말로 전송함으로써 상기 사용자가 상기 적어도 하나의 담보대출 상품들을 참조하여 원하는 담보대출 상품을 선택할 수 있도록 하는 단계; 를 포함하는 방법에 관한 것이다.

title_abstract: BUILDING FACILITY EVALUATION DEVICE AND PROGRAM To make it possible to evaluate necessity of renovating a facility with the aiming of saving energy more correctly.SOLUTION: A building installation evaluation device 10 has: a daily power consumption estimation unit 13 that lets OA instrument power consumption on each day calculated based on the number of staying persons and an OA instrument coefficient every unit time for each building of an evaluation object within a prescribed period be exclusion power consumption, subtracts the exclusion power consumption from power consumption on each day of an entire building, and calculates daily power consumption; an index calculation unit 14 that calculates a ratio of power consumption of respective air conditioning facilities and illumination facilities of the building to power consumption in the entire building as an air conditioning index and illumination index on the basis of the daily power consumption within the prescribed period and a total floor area of the building; and an evaluation unit 15 that evaluates necessity of renovating the air conditioning facility and illumination facility installed in the building on the basis of the calculated indexes.SELECTED DRAWING: Figure 1
title_abstract_original: 建物設備評価装置及びプログラム 【課題】省エネを目的とした設備の改修の必要性をより正しく評価できるようにする。【解決手段】ビル設備評価装置１０は、所定期間内において評価対象のビル毎に、単位時間毎の所在人数及びＯＡ機器係数に基づき算出した各日のＯＡ機器消費電力量を除外消費電力量とし、ビル全体の各日の消費電力量から減算することで日別消費電力量を算出する日別消費電力量推定部１３と、所定期間内における日別消費電力量及びビルの延床面積に基づき当該ビルの空調設備及び照明設備それぞれの消費電力量が、ビル全体における消費電力量の占める割合を空調指標及び照明指標として算出する指標算出部１４と、算出された指標に基づきビルに設置の空調設備及び照明設備の改修の必要性を評価する評価部１５と、を有する。【選択図】図１

title_abstract: BUILDING FACILITY EVALUATION DEVICE AND PROGRAM A building facility evaluation device (10) comprises: a daily power consumption amount estimation unit (13) that calculates a daily power consumption amount for each building to be evaluated during a prescribed period by setting an OA equipment power consumption amount for each day, which is calculated on the basis of the number of people present in each unit time and an OA equipment coefficient, as an excluded power consumption amount, and then subtracting this excluded power consumption amount from a power consumption amount for each day of the entire building; an index calculation unit (14) that calculates, as an air conditioning index and an illumination index, on the basis of the daily power consumption amount during the prescribed period and a total floor area of the building, a ratio of the power consumption amount of air conditioning facilities and that of illumination facilities of the building, respectively, relative to the power consumption amount of the entire building; and an evaluation unit (15) that evaluates, on the basis of the calculated indexes, the necessity of repairing the air conditioning facilities and illumination facilities installed in the building.
title_abstract_original: 建物設備評価装置及びプログラム ビル設備評価装置（１０）は、所定期間内において評価対象のビル毎に、単位時間毎の所在人数及びＯＡ機器係数に基づき算出した各日のＯＡ機器消費電力量を除外消費電力量とし、ビル全体の各日の消費電力量から減算することで日別消費電力量を算出する日別消費電力量推定部（１３）と、所定期間内における日別消費電力量及びビルの延床面積に基づき当該ビルの空調設備及び照明設備それぞれの消費電力量が、ビル全体における消費電力量の占める割合を空調指標及び照明指標として算出する指標算出部（１４）と、算出された指標に基づきビルに設置の空調設備及び照明設備の改修の必要性を評価する評価部（１５）と、を有する。

title_abstract: Self-checking method applied to natural resources The invention provides a self-checking method applied to natural resources, and relates to the field of natural resource approval. The self-checking method applied to natural resources comprises the steps of uploading report content, checking whether the report content occupies cultivated land or not, checking whether the report content has a land violation behavior or not, checking whether the report content meets a land utilization index or not, and checking whether the report content is complete or not. Judging whether the report content contains approval of a low-hill gentle slope land ornot, and examining whether the approval is located in the low-hill gentle slope land or not; collecting land change data, and reviewing the report content according to the land change data; displayinga land approval situation by utilizing the geographic image according to the report content, and displaying a land utilization situation by utilizing the geographic image according to the land changedata; and examining whether the newspaper content has approval authority or not. The approval period can be shortened, so that the approval efficiency of natural resources is improved.
title_abstract_original: 一种应用于自然资源的自检方法 本发明提出了一种应用于自然资源的自检方法，涉及自然资源审批领域。一种应用于自然资源的自检方法，包含上传报件内容，审查上述报件内容是否占用耕地，审查上述报件内容是否具有土地违规行为，审查上述报件内容是否符合土地利用指标，还包含审查上述报件内容是否完整；判断上述报件内容是否包含低丘缓坡地的审批，并审查上述审批是否坐落于低丘缓坡地；采集土地变更数据，并根据上述土地变更数据审查上述报件内容；利用地理图像根据上述报件内容显示土地报批情况，利用地理图像根据上述土地变更数据显示土地利用情况；审查上述报件内容是否具有报批权限。本发明能够缩短报批周期，从而提高自然资源的审批效率。

title_abstract: House resource recommendation method and house resource recommendation system The invention discloses a housing resource recommendation method. The recommendation method comprises the steps of obtaining housing resource information and behavior information of a user; generatinguser preference information based on the house resource information and the behavior information; obtaining a first preset algorithm and preset matrix information, and processing the first preset algorithm based on the user preference information and the preset matrix information to obtain a processed algorithm; obtaining similar house resource information based on the processed algorithm; and screening the similar house resource information to obtain corresponding recommended house resource information. The invention further discloses a house resource recommendation system. The traditional recommendation method is improved, and the house resource information most matched with the actual demand of the user is recommended to the user in combination with the personalized demand of the user,so that the personalized demand of the user is met, the recommendation accuracy is improved, and the user experience is improved.
title_abstract_original: 房源的推荐方法及房源的推荐系统 本发明公开了一种房源的推荐方法，所述推荐方法包括：获取房源信息和用户的行为信息；基于所述房源信息和所述行为信息生成用户偏好信息；获取第一预设算法和预设矩阵信息，并基于所述用户偏好信息和所述预设矩阵信息对所述第一预设算法进行处理以获得处理后算法；基于所述处理后算法获取相似房源信息；对所述相似房源信息进行筛选以获得对应的推荐房源信息。本发明还公开了一种房源的推荐系统。通过对传统的推荐方法进行改进，结合用户的个性化需求向用户推荐与用户实际需求最匹配的房源信息，从而满足了用户的个性化需求，提高了推荐的精确性，提高了用户体验。

title_abstract: Method for isolating xylanase gene sequences from soil DNA, compositions useful in such method and compositions obtained thereby Xylanase DNA is recovered from soil by PCR amplification using degenerate primers. Because of the complexity of the soil samples, it is likely that the recovered product will include more than one species of polynucleotide. These recovered copies may be cloned into a host organism to produce additional copies of each individual species prior to characterization by sequencing. Recovered DNA which is found to vary from known xylanases can be used in several ways to facilitate production of novel xylanases for industrial application. First, the recovered DNA, or probes corresponding to portions thereof, can be used as a probe to screen DNA libraries and recover intact xylanase genes including the unique regions of the recovered DNA. Second, the recovered DNA or polynucleotides corresponding to portions thereof, can be inserted into a known xylanase gene to produce a recombinant xylanase gene with the sequence variations of the recovered DNA.

title_abstract: Fireproofing system for structures, in particular for tunnel walls The invention relates to a fireproofing system for structures, in particular for tunnel walls, having a heat-insulating and fire-resistant lining which is arranged on the tunnel wall, consists of insulating materials and is delimited towards the interior of the tunnel by a self-supporting shell. In the case of said fireproofing system, this shell is formed from prefabricated individual elements which are connected to one another in a flexurally rigid manner and are connected to the tunnel wall in an impact-absorbing manner.
title_abstract_original: BRANDSCHUTZSYSTEM FUER BAUTEN, INSBESONDERE FUER TUNNELBAUWANDUNGEN The invention relates to a fireproofing system for structures, in particular for tunnel walls, having a heat-insulating and fire-resistant lining which is arranged on the tunnel wall, consists of insulating materials and is delimited towards the interior of the tunnel by a self-supporting shell. In the case of said fireproofing system, this shell is formed from prefabricated individual elements which are connected to one another in a flexurally rigid manner and are connected to the tunnel wall in an impact-absorbing manner.

title_abstract: METHOD AND CIRCUIT FOR COLOR SIGNAL DEMODULATION PURPOSE: To obtain a chrominance signal demodulating circuit and method for demodulating a chrominance signal corresponding to different color sub- carrier frequencies by simple hardware. CONSTITUTION: A chrominance signal inputted by using a Hilbert converter 161 is π/2 delayed, and inputted chrominance signals C and C' and carrier signals sin ωsc t and cos ωsc t for demodulation generated by a carrier generator 140 are multiplied 162-165, and then added 166 and 168. Then, a desired base band color difference signal is demodulated by using the result.

title_abstract: Color signal demodulation circuit and method therefor A color signal demodulation circuit demodulates a color signal in correspondence with different chrominance subcarrier frequencies. The input color signal is delayed by pi /2 using a so-called Hilbert transformer and the carrier signal for use in the demodulation is generated from a carrier generator. The input color signal and the carrier signal are selectively multiplied and added so as to demodulate a color difference signal of the desired baseband, to thereby correspond to the chrominance subcarriers having different frequencies while simplifying the hardware. A method for demodulating the chrominance signal, which method is particularly adapted to the demodulation circuit is also detailed.

title_abstract_original: 색신호 복조기 이 발명은 색신호 복조기에 있어서, 색부 반송파 주파수가 서로 다른 경우에 하드웨어의 수정없이 계수치 변경만으로도 색복조가 가능한 색신호 복조기에 관한것이다. 종래의 색신호 복조기는 복조하려는 색신호의 색부 반송파에 따라 각각 다른 로우 패스 필터가 복조기 후단에 필요하게 되므로 여러가지 주파수를 복조해야 할 경우 로우 패스 필터를 바꾸어 주어야하는 하드웨어 설계상의 문제점이 있었으나, 이 발명에 따른 색신호 복조기에 따르면 색복조부에 힐버트 변환기를 이용해 입력되는 색신호를 /2 지연시켜 입력된 색신호와 변환된 색신호와 캐리어 발생부로부터 입력되는 복조용 캐리어신호를 곱셈기와 가산기를 이용해 원하는 색차신호를 얻어낸다. 따라서 영상기기의 색신호 복조에 적용된다.

title_abstract: Improvements in or relating to pit props or the like 322,619. Williams, M., and Williams, M, J. Nov. 13, 1928. Mine props -Telesoopic props of the type in which an inverted cone is held in position around two telescoping tubes by means of wedges placed between the inner member and the cone, have the wedges and cone member secured together by slotted pins H passing through apertures, in flanges C<1>, D<1> provided on the cone member and wedges, respectively, and secured by cotters I. The base of the prop may be formed as a cap H and the head as a cap K, which may be adjusted by a cross wedge G passing through the slots in the tubular member and in a surrounding sleeve F.

title_abstract: Construction method of endo-beta-glucanase suitable for high-temperature granulation of feed The invention discloses a construction method of endo-beta-glucanase suitable for feed high-temperature granulation, and belongs to the technical field of genetic engineering. The invention discloses a construction method of endo-beta-glucanase suitable for high-temperature granulation of feed. The construction method comprises the following steps: amplifying a target gene; carrying out enzyme digestion, connection and transformation; iPTG is utilized to induce expression of a target gene, and a protein crude enzyme solution is obtained through ultrasonication; and purifying the protein crude enzyme liquid by adopting a Ni-NTA purification medium. The beta-glucanase with high thermal stability is obtained through directed evolution, the specific enzyme activity is 91.6 U/mg, the half-life period at 90 DEG C is 1.5 h, and the beta-glucanase has huge potential in application in the field of feed.
title_abstract_original: 一种适合饲料高温制粒的内切β-葡聚糖酶的构建方法 本发明公开了一种适合饲料高温制粒的内切β‑葡聚糖酶的构建方法，属于基因工程技术领域。本发明公开的一种适合饲料高温制粒的内切β‑葡聚糖酶的构建方法，包括目的基因扩增；酶切、连接和转化；利用IPTG诱导目的基因的表达，经超声破碎获得蛋白粗酶液；采用Ni‑NTA纯化介质对蛋白粗酶液进行纯化。本发明通过定向进化，得到一个具有高度热稳定性的β‑葡聚糖酶，比酶活为91.6U/mg，在90℃半衰期为1.5h，该酶在饲料领域应用具有巨大潜力。

title_abstract: Oil and gas well device
title_abstract_original: Oil and gas well device

title_abstract: Oil pumping device The invention discloses an oil pumping device which comprises an oil well pump and a gas anchor which are sequentially connected in series. The oil well pump comprises a pump cylinder assembly, a plunger assembly and a fixing valve assembly. Both the plunger assembly and the fixing valve assembly are located in the pump cylinder assembly. The gas anchor connected with the oil well pump comprises a center pipe, an inner pipe arranged outside the center pipe in a sleeving manner and an outer pipe arranged outside the inner pipe in a sleeving manner. A first sand setting annulus is arranged between the center pipe and the inner pipe. An oil inflow annulus is arranged between the outer pipe and the inner pipe. Oil inflow meshes communicating with the oil inflow annulus are formed in the outer pipe. The lower end of the center pipe and the lower end of the inner pipe are connected through a first two-way joint. The interior of the center pipe communicates with the oil inflow annulus through the first two-way joint to form an oil inflow channel. The oil inflow channel and the first sand setting annulus are separated through the first two-way joint.
title_abstract_original: 抽油装置 本申请公开种抽油装置，包括顺序串接的抽油泵和气锚；其中，所述抽油泵包括泵筒组件、柱塞组件、固定凡尔组件；所述柱塞组件及所述固定凡尔组件均位于所述泵筒组件内；连接所述抽油泵的所述气锚包括中心管、套设于中心管外的内管、以及套设于内管外的外管；所述中心管与所述内管之间设有第沉砂环空；所述外管与所述内管之间设有进油环空；所述外管上设有通入所述进油环空的进油筛孔；所述中心管的下端与所述内管的下端通过第双通接头连接；所述中心管的内部与所述进油环空通过所述第双通接头连通形成进油通道，所述第双通接头将所述进油通道与所述第沉砂环空隔开。

Computerimplementiertes Verfahren zum Optimieren einer Gebäudeinfrastruktur. Bei einem computerimplementierten Verfahren zum Optimieren einer Gebäudeinfrastruktur (1), wobei die Gebäudeinfrastruktur (1) eine Mehrzahl an Infrastrukturkomponenten (2.1, 2.2) umfasst, umfasst das Verfahren einen Modellierungsprozess (P1), innerhalb dessen ein Computermodell (4) der Gebäudeinfrastruktur (1) erstellt wird, wobei jeder Infrastrukturkomponente (2.1, 2.2) eine eindeutige Identifikationsnummer (3.1, 3.2) zugewiesen wird. Das Verfahren kann einen Betriebsoptimierungsprozess umfassen, innerhalb dessen im Computerprogramm ein virtueller Infrastrukturparameter einer Infrastrukturkomponente (2.1, 2.2) modifiziert wird, und anschliessend der entsprechende reale Infrastrukturparameter entsprechend modifiziert wird.

АНТИТЕЛА, РАСПОЗНАЮЩИЕ ТАУ В настоящем изобретении предложены антитела, которые специфично связываются с тау. Антитела ингибируют или отсрочивают связанные с тау патологии и связанные ухудшения симптомов.

一体式带管嘴病毒采样提取管 本发明涉及一种带管嘴一体式病毒采样提取管，包含管身（1）和管盖（2）两大部分。管身（1）的空腔（11）上有一带斜度的凹槽（111），管身（1）的端面（12）上有一带斜度的凹槽（121），两个凹槽（111）和（121）连通在一起，起着管嘴的作用。采用上述结构的提取管通过一次注塑成型完成生产，无后续组装工序，生产效率高，成本低；同时用户在使用产品时，只需打开管盖，倾斜管身，病毒溶液即可从管嘴滴出，整个操作非常简单、方便和人性化。

title_abstract: Controllable antenna arrays for wireless communications Examples disclosed herein describe an antenna architecture (e.g., a planar electronically steered antenna architecture) that enables operation at low elevation angles, down to zero degrees from the satellite. The proposed ‘3SA’ architecture may improve power consumption and array footprints. The proposed ‘3SA’ architecture can support aero terminal implementation on aircraft, enabling the use of GEO, MEO and LEO satellites even in regions having low elevation angles. The architecture may include a horizontal antenna array and vertical antenna array as well as a controller for switching between the antenna arrays.

title_abstract: APPARATUS FOR DETECTING BITE OF FISH PURPOSE: A device for detecting a bite of fishes is provided to inform a far-off fisher that fishing line reaches an objective point and a fish bites a bait by generating an alarm. CONSTITUTION: An apparatus for detecting a bite of a fish comprises a main device, a distance measurement device for accurately measuring the distance of a fishing line released from a fishing ship, and a wireless pager. The main device consists of a power source, a connector connected to the distance measurement device, an input inquiry part, a detection part, a display part, a night lamp switch, an alarm generating part, a wireless transmitter for transmitting signals to the wireless pager, a control part, a body, and a body support stay.

title_abstract: Recipe for Cabbage Kimchi added with raw ginseng extracts The present invention relates to a method of preparing cabbage kimchi added with raw ginseng extracts. More specifically, the method of preparing cabbage kimchi added with raw ginseng extracts comprises the following steps of: dividing cabbage into four parts, washing the cabbage salted in salted water (14 to 16% of salinity) three times of the weight of the cabbage for four to six hours with purified water for two to four times, and repelling water from the washed cabbage for 20 to 40 minutes; trimming raw ginseng, washing the same, removing moisture therefrom, and cutting the raw ginseng into about 3.0 to 5.0 cm; mixing red pepper powder in kelp water of 40 to 60°C, cooling the mixture at a room temperature, adding radish strips, radish juice, salted shrimp, sand lance extract, apple juice, sesame, salt, garlic, ginger and artificial sweeteners to the mixture, mixing the same well, adding processed raw ginseng, and mixing the processed raw ginseng with seasonings; and inserting mixed raw ginseng seasonings to the intervals of the salted cabbage, putting the cabbage into a plastic bag for storing kimchi, putting the plastic bag into a sealed container for kimchi, and storing the sealed container in a refrigerator for kimchi. According to the present invention, raw ginseng contains saponin and sterol components like ginseng to be used for medicinal drugs for tonic, bronchitis, and chronic obstructive pulmonary disease, and contains sufficient mineral and vitamin such as calcium, phosphorus, and iron, and particularly, amino acid components such as glycine, cysteine, phenylalanine and the like, thereby improving taste when added to kimchi, and extending preservability.
title_abstract_original: 수삼 추출물을 첨가한 배추 김치의 제조방법 본 발명은 수삼 추출물을 첨가한 배추 김치의 제조방법에 관한 것이다. 보다 상세하게는 배추를 4등분하여 배추 무게의 3배 소금물(염도 14∼16％)에 4∼6시간 염지시킨 배추를 정제수에 2∼4회 세척한 후 20∼40분간 발수시키는 단계와, 수삼을 손질하여 세척한 후 물기를 제거하고 약 3.0∼5.0cm로 절단하여 준비하는 단계와, 고춧가루를 40∼60℃의 다시마물에 섞고 실온으로 냉각시켜 무채, 무즙, 새우젓, 까나리 액젓, 사과즙, 깨, 소금, 마늘, 생강 및 인공감미료를 넣고 잘 혼합시킨 후 가공된 수삼을 넣고 양념들과 섞는 단계와, 섞은 수삼 양념을 절인배추의 사이사이에 넣고 김치 보관용 비닐봉지에 담은 후 김치용 밀폐용기에 넣고 김치 냉장고에 보관하는 단계로 구성된다. 본 발명의 수삼은 인삼과 같은 사포닌과 스테롤 성분이 함유되어 강장제나 기관지염 및 해소병의 약재로 이용되며 칼슘, 인, 철분과 같은 무기질과 비타민이 풍부하고, 특히 항암작용이 있는 글리신, 시스테인, 페닐알라닌 등의 아미노산 성분이 있어 김치에 첨가했을 때 맛을 좋게 하고, 보존성을 연장시킬 수 있다.

title_abstract: Grading of Breast Cancer Methods and compositions for the identification of breast cancer grade signatures are provided. The signature profiles are identified based upon multiple sampling of reference breast tissue samples from independent cases of breast cancer and provide a reliable set of molecular criteria for identification of cells as being in one or more particular stages and/or grades of breast cancer.

title_abstract: Biomarkers for breast cancer Methods and compositions are provided for the detection of breast cancer based upon the identification of three biomarkers for non-normal breast cells. The biomarkers were identified based upon multiple sampling of reference breast tissue samples from independent cases of breast cancer. Two biomarkers display increased expression in non-normal cells while the third biomarker displays decreased expression in non-normal cells.

title_abstract: Method and apparatus for tracking signals In one aspect of the present invention, a method and apparatus are provided for tracking a plurality of frequency-shift-key modulated signals in a communications device. The method includes determining a first threshold value for a first input signal of the plurality of signals, comparing the first input signal to the first threshold value and providing a first output signal. The method includes determining a second threshold value for a second input signal of the plurality of signals, and retaining at least a portion of the first threshold value while determining the second threshold value.
title_abstract_original: Method and apparatus for tracking signals In one aspect of the present invention, a method and apparatus are provided for tracking a plurality of frequency-shift-key modulated signals in a communications device. The method includes determining a second threshold value for a second input signal of the plurality of signals, and retaining at least a portion of the first threshold value while determining the second threshold value.

title_abstract: Fragrant and sweet instant dehydrated lotus root slices and preparation method thereof The invention discloses fragrant and sweet instant dehydrated lotus root slices and a preparation method thereof. The fragrant and sweet instant dehydrated lotus root slices are prepared from 70-80 parts by weight of lotus root, 7-8 parts by weight of sticky candy, 3-4 parts by weight of jasmine flower, 2-3 parts by weight of rose, 1-2 parts by weight of mulberry leaf, 4-6 parts by weight of prunella vulgaris, 3-4 parts by weight of green tea, 5-7 parts by weight of flower of official magnolia, 2-3 parts by weight of Borreria stricta, 1-2 parts by weight of seed of cowherb, 3-4 parts by weight of Zornia gibbosa, 85-90 parts by weight of cola and 5-7 parts by weight of corn oil. The fragrant and sweet instant dehydrated lotus root slices can be prepared by simple processes, are convenient for eating and have a unique local flavor and a fragrant and sweet taste. In processing, a plurality of Chinese herbal medicines are used so that the fragrant and sweet instant dehydrated lotus root slices are rich in nutrients, have effects of transforming dampness and regulating the middle warmer, rectifying qi and resolving depression, reducing blood sugar and blood pressure, clearing liver and purging fire, and invigorating blood circulation and freeing the channels, and are natural and leisure health foods.
title_abstract_original: Fragrant and sweet instant dehydrated lotus root slices and preparation method thereof The invention discloses fragrant and sweet instant dehydrated lotus root slices and a preparation method thereof. The fragrant and sweet instant dehydrated lotus root slices are prepared from 70-80 parts by weight of lotus root, 7-8 parts by weight of sticky candy, 3-4 parts by weight of jasmine flower, 2-3 parts by weight of rose, 1-2 parts by weight of mulberry leaf, 4-6 parts by weight of prunella vulgaris, 3-4 parts by weight of green tea, 5-7 parts by weight of flower of official magnolia, 2-3 parts by weight of Borreria stricta, 1-2 parts by weight of seed of cowherb, 3-4 parts by weight of Zornia gibbosa, 85-90 parts by weight of cola and 5-7 parts by weight of corn oil. The fragrant and sweet instant dehydrated lotus root slices can be prepared by simple processes, are convenient for eating and have a unique local flavor and a fragrant and sweet taste. In processing, a plurality of Chinese herbal medicines are used so that the fragrant and sweet instant dehydrated lotus root slices are rich in nutrients, have effects of transforming dampness and regulating the middle warmer, rectifying qi and resolving depression, reducing blood sugar and blood pressure, clearing liver and purging fire, and invigorating blood circulation and freeing the channels, and are natural and leisure health foods.

title_abstract: A method of removing oligomers and slow monomer from leukocute interferon (IFN- alpha ) having high sequence homology with human leukocyte interferon which method comprises: a) incubating a buffer solution containing 1-20 mg/ml of IFN- alpha at a pH between 3 and approximately 4.8 for 30 minutes-24 hours at 28-40 DEG C to precipitate oligomers and slow monomer followed by; b) recovering native IFN- alpha .

鉴定双价抗除草剂基因棉花GGK2分子标记及应用 本发明属于转基因植物检测领域，具体公开了用于鉴定双价抗除草剂基因棉花品系GGK2及其衍生系的特异的2个分子标记，该分子标记分别由SEQ ID NO:1和SEQ ID NO:2所示的核苷酸序列组成。本发明还公开了用于扩增分子标记的特异性引物，以及本发明分子标记和特异性引物的用途。本发明为双价抗除草剂基因棉花品系GGK2或其衍生材料的检测鉴定提供了准确、可靠的分子标记和特异性引物，为转基因安全提供了保证；其次，本发明检测方法简单、检测速度快，适宜于在转基因作物遗传育种中对杂交后代中对双价抗除草剂基因的纯合/杂合体育种材料进行大规模地进行鉴定和筛选，有助于缩短育种进程，降低育种成本。

title_abstract: Molecular marker for identifying bivalent herbicide resistance gene cotton GGK2 and application of molecular marker The invention belongs to the field of detection of genetically modified plants, and particularly discloses 2 molecular markers for identifying the specificity of bivalent herbicide resistance gene cotton strains GGK2 and derived lines. Each molecular marker consists of nucleotide sequences as shown in SEQ ID NO: 1 and SEQ ID NO: 2. The invention further discloses specific primers for amplifying the molecular markers, and purposes of the molecular markers and the specific primers. Accurate and reliable molecular markers and specific primers are provided for detection and identification of the bivalent herbicide resistance gene cotton strains GGK2 or derived materials thereof, and transgenic safety is guaranteed; then the detection method is simple, the detection speed is high, large-scale identification and screening are appropriately performed on homozygosis/heterozygote breeding materials in bivalent herbicide resistance genes in filial generations in heredity and breeding of genetically modified crops, shortening of a breeding process is facilitated, and the breeding cost is reduced.

title_abstract: ANALYSIS OF SOCIAL MEDIA MESSAGES In a method for analyzing social media messages, the method includes one or more processors analyzing social media messages utilizing a set of topics and keywords associated with a brand. The method further includes one or more processors identifying social media messages that include information relating to the brand utilizing the analysis of social media messages utilizing the set of topics and keywords. The method further includes one or more processors determining relevancy scores for the identified social media messages that provide an indication of the percentage likelihood that a social media message is related to the brand. The method further includes one or more processors determining one or more recommendations of social media users associated with social media messages based on the determined relevancy scores.

title_abstract: OVERFLOW DRILL BALL VALVE FIELD: soil or rock drilling.SUBSTANCE: invention relates to overflow devices of a drill string with a screw downhole motor. Valve consists of cylinder case with stepped hole and radial (overflow) hole. There can be several overflow holes. Holder in form of a segment is installed, for example, in the stepped hole of the case. Cartridge is made of a cylindrical cavity in which a saddle, a ball, a conical return spring located below the seat, a cylindrical pusher, installed between the ball and the conical spring are installed. One end of the conical spring with a smaller diameter is mounted on a centering projection formed on the bottom of the pusher, and the other end of the spring with a large diameter is mounted with support on the bottom of the cage. Longitudinal centering ribs are formed on the outer surface of the upper part of the cylindrical pusher, forming longitudinal channels for the flow of liquid with the inner surface of the saddle. Saddle is installed in a stepped hole of the cylindrical cavity and clamped by a limiter made in the form of a cage, which is installed in the cage, for example, using a threaded connection. Threaded radial hole coaxial to the radial hole of the case for flow of liquid is made in the holder. Screw with filtering holes and a hole for flow of liquid is screwed into the holder through the radial hole of the case. Screw maintains the holder in radial and axial directions.EFFECT: technical result is improvement of reliability and service life of the valve.2 cl, 3 dwg
title_abstract_original: Клапан буровой переливной шариковый Изобретение относится к переливным устройствам бурильной колонны с винтовым забойным двигателем. Клапан содержит цилиндрический корпус со ступенчатым отверстием и радиальным (переливным) отверстием. Радиальных отверстий может быть несколько. В ступенчатом отверстии корпуса установлена обойма, выполненная, например, в виде сегмента. В обойме выполнена цилиндрическая полость, в которой установлены седло, шар, коническая возвратная пружина, размещенная ниже седла, цилиндрический толкатель, установленный между шаром и конической пружиной. Один конец конической пружины с меньшим диаметром установлен на центрирующем выступе, выполненном на основании нижней части толкателя, а другой конец пружины с большим диаметром установлен с опорой на дно обоймы. На наружной поверхности верхней части цилиндрического толкателя выполнены продольные центрирующие ребра, образующие с внутренней поверхностью седла продольные каналы для протока жидкости. Седло установлено в ступенчатом отверстии цилиндрической полости и зажато ограничителем, выполненным в виде клетки, которая установлена в обойме, например, с помощью резьбового соединения. В обойме выполнено резьбовое радиальное отверстие соосно радиальному отверстию корпуса для протока жидкости. В обойму через радиальное отверстие корпуса ввинчен винт с фильтрующими отверстиями и отверстием для протока жидкости. Винт удерживает обойму в радиальном и осевом направлениях. Технический результат заключается в повышении надежности и ресурса работы клапана. 2 з.п. ф-лы, 3 ил.

title_abstract: NICAM encoder featuring synchronization of a NICAM processor with front-end input and output sections A NICAM encoder ( 54 ) comprises a NICAM processor ( 82 ) and a front-end section ( 80,84 ) coupled to the NICAM processor. The front-end section is configured for operating with a system clock ( 68 ) that is integer divisible such that the system clock can be used by both the NICAM processor ( 82 ) and the front-end section ( 80,84 ).

title_abstract: Property management system The invention discloses a property management system comprising a central management system, a resident management system, a charging management system, a garbage processing system, a parking lot management system, a monitoring alarm system, and a complaint supervision system; the property management system can make unified management for resident property fee, utilities, gas fee, and parking fee,and can realize uniform endcount. The garbage management system can automatically recover, dump and process garbage, thus preventing environment pollution caused by untimeliness processing of overloaded garbage, and keeping a sanitary environment; sanitation personnel can only maintain the dustbins, thus greatly reducing working intensity of the sanitation personnel; the parking management systemcan fast find carports, thus facilitating parking. The property management system can realize uniform intelligent management of the community properties, thus improving the community property servicelevel and quality.
title_abstract_original: 种物业管理系统 本发明公开了种物业管理系统，包括中央管理系统、住户管理系统、收费管理系统、垃圾处理系统、停车场管理系统、监控报警系统、投诉监督系统。本发明对住户的物业费、水电费、燃气费、停车费等进行统管理，统结算；本发明的垃圾管理系统可以实现垃圾的自动回收、倾倒和处理，避免了垃圾装满时因没有及时处理造成的环境污染，有利于保持环境卫生，且保洁人员只需要对垃圾桶进行维护，可大大减少保洁人员的工作强度；本发明的停车场管理系统有利于快速找到停车位，方便停车。本发明对社区物业进行统智能化管理，有利于提高社区物业服务水平和质量。

System zur Sequenzierung von Nukleinsäuren in Fluidschaum Durchflusszelle, umfassendeinen ternären Komplex, der innerhalb eines Durchflusszellenkanals immobilisiert ist, wobei der ternäre Komplex eine Polymerase, eine geprimete Matrizen-Nukleinsäure und ein nächstes richtiges Nukleotid für die Matrize aufweist; undeinen Fluidschaum, der mit dem ternären Komplex in dem Durchflusszellenkanal in Kontakt steht, wobei der Fluidschaum eine Vielzahl von Gasblasen in einer Flüssigkeit aufweist, wobei der Fluidschaum einen Volumenanteil von Blasen aufweist, der mindestens 25% des Gesamtvolumens des Fluidschaums in dem Durchflusszellenkanal ausmacht, und wobei der durchschnittliche effektive Durchmesser der Gasblasen höchstens 95% des Durchmessers des Durchflusszellenkanals beträgt.
Verfahren zur selektiven Oxydation von Polyhydroxy-steroiden

ЗАРЯД ВЗРЫВЧАТОГО ВЕЩЕСТВА ДЛЯ ОБВОДНЕННЫХ СКВАЖИН Рукав состоит из извлекаемой и не извлекаемой частей, разделенных перфорацией. С обоих сторон перфорации закреплены впайкой распорные элементы из упругой проволоки. На распорный элемент на извлекаемой части прикрепляют средство отрыва и извлечения с длиной, достаточной для отрыва и вытаскивания из скважины извлекаемой части с поверхности. Диаметр скважины и распорных элементов принимают больше диаметра рукава, а длину неизвлекаемой части принимают равной длине заряда взрывчатого вещества.
Elektrische Steuerschaltungsanordnung

一种带心率监测的超低功耗智能手表的实现方法 本发明公开了一种带心率监测的超低功耗智能手表的实现方法，其方法步骤如下：S1：将柔性脉搏波传感器固定在表头底部与人体手臂皮肤的接触面上；S2：通过柔性脉搏波传感器对心率生理信号进行收集；S3：通过信号采集模块和AD数模转换模块对收集的信号进行处理；S4：通过中央处理单元处理后，将心率数据显示出来供人员查看，本发明带心率监测的超低功耗智能手表的实现方法中，采用柔性佩戴的方式，使得使用者在长期佩戴使用的过程中不易出现不适感，适合长期佩戴对人员的心率进行监测，本方法保证了心率监测数据提取的准确性，且不易因为外部因素而造成干扰，与传统的PPG传感器监测方式相比，本方法的整体使用稳定性好，数据精准可靠。

title_abstract: Address recognition method, device and storage medium The invention discloses an address recognition method, a device and a storage medium, and relates to the field of data processing. The address recognition method comprises the steps of recognizing first-level area information and second-level area information in an input address, wherein the first-level area information is an area below the city level; searching entries simultaneously matched withthe first-stage region information and the second-stage region information in a pre-established address information mapping table, the address information mapping table comprising a corresponding relationship among the first-stage region, the second-stage region and a corresponding address subset table; and identifying standard address information matched with the input address in an address subset table corresponding to the matched entry, the address subset table corresponding to the matched entry including standard address information having first-level region information and second-level region information. Therefore, the address does not need to be searched for in the whole standard address library and is searched for from the area below the city level, the address recognition efficiency is improved, and computing resources are saved.
title_abstract_original: 地址识别方法、装置和存储介质 本发明公开了一种地址识别方法、装置和存储介质，涉及数据处理领域。地址识别方法包括：识别输入的地址中的第一级区域信息和第二级区域信息，其中，第一级区域信息为市级以下的区域；在预先建立的地址信息映射表中查找同时与第一级区域信息和第二级区域信息匹配的条目，其中，地址信息映射表包括第一级区域、第二级区域和相应的地址子集表之间的对应关系；在匹配的条目对应的地址子集表中识别与输入的地址匹配的标准地址信息，其中，匹配的条目对应的地址子集表包括具有第一级区域信息和第二级区域信息的标准地址信息。从而，无需在整个标准地址库中查找地址，并且从市级以下的区域开始查找，提高了地址识别效率，节约了计算资源。

Tallerkenventil En ventil (1) omfatter et hus (4) som har en første innvendig boring (19) og et ventilsete (30). Et ventilelement (21) er bevegelig anordnet i forhold til huset og forbundet med ventilopereringsmidler (5, 11, 14), og ventilelementet (21) omfatter en første overflate (21b) konfigurert og anordnet for å tilpasse seg en kraft (F) generert av et fluidtrykk. Ventilelementet (21) omfatter ytterligere en tetningsflate (21a) konfigurert for tettende samvirking med ventilsetet (30), og den første overflaten (2lb) vender bort fra ventilsetet (30). Ventilen omfatter også en andre innvendig boring (20) konfigurert for å motta innsatsen (35). Den andre boringen har en indre ende (43) som er fluidforbundet med den første boringen (19) og anordnet i en vinkel a som er ulik null i forhold til den første boringens (19) lengdeakse (x). Ifølge oppfinnelsen er dobbeltbarriere metall- tilmetall-tetninger tilveiebrakt, både for ventilen og innsatsen.
Tallerkenventil

title_abstract: Multi-parameter based secure automatic house inspection method and device The invention discloses a multi-parameter based secure automatic house inspection method and device. The method is divided into the following steps of starting an automatic home inspection device after receiving a notice of delivery; detecting the ground inclination, including the detection of the ground inclination of a toilet and the ground inclination of other rooms; detecting walls and doors,including the detection of the wall thickness, firmness of wall coverings, and firmness of self-provided doors; detecting house high ceiling heights, including the comparison with a pre-set house highceiling height to see whether the high ceiling conditions are met; and detecting the air quality, including the detection of the particulate matter and formaldehyde in the air.
title_abstract_original: 种基于多参数的安全自动验房方法和装置 本发明公开了种基于多参数的安全自动验房方法和装置。该方法分为以下几个步骤：在接收到交房通知后，启动自动验房装置；对地面倾斜度进行检测，包括对洗手间的地面倾斜度和其他房间的地面倾斜度的检测；对墙和门进行检测，包括对墙的厚度、墙皮牢固程度和自带门的牢固程度进行检测；对房屋挑高进行检测，包括与预先设置的房屋挑高比较是否满足挑高条件；对空气质量进行检测，包括对空气中颗粒物和甲醛含量的检测。

title_abstract: EXPANDED RADIX FOR POLYMERIC TAGS A method having steps of (a) providing nucleic acids having a tag sequence (N1)n(N2)n . . . (Nx)n, wherein N1, N2 and Nx are nucleotides that complement different nucleotides, respectively, wherein n is an integer that can differ for N1, N2 and Nx; (b) detecting the nucleic acids individually and under conditions to distinguish signal intensities for (N1)n sequences having different values for n, (N2)n sequences having different values for n and. (Nx)n sequences having different values for n; and (c) distinguishing the tags based on the signal intensities.

title_abstract: SYSTEM, METHOD AND COMPUTER PROGRAM PRODUCT FOR FACILITATING A REAL ESTATE EXCHANGE A method is provided for facilitating a real estate exchange that includes a sale portion and a purchase portion. The method includes identifying properties of an exchangor for the sale portion of the exchange, and properties of one or more sellers for the purchase portion of the exchange. The properties of the exchangor and the sellers have associated property information stored in a property database. The method also includes engaging the properties for the sale and purchase portions of the exchange to thereby facilitate the exchange. More particularly, engaging the properties includes providing a buyer with at least a portion of the property information associated with one or more properties identified for the sale portion of the exchange, and providing the exchangor with at least a portion of the property information associated with one or more properties identified for the purchase portion of the exchange.

title_abstract: Method and system for a mobile computerized multiple function real estate brokers assistant An integrated computerized method, oriented to mobile computerized devices such as tablet computers and Smartphone's, for assisting real estate brokers in conducting client site visits and tours to various real properties of interest and/or the client by themselves in visiting and touring various real estate properties of interest. The method comprises various software modules, including software modules to assist in various numeric comparative property evaluation schemes, modules to automatically present building floor plans and other information at defined tour locations, and modules to show images or CAD drawings of proposed property modifications (often using augmented reality techniques). Other modules may additionally help manage the tour, including semi-automatic notification of tour itinerary changes, management of tour route instructions, and audio or text narration during selected portions of the tour.
title_abstract_original: Method and system for a mobile computerized multiple function real estate brokers assistant An integrated computerized method, oriented to mobile computerized devices such as tablet computers and Smartphone's, for assisting real estate brokers in conducting client site visits and tours to various real properties of interest and/or the client by themselves in visiting and touring various real estate properties of interest. The method comprises various software modules, including software modules to assist in various numeric comparative property evaluation schemes, modules to automatically present building floor plans and other information at defined tour locations, and modules to show images or CAD drawings of proposed property modifications (often using augmented reality techniques). Other modules may additionally help manage the tour, including semi-automatic notification of tour itinerary changes, management of tour route instructions, and audio or text narration during selected portions of the tour.

与石油井穿孔器相关的改进 提供在引爆后能够提供放热反应的石油和天然气井聚能射孔弹穿孔器，包括壳体（2）、高性能炸药（3）和反应性衬里（6），其中，高性能炸药位于反应性衬里和壳体之间。反应性衬里（6）由在切割喷流形成期间能够支持放热反应的反应性成分制成。所述成分是包括至少两种金属的挤压即压制颗粒成分，其中，种金属作为球形颗粒存在，另种金属作为非球形颗粒存在。还可以存在不能与反应性成分放热反应的至少种其它金属，以大于衬里的10％w/w的量存在。为了有助于压实，还可以添加粘合剂。

Dispositivo coletor aeromicrobiano acoplável em aeronave remotamente pilotada dispositivo coletor aeromicrobiano acoplável em aeronave remotamente pilotada. a presente invenção diz respeito a um dispositivo que compreende um conjunto de articuladores (3), suporte de mesa de servo motor (2) para adaptar o motor e fazê-lo abrir e fechar parte do dispositivo, geometrias circulares para acoplar duas placas de petri (4a e 4b) e o encaixe superior (1) projetável em aerovanes remotamente pilotadas (arp). o atual problema existente no estado da técnica é a inexistência de dispositivos portáteis e de baixo custo, bem como, com adequada eficiciência para a coleta, amostragem e determinação de microrganismos presentes no ar e que possa ser acoplado em aeronave remotamente pilotada. a presente invenção traz como solução a possibilidade de realizar investigação de atividades microbianas entre as alturas de 1 até 120 metros em relação ao ponto de decolagem no solo, que são permitidos e regulamentados no brasil pela ica 100-40 do departamento de controle do espaço aéreo brasileiro. o dito dispositivo foi desenvolvido com objetivos voltados para a inovação científica e tecnológica preferencialmente nas áreas da engenharia, robótica e física aplicadas em microbiologia. por meio da elaboração do design do dito dispositivo em ambiente computacional e impressão 3d, o conjunto de articuladores (3), suporte de mesa de servo motor (2) para adaptar o motor e fazê-lo abrir e fechar parte do dispositivo, geometrias circulares para acoplar duas placas de petri (4a e 4b) e o encaixe superior (1) projetável em aerovanes remotamente pilotadas foi possível construir o arcabouço estrutural do dispositivo. o dito dispositivo traz uma tecnologia específica voltada preferencialmente para a amostragem de microrganismos benéficos e patogênicos do ar.

title_abstract: CLOUD PLATFORM FOR MANAGING MUNICIPAL IMMOVABLE PROPERTY The invention relates to the field of information technology and computer engineering, and more particularly to expert analytical cloud information platforms for managing municipal immovable property. The claimed cloud intelligent decision-making platform for managing municipal immovable property comprises: a cloud-based central storage and a local data processing centre. The cloud-based central storage comprises: an adaptational decision stack module containing algorithms for processing differently formatted data and analysing the results of a risk model calculation; a database module containing synthetic features; and a knowledge base module containing risk model construction algorithms. The local data processing centre is situated on a client server and comprises: an adaptational decision stack module containing algorithms for processing user data and analysing the results of a risk model calculation and for initiating user business processes; a database module containing synthetic features; a knowledge base module containing risk model construction algorithms; and a database module containing the results of a risk model calculation. The technical result consists in reducing the disparateness of municipal infrastructure data, and standardizing decision-making.
title_abstract_original: ОБЛАЧНАЯ ПЛАТФОРМА ДЛЯ УПРАВЛЕНИЯ ГОРОДСКИМ НЕДВИЖИМЫМ ИМУЩЕСТВОМ Изобретение относится к области информационных технологий и вычислительной техники, а именно к экспертно-аналитическим облачным информационным платформам для целей управления городским недвижимым имуществом. Облачная интеллектуальная платформа принятия решений для целей управления городским недвижимым имуществом, содержит: облачное центральное хранилище и локальный центр обработки данных. Облачное центральное хранилище включает: модуль стека адаптационных решений, содержащий алгоритмы для обработки разноформатных данных и анализа результатов расчета риск-моделей; модуль базы данных, содержащий синтетические признаки; модуль базы знаний, содержащий алгоритмы построения риск-моделей. Локальный центр обработки данных, расположенный на сервере заказчика включающий: модуль стека адаптационных решений, содержащий алгоритмы обработки пользовательских данных и анализа результатов расчета риск-моделей, и вызова бизнес-процессов пользователей; модуль базы данных, содержащий синтетические признаки; модуль базы знаний, содержащий алгоритмы построения риск-моделей; модуль базы данных, содержащий результаты расчета риск-моделей. Технические результат заключается в уменьшении разобщенности данных о городской инфраструктуре и стандартизация принимаемых решений.

title_abstract: REALTY MODIFICATION ASSESSMENT The present invention includes a process and system for assessing home modifications. The assessment may relate to value or risk. A formatted realty schematic database retains electronically modifiable database that uses a gateway both to provide and receive realty fixture information to third parties.

title_abstract: Improved means for cooling and air conditioning of subterranean workshops and the like 714,641. Conditioning air. ROSELL, A. F. April 22, 1952 [April 30, 1951], No. 10118/52. Class 137. [Also in Group XIII] A cooling and air conditioning system for a room in a subterranean cavity comprises means for supplying conditioned air and cooling coils embedded in a casing forming the ceiling, walls and floor of the room spaced from the adjacent inside of the cavity, for cooling the room, radiantly and convectionally. An air-conditioned underground workshop 1 is provided with a cooling coil 10 encased in the ceiling arch 3 or walls 4 or floor 5 which are kept below the average room temperature and absorb most of the heat developed. Air from outside enters a conditioning unit 11 with cooling and heating coils 19, 20 and a fan 21 through a vertical duct 12 and after passage through the workshop is exhausted by a fan 17 through an outlet duct 16. The refrigerator circuit for cooling in an exchanger E1 water pumped through coil 10 comprises in parallel the exchanger evaporator coils 51, 52 and two condenser coils 48, 49 to which ammonia &c. vapour is supplied from a compresser CR1; the condensers C1, C2 are fed respectively with water from the conditioner heating coil 20 and from an outside source, cooling tower &c., the heating coil circuit including an emergency electric heater W. Brine for the conditioner cooling coil 19 is pumped through an exchanger E2 containing an evaporator coil 53 of a refrigerator circuit comprising also a compresser CR2 and a condenser coil 50.

title_abstract: APTAMERS FOR DETECTING PLASMODIUM-INFECTED RED BLOOD CELLS A nucleic acid aptamer that binds to Plasmodium-infected cells and does not bind to Plasmodium-free cells, having a length between 30 and 200 nucleotides, and comprising a nucleotide sequence selected from the group consisting of SEQ ID NO: 1-25 is provided. The aptamers can be applied in malaria diagnostic devices as components of RDT to e.g. detect the presence of, measure the amount of Plasmodium species, identify or diagnose subjects with a Plasmodium infection and in need of treatment, to monitor the progress of a Plasmodium infection, to monitor the progress or effectiveness of treatment of a Plasmodium infection.

title_abstract: Method and system for detecting S7 protocol abnormal communication behaviors based on PSO-SVM The invention discloses a method for detecting S7 protocol abnormal communication behaviors based on PSO-SVM. The method comprises the steps of obtaining connection from an industrial control network,the connection comprising a plurality of S7 protocol communication data packets; analyzing each S7 protocol communication data packet to obtain a function code or a sub-function code corresponding tothe S7 protocol communication data packet; and forming a function code sequence corresponding to each connection by a plurality of function codes and sub-function codes corresponding to all S7 protocol communication data packets included in each connection, and inputting the function code sequence corresponding to the connection into the trained S7 protocol anomaly detection model to obtain a detection result of the connection. According to the method, the technical problems that in an existing abnormal communication behavior recognition method, the S7 protocol abnormal communication behaviorin the industrial control network cannot be detected, and the recognition rate is low due to the fact that the relevance among the multiple data packets in the same connection is not considered can be solved.
title_abstract_original: 一种基于PSO-SVM检测S7协议异常通讯行为的方法和系统 本发明公开了一种基于PSO‑SVM检测S7协议异常通讯行为的方法，包括：从工业控制网络获取连接，该连接包括多个S7协议通讯数据包，对每个S7协议通讯数据包进行解析，以获取其对应的功能码或子功能码，每个连接所包括的所有S7协议通讯数据包对应的多个功能码和子功能码构成该连接对应的功能码序列，将该连接对应的功能码序列输入训练好的S7协议异常检测模型中，以得到该连接的检测结果。本发明能够解决现有异常通讯行为识别方法中无法对工业控制网络中S7协议异常通讯行为进行检测、以及由于没有考虑同一连接中多个数据包之间的关联性导致的识别率较低的技术问题。

title_abstract: Intelligent message routing method and system based on IPv6 extension header The invention relates to the technical field of routing, and provides an intelligent message routing method and system based on an IPv6 extension header. The method comprises the following steps: eachtransit router through which an IPv6 message passes writing forwarding path information and corresponding service quality information into a transmission path feature header; updating a path featuretemporary table according to the transmission path feature headers in all the received IPv6 messages; generating a routing table from the data of each forwarding path in the path feature temporary table according to the hierarchy reverse order of the forwarding paths; generating an intelligent routing table according to the data of each forwarding path in the routing table; and selecting a complete forwarding path meeting the requirements from the intelligent routing table, filling the routing header of the IPv6 service message to be forwarded with the complete forwarding path, and forwardingthe IPv6 message according to the selected complete forwarding path. According to the invention, the optimal forwarding path of the service data message is calculated according to the obtained transmission path information and the QoS guarantee requirement of the service, and the QoS guarantee of the service is realized.
title_abstract_original: 一种基于IPv6扩展头的报文智能选路的方法和系统 本发明涉及路由技术领域，提供了基于IPv6扩展头的报文智能选路的方法和系统。包括：由IPv6报文经过的每一个中转路由器将转发路径信息及对应的服务质量信息写入传输路径特征报头；根据接收到的所有IPv6报文中的传输路径特征报头更新路径特征临时表；将路径特征临时表中每条转发路径的数据按照转发路径的层级逆序生成选路表；根据选路表中每条转发路径的数据生成智能选路表；由智能选路表中选取符合要求的完整转发路径填入待转发的IPv6业务报文的路由报头，根据选取的完整转发路径对IPv6报文进行转发。本发明依据获得的传输路径信息和业务的QoS保障要求来计算出业务数据报文的最优转发路径，实现业务的QoS保障。

一种基于IPv6扩展头的报文智能选路的方法和系统 本发明涉及路由技术领域，提供了基于IPv6扩展头的报文智能选路的方法和系统。包括：由IPv6报文经过的每一个中转路由器将转发路径信息及对应的服务质量信息写入传输路径特征报头；根据接收到的所有IPv6报文中的传输路径特征报头更新路径特征临时表；将路径特征临时表中每条转发路径的数据按照转发路径的层级逆序生成选路表；根据选路表中每条转发路径的数据生成智能选路表；由智能选路表中选取符合要求的完整转发路径填入待转发的IPv6业务报文的路由报头，根据选取的完整转发路径对IPv6报文进行转发。本发明依据获得的传输路径信息和业务的QoS保障要求来计算出业务数据报文的最优转发路径，实现业务的QoS保障。

title_abstract: Seasoning for barbecue salted product and preparation method of barbecue salted product The invention relates to the field of processing of foods and particularly relates to a seasoning for a barbecue salted product and a preparation method of the barbecue salted product. The seasoning for the barbecue salted product is prepared from the following raw materials according to a mixture ratio: 50-70g of monosodium glutamate, 80-100g of cooking wine, 20-25g of pricklyash peel powder, 20-25g of black pepper powder, 30g of chili powder, 40-45g of refined salt, 40-50g of shredded ginger, 40-50g of shredded chive, 7-10g of white sugar, 150g of vegetable oil, 250g of starch, 10g of refined truffle powder, 15g of refined elsholtzia rugulosa powder and 5-10g of sesame oil. The healthy seasoning for the barbecue salted product provided by the invention can fundamentally solve fishy and mutton smell of meats or meat products and eliminate the fishy and mutton smell after back-cooling of the meats or meat products. Furthermore, the healthy vegetable oil used in the seasoning is beneficial to human health and causes no pollution to the environment and foods.
