時間貸設備の管理システム 【課題】時間貸設備に設置された各種機器の操作手段を共通化することができ、利用者の利便性を向上させることができる時間貸設備の管理システムの提供。【解決手段】時間貸設備の管理システム１は、部屋２０を管理する管理サーバ３を備える。管理サーバ３は、端末装置４を介して機器２４，２５を操作させるための機器操作部３１１と、端末装置４を介して部屋２０の予約を受け付け、予約情報を記憶部３２に記憶させる予約受付部３１２と、予約情報に基づいて、機器操作部３１１を介して機器２４，２５を予約日時に操作させる権限を部屋２０の利用者に付与する権限付与部３１３とを備える。機器操作部３１１は、権限付与部３１３にて権限を付与された場合に、端末装置４を介して入力された機器２４，２５を操作するための操作情報と、予約情報とに基づいて、予約日時に機器２４，２５を制御する。【選択図】図２
Verfahren zur Herstellung eines Lactons der Cyclopentanopolyhydrophenanthren-Reihe.

title_abstract: Cordyceps militaris fluid medium and preparation method thereof The invention provides a cordyceps militaris fluid medium and a preparation method thereof. The fluid medium comprises the following components in proportion: 15-30 g/L of cane sugar, 5-30 g/L of a silkworm chrysalis extracting solution, 5-30 g/L of peptone, 1.2-1.5 g/L of monopotassium phosphate, 0.8-1.2 g/L of monosodium phosphate, 1 g/L of magnesium sulfate and water in balancing amount. The fluid medium is prepared by mixing the components. The fluid medium has simple components, is easy to realize, and remarkably increases the yield of the final product cordyceps militaris mycelia.
title_abstract_original: Cordyceps militaris fluid medium and preparation method thereof The invention provides a cordyceps militaris fluid medium and a preparation method thereof. The fluid medium comprises the following components in proportion: 15-30 g/L of cane sugar, 5-30 g/L of a silkworm chrysalis extracting solution, 5-30 g/L of peptone, 1.2-1.5 g/L of monopotassium phosphate, 0.8-1.2 g/L of monosodium phosphate, 1 g/L of magnesium sulfate and water in balancing amount. The fluid medium is prepared by mixing the components. The fluid medium has simple components, is easy to realize, and remarkably increases the yield of the final product cordyceps militaris mycelia.

microorganismos e métodos para a produção de caprolactona abstract the invention provides non-naturally occurring microbial organisms containing caprolactone pathways having at least one exogenous nucleic acid encoding a butadiene pathway enzyme expressed in a sufficient amount to produce caprolactone. the invention additionally provides methods of using such microbial organisms to produce caprolactone by culturing a non-naturally occurring microbial organism containing caprolactone pathways as described herein under conditions and for a sufficient period of time to produce caprolactone. tradução do resumo resumo patente de invenção: "microorganismos e métodos para a produção de caprolactona". a invenção proporciona organismos microbianos que não ocorrem naturalmente contendo caminhos da caprolactona tendo no mínimo um ácido nucléico exógeno codificando uma enzima do caminho do butadieno expressada em uma quantidade suficiente para produzir caprolactona. a invenção adicionalmente proporciona métodos de utilizar os referidos organismos microbianos para produzir caprolactona cultivando um organismo microbiano que não ocorre naturalmente contendo caminhos da caprolactona conforme descrito aqui, neste requerimento de patente, sob condições e por um período de tempo suficiente para produzir caprolactona.

title_abstract: MICROORGANISMS AND METHODS FOR THE PRODUCTION OF CAPROLACTONE The invention provides non-naturally occurring microbial organisms containing caprolactone pathways having at least one exogenous nucleic acid encoding a butadiene pathway enzyme expressed in a sufficient amount to produce caprolactone. title_abstract: A process for filling a container with frozen confection A process for filling a container with a first frozen confection material encapsulating a second confection material, the process involving the use of a filling head; the filling head comprising: a housing having a nozzle exit, a lower first material inlet, an upper second material inlet and a reciprocatable piston movable within the housing; the piston having an outer wall and upper and lower ends and an internal material flow channel connecting an upper entry in the outer wall to an exit in the lower end, the piston, housing and inlets being positioned and dimensioned such that the piston has: (1) a lower position wherein material flows from both first and second inlets are blocked by the piston outer wall; (2) a mid position wherein the piston does not block the first inlet but the second inlet is blocked by the piston outer wall; (3) an upper position wherein the first inlet is not blocked and wherein 20 the second material inlet is in communication with the internal material flowchannel; the process involving allowing frozen confection material to flow out of the nozzle exit into the container as the piston moves in an upstroke from (1) a lower position to (2) a mid positionand then to (3) an upper position whereupon the first and second materials are coextruded from the exit nozzle, followed by a downstroke to (2) a mid position whereupon only first material is extrudedfrom the exit nozzle to encapsulate the previously extruded second material, and then to (1) a lower position.
title_abstract_original: 用冷冻甜食填充容器的方法 用包封第二甜食材料的第冷冻甜食材料填充容器的方法，该方法涉及使用填充头；填充头包括：壳体，壳体具有喷嘴出口、下部第材料入口、上部第二材料入口，和在壳体内可移动的往复式活塞；活塞具有外壁和上下端以及内部材料流动通道，内部材料流动通道将外壁中的上部入口连接到下端的出口，活塞、壳体和入口被定位和定尺寸为使得活塞具有：(1)下部位置，其中来自第和第二入口的材料流被活塞外壁阻塞；(2)中间位置，其中活塞不阻塞第入口，而第二入口被活塞外壁阻塞；(3)上部位置，其中第入口未被阻塞，并且第二材料入口与内部材料流动通道连通；当活塞在上冲程中从(1)下部位置移动到(2)中间位置然后移动到(3)上部位置时，该方法包括允许冷冻甜食材料从喷嘴出口流出到容器中，由此第和第二材料从出口喷嘴共挤出，活塞随后是下冲程移动到(2)中间位置，由此只有第材料从出口喷嘴被挤出以包封先前挤出的第二材料，然后活塞移动到(1)下部位置。

Bir kabın, bir ikinci şekerleme malzemesini sarmalayan bir birinci şekerleme malzemesi ile doldurulması için bir işlem olup, işlem bir doldurma başlığının (10) kullanımını kapsamakta; doldurma başlığı (10) şunları içermektedir: bir nozül çıkışı (19), altta bir birinci malzeme çıkışı (16), üstte bir ikinci malzeme çıkışı (18), ve kendisinin içerisinde ileri geri hareket edebilen bir pistonu (14) bulunan bir mahfaza (12); piston (14) bir dış çepere ve üst ile alt uçlara, ve dış çeperdeki bir üst girişi (26) alt uçtaki bir çıkışa (28) bağlayan bir malzeme akışı iç kanalına (24) sahiptir, piston (14), mahfaza (12) ve girişler (16, 18), pistonda (14) şunların bulunacağı şekilde konumlandırılmakta ve boyutlandırılmaktadır: (1) birinci (16) ile ikinci girişin (18) her ikisinden de malzeme akışlarının piston (14) dış çeperi tarafından engellendiği bir alt pozisyon; (2) pistonun (14) birinci girişi (16) engellemediği, fakat ikinci girişin (18) piston (14) dış çeperi tarafından engellendiği bir orta pozisyon; (3) birinci girişin (16) engellenmediği, ve ikinci malzeme girişinin (18) malzeme akışı iç kanalı (24) ile irtibatlı olduğu bir üst pozisyon; işlem, piston (14) bir alt pozisyondan (1) bir orta pozisyona (2) ve ardından bir üst pozisyona (3) hareket ettikçe dondurulmuş şekerleme malzemesinin nozül çıkışından (19) kabın içine akmasına, bundan dolayı birinci ve ikinci malzemenin çıkış nozülünden birlikte ekstrüde edilmesine imkan verilmesini, bunu aşağıya bir orta pozisyona (2) doğru darbenin izlemesine, dolayısıyla yalnızca birinci malzemenin önceden ekstrüde edilmiş ikinci malzemeyi sarmalamak üzere çıkış nozülünden ekstrüde edilmesine, ve ardından pistonun bir alt pozisyonuna (1) imkan verilmesini kapsamaktadır.

title_abstract: Method for transmitting real-time data and historical data of photovoltaic module The invention mainly relates to a method for transmitting real-time data and historical data of a photovoltaic module. The core scheme is that a first data processor of a collecting end is used for collecting target data of one photovoltaic module paired with the first data processor; and a second data processor configured by a data receiving end communicates with first data processors configuredby a series of different photovoltaic components. A real-time mark symbol of the target data in a time stamp has a real-time state or a historical state, and represents the uniqueness and traceabilityof the target data on a time point. The first data processor sends the real-time data with the real-time mark symbol in the real-time state in the time stamp to the second data processor every a sending period, and the first data processor sends the historical data with the real-time mark symbol in the historical state in the time stamp to the second data processor only when the photovoltaic module matched with the first data processor meets a permission condition.
title_abstract_original: 传送光伏组件实时数据和历史数据的方法 本发明主要涉及到种传送光伏组件实时数据和历史数据的方法，核心方案是利用采集端的第数据处理器采集与之配对的个光伏组件的目标数据，利用数据接收端配置的第二数据处理器和系列不同的光伏组件各自所配置的第数据处理器建立通信。目标数据在时间戳中的实时性标记符号有实时态或历史态，表征目标数据在时间点上的唯性和追溯性。第数据处理器每隔个发送周期即向第二数据处理器发送次时间戳中实时标记符号为实时态的实时数据，第数据处理器在与其配对的光伏组件符合许可条件时才向第二数据处理器发送时间戳中实时性标记符号为历史态的历史数据。

传送光伏组件实时数据和历史数据的方法 本发明主要涉及到一种传送光伏组件实时数据和历史数据的方法，核心方案是利用采集端的第一数据处理器采集与之配对的一个光伏组件的目标数据，利用数据接收端配置的第二数据处理器和一系列不同的光伏组件各自所配置的第一数据处理器建立通信。目标数据在时间戳中的实时性标记符号有实时态或历史态，表征目标数据在时间点上的唯一性和追溯性。第一数据处理器每隔一个发送周期即向第二数据处理器发送一次时间戳中实时标记符号为实时态的实时数据，第一数据处理器在与其配对的光伏组件符合许可条件时才向第二数据处理器发送时间戳中实时性标记符号为历史态的历史数据。

title_abstract: Feed used for white feather chicken cultivation, and raising method for white feather chicken cultivation The invention discloses feed used for white feather chicken cultivation, and a raising method for the white feather chicken cultivation. The feed comprises the following ingredients: Zea mays L., soybean meal, fish meal, calcium hydrogen phosphate, lysine salts, table salts, Setaria italica var. germanica (Mill.) Schred., Sorghum bicolor (L.) Moench, soya-bean cakes, fish meal, probiotics, shell powders, bone meal, peanut cakes, Setaria viridis (L.) Beauv seeds, fatty powders, fructus lycii, Setaria italica var. germanica (Mill.) Schred. flour, rehmanniae radix, crude protein, euryales semen,blood powders, cortex eucommiae, radix astragali calcium, total phosphorus, available phosphorus, lysine, methionine and tryptophan, wherein all ingredients are matched according to different parts byweight. According to the invention, different parts by weight of feed are matched by aiming at the white feather chicken of different days of ages so as to be favorable for the growth of the white feather chicken. Through the early-stage preparation of a henhouse, the henhouse is sterilized and disinfected, the growth safety of the white feather chicken is guaranteed, a corresponding cultivationmeasure can be formulated according to a practical situation through data recording and processing, and the composition and the feeding quantity of the feed can be regulated in time according to production requirements.
title_abstract_original: 一种用于白羽鸡养殖的饲料及其饲养方法 本发明公开了一种用于白羽鸡养殖的饲料及其饲养方法，包括以下组成部分：玉米、大豆粕、鱼粉、磷酸氢钙、赖氨酸盐、食盐、小米、高粱、豆饼、鱼粉、益生菌、贝壳粉、骨粉、花生饼、狗尾草籽、脂肪粉、枸杞、小米面、生地黄、粗蛋白、芡实、血粉、生地黄、杜仲、黄芪钙、总磷、可利用磷、赖氨酸、蛋氨酸、色氨酸,各组成部分按照不同的重量份进行配比。本发明通过针对不同日龄的白羽鸡进行饲料的不同重量份配比，有利于白羽鸡的生长，通过鸡舍前期的准备，对鸡舍进行杀菌消毒，保证了白羽鸡生长的安全，通过数据记录和处理可以根据实际情况制定相应的养殖措施，根据生产需要及时调整饲料的组成与投喂量。

title_abstract: Safety cigarette with paper sleeve remaining unburnt The used paper sleeve of the cigarette is specially treated with an aqueous solution such that it remains unburnt during smoking to form a protective jacket. Pref. the solution for the impregnation of the paper has a pH value of 6 plus or minus 1, ie 5 to 7, and it is free of poisonous substances. The tobacco is completely burnt without ash formation during combustion and consequent harmful effects. During smoking the cigarette remains at its original length so that dropping of ash, while still glowing, is reduced, thus greatly reducing the danger of fire.

title_abstract: Heterocyclics
title_abstract_original: Heterocyclics

Steuersystem mit der Möglichkeit zum webbasierten Steuern des Ein-/Aus-Zustands von mehreren Hauptplatinen Steuersystem mit der Möglichkeit zum webbasierten Steuern des Ein-/Aus-Zustands von mehreren Hauptplatinen, aufweisend: eine Mehrzahl von Hauptplatinen (1), denen je eine Gerätekennung zugeordnet ist und die durch je ein Auslösesignal (D1) dazu gebracht werden, ein Ein-/Aus-Signal (Ps_of) zu erzeugen; eine Mehrzahl von Netzteilen (2), die elektrisch mit den jeweiligen Hauptplatinen (1) verbunden ist, wobei sich das Netzteil (2) durch das von der elektrisch angeschlossenen Hauptplatine (1) ausgegebene Ein-/Aus-Signal (Ps_on) ein- und ausschalten lässt; eine webbasierte Überwachungsplattform (3), die einem Benutzer (6) eine sachgemäße Steuerung/Bedienung ermöglicht, wenn sich der Benutzer (6) in die webbasierte Überwachungsplattform (3) eingeloggt hat, wobei auf die webbasierte Überwachungsplattform (3) die Gerätekennungen geladen sind, und wobei die webbasierte Überwachungsplattform (3) eine grafische Bedienoberfläche (31) aufweist, und wobei auf der grafischen Bedienoberfläche (31) eine Kontrollzone (311) vorhanden ist, in der mehrere den Hauptplatinen (1) zugeordnete Kontrollkästchen angeordnet sind, wobei beim Markieren eines Kontrollkästchens eine Hauptplatine (1) ausgewählt wird, wodurch ein Steuersignal (D2) die der Hauptplatine (1) entsprechende Gerätekennung enthält; und ein Ein-/Aus-Steuermodul (4), das eine telekommunikativ mit der webbasierten Überwachungsplattform (3) verbundene, das Steuersignal (D2) empfangende Signalempfangseinheit (41) und eine mit der Signalempfangseinheit (41) verbundene, das Steuersignal (D2) empfangende Ein-/Aus-Steuereinheit (42) aufweist, wobei sich wenigstens eine im Steuersignal (D2) vorhandene Gerätekennung interpretieren bzw. entschlüsseln lässt, wobei das Auslösesignal (D1) an eine der Gerätekennung zugeordnete Hauptplatine (1) ausgebbar ist, wodurch die das Auslösesignal (D1) empfangende Hauptplatine (1) das Ein-/Aus-Signal (Ps_on) an dem entsprechenden Netzteil (2) ausgibt, um das Netzteil (2) ein- oder auszuschalten.

title_abstract: Quick tunneling method for high-efficiency shaped charge blasting in half-coal and half-rock roadway The invention discloses a quick tunneling method for high-efficiency shaped charge blasting in a half-coal and half-rock roadway, and relates to a tunneling method for a coal mining roadway. The quicktunneling method for high-efficiency shaped charge blasting in the half-coal and half-rock roadway comprises the steps that blasting holes are arranged, specifically, cutting blasting holes, auxiliary blasting holes and peripheral blasting holes are arranged, the cutting blasting holes are located at the middle position of a cross section of the roadway and comprise straight holes formed in the center and slightly inclined holes surrounding the straight holes, and the hole bottoms of the slightly inclined holes are inclined toward the straight holes; and initiation is carried out, specifically, the initiation is delayed one-time initiation. The rock drilling speed is increased, the molding quality of the cross section of the blasting roadway is improved, the blastholes are high in utilization rate, the cost is saved, the labor intensity is reduced, the working environment is improved, and quick tunneling of the half-coal and half-rock roadway is achieved.
title_abstract_original: 半煤岩巷高效聚能爆破快速掘进方法 本发明为半煤岩巷高效聚能爆破快速掘进方法，涉及到一种采煤巷道的掘进方法，包括设置爆破眼步骤、起爆步骤，其中设置爆破眼步骤包括设置掏槽爆破眼、辅助爆破眼、周边爆破眼。掏槽爆破眼在巷道断面的中部处，包括设置在中心的直眼，以及围绕直眼的微倾斜眼，微倾斜眼的孔底向直眼方向倾斜。其中起爆步骤为延时一次起爆。本发明提高凿岩速度、爆破巷道断面的成型质量，并且本发明炮眼利用率高、节约成本，降低劳动强度，改善作业环境。实现半煤岩巷快速掘进。

title_abstract: Split type microalgae cultivation device The utility model discloses a split type microalgae cultivation device. The split type microalgae cultivation device comprises an incubator, a liquid inlet pipe, a gas supply pipe, a liquid outlet pipe, a circulating pipe, a valve, a circulating pump, and a collecting pipe, wherein the incubator, the liquid inlet pipe, the gas supply pipe, the liquid outlet pipe, the circulating pipe and the valve form an independent split device, the split device is combined together with the circulating pump, the collecting pipe and the valve to form the split type microalgae cultivation device; according to the split type microalgae cultivation device, the microalgae can be ensured to be independent in a cultivation process, large-scale production can be realized in an unlimited parallel connection manner, the occupied area is small by adopting independent incubators, and the incubators can be split and combined and not limited by the places, environments and other conditions; materials of culture solution and the like can be recycled in the cultivation process, thereby beneficially controlling the energy consumption and further lowering the cost; and split cultivation or combined cultivation can be selected according to the characteristics of the microalgae in different growth stages in the cultivation process, the microalgae production efficiency and the bio-synthetic ratio can be improved, and the environment emission pressure can be reduced.
title_abstract_original: Split type microalgae cultivation device The utility model discloses a split type microalgae cultivation device. The split type microalgae cultivation device comprises an incubator, a liquid inlet pipe, a gas supply pipe, a liquid outlet pipe, a circulating pipe, a valve, a circulating pump, and a collecting pipe, wherein the incubator, the liquid inlet pipe, the gas supply pipe, the liquid outlet pipe, the circulating pipe and the valve form an independent split device, the split device is combined together with the circulating pump, the collecting pipe and the valve to form the split type microalgae cultivation device; according to the split type microalgae cultivation device, the microalgae can be ensured to be independent in a cultivation process, large-scale production can be realized in an unlimited parallel connection manner, the occupied area is small by adopting independent incubators, and the incubators can be split and combined and not limited by the places, environments and other conditions; materials of culture solution and the like can be recycled in the cultivation process, thereby beneficially controlling the energy consumption and further lowering the cost; and split cultivation or combined cultivation can be selected according to the characteristics of the microalgae in different growth stages in the cultivation process, the microalgae production efficiency and the bio-synthetic ratio can be improved, and the environment emission pressure can be reduced.
PROCEDE ET MACHINE DE CONDITIONNEMENT D'HUITRES ET DE PREPARATION DES CONDITIONNEMENTS

title_abstract: Method and machine for packaging oysters and for the preparation of the packages The method consists in causing rows of oysters to travel down an integral series of parallel gutters, the movement along the gutters being caused by low-amplitude reciprocating movements of the gutters in their plane, and in then collecting the oysters on a corrugated support moving translationally underneath the gutters, the troughs of the corrugations of the support being in line with the gutters. The machine comprises a corrugated plate 1 in which the troughs of the corrugations form adjacent gutters, driving means 2 for imparting reciprocating movements to the plate 1 in its plane, and means for moving a corrugated support 8 underneath the lower edge 7 of the plate 1. <IMAGE>
title_abstract_original:
PROCEDE ET MACHINE DE CONDITIONNEMENT D'HUITRES ET DE PREPARATION DES CONDITIONNEMENTS

LE PROCEDE CONSISTE A FAIRE DESCENDRE DES RANGEES D'HUITRES DANS DES GOUTTIERES PARALLELES SOLIDAIRES, LE DEPLACEMENT DANS LES GOUTTIERES ETANT PROVOQUE PAR MOUVEMENTS ALTERNATIFS DE FAIBLE AMPLITUDE DES GOUTTIERES DANS LEUR PLAN, PUIS A RECUEILLIR LES HUITRES SUR UN SUPPORT ONDULE SE DEPLACANT EN TRANSLATION SOUS LE BAS DES GOUTTIERES, LES PARTIES CREUSES DES ONDULATIONS DU SUPPORT ETANT ALIGNEES AVEC LES GOUTTIERES.

LA MACHINE COMPREND UNE PLAQUE ONDULEE 1 DONT LES CREUX DES ONDULATIONS FORMENT DES GOUTTIERES ADJACENTES, DES MOYENS MOTEURS 2 POUR IMPRIMER A LA PLAQUE 1 DES MOUVEMENTS ALTERNATIFS DANS SON PLAN, DES MOYENS POUR DEPLACER SOUS LE BORD INFERIEUR 7 DE LA PLAQUE 1 UN SUPPORT ONDULE 8.

title_abstract: Food additive for promoting calcium absorption The invention provides a food additive for promoting calcium absorption. The food additive includes the following ingredients by weight: 3-9 parts of vitamin D, 4-16 parts of vitamin K, 5-15 parts of hericium erinaceus, 3-18 parts of seaweed, 5-15 parts of sodium glycinate, 4-8 parts of glutamic acid, 4-8 parts of sesame paste, and 4-16 parts of spinach. The food additive for promoting calcium absorption provided by the invention has scientific and reasonable component proportion, and has very good effects of promoting calcium absorption and supplementing essential amino acids and nutrients.
title_abstract_original: 种促进钙吸收的食品添加剂 本发明提供种促进钙吸收的食品添加剂，包括以下重量份的成分：维生素D 3～9份、维生素K 4～16份，猴头菌5～15份，海藻3～18份、甘氨酸钠5～15份、谷氨酸4～8份，麻酱4～8份，菠菜4～16份，本发明提供的促进钙吸收的食品添加剂，各组份配比科学合理，具有很好的促进钙质吸收，补充必须氨基酸和营养物质的作用。

title_abstract: Composite black tea suitable for being drunk by women and preparation method of composite black tea The invention relates to composite black tea suitable for being drunk by women and a preparation method of the composite black tea. The composite black tea is prepared from, by weight, 2.5-3.0 parts of Zhenghe Congou black tea, 3.5-4.5 parts of Lapsang Souchong Congou black tea and 0.8-1.5 parts of orange osmanthus. According to the composite black tea, orange osmanthus has the specific function of adjusting internal secretion, Zhenghe Congou black tea and Lapsang Souchong Congou black tea are warm in performance, through mixed matching of Zhenghe Congou black tea, Lapsang Souchong Congou black tea and orange osmanthus, the function of orange osmanthus can be better achieved, the taste can be improved, and the health care function can also be improved.
title_abstract_original: 种适于女性饮用的复合红茶及其制备方法 种适于女性饮用的复合红茶及其制备方法，按下列重量份数组成：政和工夫红茶2.5～3.0；正山小种工夫红茶3.5～4.5；丹桂0.8～1.5。本发明中，丹桂有调节内分泌的特效，而政和工夫红茶、正山小种工夫红茶皆性属温热，三者混合搭配，更能发挥丹桂的功效，既能提高口感，又能提高保健功效。

title_abstract: Polypeptides having protease activity and polynucleotides encoding same The present invention relates to isolated polypeptides having protease activity, and polynucleotides encoding the polypeptides. The invention also relates to nucleic acid constructs, vectors, and host cells comprising the polynucleotides as well as methods of using the polypeptides in beer production.

Proteaz Aktivitesine Sahip Polipeptitler Ve Bunları Kodlayan Polinükleotitler Bu buluş proteaz aktivitesine sahip izole edilmiş polipeptitlere ve polipeptitleri kodlayan polinükleotitlere ilişkindir. Buluş ayrıca polinükleotitleri içeren nükleik asit oluşumları, vektörler ve konakçı hücrelerin yanı sıra polipeptitlerin bira üretiminde kullanımı için usullere ilişkindir.

title_abstract: Modeling comparable properties where the subject property is a condominium property Modeling appropriate comparable properties for a condo property includes accessing property data, and identifying candidate condo properties in the accessed property data to produce condo property data. A regression is performed using the property data, with the regression modeling the relationship between price and explanatory variables, and the explanatory variables including at least one variable that is specific to condo property assessment. The regression accommodates a modeling of comparable properties, such that a subject condo property and comparable properties may be identified and displayed.

title_abstract: Human choline/ethanolamine kinase (HCEK)-related gene variant associated with lung cancers The invention relates to the nucleic acid and polypeptide sequences of a novel human HCEK-related gene variant (HCEKV). The invention also relates to the process for producing the polypeptide of the variant. The invention further relates to the use of the nucleic acid and polypeptide of the gene variant in diagnosing diseases, in particular, lung cancers.

title_abstract: INTERPHONE DEVICE PURPOSE:To facilitate an easy transfer of an external call and at the same time to improve the information transmitting function by providing a call signal memory means and an indoor channel forming means to a master device and performing the transfer of calls between the master device and a secondary master device according to a later call signal in terms of time. CONSTITUTION:An indoor master device T is provided together with a doorphone D belonging to the device T, an internal channel between the device T and a secondary master device S, external channels among the device T, a janitor master device and a common entrance device, and a channel control circuit which controls the ON/OFF of plural indoor master devices connected to the external channel. A memory means 25 for each call signal which is transmitted via the doorphone D and a communication control circuit and a means which forms an indoor channel between the devices T and S are provided to the device T. Then the call signal which is stored later in terms of time among those signals stored in the means 25 is read out and the calls are transferred between both devices T and S by means of a means provided to the device T.

title_abstract: House space area distribution method and device, storage medium and electronic equipment The invention discloses a house space area distribution method and device, a storage medium and electronic equipment, and relates to the house space design technology. According to the specific scheme, the method comprises the steps of obtaining house attribute information of a target house space to be regionally allocated; determining the similarity between each standard house in the standard house library and the target house space according to the house attribute information, and determining more than two target standard houses according to each similarity; according to each target standardhouse, determining at least one functional area of the target house space and an area proportion of each functional area in the target house space; and determining the position of each functional area in the target house space according to the house attribute information, the at least one functional area of the target house space and the area proportion of each functional area in the target housespace. According to the invention, more reasonable region allocation can be carried out on the target house space, so that more intuitive house space information for functional region allocation is provided.
title_abstract_original: 房屋空间区域分配方法、装置、存储介质及电子设备 本申请公开了一种房屋空间区域分配方法、装置、存储介质及电子设备，涉及房屋空间设计技术。具体方案包括：获取待区域分配的目标房屋空间的房屋属性信息；根据房屋属性信息，确定标准房屋库中每个标准房屋与目标房屋空间的相似度，并根据每个相似度确定得到两个以上目标标准房屋；根据每个目标标准房屋，确定目标房屋空间的至少一个功能区域以及每个功能区域占目标房屋空间的面积比例；根据房屋属性信息、目标房屋空间的至少一个功能区域以及每个功能区域占目标房屋空间的面积比例，确定每个功能区域在目标房屋空间中的位置。本申请可以对目标房屋空间进行更加合理的区域分配，从而提供更直观的、进行了功能区域分配的房屋空间信息。

Kommunikationssystem für die Kommunikation in einem Kommunikationsnetzwerk mit Subnetzwerken Die Erfindung betrifft ein Kommunikationssystem (300) für die Kommunikation in einem Kommunikationsnetzwerk (303), wobei das Kommunikationsnetzwerk (303) ein erstes Subnetzwerk (307) und ein zweites Subnetzwerk (311) aufweist, mit: einer ersten Identifizierungsentität (309), welche dem ersten Subnetzwerk (307) zugeordnet und ausgebildet ist, eine Identität (302) eines Kommunikationsendgeräts (301) zu empfangen, und das Kommunikationsendgerät (301) auf der Basis der Identität (302) für die Kommunikation über das erste Subnetzwerk (307) zu identifizieren; einer zweiten Identifizierungsentität (313), welche dem zweiten Subnetzwerk (311) zugeordnet und ausgebildet ist, die Identität (302) des Kommunikationsendgeräts (301) zu empfangen, und das Kommunikationsendgerät (301) auf der Basis der Identität (302) für die Kommunikation über das zweite Subnetzwerk (311) zu identifizieren; und einer Management-Entität (319), welche ausgebildet ist, das Kommunikationsendgerät (301) für die Kommunikation über das jeweilige Subnetzwerk (307, 311) zu authentifizieren.

title_abstract: ORE PRODUCTION DEVICE FIELD: mining.SUBSTANCE: device for ore discharge includes a working element, a channel with at least one hydraulic cylinder installed in it with a locking device on the stock end and guides installed along the channel. Device is additionally equipped with a collapsible conveyor assembly consisting of working sections, the length of which is equal to the length of the piston stroke of the hydraulic cylinder and the end section, which length is equal to the sum of the lengths of the piston stroke of the hydraulic cylinder and the working element. Each section includes a scraper and a tie-rod having an arc-shaped section, at the end of which there are protrusions and a straight section, at the end of which there are hook-shaped retainers at the working sections, and a locking device at the end section. Hydraulic cylinder locking device is made in form of latch with tie rod, and on the lower surface of the scraper there are brackets with the possibility of fixing the locking device of the hydraulic cylinder and the protrusions with the possibility of engagement with the guides.EFFECT: simplified design, increase in operational characteristics and efficiency of ore production.3 cl, 8 dwg
title_abstract_original: Устройство для выпуска руды Изобретение относится к горной промышленности. Техническим результатом является упрощение конструкции, повышение эксплуатационных характеристик и производительности работ по выпуску руды. Устройство для выпуска руды включает рабочий орган, канал с установленным в нем по крайней мере одним гидроцилиндром с замковым устройством на конце штока и направляющие, установленные вдоль канала. Устройство дополнительно снабжено разборным конвейерным ставом, состоящим из рабочих секций, длина которых равна длине хода поршня гидроцилиндра и концевой секции, длина которой равна сумме длин хода поршня гидроцилиндра и рабочего органа. Каждая секция включает скребок и тягу, имеющую дугообразный участок, на конце которого выполнены выступы и прямолинейный участок, на конце которого у рабочих секций выполнены крюкообразные фиксаторы, а у концевой секции стопорное устройство. Замковое устройство гидроцилиндра выполнено в виде защелки с тягой, а на нижней поверхности скребка выполнены скобы с возможностью фиксации на нем замкового устройства гидроцилиндра и выступы с возможностью зацепления их с направляющими. 2 з.п. ф-лы, 8 ил.

title_abstract: Device for gripping an object in a constrained space A gripper assembly for gripping coiled tubing with lower and upper ball carriers. A first gripper portion and a second gripper portion each have a channel for a bore through the gripper portions. Gripper portions can rotate in relation to each other. Rotation causes the gripper portion to close around an object that passes through the bore. With a translational force, the gripper portions rotate relative to each other to grasp an object.
title_abstract_original: Device for gripping an object in a constrained space A gripper assembly for gripping coiled tubing with lower and upper ball carriers. A first gripper portion and a second gripper portion each have a channel for a bore through the gripper portions. Gripper portions can rotate in relation to each other. Rotation causes the gripper portion to close around an object that passes through the bore. With a translational force, the gripper portions rotate relative to each other to grasp an object.

title_abstract: METHOD AND SYSTEM FOR DETECTING REAL ESTATE QUALITY A method and a system for detecting real estate quality, the method comprising the following steps: acquiring picture information of a property (101); analyzing and processing the picture information to acquire the flatness and the color of the property (102); and calculating the quality of the property according to the flatness and the color (103).
title_abstract_original: 房地产质量检测方法及系统 一种房地产质量检测方法及系统，所述方法包括如下步骤：获取房屋的图片信息（101）；对图片信息进行分析处理获取房屋的平整度、色泽度（102）；依据该平整度和色泽度计算出该房屋的质量（103）。

title_abstract: Real estate quality detection method and system The invention provides a real estate quality detection method and system. The method comprises the following steps of obtaining picture information of a house; analyzing the picture information to obtain the flatness and the color of the house; calculating the quality of the house according to the flatness and the color. The technical scheme provided by the invention is advantaged by achieving quality detection.
title_abstract_original: 房地产质量检测方法及系统 本发明提供了种房地产质量检测方法及系统，所述方法包括如下步骤：获取房屋的图片信息；对图片信息进行分析处理获取房屋的平整度、色泽度；依据该平整度和色泽度计算出该房屋的质量。本发明提供的技术方案具有实现质量检测的优点。

title_abstract: METHOD AND SYSTEM FOR PREPARING REAL ESTATE ANALYSIS REPORT The present invention provides a method and system for creating a real estate analysis report. Provided are the method and system, which can provide a report which can refer to an investment value of real estate through mechanical analysis through market research and business feasibility review for the real estate selected by a user for review. The method comprises the steps of: receiving information on a review target; examining the market of the review target based on the received information; and creating a report on the review target by using the market review result.
title_abstract_original: 부동산 분석 보고서 작성 방법 및 시스템 본 발명은 부동산 분석 보고서 작성 방법 및 시스템에 있어서, 사용자가 선정한 검토대상 부동산에 대하여 시장 조사 및 사업성 검토를 통하여 기계적 분석을 통한 부동산의 투자 가치에 대해 참고할 수 있는 보고서를 제공할 수 있는 방법 및 시스템에 관한 것으로, 검토 대상에 대한 정보를 입력 받는 단계; 입력 받은 상기 정보에 기반해 상기 검토 대상의 시장을 검토하는 단계; 및 상기 시장 검토 결과를 이용해 상기 검토 대상에 대한 보고서를 작성하는 단계;를 포함하는 구성을 개시한다.

sistema e método para monitoramento e análise de informações nos mercados de renda variável sistema e método para monitoramento e análise de informações nos mercados de renda variável. a presente invenção compreende um sistema e método para monitoramento e análise de informações, tomada de decisão e operação nos mercados de renda variável. o sistema recebe os dados da bolsa de valores, compila e interpreta essas informações semi-automatizando o processo analítico. ainda, a presente invenção compreende a plotagem de informações referentes à detecção de agressões exibidas em tempo real. a presente invenção se situa nos campos de instrumentos financeiros, mais especificamente, na área de plotagem de dados financeiros.

title_abstract: System and method for investment in real estate based on block chain The present invention relates to a blockchain-based real estate investment. Specifically, the present invention relates to the blockchain-based real estate investment system and a method thereof which connect real estate developers, financial institutions, and investors on a blockchain network so that the investors can conveniently and safely make real estate investment. To this end, according to the present invention, the blockchain-based real estate investment system comprises: a real estate developer platform which digitizes real estate assets of real estate owners to create digital assets and allocates and distributes the digital assets; and a financial institution platform which sells the digital assets allocated and distributed from the real estate developer platform to an investor computing device and returns the investments from the sale of digital assets to the real estate developer platform.
title_abstract_original: 블록체인 기반의 부동산 투자 시스템 및 방법 본 발명은 블록체인 기반의 부동산 투자에 관한 것으로서, 상세하게는 블록체인 네트워크 상에서 부동산 개발자, 금융기관, 투자자를 연결하여 투자자가 편리하고 안전하게 부동산 투자를 할 수 있도록 한 블록체인 기반의 부동산 투자 시스템 및 방법에 관한 것이다. 이를 위해, 본 발명에 따른 블록체인 기반 부동산 투자 시스템은 부동산 소유자의 부동산 자산을 디지털화하여 디지털 자산을 생성하고 디지털 자산을 할당 분배하는 부동산 개발자 플랫폼과, 상기 부동산 개발자 플랫폼으로부터 할당 분배 받은 디지털 자산을 투자자 컴퓨팅 장치에 판매하고 디지털 자산의 판매에 따른 투자금을 상기 부동산 개발자 플랫폼으로 반환하는 금융기관 플랫폼을 포함한다.

title_abstract: Use of cis-cinnemaldehyde as flavouring agent A mixture of cis- and trans- cinnamaldehyde containing isomer cis in a proportion equal to or higher than about 10% by weight, preferably of between about 10 and 30%, is useful for the manufacture of flavouring compositions destined in particular to reinforce, improve or modify the organoleptic properties of flavours of chinese cinnamon type. The cis-cinnamaldehyde may be made by irradiating a mixture of the trans-isomer, hexane and xylene with a mercury lamp, and fractionating.
title_abstract_original: Use of cis-cinnemaldehyde as flavouring agent A mixture of cis- and trans- cinnamaldehyde containing isomer cis in a proportion equal to or higher than about 10% by weight, preferably of between about 10 and 30%, is useful for the manufacture of flavouring compositions destined in particular to reinforce, improve or modify the organoleptic properties of flavours of chinese cinnamon type. The cis-cinnamaldehyde may be made by irradiating a mixture of the trans-isomer, hexane and xylene with a mercury lamp, and fractionating.

title_abstract: Delta 7 and delta 22 cholesterol desaturases from ciliata phylum, and uses A cell free extract from a ciliate microorganism, including protozoo Tetrahymena, wherein the extract comprises a homogenate a microsomal fraction, a desaturaseenriched fraction or a mixture thereof and, more particularly the invention provides substantially pure enzymes: DELTA 7 cholesterol desaturases and DELTA 22 cholesterol desaturase enzymes. <??>The present invention provides methods for decreasing the cholesterol content of a foodstuff of animal origin, such as a dairy product. The methods comprise the step of treating a foodstuff by incubating the same with a cell free extract in a effective amount to enable changes in the foodstuff: (a)reduce the level of cholesterol; and (b) increase the level of at least one desaturated cholesterol derivative: DELTA 7- dehydrocholesterol, DELTA 22 dehydrocholesterol and/or DELTA 7,22 bisdehydrocholesterol. <??>The invention also relates to methods for recovering cholesterol desaturases activities from ciliates, including Tetrahymena, and their use in a production of DELTA 7 dehydrosterol, DELTA 22 dehydrosterol and DELTA 7,22 bis dehydrosterol from several sterol sources as cholesterol.

title_abstract: Delta 7 and delta 22 cholesterol desaturases from ciliata phylum, and uses A cell free extract from a ciliate microorganism, including protozoo  Tetrahymena , wherein the extract comprises a homogenate a microsomal fraction, a desaturaseenriched fraction or a mixture thereof and, more particularly the invention provides substantially pure enzymes: Δ7 cholesterol desaturases and Δ22 cholesterol desaturase enzymes. title_abstract: Cholesterol desaturases from ciliates, methods and uses A cell free extract from a ciliate microorganism, including protozoo Tetrahymena, wherein the extract comprises a homogenate a microsomal fraction, a desaturase-enriched fraction or a mixture thereof and, more particularly the invention provides substantially pure enzymes: 7 cholesterol desaturases and 22 cholesterol desaturases. The invention also relates to methods for recovering cholesterol desaturases activities from ciliates, including Tetrahymena, and their use in a production of Vitamin D precursors and analogs from several cholesterol sources.
title_abstract_original: Cholesterol desaturases from ciliates, methods and uses A cell free extract from a ciliate microorganism, including protozoo Tetrahymena, wherein the extract comprises a homogenate a microsomal fraction, a desaturase-enriched fraction or a mixture thereof and, more particularly the invention provides substantially pure enzymes: 7 cholesterol desaturases and 22 cholesterol desaturases. The invention also relates to methods for recovering cholesterol desaturases activities from ciliates, including Tetrahymena, and their use in a production of Vitamin D precursors and analogs from several cholesterol sources.

title_abstract: Human B-cell translocation genes-2 and 3 The present invention relates to novel antiproliferative genes. More specifically, isolated nucleic acid molecules are provided encoding the human B-cell translocation genes 2 and 3 (BTG-2 and BTG-3). title_abstract: Non-return optical star coupler A passive optical star coupler, and associated method of operation arranged to transmit signals received at any input port to all output ports other than an output port associated with the input port. In this way all received signals are broadcast to all connected network equipment with the exception of the transmitting equipment.

title_abstract: Real estate information service system based on user data analysis The invention discloses a real estate information service system based on user data analysis. The system comprises an administrator client, a user client and a database server; the administrator client comprises an administrator login module, a real estate information building module and a real estate information classification module; the user client comprises a user data application module, a user data analysis module, a real estate information pushing module and a real estate information application module; the database server is used for receiving classified real estate information sent by the real estate information classification module and sending the classified real estate information to the real estate information application module for displaying and being checked by users via clicking; the database server receives user behavior data information sent by the user data analysis module, matches real estate information related to the user behavior data according to the user behavior data, and sends the matched real estate information to the real estate information pushing module. The system provided by the invention has the advantages of being saving in user energy and time, and highly comfortable in user experience.
title_abstract_original: 种基于用户数据分析的房产信息服务系统 本发明公开了种基于用户数据分析的房产信息服务系统，包括管理员客户端、用户客户端、数据库服务器；管理员客户端包括管理员登录模块、房产信息建立模块、房产信息分类模块；用户客户端包括用户数据应用模块、用户数据分析模块、房产信息推送模块、房产信息应用模块；数据库服务器用于接收房产信息分类模块发送的分类后的房产信息并将分类后的房产信息发送至房产信息应用模块，显示出来供用户点击查看，数据库服务器接收用户数据分析模块发送的用户行为数据信息，根据用户行为数据匹配出与用户行为数据相关的房产信息，并且将匹配出的房产信息发送至房产信息推送模块。本发明具有节省用户精力和时间、用户体验舒适度高等优点。

title_abstract: Capillary electrophoretic detection of nucleic acids
title_abstract_original: Capillary electrophoretic detection of nucleic acids

title_abstract: Capillary electrophoretic detection of nucleic acids Methods are provided for detection and quantitation of mixtures containing target nucleobase sequences using capillary electrophoresis. Peptide nucleic acid oligomers, complementary to the target sequences and preferably having appended detectable labels, are hybridized to the targets. Capillary electrophoresis is then performed, and the detectable label is detected and quantitated.

title_abstract: Peach jam A peach jam comprises the following composition in parts by weight: 11-14 parts of peaches, 4-6 parts of table salt, 4-9 parts of radix angelicae, 7-10 parts of white granulated sugar, 4-7 parts of starch, 7-9 parts of glucose, 3-7 parts of maltose, 3-8 parts of white vinegar, and 6-8 parts of egg yolk. A method for preparing the peach jam comprises the steps: weighing the raw materials according to the weight, washing the peaches cleanly, removing seeds and peeling, putting into water and soaking for 1 hour, then taking out, and beating into a peach sauce by a beating machine; putting white granulated sugar and a proper amount of water into a heater, and heating to 30 DEG C; then adding table salt, radix angelicae, starch, glucose, maltose, white vinegar and egg yolk, heating up to 80 DEG C, and holding for 1 hour; finally, adding the peach sauce into the mixture, heating to boil, stirring for 30 minutes while boiling; and cooling, bottling, sealing mouths, and thus obtaining the finished product. The peach jam has the advantages of relieving summer heat and quenching thirst, clearing heat and moistening lung, has rich iron content, contains more potassium and less sodium, and is suitable for iron deficiency anemia patients and edema patients to eat.
title_abstract_original: 种桃子果酱 种桃子果酱，包括如下重量份数配方组分：桃子11‑14份，食盐4‑6份，白芷4‑9份，白砂糖7‑10份，淀粉4‑7份，葡萄糖7‑9份，麦芽糖3‑7份，白醋3‑8份，蛋黄6‑8份。种桃子果酱的制备方法，步骤为：按重量称取原料，将桃子洗净，去核去皮，放入水中浸泡1小时后取出，用打浆机打成桃子酱。将白砂糖和适量水放入加热器，加热至30℃。再加入食盐、白芷、淀粉、葡萄糖、麦芽糖、白醋和蛋黄，升温至80℃，保温1小时。最后，将桃子酱加入其中，加热至沸腾，边沸腾边搅拌30分钟。冷却后装瓶封口，即得成品。其优点在于：消暑止渴、清热润肺。铁含量较丰富，含钾多，含钠少，适宜缺铁贫血患者及水肿患者食。

title_abstract: NUCLEIC ACIDS THAT BIND TO ENTEROTOXIN B The invention relates to a nucleic acid that binds to Staphylococcal Enterotoxin B, in particular Staphylococcus aureus and to a method for producing and/or identifying nucleic acids, which bind to a target molecule, in particular an inventive nucleic acid. According to the method, a) a heterogeneous population of nucleic acids is created; b) the population in step a) is contacted; c) the nucleic acids that do not interact with the target molecule are separated; d) the nucleic acids that interact with the target molecule are optionally separated; and e) the nucleic acids that interact with the target molecule are optionally sequenced. The invention is characterised in that the target molecule comprises an amino acid sequence of Staphylococcal Enterotoxin B, preferably of Staphylococcus aureus.
title_abstract_original: ENTEROTOXIN B BINDENDE NUKLEINSÄURE Die vorliegende Erfindung betrifft eine Nukleinsäure bindend an Enterotoxin B von Staphylococcus, insbesondere von Staphylococcus aureus, sowie ein Verfahren zur Herstellung und/oder Identifizierung von Nukleinsäuren, die an ein Zielmolekül binden, insbesondere von einer erfindungsgemässen Nukleinsäure, wobei a) eine heterogene Population von Nukleinsäuren erzeugt wird; b) die Population von Schritt a) in-Kontakt-gebracht wird; c) die Nukleinsäuren, die nicht mit dem Zielmolekül in Wechselwirkung treten abgetrennt werden; d) die Nukleinsäuren, die mit dem Zielmolekül in Wechselwirkung treten optional abgetrennt werden; und e) die Nukleinsäuren, die mit dem Zielmolekül in Wechselwirkung getreten sind optional sequenziert werden. Dadurch gekennzeichnet, dass das Zielmolekül eine Aminosäuresequenz des Enterotoxin B von Staphylococcus, bevorzugterweise von Staphylococcus aureus, umfasst.

title_abstract: New nucleic acid that binds to staphylococcal enterotoxin B, useful for treating and diagnosing e.g. septic shock, identified by the SELEX method Nucleic acid (I) that binds to enterotoxin B (Eb) of Staphylococcus, especially S. aureus, is new. Independent claims are also included for the following: (1) preparing and/or identifying nucleic acids (Ia), particularly (I), that bind to an Eb-derived target molecule; (2) preparing L-nucleic acid (Ib) that binds to an Eb-derived target having the natural configuration; (3) complexes of Eb, especially from S. aureus, and (I); and (4) kit for detecting Eb, especially from S. aureus, that comprises (I).
title_abstract_original: New nucleic acid that binds to staphylococcal enterotoxin B, useful for treating and diagnosing e.g. septic shock, identified by the SELEX method Die vorliegende Erfindung betrifft eine Nukleinsäure, bindend an Enterotoxin B von Staphylococcus, insbesondere von Staphylococcus aureus, sowie ein Verfahren zur Herstellung und/oder Identifizierung von Nukleinsäuren, die an ein Zielmolekül binden, insbesondere von einer erfindungsgemäßen Nukleinsäure, wobei DOLLAR A a) eine heterogene Population von Nukleinsäuren erzeugt wird; DOLLAR A b) die Population von Schritt a) in Kontakt gebracht wird; DOLLAR A c) die Nukleinsäuren, die nicht mit dem Zielmolekül in Wechselwirkung treten, abgetrennt werden; DOLLAR A d) die Nukleinsäuren, die mit dem Zielmolekül in Wechselwirkung treten, optional abgetrennt werden und DOLLAR A e) die Nukleinsäuren, die mit dem Zielmolekül in Wechselwirkung getreten sind, optional sequenziert werden, DOLLAR A dadurch gekennzeichnet, dass das Zielmolekül eine Aminosäuresequenz des Enterotoxin B von Staphylococcus, bevorzugterweise von Staphylococcus aureus, umfasst.

title_abstract: Form fixing device for wire workpiece and voice coil wire form fixing method The invention relates to a form fixing device for a wire workpiece and a voice coil wire form fixing method; the form fixing device for the wire workpiece comprises an installation base, a take-up mechanism arranged on the installation base, and a form fixing mechanism arranged on the installation base; the take-up mechanism comprises a take-up block and a take-up cylinder, a take-up groove is arranged at the lower end of the take-up block, and the take-up cylinder drives the take-up block to move; the form fixing mechanism comprises a wire clamping rod, a wire clamping power piece driving thewire clamping rod to fold/unfold, a form fixing rod provided with a form fixing groove on the outer side, and a form fixing power piece driving the form fixing rod to unfold/fold; and the moving direction of the wire clamping rod and the moving direction of the form fixing rod are opposite. The form fixing device in the structure is high in processing efficiency and high in rate of finished products, and the production cost of the finished product is greatly lowered.
title_abstract_original: 导线类工件用定形装置及音圈导线定形方法 本发明涉及导线类工件用定形装置及音圈导线定形方法；导线类工件用定形装置，包括安装座，设于安装座的收线机构，以及设于安装座的定形机构；所述收线机构包括下端设有收线槽的收线块，以及带动收线块移动的收线气缸；所述定形机构包括夹线杆，带动夹线杆收拢/展开的夹线动力件，外侧设有定形槽的定形杆，以及带动定形杆展开/收拢的定形动力件；所述夹线杆的运动方向与定形杆的运动方向相反。本结构的定形装置，加工效率高，成品率高，大大降低了成品。

title_abstract: Methods of reprogramming cells The present invention provides methods of reprogramming cells, for example, directly reprogramming a somatic cell of a first cell type into a somatic cell of a second cell type, are described herein. In particular, the present invention generally relates to methods for reprogramming a cell of an endoderm origin to a cell having pancreatic β-cell characteristics. The present invention also relates to an isolated population comprising reprogrammed cells, compositions and their use in the treatment of diabetes mellitus. In particular, the present invention relates to reprogramming a cell of an endoderm origin to a cell having pancreatic β-cell characteristics by increasing the protein expression of at least one transcription factor selected from Pdx1, Ngn3 or MafA in the cell of endoderm origin to reprogram the cell of an endoderm cell to a cell which exhibits at least one or at least two characteristics of an endogenous pancreatic β-cell.

title_abstract: Method and system for preparing ethanol based on sweet broomcorn straw solid fermentation This invention relates to a method and system of preparing ethanol based on the solid state fermentation of sweet sorghum stem, belonging to the ethanol production technology of solid state fermentation. It includes the following key processes and device: raw materials smash is to choose the suitable mill to smash sweet sorghum stalk, strain addition is to add ethanol bacteria at the entrance of solid-state fermentation tank, solid-state fermentation is that the raw materials added bacteria is fermented in the slant rotor solid-state fermentation tank, solid distillation is to distill the solid-state fermented materials to obtain ethanol.
title_abstract_original: Method and system for preparing ethanol based on sweet broomcorn straw solid fermentation This invention relates to a method and system of preparing ethanol based on the solid state fermentation of sweet sorghum stem, belonging to the ethanol production technology of solid state fermentation. It includes the following key processes and device: raw materials smash is to choose the suitable mill to smash sweet sorghum stalk, strain addition is to add ethanol bacteria at the entrance of solid-state fermentation tank, solid-state fermentation is that the raw materials added bacteria is fermented in the slant rotor solid-state fermentation tank, solid distillation is to distill the solid-state fermented materials to obtain ethanol.

title_abstract: Gravel and binder mixt. for deep wells in brown coal mining, etc. Water-sepn. element for well linings of circular construction consists of a mixt. of 20 to 30 parts of an aggregate of 1 part of binding agent. Variants claimed include the aggregate being a filter gravel, pref. in the 1 to 4mm range, the binder having a polyurethane base, and a method of producing the element for a well lining.
title_abstract_original: ENTWAESSERUNGSELEMENT FUER DEN BRUNNENAUSBAU UND VERFAHREN ZU SEINER HERSTELLUNG Water-sepn. element for well linings of circular construction consists of a mixt. of 20 to 30 parts of an aggregate of 1 part of binding agent. Variants claimed include the aggregate being a filter gravel, pref. in the 1 to 4mm range, the binder having a polyurethane base, and a method of producing the element for a well lining.

title_abstract: Equipment for erecting segments of tubbing rings - has erection arm with radially and axially movable erection head The erection head is axially and radially movable by a mechanism consisting of a number of movable adjusting drives (27), parallel in the radial direction. These drives consist of double acting hydraulic cylinders (23), coupled to the erection head (12) by a linkage (25). This linkage consists of an angular arm (33) connected at one end to the adjusting drive (27) and at its other end to the erection head (12). The adjusting drives or the hydraulic cylinders are positioned inside the hollow erection arm. The erection arm (11) has a radially movable telescopic head (23) to which is coupled the erection head by the linkage.

recuperação e reutilização de fluido de perfuração com base em óleo recuperação e reutilização de fluido de perfuração com base em óleo. a presente invenção refere-se a métodos e sistemas relaiconados que são configurados para tratar um fluido de perfuração para fazer com que as gotículas de água coalesçam. uma ou mais fases são posteriormente separadas a partir do fluido de perfuração tratado. òleo e/ou sólidos separados a partir do fluido de perfuração tratado pode ser adicionado ao fluido de base.

title_abstract: OIL-BASED DRILLING FLUID RECOVERY AND REUSE Methods and related systems are configured to treat a drilling fluid to cause water droplets to coalesce. One or more phases are thereafter separated from the treated drilling fluid. The oil and / or solids separated from the treated drilling fluid may be added to a base fluid.

Gjenvinning og gjenbruk av oljebasert borefluid Fremgangsmåter og relaterte systemer konfigureres for å behandle et borefluid for å få vanndråper til å koalesere. En eller flere faser blir deretter separert fra det behandlede borefluidet. Oljen og / eller faststoffene som separeres fra det behandlede borefluidet kan tilsettes til et basisfluid.

title_abstract: Alarming device used in mine The invention discloses an alarming device used in a mine, which comprises a shell, wherein the inside of the shell is a hollow structure, an alarming lamp which can be sparkling is disposed on the surface of the shell, a voice broadcaster is linked on one end of the alarming lamp, a solar panel is linked on the other end of the alarming lamp, a circuit board is installed on one side of the voice broadcaster, the circuit board is successively linked to a temperature sensor, a particle detector and a gas detector, the circuit board is linked to an operation panel by a the sensor, and an observation window is disposed on the surface of the operation panel. The alarming device used in the mine can be easily applied in the mine, can automatically detect relevant parameters, can determine when alarming is necessary through parameter comparison, has high accuracy, can guarantee safety of workers in the mine and can also realize the alarming through a manual manner. The alarming device used in the mine is good in automation performance, flexible in utilization, good in practical performance and novel in design, is a very good innovative scheme, and has a promising market promotion prospect.

Verfahren zur Anzeige von zentral auf einem Computer gespeicherten Daten Die vorliegende Erfindung beschreibt ein Verfahren zur Anzeige von zentral auf einem Computer gespeicherten Daten auf mindestens einem entfernt angeordneten Monitor, aufweisend die Schritte: a) Eingabe von dauerhaft anzuzeigenden Daten in eine Datenbank; b) Eingabe von über einen begrenzten Zeitraum anzuzeigenden Daten in eine Datenbank; c) Übertragen mindestens eines Teils der in Schritt a) und b) in einer oder mehreren Datenbanken gespeicherten Daten auf einen entfernt angeordneten Monitor; d) Gemeinsames Darstellen von mindestens einem Teil der dauerhaft anzuzeigenden Daten und mindestens einem Teil der über einen begrenzten Zeitraum anzuzeigenden Daten auf einem entfernt angeordneten Monitor. Weiterhin beschreibt die vorliegende Erfindung ein System zum Durchführen des erfindungsgemäßen Verfahrens sowie ein mit dem Verfahren verbundenes Computerprogramm und einen elektronischen Datenträger.

title_abstract: Information interaction method and device, computer readable storage medium and electronic device The embodiment of the invention discloses an information interaction method and device, a computer readable storage medium and an electronic device. The method comprises the steps of obtaining user behavior data of each reference user in N reference users; according to the obtained user behavior data and a prediction model, obtaining the probability that each reference user generates a preset event output by the prediction model; wherein the input characteristics of the prediction model comprise M behavior characteristics; obtaining an analysis value of each behavior characteristic for each reference user according to a preset model interpretation tool and the probability corresponding to each reference user, and determining a weight value of each behavior characteristic for each referenceuser according to the obtained analysis value; and obtaining model analysis data of the prediction model according to the obtained user behavior data and the weight value of each behavior characteristic determined for each reference user, so as to carry out information interaction with the target user by a corresponding information interaction strategy according to the model analysis data. According to the embodiment of the invention, the information interaction effect can be improved.
title_abstract_original: 信息交互方法、装置、计算机可读存储介质及电子设备 本公开的实施例公开了一种信息交互方法、装置、计算机可读存储介质及电子设备。该方法包括：获取N个参考用户中的每个参考用户的用户行为数据；根据所获取的用户行为数据和预测模型，获得预测模型输出的每个参考用户发生预设事件的概率；预测模型的输入特征包括M种行为特征；根据预设模型解释工具和每个参考用户对应的概率，为每个参考用户获取每种行为特征的解析值，并根据所获取的解析值，为每个参考用户确定每种行为特征的权重值；根据所获取的用户行为数据及为每个参考用户确定的每种行为特征的权重值，获得预测模型的模型分析数据，以便根据模型分析数据，以相应信息交互策略与目标用户进行信息交互。本公开的实施例能够提升信息交互效果。

title_abstract: METHOD OF MANAGING ASSET COLLATERAL RISK AND APPARATUSES PERFORMING THE SAME Disclosed are a movable security risk managing method and devices for performing the same. According to an embodiment, a movable asset risk managing server comprises a controller which determines a risk state about a movable asset around a current location of the movable asset based on security data of the movable asset and manages an index of the movable asset based on the risk state. Therefore, the risk index of the movable security is efficiently managed.
title_abstract_original: 동산 담보 지표 위험 관리 방법 및 이를 수행하는 장치들 동산 담보 위험 관리 방법 및 이를 수행하는 장치들이 개시된다. 일 실시 예에 따른 동산 담보 위험 관리 서버는 동산 담보의 담보 데이터에 기초하여 상기 동산 담보의 현재 위치를 중심으로 상기 동산 담보에 대한 위험 상태를 판단하고 상기 위험 상태에 기초하여 상기 동산 담보의 위험 지수를 관리하는 컨트롤러를 포함한다.

title_abstract: Feed additive for increasing weight and increasing hair of wool habit and preparing method thereof The invention provides a feed additive for increasing the weight and increasing hair of a wool habit. The feed additive is prepared from, by weight, 30-50 parts of radix astragali, 20-30 parts of radix codcnopsitis pilosulas, 20-30 parts of pine needle meal, 20-30 parts of the root of Chinese pulsatilla, 20-30 parts of herba portulacae, 10-15 parts of medical stone, 10-15 parts of fructus crataegi, 15-20 parts of fructus hordei germinatus, 10-15 parts of massa medicata fermentata, 10-15 parts of endothelium corneum gigeriae galli, 8-12 parts of rhizoma atractylodis, 8-12 parts of folium isatidis, 8-12 parts of cortex phellodendri, 8-12 parts of radix scutellariae, 8-12 parts of pericarpium citri reticulatae and 5-9 parts of radix liquiritiae. The invention further provides a preparing method of the feed additive. The feed additive has the functions of clearing away heat and drying dampness, replenishing qi to invigorate the spleen, helping digestion and harmonizing the stomach, and canbe used for promoting the growth of the wool habit, increasing the hair yield and strengthening the disease resistance of the wool habit. The feed additive is easy to prepare, has obvious effects, and is safe, free of side effects, and suitable for being applied and popularized on a large scale by rabbit breeders.
title_abstract_original: 种毛兔增重增毛的饲料添加剂及其制备方法 本发明提供种毛兔增重增毛的饲料添加剂，由以下重量份的原料组成：黄芪30‑50份、党参20‑30份、松针粉20‑30份、白头翁20‑30份、马齿苋20‑30份、麦饭石10‑15份、山楂10‑15份、麦芽15‑20份、神曲10‑15份、鸡内金10‑15份、苍术8‑12份、大青叶8‑12份、黄柏8‑12份、黄芩8‑12份、陈皮8‑12份、甘草5‑9份。本发明还提供其制备方法，该种饲料添加剂具有清热燥湿、益气健脾、消食和胃的功效，可用于毛兔促生长、提高产毛量并且还可以增强毛兔的抗病能力。本发明种毛兔增重增毛的饲料添加剂制备简单、效果显著，安全、无副作用，适合兔养殖人员规模推广应用。

title_abstract: VOLUME ADJUSTMENT METHOD AND DEVICE Provided are a volume adjustment method and device. The volume adjustment method is applied to a terminal, and the terminal comprises a camera. The method comprises: firstly, displaying an operating area and a reference line in the operating area to a user, and obtaining, from a camera, a gesture video about the user carrying out a dangling operation on the operating area; then, acquiring, according to the gesture video, a dangling movement trajectory in the operating area when the user carries out the dangling operation; displaying, according to the dangling movement trajectory, a mapping movement trajectory of a virtual mapping icon in the operating area, wherein the movement direction and displacement of the dangling movement trajectory is consistent with that of the mapping movement trajectory; improving the accuracy and efficiency of a gesture operation by means of displaying the mapping movement trajectory of the virtual mapping icon in the operating area; and finally, determining a volume adjustment amount according to the mapping movement trajectory of the virtual mapping icon relative to the reference line. The trajectory of the virtual mapping icon relative to the reference line is used as a basis for determining the volume adjustment amount, thereby reducing the requirements for the accuracy of the user's gesture operation and improving the efficiency of the gesture operation.
title_abstract_original: 音量调节方法和装置 本发明提供一种音量调节方法和装置。音量调节方法应用于终端，终端包括摄像头，方法包括：首先向用户显示操作区和操作区内的基准线，并从摄像头获得用户对操作区进行悬空操作的手势视频；然后根据手势视频，获取用户进行悬空操作时在操作区的悬空移动轨迹；根据悬空移动轨迹，在操作区显示虚拟映射图标的映射移动轨迹，其中，悬空移动轨迹与映射移动轨迹的移动方向和位移一致；通过在操作区显示虚拟映射图标的映射移动轨迹，提高手势操作的准确性和效率；最后根据虚拟映射图标相对于基准线的映射移动轨迹，确定音量调节量，以虚拟映射图标相对于基准线的轨迹作为确定音量调节量的依据，降低对用户手势操作精确度的要求，提高手势操作效率。

title_abstract: Oil well drilling apparatus with traveling block guide
title_abstract_original: Oil well drilling apparatus with traveling block guide
OLIEBOORINRICHTING.

title_abstract: Oil well drilling apparatus with traveling block guide 1,102,488. Boring earth &c. LEE C. MOORE CORPORATION. 29, Sept., 1966 [17, May, 1966], No. 43593/66. Heading E1F. In an oil well drilling derrick 1, the travelling block 4 is restrained from lateral movement by at least three taut guide cables 6 arranged between the top and bottom of the derrick and connected to the block at 7. In one arrangement four guide cables 6 are provided each supported by pulleys 8, 9 adjacent the legs of the derrick. In a modification, the cables are suspended from the derrick top, pass through guides on the block and are fixed to pistons at their lower ends. Each piston supports a weight equal to one-half the maximum load expected in the associated cable due to lateral forces on the block, and slides in a fixed cylinder. The upper end of each cylinder is connected to the lower end of the diagonally-opposite cylinder.

title_abstract: Duck feed and preparation method thereof The invention discloses a duck feed. The duck feed comprises the following components in parts by weight of 10-18 parts of bran, 8-16 parts of soybean meal, 20-50 parts of pine seed cakes, 20-100 parts of distillers' grains, 8-15 parts of corn flour, 5-6 parts of dried marine algae powder, 3-4 parts of proteases, 1-3 parts of vitamin A and 1-3 parts of vitamin B. A preparation method of the duck feed specially comprises the following steps of mixing the 10-18g of the bran with 8-16g of the soybean meal, 20-50g of the pine seed cakes, 20-100g of the distillers' grains, 8-15g of the corn flour,5-6g of the dried marine algae powder, 3-4g of the proteases, 1-3g of the vitamin A and 1-3g of the vitamin B, performing uniform stirring, and performing drying until feed cakes of which the water content is 40-50% are obtained; and putting the dried feed cakes in a granulation machine, and performing granulation, so that the duck feed is obtained. The duck feed has the advantages of being low incost, convenient to make and the like, the raw materials are easy to obtain, ducks fed with the duck feed are high in weight gain, and after the ducks are fed with the duck feed, the mouth feel of the duck meat and duck eggs is improved.
title_abstract_original: 种鸭饲料及其制备方法 本发明公开了种鸭饲料，以重量份计，包括如下组分：麸皮：10‑18份，豆粕：8‑16份，松树籽饼：20‑50份，酒糟：20‑100份，玉米粉：8‑15份，海藻粉：5‑6份，蛋白酶：3‑4份，维生素A：1‑3份，维生素B：1‑3份。种鸭饲料的制备方法，具体步骤如下：将10‑18g麸皮、8‑16g豆粕、20‑50g松树籽饼、20‑100g酒糟、8‑15g玉米粉、5‑6g海藻粉、3‑4g蛋白酶、1‑3g维生素A、1‑3g维生素B进行混合，并搅拌均匀，烘干至含水量为40%‑50%的饲料饼；将烘干后的饲料饼投入制粒机内进行制粒即可。本发明具有原料易得，成本低廉，制作方便，饲养增肥快，鸭肉和鸭蛋口感好等优点。

title_abstract: Local dynamic dry-type waste water pump house for large-scale shield tunnel The invention relates to the technical field of design and construction of the urban rail transit and the railway, and particularly relates to a local dynamic dry-type waste water pump house for a large-scale shield tunnel. The local dynamic dry-type waste water pump house for the large-scale shield tunnel is characterized in that a waste water pool is divided into a water distribution gallery and mutually independent single-lattice water collecting basins by a structural wall; an independent waste water pump is arranged in each lattice of water collecting basin; a sluice hole communicated with the water distribution gallery is formed in each lattice of water collecting basin; an inspection manhole and a pump hole are formed at the top of each lattice of water collecting basin; a service ladder communicated to the inside of the corresponding water collecting basin is arranged below each inspection manhole; a tunnel line gully is communicated with the water distribution gallery by a water inlet pipe; the waste water pumps are connected by pressure waste water pipelines and are connected to an adjacent station or the outdoors. The local dynamic dry-type waste water pump house for the large-scale shield tunnel has the advantages that a space at the bottom of a shield is sufficiently utilized; a section of the shield is not increased; the waste water pumps are overhauled on the spot, but do not influence normal operation of the rail transit; the waste water pumps are overhauled on the spot, but do not influence drainage of the waste water pump house.
title_abstract_original: 种大型盾构隧道局部动态干式废水泵房 本发明涉及城市轨道交通、铁路设计与施工技术领域，尤其涉及种大型盾构隧道局部动态干式废水泵房，其特征在于：所述废水池由结构墙分割成配水廊道和相互独立的单格集水池，每格所述集水池内均设置独立的废水泵，每格所述集水池上均设置有与配水廊道相连通的闸孔，每格所述集水池的顶部均设有检修人孔和泵孔，所述检修人孔下方设置通向集水池内部的检修爬梯，所述隧道线路集水沟通过进水管与配水廊道相连通，所述废水泵通过压力废水管道连接并接至相临车站或室外。本发明具有充分利用盾构底部空间，不加大盾构断面，废水泵就地维修但不影响轨道交通的正常运行，废水泵就地检修但不影响废水泵房排水的优势。

title_abstract: A PROCESS OF FUNCTIONAL GARLIC VINEGER PURPOSE: A method for producing functional garlic vinegar is provided to preserve allicin, which is a main pharmacological ingredient of garlic and ensure anti-cancer and sterilization activities. CONSTITUTION: A step of producing functional garlic vinegar comprises: a step of preparing garlic(S1); a step of mixing garlic, inorganic salt, acetic acid, sugar or honey, and purified water then fermenting at 60°C for 45 days(S2); a step of inoculating acetobacter to mixture of fermented garlic composition, medium and ethanol and shaking at 35°C and 120rpm(S3); and a step of fermenting for 30 days and maturing for 35 days(S4). In the second step(S2), the mixture contains 40 weight% of garlic, 19 weight% of inorganic salt, 1.0 weight% of acetic acid, 10 weight% of saccharides(sugar or honey), and 30 weight% of purified water.

title_abstract: Method and System Using Computing Applications for Mutual Benefit of Connected Parties in the Real Estate Industry A method and system for connecting parties in the real estate industry comprising a first application targeted at partners and agents and a second application targeted at agents and homeowners whereby the first application and the second application work together to create benefit for all parties involved. Message alerts are generated and sent to agents and homeowners bearing the branding of the partner and agent respectively upon the occurrence of an event beneficial to said party. The second application further has a reminder utility and a directory utility for aid in the maintenance of a homeowner's home.

Message alerts are generated and sent to agents and homeowners bearing the branding of the partner and agent respectively upon the occurrence of an event beneficial to said party. title_abstract: CONTINUOUS ROD MACHINE 1365517 Cigarette and cigar making- machines HAUNI-WERKE KORBER & CO KG 23 Nov 1971 [23 Jan 1971] 54378/71 Heading A2C A continuous rod filler stream is formed by showering tobacco from a shoot 13 onto a suction backed air permeable conveyer belt 2 at the bottom of a duct 1, the side walls 3, 4 of which increase in height in the conveying direction 11 of the belt 2 in such manner that their top edges are at least approximately level with the level of the filler stream all along that part of the duct 1 in whcih the filler stream is built up, the duct 1 widening into a funnel shape above the level of the filler stream. Preferably the width of the duct 1 increases in the conveying direction 11. A trimming device 19, also provided, comprises a rotating circular knife 22 and a contra-rotating toothed wheel 21, which latter removes the surplus tobacco trimmed off by the former.

DISPOSITIVO PER FORMARE UN FLUSSO DI TABACCO IN MACCHINE CONTINUE A BACO PER SIGARETTE

title_abstract: DOWN HOLE APPARATUS FOR SENSING AND STORING VALUES OF PHYSICAL PARAMETERS Apparatus for digitally recording the value of pressure and temperature, or other parameters, in a borehole logging instrument. In one embodiment the values of the earth parameter are converted to an A.C. signal, the frequency of which is a function of the value of the parameter. Clock means are provided for presenting, at selected time intervals, voltage pulses of selected short time length. The A.C. signal is gated to a counter for the selected short interval of time, and the count of the counter becomes a measure of the parameter. Solid state memory means are provided, and the output of the counter in the form of binary bits is stored in the memory. Means are provided for retrieving the instrument and reading out of the memory the binary bits as stored.

title_abstract: DIFFERENTIAL FILL VALVE ASSEMBLY FOR CASED HOLE A differential fill valve assembly for application in float collars or shoes in a well casing can provide locking mechanisms to limit premature movement of an activating sleeve while facilitating desired advancement of the activating sleeve. The valve assembly comprises a backpressure flapper valve and an activating sleeve slidably disposed within a housing. The activating sleeve initially maintains the flapper valve in an open position while the activating sleeve is maintained in its position by upper and/or lower lock rings on either side of a shoulder of the activating sleeve. A tripping ball is dropped to seat in the activating sleeve. Pressure applied on the ball moves the activating sleeve downward, releasing the backpressure flapper valve, after which the tripping ball exits the bottom of the assembly. The lower lock ring maintains the activating sleeve in its lower position.

title_abstract_original: MONTAJE DE VALVULA DE LLENADO DIFERENCIAL PARA ORIFICIOS ENTUBADOS. Un montaje de válvula de llenado diferencial para la aplicación en zapatas o collares de flotación en una tubería de revestimiento de pozo puede proporcionar mecanismos de cierre para limitar el desplazamiento prematuro de un manguito de activación y al mismo tiempo facilitar el avance deseado del manguito de activación. El montaje de válvula comprende una válvula de charnela de contrapresión y un manguito de activación dispuesto de manera deslizable dentro de un alojamiento. El manguito de activación mantiene inicialmente la válvula de charnela en una posición abierta mientras el manguito de activación se mantiene en su posición mediante anillos de cierre superiores y/o inferiores de cualquier lado de un borde del manguito de activación. Se introduce una esfera de maniobra para que se asiente sobre el manguito de activación. La presión aplicada sobre la esfera desplaza el manguito de activación hacia abajo, mediante lo cual se libera la válvula de charnela de contrapresión, tras lo cual la esfera de maniobra sale del fondo del montaje. El anillo de cierre inferior mantiene el manguito de activación en su posición inferior.

title_abstract: DIFFERENTIAL FILL VALVE ASSEMBLY FOR CASED HOLE A differential fill valve assembly for application in float collars or shoes in a well casing can provide locking mechanisms to limit premature movement of an activating sleeve while facilitating desired advancement of the activating sleeve. The valve assembly comprises a backpressure flapper valve and an activating sleeve slidably disposed within a housing. The activating sleeve initially maintains the flapper valve in an open position while the activating sleeve is maintained in its position by upper and/or lower lock rings on either side of a shoulder of the activating sleeve. A tripping ball is dropped to seat in the activating sleeve. Pressure applied on the ball moves the activating sleeve downward, releasing the backpressure flapper valve, after which the tripping ball exits the bottom of the assembly. The lower lock ring maintains the activating sleeve in its lower position.

?conjunto de válvula, coluna de ferramenta, e, método de travamento? um conjunto de válvula de enchimento diferencial para aplicação em colares de flutuação ou sapatas num revestimento de poço pode fornecer mecanismos de travamento para limitar o movimento prematuro de uma luva de ativação, embora facilitando o avanço desejado da luva de ativação. o conjunto de válvula compreende uma válvula de aba de contrapressão e uma luva de ativação disposta de forma deslizante dentro de um alojamento. a luva de ativação inicialmente mantém a válvula de aba numa posição aberta enquanto a luva de ativação é mantida na sua posição por anéis de travamento superiores e/ou inferiores de cada lado de um ressalto da luva de ativação. uma esfera de manobra é jogada para assentar na luva de ativação. a pressão aplicada na esfera move a luva de ativação para baixo, liberando a válvula de aba de contrapressão, após o que a esfera de manobra sai do fundo do conjunto. o anel de travamento inferior mantém a luva de ativação em sua posição inferior.

title_abstract: ANTI-VARICELLA-ZOSTER VIRUS ANTIBODY Provided are a neutralizing monoclonal antibody or an antigen-binding fragment thereof which specifically binds to the varicella-zoster virus, and a preparation method for producing the antibody. Also provided is the use of the antibody in the diagnosis, disease prevention and treatment of an infected individual.

title_abstract: Antibody against varicella-zoster virus The invention relates to a neutralizing monoclonal antibody or an antigen-binding fragment thereof, which are specific for varicella-zoster virus and bind with high affinity, and a preparation method of producing the antibody. The antibody has high potency in neutralizing varicella-zoster virus infection. The invention further relates to an epitope to which the antibody bind, and an application of the antibody in diagnosis, prevention and treatment of infected individuals.

title_abstract: NETWORK NODE, A COMMUNICATION SYSTEM AND ASSOCIATED METHODS A first network node for communicating with a second network node over a first communication network is described. The second network node is arranged to communicate over the first communication network in a first part of a communication period and arranged to not communicate over the first communication network in a second part of the communication period. The first network node has a send unit for sending data formatted in data packets to the second network node, a statistics unit arranged for determining a success statistics, an availability estimator for deriving an availability estimation from the success statistics, and a send controller arranged to control the send unit in dependence on the availability estimation. Also described is a communication system, a method of estimating availability of a second network node, a method of communicating by a first network node, and an associated computer program product.

title_abstract: Kit and method for detecting ALDH2 polymorphism based on FRET probe melting curve The present invention discloses a kit and a method for detecting ALDH2 polymorphism based on a FRET probe melting curve. The kit comprises a forward primer and a reverse primer for specifically amplifying the gene ALDH2 (rs671) locus, and a pair of fluorescently labeled probes for specifically distinguishing the gene ALDH2 (rs671) polymorphism, wherein the specific sequence of the forward primer is F: 5'-AGCAGACCCTAAATCCCTGG-3, the specific sequence of the reverse primer is R: 5'-CACCAGCAGACCCTCAAG-3', the specific sequence of the sensor probe is 5'-TGCAGGCATACACTGAAGTGAAAACTGT-FAM-3', and the specific sequence of the anchor probe is 5'-ROX-AGTGTGGGACCTGCTGGGGGCT-P-3'. According to the present invention, the advantages of good specificity, high sensitivity, low price, simple operation and avoidance of pollution caused by tune opening operation are provided, and the result can be intuitively and clearly interpreted through the TM value read by the instrument.

title_abstract: Real estate value estimation method based on artificial neural network statistic model The invention discloses a real estate value estimation method based on a statistic model and map surrounding resource influence factors. The artificial neural network statistic model is adopted, the current average transaction price of real estate is used as a base price, and the base factors influencing a housing price and the weight of the factors are adjusted to build a housing price estimation neural network model including an input layer, a middle hidden layer and an output layer. The average transaction price of the real estate and all influence factors are included in the input layer, the structure of the middle hidden layer is the core content of the method, and the output layer includes the estimation price of the real estate. The estimated value of the price of the real estate is not a black box operation based on the experience of estimators any more, and is a resource capable of being publically used by people, the influence of all environment factors and the influence factors on the housing price is graphically displayed more visually, and people are made to understand the estimation component of the housing value more clearly. The flow chart of the method is shown as an attached map.
