title_abstract: Control system and valve arrangement for multi-leg mine roof supports A control system for a multi-leg mine roof support, comprising a main control valve 2, at least two leg circuits 4A, 4B, an auxiliary valves 6A, 6B associated with each leg circuit 4A, 4B, each auxiliary valve 6A, 6B comprising a valve body 9 having a main port 10, two ports 11 and 12 intersecting the port 10 and each port 11 and 12 housing a spring-loaded, poppet valve member 13, 14, the port 11 being intersected by an auxiliary inlet port 15 connectable to a pressure fluid supply line 7 which by-passes the main valve 2, the intersection being at a neck 16 between the valve member 13 and a head 17 carried by the neck 16, the head 17 being subjectable to fluid pressure within the port 10 and being displaceable from the port 10 to unseat the valve member 13 upon fluid loading on the head 17 being greater than spring loading in the opposite direction, a transfer port 19 connecting the port 11 downstream of the valve member 13 thereof to the port 12, the poppet valve 14 in the port 12 being openable upon fluid passing through the port 11 to the port 12 via the port 19, and thereby into the port 10, and the second poppet valve 14 being closeable under the influence of its spring 20 upon the fluid pressure in the port 10 equalling the fluid pressure in the port 12, the port 19 and the port 11, with a communicating bore 21 extending between the port 19 of the first valve body 9 and the or each second valve body 9, whereby manual opening of the first valve member 6A or 6B of any valve body 9 results not only in the opening of the second valve member 14 of that body under the action of pressure fluid within the ports 11, 19, 12, but also in the opening of the second valve member 14 in the or each second valve body 9 under the action of pressure fluid passing to the port 19 of the or each second valve body 9 via the communicating bore 21. <IMAGE>

Procédé de classification d’annonces immobilières à l’aide d’apprentissage machine L’invention définit un procédé et un dispositif implémentant le procédé, permettant d’apprendre puis reconnaître les annonces immobilières de location et d’achat qui proposent le même bien physique. Le procédé possède 2 phases. Pendant sa phase d’entraînement, le procédé extrait les caractéristiques des annonces, regroupe les annonces en paires d’annonces, puis classe les paires d’annonces en fonction d’une liste de critères satisfaits et des indications fournis par l’utilisateur sur la similarité des annonces. Pendant sa phase de traitement, le procédé reçoit plusieurs annonces, les regroupe en paires d’annonces, puis identifie les critères identiques entre chaque paire d’annonces. Le système par la suite calcule la probabilité pour chaque paire d’annonces qu’elle soit identique, puis la probabilité qu’elle ne le soit pas, sachant que les critères préalablement identifiés sont satisfaits. C’est la plus grande des deux probabilités qui permet de conclure. Le procédé fusionne enfin les paires identiques qui représentent le même bien physique. Ce procédé a été implémenté sur ordinateur au sein d’une application intelligente d’aide à la recherche de biens immobiliers.

title_abstract: House property management system and method based on 2D code and locating via intelligent mobile terminal The invention discloses a house property management system and method based on a 2D code and locating via an intelligent mobile terminal. The house property management system comprises a house property management service system and the intelligent mobile terminal, the intelligent mobile terminal is provided with a house property management application system, and comprises a camera, a 2D code identification system and a positioning system, and the house property management service system is connected with a 2D code printing module; the house property management service system generates a room 2D code according to attribute information of a room, controls the 2D code printing module, stores the attribute information of the room, and manages checks result information; the house property management application system obtains the attribute information of the room according to the room 2D code, compares the obtained attribute information of the room with room attribute information stored in a background, and calls a house property modification page form to modify the room attribute information stored in the background; and a comparison result and positioning information serve as a checking result, and the checking result is backfed. According to the system and method, the intelligent terminal uses the page form to maintain the house property information, and the system and method are efficient, convenient and rapid.
title_abstract_original: 基于二维码和智能移动终端定位的房产管理系统和方法 本发明公开了种基于二维码和智能移动终端定位的房产管理系统，包括房产管理服务系统和智能移动终端，智能移动终端安装有房产管理应用系统，包括摄像头、二维码识别系统和定位系统，房产管理服务系统连接二维码打印模块；房产管理服务系统，用于根据房间属性信息生成房间二维码，控制二维码打印模块，存储房间属性信息，管理盘点结果信息；房产管理应用系统，根据房间二维码获取房间属性信息，将获取的房间属性信息与后台存储的房间属性信息比对，调用房产信息修改页面表单修改后台存储的房间属性信息；将比对结果以及定位信息作为盘点结果进行反馈。本发明通过智能终端应用页面表单现场进行房产信息维护，高效、便捷、快速。

title_abstract: Comprehensive treatment system for underground coal gangue of coal mine The invention discloses a comprehensive treatment system for underground coal gangue of a coal mine. The comprehensive treatment system solves the problems of coal-gangue separation and gangue utilization. The comprehensive treatment system includes an integrated gangue warehouse, a gangue warehouse-roof chamber, a crossheading of the gangue warehouse, a filling crossheading, a crossheading of thewarehouse-roof chamber, an air-intake hole, and track alleys. The integrated gangue warehouse includes a coal gangue warehouse, a gangue warehouse, and a filling gangue warehouse. The coal gangue warehouse and the gangue warehouse have the same elevation, and the filling gangue warehouse is installed under the coal gangue warehouse and the gangue warehouse. The entrance of the coal gangue warehouse is connected to the entrance of the gangue warehouse by the gangue ware-roof chamber, the exit of the coal gangue warehouse and the exit of the gangue warehouse are arranged on the top portion of the crossheading of the gangue warehouse, the crossheading of the gangue warehouse is connected with two track alleys, the entrance of the filling gangue warehouse is arranged in the crossheading of the gangue warehouse and the exit of the filling gangue warehouse is arranged in the crossheading of the filling crossheading, and the filling crossheading is connected to the cross heading of the gangue warehouse by the air-intake hole. The comprehensive treatment system for the underground coal gangue of the coal mine also has the advantages that storage and transportation capacity of the gangue is strong; the transportation conflict between coal and gangue is eased, the coal quality is improved, and the gangue is collected and utilized.
title_abstract_original: 种煤矿井下煤矸综合处理系统 本发明公开了种煤矿井下煤矸综合处理系统，解决了煤矸分离以及矸石利用的问题，该系统包括综合矸体仓、矸石仓仓顶硐室、矸石仓联络巷、充填联络巷、仓顶硐室联络巷、进风孔和轨道大巷，综合矸体仓包括煤矸仓、矸石仓和充填矸石仓，煤矸仓与矸石仓标高相同，充填矸石仓设置在煤矸仓和矸石仓之下，矸石仓顶硐室将煤矸仓和矸石仓入口相连，煤矸仓和矸石仓的出口均设置在矸石仓联络巷顶部，矸石仓联络巷连接两条轨道大巷，充填矸石仓的入口设置在矸石仓联络巷内，出口设置在充填联络巷内，进风孔连接充填联络巷与矸石仓联络巷。煤矿井下煤矸综合处理系统还具有矸石储运能力强，缓解煤与矸石的运输冲突，提高煤质，收集并利用矸石的优点。

title_abstract: UNIDIRECTIONAL SAW EXCITER PURPOSE:To increase the exciting efficiency extremely high, by dividing an electrode having three pieces as one set for a section, into 2 pieces and one, fitting them on the front and back side of a piezoelectric thin film, and making the thickness of this piezoelectric thin film several tens % of a SAW wave length. CONSTITUTION:On a substrate made of glass medium or the like, 0 deg. comb type electrodes 1211, 1212... and 120 deg. comb type electrodes 1221, 1222... are formed. A piezoelectric thin film 11 made of zinc oxide or the like is grown with sputtering. The thickness of this piezoelectric thin film 11 is taken as several tens % of the wave lenfth of a SAW filter. Remaining 240 deg. comb type electrodes 1231, 1232... are formed on the upper side of the piezoelectric thin film 11. Through an alternating electric field from a 120 deg. phase device, electrodes 1211 1221, 1231/ 1212, 1222, 1232/..., three electrodes as one pair, are driven with a phase difference of 120 deg. sequentially for unidirectional excitation.

title_abstract: Compound for resisting tumor as well as preparation method and purposes thereof The invention discloses a compound for resisting a tumor. The compound is B-nor-3-hydroxyiminocholest-4-ene-6(4'-phenyl)thiosemicarbazone, the chemical formula of the B-nor-3-hydroxyiminocholest-4-ene-6(4'-phenyl)thiosemicarbazone is as shown in a formula 5 in the description, or the compound is 3-aza-4-oxo-6-(2'-(5'- methylamino)thiadiazole)-A-iso-B-norcholest-4a-ene, and the chemical formula of the 3-aza-4-oxo-6-(2'-(5'- methylamino)thiadiazole)-A-iso-B-norcholest-4a-ene is as shown in a formula 6 in the description. The invention also discloses a preparation method of compound. The preparation method comprises the following steps of oxidizing a compound 1, which is prepared by starting from cholesterol, through a Jone's reagent to obtain a compound 2, subsequently, making the compound 2 singly react with methylthiosemicarbazone and phenyl-thiosemicarbazone respectively, so as to obtain a compound 3a and a compound 3b respectively, afterwards, carrying out oximation on 3-carbonyl of the compounds 3a and 3b respectively, so as to further obtain a compound 4 and a compound 5 respectively, wherein the compound 5 is the B-nor-3-hydroxyiminocholest-4-ene-6(4'-phenyl)thiosemicarbazone. The invention also discloses a purpose of the compound for resisting the tumor. The invention also discloses a purpose of the compound for preparing a medicine for treating a lung cancer.
title_abstract_original: 用于抗肿瘤的化合物及其制备方法和用途 本发明公开了种用于抗肿瘤的化合物，该化合物为B‑降‑3‑肟基胆甾‑4‑烯‑6‑(4'‑苯基)缩胺硫脲，其化学式如式5所示：或者该化合物为3‑氮杂‑4‑氧代‑6‑(2'‑(5'‑甲氨基)噻二唑)‑A‑同‑B‑降胆甾‑4a‑烯，其化学式如式6所示：本发明还公开了化合物的制备方法，包括如下步骤：由胆甾醇出发所制备得到的化合物1经Jone’s试剂氧化得到化合物2，之后化合物2与甲基缩氨硫脲和苯基缩氨硫脲各自分别反应，分别得到化合物3a和3b，然后对化合物3a和3b的3‑位羰基分别进行肟化，且分别得到化合物4和化合物5，所述化合物5为B‑降‑3‑肟基胆甾‑4‑烯‑6‑(4'‑苯基)缩胺硫脲。本发明还公开了化合物用于抗肿瘤的用途。本发明还公开了化合物用于制备治疗肺癌药物的用途。

title_abstract: CONFIGURABLE GRAPHICAL USER INTERFACE USEFUL IN MANAGING DEVICES CONNECTED TO A NETWORK A system for providing a configurable graphical user interface useful in managing network devices (16-22) connected to a network, the system using one or more servers (14) and one or more clients(12), each server receiving messages from and sending messages to a set of the network devices (16-22) via a standard server/device protocol, each client communicating with at least one server via a client/server protocol and providing a graphical user interface (32) for receiving requests from a user and displaying information to the user relating to the network devices (16-22), the client (12) initiating a graphical user interface in response to a user input by sending an initiation message to the server (14), and the server then sending resource information and a data stream relating to the current state of the network devices.

title_abstract: Hydraulic control arrangement for support assemblies The invention relates to a hydraulic control arrangement for underground support assemblies. In addition to being provided with their conventional supply lines, the piston spaces (6) of the supporting props (7) are provided with a further disposal line (11) which is directly attached to the return line (R). When the supporting prop (7) is being withdrawn, the directional control valve (1) is by-passed by the additional return line (11) and is thereby largely protected against the release shocks occurring when the supporting prop (7) is being withdrawn. <IMAGE>

title_abstract: Real estate appraisal drawing method and system The present invention provides a real estate appraisal drawing method and system, which comprises the following steps: acquiring real estate appraisal data of a region; Filtering and processing the appraisal data; and generating an appraisal curve for the appraisal data that have been filtered and processed. The technical proposal provided by the invention has the advantages of realizing the drawing of appraisal curves.
title_abstract_original: 房地产评价绘制方法及系统 本发明提供了种房地产评价绘制方法及系统，所述方法包括如下步骤：获取个区域的房地产评价数据；对该评价数据进行过滤处理；将过滤处理后的评价数据生成评价曲线。本发明提供的技术方案具有实现评价曲线绘制的优点。

title_abstract: Real estate information verification method and device, storage medium and electronic device The embodiment of the invention discloses a real estate information verification method and device, a storage medium and an electronic device. The method comprises the steps of obtaining a feature information set corresponding to house property information of a to-be-verified house resource; and querying a preset building dictionary according to the feature information set of each to-be-verified house resource, and determining whether the to-be-verified house resource is a false house resource or not according to a query result. Through using the technical scheme of the embodiment of the invention, the feature information in the house property information of the to-be-verified house resource is verified through the standard feature information in the real house resource. Therefore, the effect of quickly identifying the false house resources from the acquired house resources is achieved, and the problem that the false house resources are published to a network platform for display due to lack of an effective means for identifying the false house resources is avoided.
title_abstract_original: 一种房产信息的校验方法、装置、存储介质及电子设备 本公开实施例公开了一种房产信息的校验方法、装置、存储介质及电子设备。该方法包括获取待校验房源的房产信息对应的特征信息集；根据每个所述待校验房源的特征信息集查询预设楼盘词典，并根据查询结果确定所述待校验房源是否为虚假房源。采用本公开实施例的技术方案，通过真实房源中的标准特征信息验证待校验房源的房产信息中的特征信息，以确定待校验房源是否为虚假房源，从而，实现快速地由已获取的房源中识别出虚假房源的效果，避免因缺乏识别虚假房源的有效手段而将虚假房源发布到网络平台进行展示的问题发生。

title_abstract: PUMPING UNIT INSPECTION SENSOR ASSEMBLY, SYSTEM AND METHOD A sensor assembly can include a gyroscope, an accelerometer, and a housing assembly containing the gyroscope and the accelerometer. An axis of the gyroscope can be collinear with an axis of the accelerometer. A method of inspecting a well pumping unit can include attaching a sensor assembly to the pumping unit, recording acceleration versus time data, and in response to an amplitude of the acceleration versus time data exceeding a predetermined threshold, transforming the data to acceleration versus frequency data. A method of balancing a well pumping unit can include comparing peaks of acceleration versus rotational orientation data to peaks of acceleration due to circular motion, and adjusting a position of a counterweight, thereby reducing a difference between the peaks of acceleration due to circular motion and the peaks of the acceleration versus rotational orientation data for subsequent operation of the pumping unit.

INSPECCIÓN DE LA UNIDAD DE BOMBEO, ENSAMBLAJE DEL SENSOR, SISTEMA Y MÉTODO Un ensamblaje del sensor puede incluir un giroscopio, un acelerómetro y un ensamblaje de la carcasa que contiene el giroscopio y el acelerómetro. Un eje del giroscopio puede ser colineal con un eje del acelerómetro. Un método para inspeccionar una unidad de bombeo de pozo puede incluir unir un ensamblaje del sensor a la unidad de bombeo, registrar los datos de la aceleración en relación con el tiempo y, en respuesta a una amplitud de los datos de la aceleración en relación con el tiempo que excede un umbral predeterminado, transformar los datos a datos de aceleración en relación con la frecuencia. Un método para equilibrar una unidad de bombeo de pozo puede incluir comparar los picos de los datos de la aceleración en relación con la orientación rotatoria con los picos de la aceleración debido al movimiento circular y ajustar una posición de un contrapeso y, así, reducir una diferencia entre los picos de aceleración debido al movimiento circular y los picos de los datos de la aceleración en relación con la orientación rotatoria para el funcionamiento posterior de la unidad de bombeo.

Ensamblaje de sensor de inspección de unidad de bombeo, sistema y método RESUMEN DE LA INVENCIÓN Un ensamblaje de sensor puede incluir un giroscopio, un acelerómetro, y un ensamblaje de carcasa que contiene el giroscopio y el acelerómetro. Un eje del giroscopio puede ser colineal con un eje del acelerómetro. Un método de inspección de una unidad de bombeo de pozo puede incluir, unir un ensamblaje de sensor a la unidad de bombeo, registrar datos de aceleración frente a tiempo, y en respuesta a una amplitud de los datos de aceleración frente a tiempo que excede un umbral predeterminado, transformar los datos en datos de aceleración frente a frecuencia. Un método de balanceo de una unidad de bombeo de pozo puede incluir, comparar picos de datos de aceleración frente a orientación rotativa con picos de aceleración debido al movimiento circular, y ajustar una posición de un contrapeso, reduciendo así una diferencia entre los picos de aceleración debido al movimiento circular y los picos de los datos de aceleración frente a orientación rotativa para posterior operación de la unidad de bombeo.

title_abstract: FACILITATING DISTRIBUTED SNAT SERVICE Some embodiments of the invention provide novel methods for facilitating a distributed SNAT (dSNAT) middlebox service operation for a first network at a host computer in the first network on which the dSNAT middlebox service operation is performed and a gateway device between the first network and a second network. The novel methods enable dSNAT that provides stateful SNAT at multiple host computers, thus avoiding the bottleneck problem associated with providing stateful SNAT at gateways and also significantly reduces the need to redirect packets received at the wrong host by using a capacity of off-the-shelf gateway devices to perform IPv6 encapsulation for IPv4 packets and assigning locally unique IPv6 addresses to each host executing a dSNAT middlebox service instance that are used by the gateway device.

title_abstract: Hydraulic oil pipe wrench control device and operation method thereof The invention discloses a hydraulic oil pipe wrench control device and an operation method thereof, and belongs to the field of oil and gas production facilities. The hydraulic oil pipe wrench control device comprises a remote control assembly, a first control assembly, a first electromagnetic valve and a reversing valve, after the remote control assembly sends out a control signal, the first control assembly controls the first electromagnetic valve based on the control signal, and the first electromagnetic valve controls a piston of the reversing valve to move; the reversing valve is arranged on the hydraulic pipe wrench, so that any one of the two loops of the reversing valve is communicated with the motor of the hydraulic pipe wrench, the motor of the hydraulic pipe wrench rotates forwards or backwards, and therefore the hydraulic pipe wrench can be remotely controlled. The safety is relatively low when an operator operates within a wellhead of an oil and gas well and the rotating range of the hydraulic oil pipe wrench, and the effect of improving the safety of the hydraulic oil pipe wrench control device is achieved.
title_abstract_original: 液压油管钳控制装置及其操作方法 本申请公开了一种液压油管钳控制装置及其操作方法，属于油气生产设施领域。所述液压油管钳控制装置包括遥控组件、第一控制组件、第一电磁阀以及换向阀，在遥控组件发出控制信号后，第一控制组件基于该控制信号控制第一电磁阀，第一电磁阀控制换向阀的活塞移动，以使换向阀的两条回路中的任一回路与液压油管钳的马达连通，使得液压油管钳的马达正转或者反转，从而可实现远程控制液压油管钳，可以解决相关技术中液压油管钳控制装置在使用时，操作人员处于油气井井口和液压油管钳旋转范围内进行操作，安全性较低的问题，实现了提高液压油管钳控制装置的安全性的效果。

title_abstract_original: Machine for applying dry coatings to confections

title_abstract: Anti-aging health-care food The invention discloses anti-aging health-care food characterized by comprising substances in parts by weight as follows: 20-31 parts of Chinese yam, 11-20 parts of coix seeds, 9-14 parts of Chinese wolfberry fruit, 8-14 parts of a fatty acid ester compound, 3-6 parts of radix stemonae, 7-14 parts of angelica sinensis, 1-4 parts of cinnamon, 3-8 parts of safflower, 2-8 parts of hydrargyri oxydum rubrum, 1-7 parts of radix ophiopogonis, 3-7 parts of asparagus lettuce powder, 9-14 parts of chrysanthemum powder, 3-8 parts of chilli powder, 1-2 parts of polyoxyethylene polyoxypropylene pentaerythritol ether and 3-8 parts of polyoxyethylene polyoxypropylene ether. The food is mild in nature, reliable in effect, low in cost, free of toxic and side effects and wide in application range and can be taken by women, middle-aged people and old people. The women are full of energy and glossy in appearance after taking the food. After the middle-aged and old people take the food, aging can be delayed, the body health can be promoted, and the body vitality can be increased.

title_abstract: Alpha-fetoprotein peptides and uses for imaging
title_abstract_original: Alpha-fetoprotein peptides and uses for imaging

title_abstract: Alpha-fetoprotein peptides and uses for imaging The invention provides diagnostic procedures wherein the presence or absence of a cell-proliferating disorder, e.g., a breast cancer, may be determined. The imaging agents of the invention include alpha-fetoprotein hydrophilic analogs which have been determined to target cancers, e.g., breast cancer, and are also anti-cell proliferating in nature. These modulators contain amino acid structures which are arranged as a hydrophilic analog of an alpha-fetoprotein. The modulator may be a peptide; a peptidomimetic; or may be in the form of a pharmaceutically acceptable scaffold, such as a polycyclic hydrocarbon to which is attached the necessary amino acid structures. The imaging agents of the invention further comprise an imaging moiety that allows for the imaging of the area targeted by the imaging agent.

title_abstract: INFORMATION PROCESSING DEVICE, INFORMATION PROCESSING METHOD, AND PROGRAM Provided is an information processing device equipped with: an image evaluation unit for receiving an input of a room layout image of a subject room layout related to a property to be evaluated, and using machine learning device to generate a first evaluation vector related to a prescribed evaluation scale; a structure evaluation unit for generating a second evaluation vector related to the prescribed evaluation scale by means of arithmetic processing applied to a subject graph structure in which rooms in the subject room layout and connections between the rooms are represented as nodes and edges; and an output unit for using the first evaluation vector and the second evaluation vector to output an evaluation value related to the prescribed evaluation scale.
title_abstract_original: 情報処理装置、情報処理方法及びプログラム 評価対象の物件に係る対象間取りの間取り画像の入力を受け、機械学習器を用いて所定の評価尺度に係る第１評価ベクトルを生成する画像評価部と、前記対象間取りの部屋及び部屋間の接続がノード及びエッジとして表現される対象グラフ構造に対する演算処理により、前記所定の評価尺度に係る第２評価ベクトルを生成する構造評価部と、前記第１評価ベクトルと前記第２評価ベクトルを用いて前記所定の評価尺度に係る評価値を出力する出力部とを備える情報処理装置を提供する。

title_abstract: House-purchase evaluation method, related device, electronic equipment, and storage medium The invention relates to a house-purchase evaluation method, a related device, electronic equipment, and a storage medium. The method comprises the steps: obtaining the house-purchase intention information of a user, wherein the house-purchase intention information comprises the investment budget, and also comprises at least one piece of investment start time, investment purpose, investment regionand risk tolerance; obtaining the attribute list of all real estate projects; obtaining the investment capital according to investment budget through a predetermined algorithm, wherein the investmentcapital and the subinformation form all subparameters of one investment parameter; calculating the matching values of the investment parameters with the attributes of each real estate project according to the predetermined algorithm, and obtaining a matching value lit of the investment parameters with all real estate projects. The method can achieve the efficient and quick evaluation of a house suitable for the user, saves the time and energy of the user in screening the houses, is good in user experience, and is more scientific and objective in evaluation.
title_abstract_original: 购房评估方法及相关装置、电子设备与存储介质 本发明涉及种购房评估方法及相关装置、电子设备与存储介质，该方法包括获取用户的购房意向信息，该购房意向信息包括投资预算，还包括投资开启时间、投资目的、投资地域与风险承受能力中的至少项子信息；获取所有房产项目的属性列表；根据投资预算按预定算法获得投资本金，该投资本金与子信息构成项投资参数的所有子参数；根据预定算法计算投资参数与每项房产项目的属性的匹配值，得到该投资参数与所有房产项目的匹配值列表。本发明可高效快速地评估出适合用户的房源，节省了用户筛选房源的时间和精力，用户的体验感好，而且评估过程更科学客观。

title_abstract: Property management comprehensive supervision system based on knowledge base and construction method thereof The invention discloses a property management comprehensive supervision system based on a knowledge base and a construction method thereof. The property management comprehensive supervision system comprises an early-stage development project leaving problem knowledge base, an illegal construction and illegal decoration knowledge base and a settlement house community illegal phenomenon knowledge base. The early-stage development project remaining problem knowledge base is used for storing remaining problems existing in the project development process. And the illegal construction and illegal decoration knowledge base is used for storing illegal and dangerous construction problems occurring in property management in real time. The settlement house community violation phenomenon knowledge base is used for dynamically and intensively supervising property violation phenomena and problems related to settlement houses. The system has the advantages that handover management is well done, and the system is clear in property right and in-place in management; comprehensively renovating the old community. The property service level is improved, and illegal behaviors of property management areavoided. The system improves the quality of property service, and solves the problem of illegal behaviors of owners.
title_abstract_original: 基于知识库的物业管理综合监管系统及其构建方法 本发明公开了一种基于知识库的物业管理综合监管系统及其构建方法，包括：前期开发项目遗留问题知识库、违法建设与违规装修知识库、安置房小区违规现象知识库；前期开发项目遗留问题知识库用于存储在项目开发过程中所存在的遗留问题。违法建设与违规装修知识库用于实时地存储物业管理当中发生的违规和危建问题。安置房小区违规现象知识库用于动态和集中地监管与安置房相关物业违规现象和问题。本发明的优点在于：做好移交管理，系统做到产权明确、管理到位；对老旧小区进行综合整治；提升物业服务水平，杜绝物业管理违法违规行为；系统提升物业服务品质，解决业主的违法违规行为。
Convertisseur
Maschine zum Schaelen oder Reinigen von Gemuese mit einer umlaufenden Reibplatte

БУРИЛЬНАЯ ТРУБА Полезная модель относится к нефтегазодобывающей промышленности, а именно, к устройствам для бурения, и предназначена для предохранения от износа бурильной трубы. Бурильная труба с износостойкими частями содержит тело трубы с участком, имеющим утолщение под клиновые захваты, муфту и ниппель. Утолщение под клиновые захваты выполнено со стороны муфты на участке трубы в области работы клиновых захватов, причем длина участка трубы с утолщением составляет не менее 7% от номинальной длины трубы, а толщина трубы на участке с утолщением больше минимум на 43 % толщины основной стенки тела трубы. Применение заявляемой полезной модели обеспечивает повышение износостойкости трубы более чем в 3 раза. 2 ил.

СПЕЦПРОФИЛЬ Полезная модель используется в горно-шахтном оборудовании.Спецпрофиль содержит наклонные боковые стенки с углом наклона в оси симметрии спецпрофиля, прямолинейное днище, равное по толщине высоте фланцев и составляющее от 2,8 до 4,5 толщины боковых стенок, при этом глубина поверхностного слоя с ферритным зерном для днища и фланцев составляет в пределах 0,02-0,05 их толщины и высоты соответственно, а для боковых стенок- 0,05-0,12 их толщины.Полезная модель обладает необходимыми эксплуатационными характеристиками при меньшей ее металлоемкости.

title_abstract: Feeding device for chocolate-molding machines
title_abstract_original: Feeding device for chocolate-molding machines

title_abstract: Powerful self-sensing drill bit for cone The invention discloses a powerful self-sensing drill bit for a cone. The powerful self-sensing drill bit comprises a drill bit body; the drill bit body is internally provided with an installation hole, a positioning hole, a sensing hole, an oil supply hole, an oil passing hole, a decompression oil hole and a decompression through hole. The top of the installation hole extends to the outer surfaceof the drill bit body; the inner bottom wall of the installation hole communicates with the inner top wall of the positioning hole; the inner bottom wall of the positioning hole communicates with theinner top wall of the sensing hole; and the end inner walls of the oil supply hole and the through hole communicate with the inner lateral wall of the positioning hole. According to the powerful self-sensing drill bit for the cone, the effect of real time sensing detection of pressure applied to the cone bit during spudding is achieved. Pressure applied to the cone bit extrudes the surface of a micro pressure sensor through hydraulic oil, and the cone bit is subjected to real time detection through a pressure sensor, so that the problems that the tough working environment of the cone bit leads to the fact that the bit is liable to be damaged and working efficiency can be influenced are effectively solved.
title_abstract_original: 种自感式牙轮用强力钻头 本发明公开了种自感式牙轮用强力钻头，包括钻头体，所述钻头体的内部分别开设有安装孔、定位孔、感应孔、进油孔、通油孔、泄压油孔和泄压通孔，安装孔的顶部延伸至钻头体的外表面，安装孔的内底壁与定位孔的内顶壁连通，定位孔的内底壁与感应孔的内顶壁连通，进油孔和通孔的端内壁均与定位孔的内侧壁连通。该自感式牙轮用强力钻头，达到了对牙轮钻头开钻时所受的压力进行实时感应检测的效果，牙轮钻头开采时所受的压力通过液压油对微型压力传感器的表面进行挤压，进而通过压力传感器对牙轮钻头进行实时检测，从而有效的解决了牙轮钻头工作环境恶劣而导致整个钻头容易损坏，影响工作效率的问题。

title_abstract: STEREOSCOPIC VIDEO IMAGE DISPLAY DEVICE WITHOUT EYEGLASSES PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To provide a stereoscopic video image display device without eyeglasses, where a means to replace left/right video images is not needed and each person among many persons can properly view a stereoscopic video image, even when many persons view the video image. SOLUTION: This stereoscopic video image display device is provided with a video light source 1, that has a plurality of light emitting regions where lighting or extinguishing of each light-emitting region is switched, image display means 11, 12 with which a right eye video image and a left eye video image are temporarily alternately displayed on each of pixels arranged side by side, a 1st optical means 21, that leads a light from the video image light source 1 to each pixel and that forms a light source incoming light arrival narrow width region, corresponding to each light emitting region that is narrower in width than the width of each pixel in each pixel, a 2nd optical means 22 that leads light from the light source incoming light arrival narrow width region in each pixel to each of the left or right eye of viewers, and a light source control means 9 that controls lighting/extinguishing of each light emitting region of the light source 1, on the basis of an output of a sensor 10 which detects the positions of the viewers.
title_abstract_original: STEREOSCOPIC VIDEO IMAGE DISPLAY DEVICE WITHOUT EYEGLASSES PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To provide a stereoscopic video image display device without eyeglasses, where a means to replace left/right video images is not needed and each person among many persons can properly view a stereoscopic video image, even when many persons view the video image. SOLUTION: This stereoscopic video image display device is provided with a video light source 1, that has a plurality of light emitting regions where lighting or extinguishing of each light-emitting region is switched, image display means 11, 12 with which a right eye video image and a left eye video image are temporarily alternately displayed on each of pixels arranged side by side, a 1st optical means 21, that leads a light from the video image light source 1 to each pixel and that forms a light source incoming light arrival narrow width region, corresponding to each light emitting region that is narrower in width than the width of each pixel in each pixel, a 2nd optical means 22 that leads light from the light source incoming light arrival narrow width region in each pixel to each of the left or right eye of viewers, and a light source control means 9 that controls lighting/extinguishing of each light emitting region of the light source 1, on the basis of an output of a sensor 10 which detects the positions of the viewers.

title_abstract: Resonator, resonator assembly, filter and electronic equipment The invention provides a resonator, a resonator assembly, a filter and an electronic device. The resonator includes a substrate; an acoustic mirror; a seed layer; a bottom electrode formed on the seed layer; a piezoelectric layer; and a top electrode; the overlapped parts of the acoustic mirror, the bottom electrode, the piezoelectric layer and the top electrode jointly form an effective area of the resonator; wherein the area of the effective region covered by the seed layer in the transverse direction of the resonator is smaller than the area of the effective region, so that the effective electromechanical coupling coefficient of the resonator is adjusted by changing the area of the effective region covered by the seed layer. According to the invention, by changing the area of the seed layer covering the effective region, the parameters such as the effective electromechanical coupling coefficient of the resonator can be adjusted.
title_abstract_original: 谐振器、谐振器组件、滤波器及电子设备 本发明提供一种谐振器、谐振器组件、滤波器及电子设备。谐振器包括衬底；声学镜；种子层；底电极，形成于种子层上；压电层；以及顶电极；声学镜、底电极、压电层和顶电极的重叠部分共同形成谐振器的有效区域；其中，种子层在谐振器的横向上覆盖有效区域的面积小于有效区域的面积，以通过改变种子层的覆盖于有效区域的面积对谐振器的有效机电耦合系数进行调节。本发明通过改变种子层的覆盖于有效区域的面积，能够对谐振器的有效机电耦合系数等参数进行调节。

title_abstract: Resource allocation method and device
title_abstract_original: Resource allocation method and device

title_abstract:
RESOURCE ALLOCATION METHOD, AND APPARATUS THEREFOR

PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To provide a resource allocation method for a multicarrier radio communication system under a restricted environment.

SOLUTION: A user having a best priority metric is determined for each allocation target resource to obtain a first priority metric vector, one user is allocated to each allocation object resource under a restricted condition to obtain a second priority metric vector, a difference vector between the first and second priority metric vectors is calculated to obtain a reallocation resource index vector, reallocation is performed in a resource corresponding to a resource index in the reallocation resource index vector in accordance with the restricted condition to obtain a candidate user index vector and a candidate priority metric vector, and such a candidate priority metric vector as to maximize a sum of elements is retrieved to be defined as a resource allocation result.

title_abstract_original:
RESOURCE ALLOCATION METHOD, AND APPARATUS THEREFOR

PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To provide a resource allocation method for a multicarrier radio communication system under a restricted environment.

title_abstract: Resource allocation method and device The invention discloses a resource allocation method and a resource allocation device. The method comprises the following steps of: respectively determining a user with optimal priority measurement for each resource to be allocated so as to obtain a first priority measurement vector; respectively distinguishing a user for each resource to be allocated so as to obtain a second priority measurement vector under limiting conditions; calculating difference of corresponding elements of the first and second priority measurement vectors to obtain a difference vector, and finding an element over zero and obtaining a resource index which corresponds to the element and has the non-zero priority measurement to serve as a reallocation resource index vector; reallocating resources corresponding to the resource index in the reallocation resource index vector according to the limiting conditions so as to obtain a candidate user index vector and a candidate priority measurement vector; and finding the maximum of various elements of the candidate priority measurement vector to serve as a resource allocation result so as to realize resource allocation of a multi-carrier wireless communication system in an environment with limited bandwidth or power or transmission data. Moreover, the device has the highest system capacity.
title_abstract_original: Resource allocation method and device The invention discloses a resource allocation method and a resource allocation device. The method comprises the following steps of: respectively determining a user with optimal priority measurement for each resource to be allocated so as to obtain a first priority measurement vector; respectively distinguishing a user for each resource to be allocated so as to obtain a second priority measurement vector under limiting conditions; calculating difference of corresponding elements of the first and second priority measurement vectors to obtain a difference vector, and finding an element over zero and obtaining a resource index which corresponds to the element and has the non-zero priority measurement to serve as a reallocation resource index vector; reallocating resources corresponding to the resource index in the reallocation resource index vector according to the limiting conditions so as to obtain a candidate user index vector and a candidate priority measurement vector; and finding the maximum of various elements of the candidate priority measurement vector to serve as a resource allocation result so as to realize resource allocation of a multi-carrier wireless communication system in an environment with limited bandwidth or power or transmission data. Moreover, the device has the highest system capacity.

title_abstract: Expandable antenna mechanism of torsion spring driven shears-fork annular truss The invention discloses an expandable antenna mechanism of a torsion spring driven shears-fork annular truss. The mechanism comprises N folding and unfolding units with completely same structure, and the adjacent folding and unfolding units are connected by shared upper and lower flower discs to form a polygonal annular truss. Each folding and unfolding unit comprises two shears-fork rods, two groups of torsion spring driving assemblies, four connecting rods and four flower discs. All rotating pair axes on the shears-fork rods and the connecting rods in the same folding and unfolding unit are parallel. The mechanism has the characteristics of high rigidity, flexibility in motion and large folding ratio; and by adopting torsion spring driving, the whole mechanism is fast in unfolding and quick in response, and can be applied to communication satellites, space stations and space detectors.
title_abstract_original: 扭簧驱动剪叉式环形桁架可展开天线机构 种扭簧驱动剪叉式环形桁架可展开天线机构，包括N个折展单元，各折展单元结构完全相同，相邻折展单元通过共用的上下两个花盘连接，组成多面式环形桁架。每个折展单元包括两个剪叉杆、两组扭簧驱动组件、四个连杆和四个花盘。同折展单元中剪叉杆和连杆上所有的转动副轴线均平行。本发明具有刚度较高、运动灵活、折叠比大的特点，采用扭簧驱动，整体机构展开过程较快，响应迅速，可应用于通讯卫星、空间站和空间探测器上。

title_abstract: PLANT APOPTOSIS INDUCING FACTORS (AIFs) This invention relates to an isolated nucleic acid fragment encoding an AIF. The invention also relates to the construction of a chimeric gene encoding all or a portion of the AIF, in sense or antisense orientation, wherein expression of the chimeric gene results in production of altered levels of the AIF in a transformed host cell.

title_abstract: Earth pressure balance muddy water conveying type planetary multi-cutter square tube push bench and construction method thereof The invention provides an earth pressure balance muddy water conveying type planetary multi-cutter square tube push bench and the construction method thereof. The earth pressure balance muddy water conveying type planetary multi-cutter square tube push bench comprises a special-shaped three-cutterhead and a soil bin arranged at the front end of the tube push bench, first stirring rods are correspondingly fixed to the back faces of the three cutterheads in the special-shaped three-cutterhead, the first stirring rods are correspondingly located at the positions deviating from the autorotation centers of the cutterheads where the first stirring rods are located, and a water supply pipeline is connected to the soil bin. The water supply pipeline is provided with a water pump, a planetary driving device and a muddy water bin, and the water pump is used for controlling water supply; the planetary driving device is used for driving the three cutterheads in the special-shaped three-cutterhead to perform revolution and rotation motion to perform full-section planetary cutting; and the muddy water bin is arranged on the back face of the soil bin and communicates with the interior of the soil bin, the muddy water bin is connected with a slurry discharging pipeline used for conveying slurry to the ground, and the slurry discharging pipeline is provided with a slurry pump used for controlling slurry discharging. Earth pressure balance in the shell is controlled through a stepless speed change driving motor, and the technical problem that in the prior art, in the pipe roof construction process, a slurry discharging pipeline for conveying muddy water out of soil is prone to being blocked is solved.
title_abstract_original: 土压平衡泥水输送式行星多刀盘方形顶管机及其施工方法 本发明的土压平衡泥水输送式行星多刀盘方形顶管机及其施工方法，顶管机包括：异型三刀盘，设于该顶管机的前端的土仓，该异型三刀盘中三个刀盘的背面分别固定有第一搅拌棒，该第一搅拌棒分别位于偏离各自所在刀盘的自转中心的位置，该土仓上连接有供水管路，该供水管路设有控制供水的水泵；用于带动该异型三刀盘中三个刀盘公转和自转运动进行全断面行星式切削的行星驱动装置；泥水仓，设置于该土仓的背面且与该土仓内部连通，该泥水仓上连接有用于将泥浆输送至地面的排浆管路，该排浆管路设有控制排浆的泥浆泵。本发明通过无极变速驱动电机控制壳体内的土压平衡，解决了现有技术中管幕施工过程中泥水输送出土的排浆管路易堵塞的技术问题。

title_abstract: Identifying un-deployed features of an application Provided are systems and methods for indicating deployment of application features. In one embodiment, a method is provided that includes determining available features of a current deployment of an application for receiving machine-generated data from one or more data sources of a data system, determining un-deployed features of the current deployment of the application, wherein the un-deployed features comprise one or more of the available features that is configured to use input data from a data source and wherein the input data is not available to the feature in the current deployment of the application, and causing display of a deployment graphical user interface (GUI) that comprises an indication of the un-deployed features.

title_abstract: METHODS FOR OBTAINING AND USING PLANTS AND PLANT PARTS WITH INCREASED NUTRIENT, OIL, AND/OR PROTEIN CONTENT Methods for identifying Methylobacterium strains which can be used to increase mineral nutrient, vitamins, oil and/or protein content in plants are provided. Also provided are related methods of providing seed lots, food ingredients, feed ingredients, food, or feed with increased mineral nutrient, vitamins, oil and/or protein content. Methods of providing increased mineral nutrient and/or vitamin content, and/or increased oil and/or protein yield from plant seed lots are also provided.

Métodos para identificar uma cepa de methylobacterium, para produzir um ingrediente de alimento ou um ingrediente de ração e um alimento ou uma ração, para aprimorar o rendimento de óleo de semente e de proteína de semente de um lote de sementes, para prover um lote de sementes, e, planta ou parte de planta métodos para identificar uma cepa de methylobacterium, para produzir um ingrediente de alimento ou um ingrediente de ração e um alimento ou uma ração, para aprimorar o rendimento de óleo de semente e de proteína de semente de um lote de sementes, para prover um lote de sementes, e, planta ou parte de planta. são providos métodos para identificar cepas de methylobacterium que podem ser usadas para aumentar o teor de nutriente mineral, vitaminas, óleo e/ou teor de proteína em plantas. também são providos métodos relacionados para prover lotes de sementes, ingredientes de alimento, ingredientes de ração, alimento, ou ração com teor aumentado de nutriente mineral, vitaminas, óleo e/ou proteína. também são providos métodos para prover rendimento aumentado de nutriente mineral e/ou teor de vitamina, e/ou óleo aumentado e/ou proteína a partir de lotes de sementes de plantas.

title_abstract: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR THE IN-SITU PREPARATION OF MACROMOLECULES VIA UNIFORM GLOW DISCHARGE PLASMA The present invention is directed toward an apparatus for the in-situ preparation of macromolecules via uniform glow discharge plasma, and a metho d for using the apparatus. The method and apparatus are designed for preparing macromolecules from biological materials, including at least DNA, RNA, saccharides, lipids and proteins, in a manner which eliminates the need for biological solvents or chemicals, grinders, freezing, or detergents. The present invention is capable of operating at one atmosphere of pressure. The present method is a non-destructive, thus rendering the yielded macromolecul es amenable for further modification or analysis via exposure to the glow discharge plasma sustained at substantially atmospheric pressure in air or modified gas environments. The device includes a spaced apart pair of metall ic electrodes. At least one of the electrodes is covered with a high dielectric insulation material. A power supply is provided for energizing the electrode s. In the method, the biological material is placed on a substrate or suspended in solution and then placed within the device. The biological material is immersed in direct contact with the plasma or an active species generated by the plasma such that the exterior of the biological material is disrupted, yielding the macromolecules generally intact and available for analysis and/ or modification.

title_abstract: SYSTEM FOR PROVIDING MIGRATION SUPPORTING SERVICE PURPOSE: A migration support service providing system is provided to enabling a business to grasp migration contents of workers. CONSTITUTION: A migration support service providing server(310) receives migration information of migrant workers through migrant worker terminals(111,112,131,132). The migration support service providing server stores the migration information in a migrant worker database(321) for each business. The migration support service providing server stores migration service information which is registered from terminals(411,412,421,422,431,432) of service providing businesses in service information databases(322,323,324,325). [Reference numerals] (200) Internet network

title_abstract: Electronic whiteboard authority management method, device and equipment and storage medium The invention relates to the technical field of video data processing, and provides an electronic whiteboard authority management method, device and equipment and a storage medium, so that a terminalin a video conference operates an electronic whiteboard in order. The method comprises: sending an electronic whiteboard sharing request to at least one second articulated naturality web terminal in an articulated naturality web data transmission process with the at least one second articulated naturality web terminal; in response to a sharing response sent by the at least one second articulated naturality web terminal, displaying first editing data edited for the electronic whiteboard on a display screen; sending the first editing data to the at least one second articulated naturality web terminal, so that a display screen of the at least one second articulated naturality web terminal synchronously displays the first editing data; receiving an electronic whiteboard editing permission request sent by a target terminal in the at least one second articulated naturality web terminal; and in response to the electronic whiteboard editing permission request, transferring the electronic whiteboard editing permission to the target terminal.
title_abstract_original: 电子白板权限管理的方法、装置、设备以及存储介质 本发明涉及视频数据处理技术领域，提供了一种电子白板权限管理的方法、装置、设备以及存储介质，以使视频会议中的终端有序地操作电子白板。在与至少一个第二视联网终端进行视联网数据传输的过程中，向所述至少一个第二视联网终端发送电子白板共享请求；响应于所述至少一个第二视联网终端发送的共享应答，在显示屏上显示对电子白板编辑的第一编辑数据；将所述第一编辑数据发送给所述至少一个第二视联网终端，以使所述至少一个第二视联网终端的显示屏同步显示所述第一编辑数据；接收所述至少一个第二视联网终端中的目标终端发送的电子白板编辑权限请求；响应于所述电子白板编辑权限请求，将电子白板编辑权限移交给所述目标终端。

title_abstract: Control parameters of quasi-random sequence in spread spectrum communication system and integrated evaluation method using parameters The invention relates to control parameters of a quasi-random sequence in a spread spectrum communication system and an integrated evaluation method using the parameters. Eight control parameters andseven test mechanisms are established, so that the integrated evaluation method for the quasi-random sequence in the spread spectrum communication system is designed. The method integrates randomness,initial value sensitivity, Lyapunov index, balance degree, run, self-correlation and cross-correlation tests, and a to-be-measured index coefficient C, a randomness index test parameter, a sensitivity index test parameter, a Lyapunov index test parameter, a balance degree index test parameter, a run index test parameter, a self-correlation index test parameter and a cross-correlation index test parameter are defined. The test mechanisms comprise a randomness index test, a sensitivity index test, a Lyapunov index test, a balance degree index test, a run index test, a self-correlation index test and a cross-correlation index test, and are suitable for the spread spectrum communication system.
title_abstract_original: 扩频通信系统中类随机序列的控制参数及使用这些参数的集成评测方法 涉及扩频通信系统中类随机序列的控制参数及使用这些参数的集成评测方法，建立8个控制参数，7个测试机制，从而设计了扩频通信系统中类随机序列的集成评测方法。该方法集成了随机性、初值敏感性、Lyapunov指数、平衡度、游程、自相关、互相关的测试，参数：定义待测指标系数C，定义随机性指标测试参数，定义敏感性指标测试参数，定义Lyapunov指数测试参数，定义平衡度指标测试参数，定义游程指标测试参数，定义自相关指标测试参数，定义互相关指标测试参数。测试机制：随机性指标测试，敏感性指标测试，Lyapunov指数测试，平衡度指标测，游程指标测试，自相关指标测试，互相关指标测，适用于扩频通信系统。

采用扩频通信系统中类随机序列的控制参数的集成评测方法 采用扩频通信系统中类随机序列的控制参数的集成评测方法，建立8个控制参数，7个测试机制，从而设计了扩频通信系统中类随机序列的集成评测方法。该方法集成了随机性、初值敏感性、Lyapunov指数、平衡度、游程、自相关、互相关的测试，参数：定义待测指标系数C，定义随机性指标测试参数，定义敏感性指标测试参数，定义Lyapunov指数测试参数，定义平衡度指标测试参数，定义游程指标测试参数，定义自相关指标测试参数，定义互相关指标测试参数。测试机制：随机性指标测试，敏感性指标测试，Lyapunov指数测试，平衡度指标测，游程指标测试，自相关指标测试，互相关指标测，适用于扩频通信系统。

title_abstract: SYSTEM AND METHOD FOR DATA COMMUNICATION OVER MULTI-INPUT, MULTI-OUTPUT CHANNELS System and method for estimating data transmitted by a plurality of transmit elements across a communications channel. The system comprises a plurality of receive interfaces, each operative to receive a signal via the channel and output a respective sequence of received data elements. The system also comprises a space matched filter connected to the plurality of receive interfaces and operative to (i) assemble the received data elements into sets of received data elements, each the set of received data elements including at least one received data element from each sequence of received data elements; and (ii) jointly process each set of received data elements with each of a plurality of channel data elements to produce a corresponding plurality of filtered data elements, each filtered data element being associated with one of the transmit elements, each channel data element being representative of a portion of the channel between an associated one of the transmit elements and the plurality of receive interfaces. Finally, the system comprises a detector connected to the space matched filter and operative to process each filtered data element to produce a corresponding decision data set therefor.
title_abstract_original: SYSTEM AND METHOD FOR DATA COMMUNICATION OVER MULTI-INPUT, MULTI-OUTPUT CHANNELS System and method for estimating data transmitted by a plurality of transmit elements across a communications channel. The system comprises a plurality of receive interfaces, each operative to receive a signal via the channel and output a respective sequence of received data elements. title_abstract: Novel members of the iap gene family
title_abstract_original: Novel members of the iap gene family

title_abstract: NOVEL MEMBERS OF THE IAP GENE FAMILY DNA and protein sequences are disclosed for several new members of the IAP gene family, namely ILP-2 and ILP-3 homologs which modulate TGF beta receptor activity. The ILP-2 sequence modulates apoptosis and activates JNK activity. ILP-3 inhibits ILP-1-mediated JNK activation. The disclosure also includes specific binding agents (such as antibodies) that recognize ILP-2 and ILP-3, methods of decreasing apoptosis by increasing ILP-2 expression, methods of increasing apoptosis by decreasing ILP-2 expression, methods of treating disease caused by mutations, therapeutic compositions that include ILP-2 and/or ILP-3, recombinant DNA molecules, probes, and transformed cells that incorporate the DNA sequence to express ILP-2 and/or ILP-3. The disclosure also includes methods of diagnosis and treatment of diseases caused by an increased expression of ILP-2 and/or ILP-3, such as neurodegenerative diseases, and methods of treatment of diseases caused by unwanted apoptosis, such as occurs in autoimmune diseases and neurodegenerative disorders. The disclosure also includes methods of diagnosis and treatment of diseases caused by an underexpression of ILP-2 and/or ILP-3, such as cancer.

title_abstract: Method of isolation, culture and proliferation of human atrial myocytes The present invention provides methods for isolating and culturing human myocardiocytes from adult human atrial tissue and proliferating cultures resulting therefrom. In one embodiment, the myocardial cells are substantially dissociated through sequential enzymatic digestion and plated on growth medium selective for myocardial cell growth. In another embodiment, the atrial tissue is subjected to only limited digestion to provide an explant tissue portion which is cultured under conditions favoring cell proliferation. Cells migrating from the explant are isolated and subjected to time-based selective attachment and selective growth techniques which result in a myocardial cell culture of approximately 93% purity.

title_abstract: Secure shutdown system for wellheads The present invention discloses a secure shutdown system to control a surface valve and a subsurface valve that are mounted to a wellbore. A housing is provided in which is mounted a manual hydraulic pump, a reset panel control switch, and a hydraulic switch controlled by a programmable logic controller. The reset switch is normally operable to move the hydraulic switch to a position to allow the manual hydraulic pump to open the subsurface valve. The programmable logic controller being configured to be responsive to a security shutdown signal to prevent operation of the reset panel control switch. The programmable logic controller is programmed to normally operate with less than ten microamperes.

title_abstract: Frozen concentrated milk-acidulating culture 1,134,199. Cheese; frozen concentrated milk-acidulating culture. CHAS. PFIZER & CO. Inc. 19 April, 1966, No. 17147/66. Headings A2B and A2D. [Also in Division C6] A process for making a frozen concentrated milk-acidulating culture comprises propagating a starter culture in a non-milk medium, separating substantially all the cell-free medium, adding a diluent to the cells and freezing the cells and diluent. The concentrated milk-acidulating culture should contain at least 60 billion (6 Î 10<SP>10</SP>) cells per ml. of diluent. The diluent may consist of 90-70 parts by weight of normal saline and 10-30 parts by weight of glycerol. In the acidulation of cheddar cheese, cottage cheese or buttermilk, the concentrated milk-acidulating culture is dropped into the milk while still frozen. The non-milk medium, which is maintained at a pH in the range of 5.0-7.0 by the addition of specified alkaline materials, may comprise hydrolysed casein, lactalbumen or soya protein, peptones and tryptones, yeast extract, glucose or lactose, specified trace elements and soluble phosphates, and a silicone anti-foam compound, all in specified propositions. According to an Example, a commercially available Cheddar cheese starter culture is propagated initially in skim milk medium in two stages, and then in a non-milk medium (as given above). When the carbohydrate has been substantially completely consumed, the broth is chilled to 5‹C. and then is centrifuged whereby the cells are concentrated 20-fold. The cell concentrate is diluted with an equal volume of normal saline-glycerol solution and the diluted cell suspension is quick frozen in dry ice. The preparation of a Cheddar cheese employing the frozen concentrated milk-acidulating culture, is described in detail.

title_abstract: Relay air supply deep well mining refrigeration system The invention relates to a relay air supply deep well mining refrigeration system which comprises an air cooler, a fan, an air wall and an air inlet and outlet pipeline, and the air cooler is main equipment of the refrigeration system; the system is arranged in a prospecting circle roadway close to a stope or a driving working face in a deep well, a closed small air reservoir is formed in the prospecting circle roadway space through an air wall, and non-fresh air in a roadway in the middle of a mine is introduced to be automatically precipitated; and the precipitated air exchanges heat with cooling water in the air cooler and then is sent to a nearby working face through a pipeline, so that the cooling of the working face of the stope or the driving working face is completed. A roadway plugging relay air supply mode is adopted, the deep well space is fully utilized, no electric equipment is needed except the draught fan, and the deep well air supply system has the advantages of being compact in equipment, simple in structure, convenient to control, high in refrigeration efficiency and very suitable for deep well operation.
title_abstract_original: 一种接力送风的深井采矿制冷系统 本发明涉及一种接力送风的深井采矿制冷系统，包括空冷器、风机、风墙及进出风管道，所述空冷器为制冷系统主要设备；所述系统设置于深井中距离采场或掘进工作面附近的探矿圈巷道内，利用风墙使探矿圈巷道空间形成封闭的小型风库，通入矿井中部巷道的非新鲜空气，使其进行自行沉淀；经过沉淀的空气在所述空冷器中与冷却水进行热交换后，通过管路送往附近的工作面，从而完成采场工作面或掘进工作面的降温。采用的巷道封堵的接力送风模式，充分利用了深井空间，并且除风机外无用电设备，具有设备紧凑、结构简单、控制方便、制冷效率高的优点非常适合深井作业使用。

simulador de ambientes simulador de ambientes, constituído por estrutura (1) em madeira ou drywall ( gesso acartonado) com fechamento exterior, rebaixo ou alto relevo(2), porta de acesso técnico (3), nichos para projetor (4), elétrica e sinal do projetor (5), apoio para monitor de led (6), tela led de 42" touch screen (7), visor (8), computador (9), fita led (10) e chapa mdf com emassamento (11), projetor (12) , volumes construído em madeira, emassado e com pintura em cor neutra para receber imagens advindas das ilustrações possíveis e aplicáveis ao software, para ilustrar com alto grau de veracidade, móveis, marcenaria e utensílios de maneira a denotar a diferença entre ambientes diversos (13), sendo uma espécie de monóculo por onde através do recurso de projeção serem simulados quatro ambientes sendo estes, cozinha, sala, dormitório e área externa, podendo o público através de um software aplicado a um monitor touch screen mudar os revestimentos e fazer diversas composições, disponibilizando inúmeras possibilidades.

title_abstract: Live streaming display method, device and terminal The present invention provides a live streaming display method, a live streaming display device and a terminal. According to one specific embodiment of the invention, the display method includes the following steps that: video thumbnail data corresponding to a live streaming room are obtained; cover data corresponding to the live streaming room is generated; and the cover data corresponding to the live streaming room is displayed. With the live streaming display method provided by the embodiment of the invention adopted, an audience end can watch real-time live streaming pictures in the live streaming room without entering the live streaming room, and therefore, time required by the audience end to select a live streaming room which the audience end is to enter can be decreased.
title_abstract_original: 直播显示方法、装置及终端 本公开提供种直播显示方法、装置及终端，所述方法的具体实施方式包括：获取直播房间对应的视频缩略数据；根据所述视频缩略数据，生成所述直播房间对应的封面数据；显示所述直播房间对应的封面数据。该实施方式实现观众端无需进入直播房间，即可观看直播房间内的实时直播画面，进而可以降低观众端选择待进入的直播房间的所需时间。

title_abstract: Visual telephone apparatus. A visual telephone apparatus of the present invention is capable of deciding whether the apparatus of the other party of communication is a normal telephone apparatus or facsimile equipment by the operator who hears the data received from a connected communication medium or automatically by analysis of the procedure of controlling the communication with the apparatus of the other party, and transmitting the data obtained by photographing a subject in accordance with the communication specification corresponding to the apparatus decided, as well as receiving the data from the apparatus of the other party in accordance with the communication specification corresponding to the apparatus decided and displaying the data on a display unit. The apparatus is also capable of visual telephone communication with a visual telephone set and facsimile communication with facsimile terminal equipment.

title_abstract: VIDEO TELEPHONE SYSTEM PURPOSE:To communicate with both a television telephone system and a facsimile equipment by judging whether a communication specification to a connected communication medium is telephone communication or facsimile communication, and transmitting or decoding data after converting it into transmission data in accordance with the decided communication specification. CONSTITUTION:In the case of not telephone operation, a camera start key A8 is depressed, and an object to be transmitted is photographed by a camera. A transmitting person off-hooks a handset A1 in order to call up a transmission destination so as to connect a trunk line B1 to a telephone set B2. On the judgement that a remote party device is the facsimile equipment, a facsimile equipment selection key A6 is depressed so as to connect the trunk line B1 to a modulation.demodulation processing part B3 for facsimile. ON the judgement that the remote party device is a TV telephone set, a video telephone selection key A5 is depressed so as to connect the trunk line B1 to a demodulation processing part B4 for television telephone as keeping the trunk line B1 in a state connected to the telephone set B2.

ON the judgement that the remote party device is a TV telephone set, a video telephone selection key A5 is depressed so as to connect the trunk line B1 to a demodulation processing part B4 for television telephone as keeping the trunk line B1 in a state connected to the telephone set B2.

种井下溜井侧帮保护方法 本发明涉及种井下溜井侧帮保护方法，按照如下方法进行：第步，拆除现有侧帮板，在墙体预埋板上开具若干的通孔；第二步，在溜井侧帮墙体上预埋锚杆，锚杆的分布与墙体预埋板上的通孔相适配；第三步，将墙体预埋板覆至规定墙体上，锚杆与墙体预埋板采用层焊固定；第四步，将侧帮板吊装至预定工位，侧帮板与墙体预埋板的衔接处采用层焊固定；该安装方法安全牢靠故障率低。

title_abstract: Underground ore pass side protecting method The invention relates to an underground ore pass side protecting method. The underground ore pass side protecting method comprises the following steps of first, detaching the traditional side plate and forming a plurality of through holes in a wall embedded plate; second, embedding anchor rods on the wall of a ore pass side, wherein the anchor rods are adaptive to the through holes on the wall embedded plate; third, covering the wall embedded plate to a specified wall and fixing the anchor rods and the wall embedded plate through overlay welding; and fourth, hoisting the side plate to a preset station and fixing the linked parts of the side plate and the wall embedded plate through overlay welding. The underground ore pass side protecting method has the advantages of safety, reliability and low fault rate.
title_abstract_original: Underground ore pass side protecting method The invention relates to an underground ore pass side protecting method. The underground ore pass side protecting method comprises the following steps of first, detaching the traditional side plate and forming a plurality of through holes in a wall embedded plate; second, embedding anchor rods on the wall of a ore pass side, wherein the anchor rods are adaptive to the through holes on the wall embedded plate; third, covering the wall embedded plate to a specified wall and fixing the anchor rods and the wall embedded plate through overlay welding; and fourth, hoisting the side plate to a preset station and fixing the linked parts of the side plate and the wall embedded plate through overlay welding. The underground ore pass side protecting method has the advantages of safety, reliability and low fault rate.

title_abstract: Instrument equipment data processing and communication control system based on Internet The invention discloses a general laboratory equipment data processing and communication control module and a system based on Internet. The module can be compatible with various different laboratory instruments and equipment, and can realize wireless and remote control of the laboratory equipment. At present, various instruments and equipment in a laboratory need to be correspondingly operated andcontrolled by a computer or a control panel, and the intelligent degree is low. According to the data processing and communication control module, interconnection and intelligence of laboratory equipment can be realized, great convenience is brought to development of laboratory research, management and use of laboratory instruments and equipment are simplified, and the use cost of the laboratoryequipment is reduced.
title_abstract_original: 基于互联网的仪器设备数据处理及通讯控制系统 本申请公开了一种基于互联网的通用实验室设备数据处理及通讯控制模块及系统。该模块可以兼容多种不同实验室仪器设备，并可实现实验室设备的无线及远程控制。目前实验室中的各种仪器设备均需使用电脑或控制面板来进行相应操作控制，智能化程度较低。本数据处理及通讯控制模块可以实现实验室设备的互联化，智能化，将为实验室研究的展开带来极大便利，简化实验室仪器设备的管理和使用，降低实验室设备的使用成本。

title_abstract: Alloy bit for mine The invention discloses an alloy bit for a mine. The alloy bit comprises a bottom sleeve, a connector, water inlet holes, a connecting seat, a connecting sleeve, crushing seats, stepped seats, stone breaking bodies, butt joint grooves, through holes and a stone breaking head. The connector with an external thread is arranged at the bottom of the bottom sleeve, the water inlet holes are formed in the bottom sleeve and the connector in a vertically through manner, the connecting sleeve is arranged at the bottom of the connecting seat and connected with the bottom sleeve in a right-hand threadedmanner, four crushing seats with equally divided angles are arranged on the outer wall of the connecting seat, the stepped seats are arranged at the tops of the crushing seats, each semicircular stonebreaking body is arranged at one end of the corresponding stepped seat, the stone breaking bodies of the stepped seats are the same, the butt joint grooves are formed in the stepped seats, through holes are formed in the connecting seat and the connecting sleeve in a vertically through manner, and the stone breaking head is arranged at the top of the connecting seat. A raised head at the top of the bit is conveniently replaced, and the service life of the stone breaking head is prolonged.
title_abstract_original: 种矿山用合金钻头 本发明公开了种矿山用合金钻头，包括底套、连接头、进水孔、连接座、连接套、破碎座、阶梯座、碎石体、对接槽、通孔、碎石头，所述底套底部设有外螺纹的连接头，所述底套与连接头上下贯穿有进水孔，所述连接座底部设有连接套，所述连接套与底套右旋螺纹连接，所述连接座外壁设有四个角度等分的破碎座，所述破碎座顶部设有阶梯座，所述阶梯座端设有半圆形碎石体，各个所述阶梯座的碎石体夹角相同，各个所述阶梯座内部设有对接槽，所述连接座和连接套上下贯穿有通孔，所述连接座顶部设有碎石头。本发明的钻头顶面的凸头便于更换，增加了碎石头的使用寿命。

title_abstract: Portable rock sample coring device The invention discloses a portable rock sample coring device. The portable rock sample coring device comprises a fixing frame. The fixing frame is connected with a drilling machine and a rock sample moving rack. The drilling machine is connected with a water supply device. The portable rock sample coring device is simple in structure, small in size, low in mass, easy to disassemble and convenient to carry. Relative components can be assembled according to the requirements in work, the indoor coring work can be met, and the field coring work can be conducted as well; and besides, a water cavity is located in the upper portion of a drilling bit, water flows down from the upper portion of the drilling bit, certain pressure is provided, and the water more easily flows into the friction portion of the drilling bit and a rock sample. The good flushing function on rock debris is formed, the rock debris is prevented from blocking water holes and causing jamming of the drilling bit, meanwhile the good cooling and lubricating functions on the drilling bit are played, the service life of the drilling bit is prolonged, and the coring work is more smooth.
title_abstract_original: 种便携式岩样取芯装置 本发明公开了种便携式岩样取芯装置，包括固定架，固定架分别连接有钻机和岩样移动架，钻机连接有供水装置。本发明种便携式岩样取芯装置结构简单，体积小，质量轻，容易拆卸，便于携带，工作时可根据需要进行相关部件的组装，不仅可以满足室内的取芯工作，也可以进行野外取芯，并且水腔位于钻头上部，水从钻头上部留下，且具有定压力，水更容易进入钻头与岩样的摩擦部位，不仅岩屑形成良好的冲刷作用，避免岩屑堵塞水眼造成卡钻，同时也对钻头起到了良好的冷却和润滑作用，延长钻头使用寿命，使取芯工作更加顺利。

title_abstract:
INFORMATION STORAGE MEDIUM, INFORMATION REPRODUCING METHOD, INFORMATION REPRODUCING APPARATUS

PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To provide an information storage medium which attains reproduction with high expression.

SOLUTION: In the information storage medium; reproduction management information (PLLST) which controls simultaneous reproduction of a first reproduction display object (P-EVOB) and a second reproduction display object (S-EVOB) includes first reference information (SCRTMP) which refers to the first time map (PTMAP); the above first time map includes second reference information (VTSI_FNAME) which refers to second management information (VTSI) containing first management information (EVOBI) regarding to the above first reproduction display object; the above first management information includes third reference information (EVOB_FNAME) which refers to the above first reproduction display object; the above reproduction management information includes fourth reference information (SCRTMP) which refers to the second time map; and the second time map comprising data structure including fifth reference information (EVOB_FNAME) which refers to the above second reproduction display object.

title_abstract: Plural input signal translating system
title_abstract_original: Plural input signal translating system
料理机腌制食物的方法 本发明提供了一种料理机腌制食物的方法，包括：食材投放步骤：将待腌制的食材投放到料理机的搅拌杯内；腌制步骤：对搅拌杯进行抽真空处理，对搅拌杯内的食材进行腌制。本发明的料理机腌制食物的方法由于用于腌制食材的搅拌杯处于负压状态，在真空负压下，食材的纤维孔最大限度扩大，使得腌制液能快速渗透至细微毛孔和空隙中，进而达到缩短腌制时间的目的。

title_abstract: Method of marinating food by food processor The invention provides a method of marinating food by a food processor; the method comprises the steps of adding food materials, to be specific, adding food materials to be marinated into a stirring cup of the food processor; marinating, to be specific, vacuumizing the stirring cup, and marinating the food materials in the stirring cup. Since the stirring cup for marinating food materials herein is in vacuum, fiber holes of the food materials under vacuum are maximally expanded, and a marinating liquid may quickly permeate in the fine pores and voids; therefore, marinating time is shortened accordingly.

title_abstract: DICKKOPF-1 VARIANT ANTIBODIES AND METHODS OF USE Provided herein are methods and compositions relating to libraries of optimized antibodies having nucleic acids encoding for an antibody comprising modified sequences. Libraries described herein comprise nucleic acids encoding Dickkopf WNT signaling pathway inhibitor 1 (DKK1) antibodies. Further described herein are protein libraries generated when the nucleic acid libraries are translated. Further described herein are cell libraries expressing variegated nucleic acid libraries described herein.

title_abstract: Method of mixing air into ice cream mix in automatic ice cream making machine In automatic ice cream making machines, air is mixed in by metering air via an inner tube (5) of a valve (2) into a freezing cylinder (3) and then holding the mass of ice cream in the upper space of the cylinder at a level at which excess ice mix or air or ice mix-air mix is guided via an intermediate space between inner tube and outer tube (4) and an opening (6) in the outer tube into the storage container (1) of the machine. Also claimed is an arrangement for carrying out the method with the inner tube of the valve extending over the length of the outer tube into the freezing cylinder, the outer tube length being constant or variable by extensions and having openings of fixed or variable size.
title_abstract_original: Method of mixing air into ice cream mix in automatic ice cream making machine In automatic ice cream making machines, air is mixed in by metering air via an inner tube (5) of a valve (2) into a freezing cylinder (3) and then holding the mass of ice cream in the upper space of the cylinder at a level at which excess ice mix or air or ice mix-air mix is guided via an intermediate space between inner tube and outer tube (4) and an opening (6) in the outer tube into the storage container (1) of the machine. Also claimed is an arrangement for carrying out the method with the inner tube of the valve extending over the length of the outer tube into the freezing cylinder, the outer tube length being constant or variable by extensions and having openings of fixed or variable size.

title_abstract: Synchronizing apparatus The synchronizing apparatus includes a block (102) for detecting a code (103) from an input signal (13), a block (105) for detecting from the code the variable points of the code at several times as high as the symbol rate, a block (107, 108, 1140-114N-1) for calculating a histogram of the detected variables of the code to time, and a block (108, 122) for deciding that the phase number at which the calculated histogram takes the maximum value is a symbol synchronization point. This synchronizing apparatus detects the zero-cross points of an intermediate frequency band signal (103) at N times as high as the symbol rate. It also calculates a histogram of detected time (0 to N-1). The time (0 to N-1) at which the histogram is the maximum within a predetermined detected time is selected as a symbol clock, and thereby symbol synchronization is established.

title_abstract: SYNCHRONIZING APPARATUS
title_abstract_original: 동기장치 동기장치는 입력신호로부터의 부호를 검출하는 블록, 상기 부호로부터 심벌율의 수 배로 부호의 변화점을 검출하는 블록, 시간에 대한 부호의 검출된 변수의 히스토그램을 산출하는 블록, 및 산출된 히스토그램이 최대값을 취하는 위상번호가 심벌 동기점임을 결정하는 블록을 포함한다. 이 동기장치는 심범율의 N배로 중간 주파수 대역신호의 제로 교차점을 검출한다. 또한, 이것은 검출시간(0 내지 N-1)의 히스토그램을 산출한다. 히스토그램이 소정의 검출시간 내에서 최대인 시간(0 내지 N-1)이 심벌클럭으로 선택되어 심벌동기가 확립된다.

동기장치 동기장치는 입력신호로부터의 코드를 검출하는 블록과 문자비와 같게 여러번 코드의 가변점을 코드로부터 검출하는 블록과 시간에 대한 코드의 검출된 가변의 히스토그램을 산출하는 블록과 산출된 히스 최대값을 하는 위상수가 문자동기점을 결정하는 블록을 포함한다. 이 동기장치는 문자비와 같이 높게 N번으로 중간 주파수 대역신호의 교차점을 검출한다. 또한 이것은 검출은 시간(0-N-1)의 히스토그램을 검출한다. 이 히스토그램이 소정의 검출된 시간내에서 최대인 시간(0-N-1)이 문자클럭으로 검출되어 문자동기가 설정된다.

title_abstract: SYNCHRONIZATION DEVICE PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To enhance the durability against a change in an environment by realizing the synchronization circuit with digital circuits only and to realize the synchronization circuit with high performance regardless of whether a symbol pattern to be received is a synchronization alternate pattern or an information symbol losing random performance. SOLUTION: A comparator 102 detects a code 103 from a reception signal 101 and a D-FF 105 detects a change point with accuracy of a multiple of N of that of a symbol clock. A controller 108 selects sequentially counters 114#0-117#(N-1). The counters 114-117 make count-up when an output of the D-FF 105 rises, calculate a histogram of a code change point of the reception signal and a phase number detector 122 provides an output of any number (0-N-1) of a counter denoting a maximum value among the counters 114-117 as a phase of a symbol clock.
title_abstract_original: SYNCHRONIZATION DEVICE PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To enhance the durability against a change in an environment by realizing the synchronization circuit with digital circuits only and to realize the synchronization circuit with high performance regardless of whether a symbol pattern to be received is a synchronization alternate pattern or an information symbol losing random performance. SOLUTION: A comparator 102 detects a code 103 from a reception signal 101 and a D-FF 105 detects a change point with accuracy of a multiple of N of that of a symbol clock. A controller 108 selects sequentially counters 114#0-117#(N-1). The counters 114-117 make count-up when an output of the D-FF 105 rises, calculate a histogram of a code change point of the reception signal and a phase number detector 122 provides an output of any number (0-N-1) of a counter denoting a maximum value among the counters 114-117 as a phase of a symbol clock.

title_abstract: Synchronization equipment An adder (1609) calculates sum of absolute values of in-phase signal and quadrature signal after analog-digital conversion and outputs the calculation result to integrators (1611,1612) selected by a selector (1610), at each sampling interval. The synchronization is acquired by comparing integrated values obtained at different sampling time intervals.

title_abstract: Tieback receptacle with upward and downward facing funnel sections A subsea well employs a tieback receptacle which has a downward facing funnel and an upward facing funnel. The downward facing funnel guides the receptacle over the wellhead housing. The tieback conduit is then lowered from a vessel into engagement with the tieback receptacle. The tieback conduit has a securing device that secures the tieback conduit to a profile in the tieback receptacle without rotation.

The downward facing funnel guides the receptacle over the wellhead housing. The tieback conduit is then lowered from a vessel into engagement with the tieback receptacle.
