title_abstract: Project object standard instantiation method for realizing intelligent property management The invention discloses a project object standard instantiation method for realizing intelligent property management. The method comprises the following steps: S1, establishing a multi-level address structured management system for all projects; S2, establishing a multi-level instance standard library for all objects; S3, selecting a corresponding object from an instance standard library and adding a corresponding object into the address structured management system; and S4, performing data management on the added object. Compared with the prior art, the method provided by the invention has the advantages that the address structure can be quickly created, object instantiation is carried out and data-based management of each object in the project is completed. The instantiation method is convenient for realizing property datamation and intelligence, and plays an important role in the aspects of future green city intelligent property management, big data application and the like.
title_abstract_original: 一种实现智慧物业的项目对象标准实例化方法 本发明公开了一种实现智慧物业的项目对象标准实例化方法，该方法包括有以下步骤：S1：针对所有的项目建立多级地址结构化管理系统；S2：针对所有的对象建立多级实例标准库；S3：从实例标准库中选取对应对象添加到地址结构化管理系统中；S4：对添加好的对象进行数据化管理。相比于现有技术，在本发明提供的方法可快速创建地址结构并进行对象实例化，完成项目中各对象的数据化管理。该实例化方法便于实现物业数据化与智慧化，在未来绿色城市智慧物业管理、大数据应用等方面将发挥重要作用。

title_abstract: Customer extension method, terminal device and storage medium The invention is suitable for the technical field of real estate customer management, and provides a customer extension method, a terminal device and a storage medium, and the method comprises the steps: obtaining user information of an access user through an access link; if the access user does not have the binding relationship with the access building corresponding to the access link, obtainingsalesmen in the access link and a direct sharer sharing the current access link to the access user; binding the access user, the salesman and the access building to obtain the binding relationship ofthe access user; if the salesman in the access link is the same as the direct sharer, generating an effective sharing frequency for the salesman; and based on the customer extension information of thesalesman, obtaining the performance assessment result of the salesman, the customer extension information comprising an effective sharing frequency and an offline visit frequency. Through adoption ofthe method, the online access user is bound with the salesperson, and the customer extension information of the salesperson is used as the performance assessment index, so that the customer extensionenthusiasm of the salesperson is improved.
title_abstract_original: 一种拓客方法、终端设备及存储介质 本申请适用于房地产客户管理技术领域，提供了一种拓客方法、终端设备及存储介质，该方法包括：通过访问链接获取访问用户的用户信息；若访问用户与访问链接对应的访问楼盘不存在绑定关系，则获取访问链接中的销售人员和分享给访问用户当前访问链接的直接分享者；将访问用户、销售人员和访问楼盘进行绑定，获得访问用户的绑定关系；若访问链接中的销售人员和直接分享者相同，则为所述销售人员生成一次有效分享次数；基于销售人员的拓客信息，获得销售人员的绩效考核结果，其中，拓客信息包括有效分享次数和线下到访次数。通过该方法，将线上访问用户与销售人员绑定、且将销售人员的拓客信息作为绩效考核的指标，提高了销售人员拓客的积极性。
APPARECCHIATURA INTEGRATA PER SONDAGGIO E RICERCA SU FONDALI SUBACQUEI

title_abstract: System for providing real property alienation The present invention relates to a real estate selling information selling system. An embodiment of the present invention may include: a consumer terminal which is used by a consumer, transmits search condition selected by the consumer to a real estate selling/earnings rate providing server to receive and display real estate selling information matching with the search condition, and transmits information of interest real estate that the consumer wants to obtain to the real estate selling/earnings rate providing server to receive and display real estate earnings rate when the consumer obtains the interest real estate; a real estate selling/earnings rate providing server which generates the real estate selling information matching with search condition received from the consumer terminal to transmit the same to the consumer terminal and generates real estate earnings rate matching with interest real estate received from the consumer terminal to transmit the same to the consumer terminal; and a wired and wireless communication network which performs wired or wireless communication between the consumer terminal and the real estate selling/earnings rate providing server. According to an embodiment of the present invention, the consumer is able to get new selling information easily by adding features to estimate earnings rate.
title_abstract_original: 부동산 분양 정보 제공 시스템 본 발명의 실시 형태는 소비자가 사용하는 단말기로서, 소비자로부터 선택되는 검색 조건을 부동산 분양/수익률 제공 서버로 전송하여 상기 검색 조건에 매칭되는 부동산 분양 정보를 수신하여 표시하며, 소비자가 분양받고자 하는 부동산인 관심 부동산의 정보를 상기 부동산 분양/수익률 제공 서버로 전송하여 상기 관심 부동산을 분양받을 시의 부동산 수익률을 수신하여 표시하는 소비자 단말기; 상기 소비자 단말기로부터 수신되는 검색 조건에 매칭되는 부동산 분양 정보를 생성하여 상기 소비자 단말기로 전송하며, 상기 소비자 단말기로부터 수신되는 관심 부동산에 매칭되는 부동산 수익률을 생성하여 상기 소비자 단말기로 전송하는 부동산 분양/수익률 제공 서버; 및 상기 소비자 단말기와 부동산 분양/수익률 제공 서버간에 유선 통신 또는 무선 통신을 수행하는 유무선 통신망;을 포함할 수 있다.

title_abstract: Earth-boring bit with shear cutting elements An earth-boring bit has a bit body and at least one cone for rotation relative to the bit body. The cone has a gage surface and a nose area separated by a central area. A nose insert is located in the nose area. The nose insert has a barrel located within a hole in the nose area and an outer end protruding from the cone, the outer end has a perimeter that is a plane perpendicular to a barrel axis of the nose insert.

title_abstract: Immobilized sulfate reducing bacterium particle preparation method and application The invention belongs to the technical field of wastewater biological treatment and discloses an immobilized sulfate reducing bacterium particle preparation method and application. The preparation method includes steps: adding graphene oxide sol into a sulfate reducing bacterium culture medium, stirring and mixing; adding sulfate reducing bacteria liquid into the sulfate reducing bacterium culturemedium, stirring and mixing; culturing for 18-72h at 10-45 DEG C in a pH value of 2-12 under anaerobic conditions to obtain particles namely immobilized sulfate reducing bacteria particles. Accordingto the preparation method, reduced graphene oxide serves as a biological carrier for immobilizing sulfate reducing bacteria, activity of the sulfate reducing bacteria is improved, and influences of heavy metals on the sulfate reducing bacteria are weakened; in addition, the preparation method is simple and convenient, high stability of the immobilized sulfate reducing bacteria in products is achieved, and extensive popularization and utilization can be realized.
title_abstract_original: 种固定化硫酸盐还原菌颗粒的制备方法及其应用 本发明公开了种固定化硫酸盐还原菌颗粒的制备方法及其应用，属于废水生物处理技术领域，该制备方法包括以下步骤：将氧化石墨烯溶胶加入到硫酸盐还原菌培养基中，搅拌混合；向硫酸盐还原菌培养基中再加入硫酸盐还原菌菌液，搅拌混合；在pH值为2～12、温度为10～45℃的厌氧条件下培养18～72h，得到的颗粒物即为固定化硫酸盐还原菌颗粒。本发明制备方法是以还原的氧化石墨烯为生物载体来固定硫酸盐还原菌，提高硫酸盐还原菌的活性，削弱重金属对硫酸盐还原菌的影响；同时，该制备方法简便，产物中固定化硫酸盐还原菌的稳定性好，其可广泛推广使用。

title_abstract: METHOD FOR DIAGNOSIS OF NEURODEGENERATIVE DISEASES BY USING HPMA The present invention relates to a composition for the diagnosis of neurodegenerative diseases, comprising hpmA, which is a substance derived from Proteus, Shigella, Klebsiella pneumoniae, or Citrobacter, preferably, a Proteus mirabilis strain, from a biological sample of a subject. The present invention also relates to a method for providing information for diagnosing a neurodegenerative disease such as Parkinson's disease, cranial neuritis or Alzheimer's disease, by measuring the amount of hpmA.
title_abstract_original: HPMA를 이용한 퇴행성 뇌질환의 진단 방법 [요약] 본 발명은 피검체의 생물학적 시료로부터, 프로테우스 (Proteus), 쉬겔라 (Shigella), 클렙시엘라 뉴모니아 (Klebsiella pneumoniae), 또는 시트로박터 (Citrobacter)로부터, 바람직하게는 프로테우스 미라빌리스 (Proteus mirabilis) 균주로부터 유래된 물질인 hpmA를 포함하는 퇴행성 뇌질환의 진단용 조성물에 관한 것이다. 또한, 본 발명은 hpmA의 양을 측정하여 파킨슨병, 뇌신경염 또는 알츠하이머병 질환 등의 퇴행성 뇌질환을 진단하기 위한 정보제공방법에 관한 것이다. [대표도] 도 1

title_abstract: Ethanol recovery process and apparatus for biological conversion of syngas components to liquid products
title_abstract_original: Ethanol recovery process and apparatus for biological conversion of syngas components to liquid products

title_abstract: Process for producing ethanol Ethanol and other liquid products produced by contacting carbon monoxide (CO) and/or a mixture of CO2 (carbon dioxide) and H2 (hydrogen) with a microorganism in a bioreactor are separated using a combination of distillation and vapor permeation membranes. The bioreactor passes an effluent with an ethanol concentration of 1 to 6 wt % to a distillation column that produces an overhead vapor stream enriched in ethanol. A series of vapor permeation membranes retain ethanol as retentate and produce a 99 wt % or higher ethanol product. Ethanol depleted permeate streams flow back to the column and the bioreactor. Coupling a bioreactor with distillation and pervaporation efficiently and economically separates ethanol when present at low concentration in an aqueous fermentation broth. The separation arrangement may also include a flash zone ahead of the distillation column to raise the concentration of the ethanol in the input stream to the distillation column.

title_abstract: Ethanol recovery process and apparatus for biological conversion of syngas components to liquid products Ethanol and other liquid products produced by the contacting CO and/or a mixture of CO2 and H2 with a microorganism in a bioreactor are separated using a combination of vacuum distillation and vapor permeation membranes. The bioreactor passes an effluent with an ethanol concentration of 1 to 6 wt% to a vacuum distillation column that produces an overhead vapor stream containing at least 30 wt% ethanol. A series of vapor permeation membranes retain ethanol as retentate and produce a 99 wt% or higher ethanol product. Ethanol depleted permeate streams flow back to the vacuum column and the bioreactor. Coupling a bioreactor with vacuum distillation and pervaporation efficiently and economically separates ethanol when present at low concentration in an aqueous fermentation broth. The separation arrangement may also include a flash zone ahead of the distillation column to raise the concentration of the ethanol in the input stream to the distillation column.

title_abstract: Selective channel assignment in a wireless data communications network The invention provides for dynamic channel/capacity assignment within an 802.11 wireless data communications network (10) consisting of several access points (20). The access points are linked to each by inter access point channels 11. Each access point 20 has an associated local coverage area 13 which services roaming terminal devices 14 or local 802.11 stations. The invention allows for increased throughput between the access points or between an access point and local stations within the local coverage area of the access point (20) by allowing additional channel capacity to be dynamically re-assigned. The invention provides a degree of quality of service for multimedia traffic transfer in wireless networks such as the 802.11 based extended service set.

title_abstract: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR COMBINED INTRA PREDICTION MODES Encoders and decoders of digital video signals use combined intra prediction modes for some images. In at least one embodiment, combined intra prediction modes can result from the intra prediction modes of neighboring blocks. The combined intra prediction mode can be added to a most probable modes list. Various embodiments describe techniques for combining the intra prediction modes, comprising a combination of reference samples and a combination of directions to form a prediction. Another embodiment adds a combination mode to the most probable modes list if the two modes that are combined to form it are directional modes with angle difference less than 90 degrees. Another embodiment uses a linear combination of intra prediction modes and another embodiment performs a linear combination which depends on the distance of a prediction from the left and above blocs.

title_abstract_original: 用于组合的帧内预测模式的方法和装置 数字视频信号的编码器和解码器对某些图像使用组合的帧内预测模式。在至少一个实施例中，组合的帧内预测模式可以由相邻块的帧内预测模式产生。可以将组合的帧内预测模式添加到最可能模式列表。各种实施例描述了用于对帧内预测模式进行组合的技术，包括参考样点的组合和方向的组合以形成预测。另一实施例中，如果被组合以形成组合模式的两个模式是角度差小于90度的方向模式，则将该组合模式添加到最可能模式列表。另一个实施例使用帧内预测模式的线性组合，并且另一个实施例执行取决于预测与左侧和上方的块的距离的线性组合。

title_abstract: Application of dry soybean curd residue in silage preparation of high moisture materials The invention discloses application of dry soybean curd residue in silage preparation of high moisture materials. The invention is based on the inventor's discovery that the soybean curd residue has very strong water absorption capacity after being dried in the sun, can adsorb excess water in the silage process of high moisture materials to improve silage fermentation quality and nutritional quality and reduce environmental pollution caused by silage liquid discharge, and is suitable for being used as a silage water absorbent. According to the invention, silage raw materials and dry soybean curd residue are evenly mixed, degassed, sealed and stored to obtain silage. The silage provided by the invention has the characteristics of low cost, safety, reliability, high nutritional value, easy utilization and the like.
title_abstract_original: 干豆腐渣在高水分材料青贮调制中的应用 本发明公开了干豆腐渣在高水分材料青贮调制中的应用。本发明是基于发明人发现豆腐渣晒干后具有非常强的吸水能力，其能够吸附高水分材料青贮过程中多余的水分，提高青贮发酵品质和营养品质，减少青贮液排放对环境污染，适合作为青贮饲料吸水剂。本发明通过将青贮原料和干豆腐渣混匀，再脱气、密封、贮藏，得到青贮饲料。本发明提供的青贮饲料具有成本低、安全、可靠、营养价值高、易于利用等特点。

title_abstract: Real estate assessment system The invention relates to a real estate assessment system. The invention relates to the technical field of assessment systems. The problem that the traditional real estate assessment adopts a cost method and is very high in practicability in reality is solved, however, the method needs a lot of statistical work; the depreciation of the real estate often comes in and goes out from the reality; and deviation is caused to real estate assessment. The system comprises an entrusting evaluation module which is used for entrusting personnel to input the area information of a community where a real estate is located and a room needing to be evaluated; a CPU; a community second-hand room transaction price database which is used for storing each community and the transaction number and transaction unit price of the corresponding community second-hand room in real time; and a map query module, a displaying interface. The system has the effect of relatively accurately estimating the estimated priceof the real estate.
title_abstract_original: 一种房地产评估系统 本发明涉及一种房地产评估系统，涉及评估系统的技术领域，解决了传统对房地产评估采用成本法在现实中实用性很强，但该方法需要大量的统计工作，而且房产的折旧往往与实际有出入，也会对房产估价造成偏差的问题，其包括供委托人员输入房地产所在小区以及所需评估房间面积信息的委托评估模块、中央处理器、实时存储有每个小区以及对应小区二手房成交数量和成交单位均价的小区二手房成交价格数据库、地图查询模块、显示界面。本发明具有对房产预估价格进行较为精准的预估的效果。

title_abstract: METHOD AND SYSTEM FOR SEARCHING FOR HOUSE LISTINGS ON INTERNET A method and system for searching for house listings on the internet. The method comprises the following steps: acquiring a house listing search criterion inputted by a user (101); according to the search criterion, employing two different search algorithms to search respectively for house listings (102); and displaying two different types of search results on alternating pages (103). The method and system for searching for house listing have the advantage of great user experience.
title_abstract_original: 互联网中房源搜索方法及系统 一种互联网中房源搜索方法及系统，所述方法包括如下步骤：获取用户输入的房源搜索条件（101）；依据该搜索条件采用两种不同的搜索算法分别搜索房源（102）；将两种不同的搜索结果隔页显示（103）。所述房源搜索方法及系统具有用户体验度高的优点。

title_abstract: Low-power-consumption image sensor assembly, detector and image acquisition and processing method The invention provides a low-power-consumption image sensor assembly, a detector and an image acquisition and processing method, and relates to the field of intelligent transportation and Internet of Things, especially full-automatic intelligent parking. In order to solve problems that an existing product generates a visual blind area, an image is out of focus or a license plate is incomplete under the non-standard parking condition, videos are frequently started to dynamically track and identify vehicle entering and exiting in the running process, power consumption is large, commercial power supply or manual battery replacement endurance is needed, and product erection relates to many related parties and thus the coordination difficulty is large, the construction period is long, and the input cost is high, the invention puts forward a novel detector mechanism with a low-power-consumption single-axis double-piece type directional geomagnetism and radar ranging module as a core and a low-power-consumption multi-channel video image switching and collecting assembly. The combined application product can realize high-precision vehicle detection and high-quality image acquisition with extremely low power consumption near a parking side line without being installed below a vehicle chassis, and provides more choices and a firmer technical basis for development of full-automatic intelligent parking core business.
title_abstract_original: 一种低功耗图像传感器组件、检测器及图像采集处理方法 本发明提供了一种低功耗图像传感器组件、检测器及图像采集处理方法，涉及智能交通与物联网尤其是全自动智慧停车领域；针对现有产品在不规范停车情况下产生视觉盲区、图像失焦或车牌不完整、运行时频繁启动视频来动态跟踪识别车辆进出耗电大须依靠市电供电或人工换电续航、产品架设涉及众多相关方而致协调难度大、施工周期长、投入成本高等问题，提出了以低功耗单轴双片式定向地磁及雷达测距模块为核心的新型检测器机构、低功耗多路视频图像切换与采集组件，组合应用产品可无须安装于车底盘下方而在泊位边线附近也能以极低的功耗实现高精度车辆检测与高质量图像采集，为全自动智慧停车核心业务开展提供了更多的选择及更为坚实的技术基础。

title_abstract: Meat mixture of aging method
title_abstract_original: 육류의 혼합 숙성 방법 본 발명은 수중 숙성, 습식 숙성 및 건식 숙성의 3단계 혼합 숙성을 통해 육질이 연하고 부드러우며, 풍미가 뛰어난 육류를 얻을 수 있는 육류의 혼합 숙성 방법에 관한 것으로, a) 진공포장 상태의 육류를 염수에 침지하여 숙성하는 수중숙성단계와; b) 상기 a)단계를 거친 육류를 저온에서 숙성하는 습식숙성단계와; c) 상기 b)단계를 거친 육류의 진공포장을 해제하고, 저온에서 숙성하는 건식숙성단계;를 포함하여 이루어지는 것을 특징으로 한다.

title_abstract: Meat mixture of aging method The present invention relates to a mixed aging method for meat, enabling acquisition of meat with outstanding taste as well as soft and tenderized texture by undergoing a three-staged mixed aging process including underwater aging, wet-type aging, and dry aging. To this end, the mixed aging method comprises the following steps: (a) an underwater aging step for aging vacuum-packaged meat after immersing the same in salt water; (b) wet-type aging step for aging the meat which had undergone the step (a) at a low temperature; and (c) a dry aging step for unsealing the vacuum packages of the meat which had undergone the step (b) and then aging the same at a low temperature.
title_abstract_original: 육류의 혼합 숙성 방법 본 발명은 수중 숙성, 습식 숙성 및 건식 숙성의 3단계 혼합 숙성을 통해 육질이 연하고 부드러우며, 풍미가 뛰어난 육류를 얻을 수 있는 육류의 혼합 숙성 방법에 관한 것으로, a) 진공포장 상태의 육류를 염수에 침지하여 숙성하는 수중숙성단계와; b) 상기 a)단계를 거친 육류를 저온에서 숙성하는 습식숙성단계와; c) 상기 b)단계를 거친 육류의 진공포장을 해제하고, 저온에서 숙성하는 건식숙성단계;를 포함하여 이루어지는 것을 특징으로 한다.

title_abstract: STEREOSPECIFIC SYNTHESES OF 24R,25- AND 24S,25-DIHYDROXYCHOLESTEROL AND ALKANOYL DERIVATIVES THEREOF Stereospecific syntheses of 24R,25- and 24S,25-dihydroxycholesterol and alkanoyl derivatives thereof, intermediates in the preparation of biologically important metabolites of Vitamin D.sub.3, are described.
title_abstract_original: STEREOSPECIFIC SYNTHESES OF 24R,25- AND 24S,25-DIHYDROXYCHOLESTEROL AND ALKANOYL DERIVATIVES THEREOF Stereospecific syntheses of 24R,25- and 24S,25-dihydroxycholesterol and alkanoyl derivatives thereof, intermediates in the preparation of biologically important metabolites of Vitamin D.sub.3, are described.

title_abstract: COMMUNICATION TO A DOWNHOLE TOOL BY ACOUSTIC WAVEGUIDE TRANSFER Systems, methods and apparatuses for communication between a surface of a wellbore and a downhole location of a wellbore via acoustic waveguide transfer. A first device can transmit an acoustic signal through a wellbore waveguide that is coupled with the first device. The acoustic signal can transfer from the wellbore waveguide to a wellbore tubular through a contact between the wellbore waveguide and the wellbore tubular. A second device can receive the acoustic signal via the wellbore tubular that is coupled with the second device.

title_abstract: Installation method for controlling precision of locking anchor pipe The invention discloses an installation method for controlling the precision of a locking anchor pipe. The installation method comprises the steps that the locking anchor pipe is installed by means ofa guiding mould and an L-shaped reinforcement; the guiding mould comprises a steel plate and two guiding pipes, circle centers are determined at the positions being 125 mm away from the two sides ofthe center of the long edge of the steel plate, and hole drilling is conducted; the guiding pipes are circular steel pipes; the assembly relationship of the guiding pipes and preformed holes is that the guiding pipes penetrate through the preformed holes in the steel plate, and are horizontally arranged downwards at 15-degree angles; after a tunnel grille is completed, the guiding mould is fixed through a strong magnet and longitudinal connecting reinforcements at arc springs of the grille, and holes are drilled in the guiding pipes to be used for determining the installation angle of the locking anchor pipe; after hole drilling is completed, the guiding mould is disassembled, and the locking anchor pipe is installed; installation of the locking anchor pipe is checked by using a method that the angle is measured by a slope scale in the driving process of the locking anchor pipe; and after installation of the locking anchor pipe is completed, one edge of the L-shaped reinforcement and amain reinforcement of the grille are subjected to full-length welding, and the other edge of the L-shaped reinforcement and the locking anchor pipe are subjected to full-length welding. According tothe installation method, it is ensured that the locking anchor pipe at the arch springs of the grille is horizontally anchored into geological surrounding rock downwards at a 15-degree angle, the locking anchor pipe is connected to a grille steel frame of a supporting structure in a welded mode to form a whole body, and the effects that pressure is borne, and the initial supporting structure is prevented from settling are achieved.
title_abstract_original: 种用于控制锁脚锚管精度的安装方法 种用于控制锁脚锚管精度的安装方法，借助导向模具和L型筋实现锁脚锚管的安装；导向模具：包括钢板和2根导向管，在钢板长边中心两侧125mm位置确定圆心并钻孔；导向管为圆形钢管。二者装配关系为：导向管穿透钢板上的预留孔，沿水平向下15°布设。隧道格栅完成后，通过强磁铁以及格栅拱脚处的纵向连接筋固定导向管模具，在导向管中钻孔，用于确定锁脚锚管安装角度；钻孔完成后，将导向模具拆除，安装锁脚锚管；锁脚锚管打设过程中使用坡度尺量测角度的方法对锁脚锚管安装进行检查；锁脚锚管安装完成后，将L型筋边与格栅主筋满焊，另边与锁脚锚管满焊。该方法确保格栅拱脚处锁脚锚管水平向下15°锚进地质围岩中，与支护结构格栅钢架焊接连成整体，起到承压、防止初期支护结构沉降等作用。

title_abstract: Corn SSR (simple sequence repeat) molecular markers applicable to capillary electrophoresis detection technology and application of molecular markers The invention provides fifteen corn SSR (simple sequence repeat) molecular markers applicable to a capillary electrophoresis detection technology and an application of the molecular markers, and provides a primer combination suitable for a capillary electrophoresis platform to detect the SSR molecular markers. The 15 SSR molecular markers can be used for: (1) construction of a corn variety SSR marker fingerprint database, (2) corn sample maternal line traceability analysis, (3) corn variety identification and genetic diversity analysis, and (4) differentiation of corn Nendan 16 and Suiyu 26. Through the application of the corn SSR molecular markers, an available marker site range of corn can be widened on a genome level; a novel tool is provided for research of the corn variety and germplasm resource identification, genetic relationship evaluation, a cytoplasmic inheritance characteristic and the like; and the molecular markers have good application prospects.
title_abstract_original: 组适用于毛细管电泳检测技术的玉米SSR分子标记及其应用 本发明提供了组适用于毛细管电泳检测技术的玉米SSR分子标记及其应用，共15个SSR分子标记，并提供套适于毛细管电泳平台的检测所述SSR分子标记的引物组合。利用这15个SSR分子标记可以：(1)构建玉米品种SSR标记指纹数据库；(2)玉米样本母系溯源分析；(3)玉米品种鉴定及遗传多样性分析；(4)区分玉米嫩单16和绥玉26品种。通过本发明的玉米SSR分子标记的应用，能够在基因组水平上拓展了玉米可用标记位点的范围；为玉米品种、种质资源鉴定，亲缘关系评价，细胞质遗传特性等研究提供新工具，应用前景良好。

title_abstract: Suspended conveying or protection pipe position control - uses inherent righting capability to suit support advances, with guides and linkages The advancing supports entrain the pipe which flexes (10, 11) according to the support movements. This flexing is achieved using end stops (4) which draw the pipe securements forward with it to the end of the advance step(s). The securements (31, 32) of the pipes on the adjoining as-yet unadvanced supports (B, B1), are also moved forward by an amt. proportional to the bend line. The pipe starts halfway along the advance step (2) so that securement on the unadvanced unit remains stationary and securement on the advancing unit moves back. These movements are assisted by a sloping guide so that the weight of the pipe restores its position each time. At least one securement of the pipe can only move backward, whilst the remainder can deviate sideways.

title_abstract: CIRCUIT FOR REDUCING ELECTROMAGNETIC INTERFERENCE FROM MAGNETIC CORE KEYBOARDS The present disclosure describes circuit variants for reducing electromagnetic interference from saturable core keyboards to acceptable levels. The invention finds particular application in conjunction with capacitive-discharge scan techniques used in such keyboards. In order to attenuate the external field resulting from such techniques, a circuit is taught which effectively disconnects the scan line array from the capacitor charging circuit during the time between scans. A second variant, when added to the first, further reduces interference by disconnecting the entire scan circuit from the supply potential during the scan time thereby eliminating steady-state currents and turnoff oscillatory transients.

title_abstract: A packaging method for the salted squid using by aluminium retort pouched film
title_abstract_original: A packaging method for the salted squid using by aluminium retort pouched film

title_abstract: A PACKAGING METHOD FOR THE SALTED SQUID USING BY ALUMINIUM RETORT POUCHED FILM PURPOSE: A packaging method of salted squid is provided to store the high quality salted squid by having hygienic advantages for improving the quality of products. CONSTITUTION: 100 wt% of squid is salted in salting solution containing 1-20 wt% of salt, 1-10 wt% of sugar, 1-10 wt% of water, and 0.01-5 wt% of refined rice wine for 1-4 days. The salted squid is coated with liquid spices. The salted squid is coated with dry spices, and aged at 0-30°C for 1-5 days. The salted squid is packaged using an aluminum retort pouch film. The dried spices contain 1-10 wt% of red pepper powder and 0.01-5 wt% of sugar for 100 wt% of squid. The liquid spices contain 1-7 wt% of red pepper powder, 0.01-5 wt% of artificial seasoning, 1-10 wt% of garlic, 1-10 wt% of starch syrup, and 1-15 wt% of water. The aluminum retort pouch film is an aluminum laminated retort pouch film (PET+Al+CPP).

title_abstract: Low-temperature smoking set with cigarette clamping function The invention discloses a low-temperature smoking set with the cigarette clamping function, which comprises a smoking set shell, a heating cavity used for containing a cigarette is formed in the smoking set shell, two clamping arms capable of being oppositely opened and closed are arranged in the smoking set shell, each clamping arm is provided with a clamping block, the two clamping blocks are symmetrically arranged on the two sides of the heating cavity, and two through holes corresponding to the two clamping blocks are formed in the two sides of the heating cavity; a driving part for driving the two clamping arms to be opened and closed is further arranged in the smoking set shell, and when the driving part drives the two clamping arms to be relatively closed, the clamping blocks are inserted into the heating cavity from the corresponding through holes. The low-temperature smoking set can effectively prevent the cigarette from being taken out of the heating cavity in the smoking process.
title_abstract_original: 具有烟支夹紧功能的低温烟具 本发明公开了一种具有烟支夹紧功能的低温烟具，包括烟具壳体，所述烟具壳体中形成有用于容纳烟支的加热腔，所述烟具壳体中设有两个可相对开合的夹臂，每个所述夹臂上均设有夹块，两个所述夹块对称布置在所述加热腔的两侧，所述加热腔的两侧设有与两个所述夹块相对应的两个通孔；所述烟具壳体中还设有驱动两个所述夹臂开合的驱动件，所述驱动件驱动两个所述夹臂相对闭合时，所述夹块从对应的所述通孔中插入所述加热腔中。本申请低温烟具可以有效避免抽吸过程中烟支从加热腔中带出。

title_abstract: Housing website information publishing method and system The invention discloses a housing web information publishing method and system. The method includes the following steps of: receiving housing source information input by a user; and automatically publishing the housing source information on all intermediary agent websites. The technical scheme has high efficiency.
title_abstract_original: 一种房产网信息发布方法及系统 本发明公开了一种房产网信息发布方法及系统，所述方法包括如下步骤：接收用户输入的房源信息；将该房源信息自动发布在所有的中介网站中。本发明提供的技术方案具有效率高的优点。

title_abstract: CLOUD-BASED INFRASTRUCTURE FOR MULTI-PARTY COMMERCIAL REAL ESTATE MANAGEMENT
title_abstract_original: CLOUD-BASED INFRASTRUCTURE FOR MULTI-PARTY COMMERCIAL REAL ESTATE MANAGEMENT

title_abstract: CLOUD-BASED INFRASTRUCTURE FOR MULTI-PARTY COMMERCIAL REAL ESTATE MANAGEMENT The present disclosure involves systems, software, and computer implemented methods for adaptive role-based leasing transaction management, including management of tenant inquiries. An example method includes receiving a request from a user to access a lease transaction management system. An organization and a role associated with a current session of the user are determined. A user interface is customized based on the organization and the role associated with the current session. Information for tenant inquiries that the user is authorized to view based on the role and the organization is displayed. Tenant inquiry information for a first tenant inquiry for a first prospective tenant is received. At least one matching property that matches the tenant inquiry information is automatically identified. Information about the at least one matching property is presented to the user.

title_abstract: System and method for acquiring real estate assessment information online The invention discloses a system and method for acquiring the real estate assessment information online, by which the problem that when an owner needs to assess the own real estate, the owner generally needs to search an assessment mechanism to assess, so that the owner cannot know the assessed price of the own real estate quickly. The key points of the technical scheme are that the system comprises a calculation module, a transaction module, an assessment module, a matching module, an input module and a display module, and the purpose that the owner know the assessed price of the own real estate quickly is achieved.
title_abstract_original: 一种在线获取房产评估信息的系统及方法 本发明公开了一种在线获取房产评估信息的系统及方法，解决了业主需要对自己的房产进行估价时，通常需要寻找评估机构进行评估，不能较快速的获知自己的目前房产的估价的问题，其技术方案要点是，包括计算模块、成交模块、评估模块、匹配模块、输入模块以及显示模块，达到用户快速获知自己的目前房产的估价信息的目的。

title_abstract: Cluster type down-the-hole hammer The invention discloses a cluster type down-the-hole hammer. The cluster type down-the-hole hammer comprises a drill rod and a down-the-hole hammer connected with the drill rod, a main air inlet channel is formed in the drill rod, a high-pressure air chamber communicated with the main air inlet channel is arranged on the down-the-hole hammer, an airflow adjusting valve with a valve block and an airflow adjusting hole is arranged between the drill rod and the down-the-hole hammer, and the airflow adjusting hole is closed by the valve block. An air inlet of the airflow adjusting valve communicates with the main air inlet channel, an air outlet of the airflow adjusting valve communicates with the high-pressure air chamber, a flow dividing air chamber is arranged on the down-the-hole hammer, and the opening degree of the valve block on the airflow adjusting hole is adjusted, so that high-pressure air in the main air inlet channel is divided into the flow dividing air chamber. According to the cluster type down-the-hole hammer, when the cluster down-the-hole hammer performs drilling and rock drilling operation in different stratums, air flow can be adjusted in time, so that the rock drilling efficiency is improved, and energy consumption is reduced. The whole linkage structure in the airflow adjusting valve is convenient to assemble and disassemble, a corresponding exhaust channel is arranged only by means of the structure of a down-the-hole hammer shell, no part needs to be additionally arranged, and structural design is reasonable and compact.
title_abstract_original: 一种集束式潜孔锤 本发明公开了一种集束式潜孔锤，包括钻杆以及与钻杆相连的潜孔锤，在钻杆上设有主进气道，在潜孔锤上设有与主进气道相连通的高压气室，在钻杆与潜孔锤之间设置具有阀片以及气流调节孔的气流调节阀，阀片将气流调节孔封闭，气流调节阀的进气口与主进气道相连通，出气口与高压气室相连通，在潜孔锤上设有分流气室，调节阀片在气流调节孔上的开合度，使得主进气道内的高压气体分流至分流气室内。本发明能保证集束潜孔锤在不同地层钻孔凿岩作业时，气流的及时调节，从而提高凿岩效率，节约能耗。气流调节阀内的整个联动结构运行结构，便于装卸，只借助潜孔锤壳体本身的结构设置对应的排气通道，不需要额外增设部件，结构设计合理，紧凑。

title_abstract: Anti-lost biological test vessel convenient to carry The invention discloses an anti-lost biological test vessel convenient to carry, and relates to the technical field of test vessels. The problem that when an existing test vessel is used, a protection mechanism for the test vessel is generally lacked is solved. The anti-lost biological test vessel convenient to carry comprises a bottom plate, a sleeve and protective plates, the bottom plate is of a disc-shaped structure, and a vessel bottle body is arranged in the middle of the top of the bottom plate; two side grooves are each internally provided with a sliding block in a sliding mode, the front sides of the two side grooves are each provided with a pulling plate in a sliding and inserting mode, and the front ends of the two pulling plates penetrate through the front side of the bottom plate and are each provided with a pulling hole; a base plate is arranged at the bottom of a vessel bottleneck, and ten protective plates are rotationally installed on the circumferential outer wall of the base plate in a surrounding mode; and a top disc is arranged at the top of the vessel bottleneck, and six main rods are rotationally installed at the bottom of the top disc in a surrounding mode. The vessel bottle body is surrounded by the ten protective plates, and the vessel bottle body is protected.
title_abstract_original: 一种便于携带防丢失的生物试验器皿 本发明公开了一种便于携带防丢失的生物试验器皿，涉及试验器皿技术领域，解决了现有的试验器皿在使用的时候，普遍缺少对试验器皿的保护机构的问题。一种便于携带防丢失的生物试验器皿，包括底板,套筒和护板，所述底板为圆盘形结构，且底板的顶部设置中间处设置有一处器皿瓶体；两处所述侧槽内均滑动安装有一处滑块，且两处侧槽的前侧均滑插安装有一处拉板，这两处拉板的前端均穿过底板的前侧开设有一处拉孔；所述器皿瓶颈的底部设置有一处底盘，且底盘的圆周外壁上呈环绕状排列转动安装有十处护板；所述器皿瓶颈的顶部设置有处顶盘，且顶盘的底部呈环绕状排列转动安装有六处主杆。本发明通过十处护板将器皿瓶体包围，对器皿瓶体保护。

title_abstract: Cylinder type multi-layered photobioreactor
title_abstract_original: Cylinder type multi-layered photobioreactor

title_abstract: CYLINDER TYPE MULTI-LAYERED PHOTOBIOREACTOR A cylindrical photobioreactor is provided to induce the mass culture of microalgae by using cylinder type light emitting diode, column type light source, circular light source, and helical light source. A cylinderical photobioreactor comprises: a reaction chamber(10) which contains microalgae; a cylindrical light source(20) which is stacked in a constant site inside the reactor; a gas inlet port(10a) which is connected from the lower part of reaction chamber; a gas discharge port(10b) which is connected to the lower part in the center of reactor; and a control switch which controls the intensity of light of cylindrical light source. An organic LED(light emitting diode) or flexible LED is equipped at outside and inside of cylindrical substrate.
title_abstract_original: CYLINDER TYPE MULTI-LAYERED PHOTOBIOREACTOR A cylindrical photobioreactor is provided to induce the mass culture of microalgae by using cylinder type light emitting diode, column type light source, circular light source, and helical light source. A cylinderical photobioreactor comprises: a reaction chamber(10) which contains microalgae; a cylindrical light source(20) which is stacked in a constant site inside the reactor; a gas inlet port(10a) which is connected from the lower part of reaction chamber; a gas discharge port(10b) which is connected to the lower part in the center of reactor; and a control switch which controls the intensity of light of cylindrical light source. An organic LED(light emitting diode) or flexible LED is equipped at outside and inside of cylindrical substrate.

title_abstract: Waffleline - configured transmission link A miniaturized transmission link architecture for intercoupling high frequency miniaturized integrated circuit components comprises a thin conductive plate in one surface of which a matrix or grid work of rectilinear grooves or channels are formed, creating "waffle-iron"-like pattern in one surface of the conductive plate. The spacing between channels corresponds to the width of a channel which, in turn, may be sized to substantially match the outer diameter of insulation jacketed wire that is placed in the channels. The depth of a channel or groove is slightly larger than the outer diameter of the wire to accommodate wire crossovers at intersections of the channels. The top surface of the "waffle-plate" is provided with a conductive foil to complete the shielding for the wires. Because the waffle structure has the same periodicity along either of the orthogonal directions of the channels, the characteristic impedance of the transmission link is readily defined by the size of the lands or mesas that are bounded by the channels and the widths of the channels themselves.

title_abstract: COMPOSITION FOR REARING ORGANISM BELONGING TO ORDER DECAPODA AND COMPOSITION FOR PREVENTING OR TREATING INFECTION IN DECAPODS Provided are: a composition for rearing an organism belonging to the order Decapoda, which includes bacterial cells of at least one type selected from NITE-BP-03199, NITE-BP-03200, and NITE-BP-03201 or a culture of the cells, or an extract thereof; and a rearing method for an organism belonging to the order Decapoda using the same. Provided are: a composition for preventing or treating a Vibrios infection in decapods, which includes bacterial cells of at least one type selected from NITE-BP-03199, NITE-BP-03200, and NITE-BP-03201 or a culture of the cells, or an extract thereof; and a method for preventing or treating an infection in decapods using the same.
title_abstract_original: エビ目の生物の飼育用組成物、およびエビ目感染症に対する予防または治療用組成物 ＮＩＴＥ－ＢＰ－０３１９９、ＮＩＴＥ－ＢＰ－０３２００およびＮＩＴＥ－ＢＰ－０３２０１から選択される少なくとも１種の細菌の菌体もしくは菌体培養物またはこれらの抽出物を含むエビ目の生物の飼育用組成物ならびにこれを用いたエビ目の生物の飼育方法が提供される。ＮＩＴＥ－ＢＰ－０３１９９、ＮＩＴＥ－ＢＰ－０３２００およびＮＩＴＥ－ＢＰ－０３２０１から選択される少なくとも１種の細菌の菌体もしくは菌体培養物またはこれらの抽出物を含む、ビブリオ属菌によるエビ目感染症に対する予防または治療用組成物ならびにこれを用いたエビ目感染症に対する予防または治療方法が提供される。

title_abstract: Device for dispensing liquid and iced confectionary
title_abstract_original: Device for dispensing liquid and iced confectionary

title_abstract: DEVICE FOR DISPENSING LIQUID AND ICED CONFECTIONERY A device is disclosed which is capable of simultaneously dispensing liquid and iced confectionery. A valve arrangement (14) is coupled to a supply of the iced confectionery and to one or more sources of the liquid confectionery such as flavouring syrup. The valve arrangement comprises shaft (24) and sleeve (26) components capable of relative rotation under manual operation to selectively adopt any of a number of dispensing locations, at each of which the liquid confectionery is added to the iced confectionery at the point of dispensing. Where plural flavours of the liquid confectionery are available, the valve arrangement preferably is capable of dispensing the flavours individually or in various combinations, depending on the dispensing location selected. The valve arrangement can also adopt one or more positions at which no liquid confectionery is dispensed.

title_abstract_original: 발효인삼종자 오일을 이용한 피토스테롤 대량 생산 방법 본 발명은 인삼종자를 발효시키는 단계, 발효인삼종자를 건조 및 분쇄시키는 단계, 오일을 추출하는 단계 및 추출된 발효인삼종자 오일에서 피토스테롤을 추출하는 단계를 포함하는 피토스테롤을 대량 생산하는 방법에 관한 것이다. 본 발명의 방법에 따를 경우 다양한 생리 활성을 갖는 기능성 소재인 피토스테롤을 대량 생산할 수 있다.

title_abstract: MASS PRODUCTION METHOD OF PHYTOSTEROLS USING FERMENTED GINSENG SEED OIL The present invention relates to a mass production method of phytosterols using fermented ginseng oil, which includes the steps of: fermenting ginseng seeds; drying and grinding the fermented ginseng seeds; extracting oil; and extracting phytosterols from the extracted fermented ginseng seed oil. The mass production method of phytosterols using fermented ginseng oil according to the present invention can mass-produce phytosterols which are functional materials with various biological activities.

title_abstract: Retrievable safety valve A new and improved subsurface safety valve which is inserted into well tubing without requiring removal of the tubing, and which replaces worn, deteriorated and fully or partially inoperative safety valves in the well tubing to prevent blow-outs in wells. The replacement subsurface safety valve may be subsequently removed after insertion without requiring removal of the well tubing.
title_abstract_original: Retrievable safety valve A new and improved subsurface safety valve which is inserted into well tubing without requiring removal of the tubing, and which replaces worn, deteriorated and fully or partially inoperative safety valves in the well tubing to prevent blow-outs in wells. The replacement subsurface safety valve may be subsequently removed after insertion without requiring removal of the well tubing.

title_abstract: Method and apparatus for impulse purchasing of packaged information services Impulse purchasing is provided for packages of services offered to consumers via an information network. A plurality of services is offered for individual purchase on an impulse basis via a user terminal coupled to the information network. The plurality of services is offered for purchase as a package on terms that may be more favorable than when the services are purchased individually. Upon purchase of a package, a package record is established for access by the user terminal. The package record provides cryptographically secure access to services provided in the package during a defined time period over which the package is valid. <IMAGE>

title_abstract_original: Method and device for providing information service by communication network

Fremgangsmåte og anordning for impulskjöp av pakkede informasjonstjenester Impulskjøp blir mulig for pakker med tjenester som tilbys forbrukere via et Informasjonsnett (80). En rekke tjenester tilbys for kjøp enkeltvis på en Impulsbasls via en brukerterminal (28) som er koblet til nettet (80). Rekken med tjenester blir tilbudt for kjøp som en pakke på betingelser som kan være mer fordelaktige enn om tjenestene kjøpes enkeltvis. Ved kjøp av en pakke settes det opp et pakkereglster (70) som brukerens terminal (28) får tilgang til. title_abstract: Method and apparatus for impulse purchasing of packaged information services Impulse purchasing is provided for packages of services offered to consumers via an information network. A plurality of services is offered for individual purchase on an impulse basis via a user terminal coupled to the information network. The plurality of services is offered for purchase as a package on terms that may be more favorable than when the services are purchased individually. Upon purchase of a package, a package record is established for access by the user terminal. The package record provides cryptographically secure access to services provided in the package during a defined time period over which the package is valid.

title_abstract_original: METODO Y APARATO PARA COMPRAR MEDIANTE IMPULSOS SERVICIOS DE INFORMACION EN PAQUETES. Se proporciona la adquisicion de paquetes de servicios mediante impulsos, ofrecidos a los consumidores vía una red de informacion. Se ofrece a la venta una pluralidad de servicios individuales mediante impulsos a través de una terminal de usuario conectada a la red de informacion. La pluralidad de servicios que se ofrecen a la venta en forma de paquete, en términos que pueden ser más favorables que cuando los servicios se adquieren en forma individual. Con la adquisicion de un paquete se establece un registro de paquetes para el acceso por parte de la terminal del usuario. El registro del paquete proporciona acceso criptográficamente seguro a los servicios proporcionados en el paquete durante un período de tiempo definido en el cual el paquete es válido.

title_abstract: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR IMPULSE PURCHASE OF PACKAGED INFORMATION SERVICE PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To provide a method for permitting an information service provider to make a program various different packages and to supply them and to provide a method for safely executing access to such service. SOLUTION: Impulse purchase is given to the package of service supplied to a consumer through an information network. Plural services are supplied for individual purchase through a user terminal connected to the information network for individual purchase. Plural services are supplied for purchase as the more suitable package compared to a case where they are individually purchased. A package record is established for access by the user terminal at the same time as the purchase of the package. The package record brings ciphering protection access to service given to the package during a definition time interval when the package is valid.

패키지정보 서비스의 임펄스구매를 위한 방법 및 장치 본 발명은 정보네트워크를 통해 소비자에게 공급되는 서비스의 패키지에 제공되는 임펄스구매에 관한 것이다. 복수의 서비스가 정보네트워크에 결합된 사용자터미널을 통해 임펄스상의 개별 구매에 대해 제공된다. 복수의 서비스는 서비스가 개별적으로 구매될 때보다 더 좋은 조건의 패키지가 구매마다 제공된다. 패키지의 구매시, 패키지기록부는 사용자터미널에 의해 억세스하기 위해 형성된다. 패키지기록부는 패키지가 유효한 규정된 시주기동안 패키지에 제공된 서비스에 암호화기법으로 안전한 억세스를 제공할 수 있다.

패키지 정보서비스의 임펄스구매를 위한 방법 및 장치 본 발명은, 정보네트워크를 통해 소비자에게 공급되는 서비스의 패키지에 제공되는 임펄스구매에 관한 것이다. 복수의 서비스가 정보네트워크에 연결된 사용자 터미널을 통해 임펄스 기초하의 개별 구매에 제공된다. 복수의 서비스는 서비스가 개별적으로 구매될 때보다 더 좋은 조건의 패키지로서 구매마다 제공된다. 패키지의 구매시에, 사용자 터미널에 의한 억세스를 위해 패키지 레코드가 설정된다. 패키지 레코드는 패키지가 유효한 한정된 기간동안 패키지에 제공된 서비스에 암호화기법으로 보안 억세스를 제공할 수 있다.

title_abstract: IN-VEHICLE COMMUNICATION DEVICE, COMMUNICATION SYSTEM IN VEHICLE, COMMUNICATION METHOD AND PROGRAM Provided is an in-vehicle communication device which determines an optimal communication path of a flow. The in-vehicle communication device is provided with an acquisition unit and a selection unit. The acquisition unit acquires vehicle information relating to the state of a vehicle in which a communication network is constructed or the environment in which the vehicle is placed. The selection unit selects, from among a plurality of communication paths included in the communication network, a communication path of a flow in which a transmission packet is received on the basis of vehicle information and communication path information relating to the communication paths included in the communication network.
title_abstract_original: 車載用通信装置、車両内通信システム、通信方法及びプログラム フローの最適な通信経路を決定する車載用通信装置を提供する。車載用通信装置は、取得部と、選択部と、を備える。取得部は、内部に通信ネットワークが構築された車両の状態又は置かれた環境に関する車両情報を取得する。選択部は、車両情報と通信ネットワークに含まれる通信経路に関する通信経路情報に基づき、送信パケットを収容するフローの通信経路を通信ネットワークに含まれる複数の通信経路のなかから選択する。

title_abstract: CAR-LOADED COMMUNICATION APPARATUS, IN-CAR COMMUNICATION SYSTEM, COMMUNICATION METHOD AND PROGRAM A car-loaded communication apparatus comprises: an acquisition part; and a selection part. The acquisition part acquires car information related to a state of a car in which a communication network is constructed inside, or an environment in which the car is placed. The selection part selects a communication route of a flow accommodating a transmission packet(s) from a plurality of communication routes included in the communication network, based on: the car information; and communication route information related to a communication route(s) included in the communication network.
title_abstract_original: CAR-LOADED COMMUNICATION APPARATUS, IN-CAR COMMUNICATION SYSTEM, COMMUNICATION METHOD AND PROGRAM A car-loaded communication apparatus comprises: an acquisition part; and a selection part. FAHRZEUGEINGEBAUTE KOMMUNIKATIONSVORRICHTUNG, FAHRZEUGINTERNESKOMMUNIKATIONSSYSTEM, KOMMUNIKATIONSVERFAHREN UND -PROGRAMM Bereitgestellt wird eine fahrzeugeingebaute Kommunikationsvorrichtung, die eine optimale Kommunikationsroute eines Flusses bestimmt. Die fahrzeugeingebaute Kommunikationsvorrichtung umfasst: einen Erfassungsabschnitt; und einen Auswahlabschnitt. Der Erfassungsabschnitt erfasst Fahrzeuginformationen, die sich auf einen Zustand eines Fahrzeugs beziehen, in dem ein Kommunikationsnetzwerk im Inneren aufgebaut ist, oder auf eine Umgebung, in der sich das Fahrzeug befindet. Der Auswahlabschnitt wählt eine Kommunikationsroute eines Flusses, der ein oder mehrere Übertragungspakete unterbringt, aus einer Vielzahl von in dem Kommunikationsnetzwerk enthaltenen Kommunikationsrouten aus, basierend auf: den Fahrzeuginformationen; und Kommunikationsrouteninformationen, die sich auf eine oder mehrere in dem Kommunikationsnetzwerk enthaltene Kommunikationsrouten beziehen.

title_abstract: A METHOD FOR SETTING THE RF-OUT CHANNEL AUTOMATICALLY PURPOSE: A method for automatically setting an RF broadcasting signal output channel is provided to be capable of removing a troublesome setting and verifying process due to a user by automatically setting an optimum video signal capturing channel with least channel interference between broadcasting signals, and of preventing the viewing through an interference channel. CONSTITUTION: First, horizontal synchronous signals are detected and counted for a constant interval of input broadcasting signals. Then, the number of the counted horizontal synchronous signals is compared with a previously stored reference value. Next, the wave detecting mode of the input broadcasting signal is changed in accordance with the comparison result.

고주파 방송신호 출력채널 자동 설정방법 본 발명은, 수신입력되는 고주파 방송신호를 복조 후 재출력하기 위한 RF채널을 설정함에 있어서, 동조가능한 전 채널에 대한 방송신호 유무를 확인하고, 방송신호 무 채널로 확인된 채널 중 인접 방송신호 채널의 영향이 가장 적은 채널을 구분파악하여, 상기 수신입력되는 고주파신호가 상기 구분파악된 RF채널의 고주파신호로 변환출력되도록 하는 고주파 방송신호 출력채널 자동 설정방법에 관한 것으로서, 영상기록재생기의 RF 출력채널 할당방법에 있어서, 채널 동조시, 방송신호 무(無)채널을 저장하는 제1단계; 상기 저장된 각 채널에 대한 전후 채널의 방송신호 존재여부를 검출하는 제2단계; 및 상기 각 검출결과에 따라, 상기 저장된 각 채널 중 하나를 선택하여 RF 출력채널로 설정하는 제3단계를 포함하여 이루어져, RF 출력채널을, 방송신호간의 채널간섭이 가장 적어 최적의 영상신호 시청이 가능한 채널로 자동설정함으로써, 사용자의 번거로운 설정 및 확인과정을 제거하고 또한 간섭채널을 통한 시청이 이루어지는 것을 방지하여 사용자의 불만사항을 사전에 차단하는 유용성과 편의성을 도모한 발명인 것이다.

title_abstract: Smoking article having a modified mouth end cavity A smoking article comprises an aerosol generating substrate and a mouthpiece in axial alignment with the aerosol generating substrate. The mouthpiece has a rod end adjacent the aerosol generating substrate and a mouth end opposite the rod end. Further, the mouthpiece comprises a tubular element defining a mouth end cavity. In addition, the mouthpiece comprises a first wrapper circumscribing the tubular element around at least the mouth end cavity and one or more holes are provided in the tubular element at the mouth end cavity to expose one or more portions of the inner surface of first wrapper to the mouth end cavity.

一种控制水稻生育期基因LJP1的应用 本发明属于植物基因工程技术领域，公开了一种控制水稻生育期基因LJP1的应用。具体涉及一种控制水稻生育期基因的克隆、功能验证和应用。所述的LJP1基因的核苷酸序列如序列表SEQ ID NO.1所示，其编码的氨基酸序列如序列表SEQ ID NO.2所示。LJP1决定水稻基本营养生长期与感光性，从而影响其产量的形成。该基因用于创制水稻育种的新种质，扩大水稻品种的种植区域与季节，提高水稻产量与品质，具有很好的应用前景。

title_abstract: Application of gene LJP1 for controlling growth period of rice The invention belongs to the technical field of plant genetic engineering, discloses application of a gene LJP1 for controlling the growth period of rice, and particularly relates to cloning, functional verification and application of the gene for controlling the growth period of rice. The nucleotide sequence of the gene LJP1 is shown in a sequence table SEQ ID NO. 1, and the coded amino acid sequence of the gene LJP1 is shown in a sequence table SEQ ID NO. 2. The gene LJP1 determines the basic vegetative growth period and the photosensitivity of rice, and therefore the yield of rice is influenced. The gene is used for creating new germplasm for rice breeding, the planting area and season of rice varieties are enlarged, the yield and quality of rice are improved, and the gene has good application prospects.

title_abstract: Container having ingredients for preparing a frozen confection, container holder and device for preparing a frozen confection The present invention relates to a container (20) designed for being inserted into a device (1) for preparing a frozen confection (52), said container (20) comprising at least one scraper (24) movable within the container (20) and said container (20) containing ingredients (23) for producing a frozen confection (52) when being cooled and moved. The present invention further relates to a container holder (15) adapted to receive a container (20) said container holder (15) having a heat exchange surface being in tight contact with the container (20) and comprising channels (45) allowing a cooling agent to run along the heat exchange surface. The present invention additionally relates to a device (1) for preparing a frozen confection.

항암물질 카텝신 B 저해제를 생산하는 신규한 균주스트렙토마이세스 SP. KH-1 본 발명은 항암물질 카텝신 B 저해제(Cathepsin B inhibitor)를 생산하는 신규한 균주 스트렙토마이세스 sp. KH-1(Streptomyces sp. KH-1)와 이들이 생산하는 카텝신 B 저해제에 관한 것으로 토양에서 단백질 분해효소 저해제를 생산하는 균주를 선발하여 배양, 여과한 후 배양 여과액의 카텝신 B 저해 활성을 측정하여 조사한 결과, 상기 균주의 배양 여과액은 카텝신 B의 단백질 분해활성을 뚜렷하게 저해하는 뛰어난 효과가 있으며, 상기와 같은 카텝신 B 저해제를 생산하는 본 발명의 신규 균주의 화학분류학적 및 형태학적 특성을 조사한 후 이 균주를 스트렙토마이세스 sp. KH-1로 명명하고 TAXON 프로그램을 사용하여 동정한 결과, 본 발명 신규 균주를 스트렙토마이세스(Streptomyces) 속 균주로 동정하고 이 균주가 생산하는 카텝신 B 저해제를C-NMR 스펙트럼 분석, IR 스펙트럼 분석, 원소분석 및 UV 흡수 스펙트럼 분석으로 동정한 결과, 폴리하이드록시아민으로 구성된 신규한 물질로 동정하여 제공하는 뛰어난 효과가 있다.

title_abstract: NEW STRAIN STREPTOMYCES SP. KH-1 (KCTC 8095) PRODUCING CATHEPSIN B INHIBITOR USED AS ANTICANCER DRUG PURPOSE: Lysosomal Catherine B, protease, is known that plays important roles in invasion and metastasis of cancers. Cathepsin B inhibitor can be used to treat cancers and a new strain of Streptomyces sp. KH-1 producing Catherine B inhibitor is provided. CONSTITUTION: Using Actinomyces selection medium containing 50 micro gram/ml of nystatin, microorganism from soil sample is cultured. Starch-casein-nitrate agar is spreaded with microorganism grown in selection media and spore is isolated. Each spore is cultured for 4 days at 28°C in the medium containing 2% glucose, 0.3% peptone, 0.05% K2HPO4, 0.05%Na NO3, and 0.05% NaCl. After cultivation, culture filtrate are obtained and heat treated at 80°C for 10 minutes. alpha-N-benzyloxycarbonyl-L-lysine-p-nitrophenylester and alpha-N-benzoyl-D,L-arginine-2-naphthylamide are used as substrates to measure the activity of Catherine B. New strain is identified and named Streptomyces sp. KH-1.

title_abstract: FUNCTIONAL MICROBEAD FOR FLUORESCENT CODING WITH RECOMBINANT BIOLUMINESCENT BACTERIA AND BIOCHIP FOR TOXICITY ANALYSIS PURPOSE: A functional microbead and a biosensor using the same are provided to save time and cost for cell arrangement and to prevent detection failure. CONSTITUTION: A microbead contains recombinant fluorescence bacteria and a fluorescent material. The fluorescent material is Cy3(green), Cy5(red), FITC(green), alexa, rhodamine, or Q-dot. The microbead is used for detecting toxic material such as mitomycin C(MMC), 1-methyl-1-nitroso-N-methylguanine(MNNG), hydrogen peroxide, paraquat, or salicylic acid. A method for preparing the microbead comprises: a step of mixing the fluorescence bacteria, natural polysaccharides, and fluorescent material to prepare a mixture; and a step of making the mixture in a bead.

title_abstract: Management system of smartphone The invention discloses a management system of a smartphone. The management system comprises a smartphone control module and an on-line control module, wherein the smartphone control module comprises an information input module, an information uploading module, an information downloading module, an information query module and an information classification module; the on-line control module comprises an information receiving module, an information feedback module, an information importing module and an information management module; and the smartphone control module and the on-line control module carry out data connection. Through the above way, by use of the management system of the smartphone, on-line and off-line service can be accurately provided so as to bring convenience to the daily use of people.
title_abstract_original: 智能手机管理系统 本发明公开了种智能手机管理系统，其包括手机控制模块和线上控制模块，所述手机控制模块包括信息输入模块、信息上传模块、信息下载模块、信息查询模块和信息归类模块，所述线上控制模块包括信息接收模块、信息反馈模块、信息导入模块、信息管理模块，所述手机控制模块与所述线上控制模块进行数据连接。通过上述方式，本发明提供的智能手机管理系统，可以准确的提供上线下线服务，方便人们日常的使用。

title_abstract: DISH REMAINING AMOUNT DETECTION APPARATUS AND DISH REMAINING AMOUNT DETECTION METHOD In accordance with one embodiment, a dish remaining amount detection apparatus comprises an input module configured to input an image of a container used in dining for placing dish and an image of the dish placed on the container captured by a camera; a remaining amount detection module configured to detect the remaining amount of the dish remaining in the container from the image input by the input module; an end determination module configured to determine whether or not the eating of the dish is ended according to the remaining amount of the dish detected by the remaining amount detection module; and an information output module configured to output information indicating that the eating of a dish is ended if the end determination module determines that the eating of the dish is ended.
title_abstract_original: DISH REMAINING AMOUNT DETECTION APPARATUS AND DISH REMAINING AMOUNT DETECTION METHOD In accordance with one embodiment, a dish remaining amount detection apparatus comprises an input module configured to input an image of a container used in dining for placing dish and an image of the dish placed on the container captured by a camera; a remaining amount detection module configured to detect the remaining amount of the dish remaining in the container from the image input by the input module; an end determination module configured to determine whether or not the eating of the dish is ended according to the remaining amount of the dish detected by the remaining amount detection module; and an information output module configured to output information indicating that the eating of a dish is ended if the end determination module determines that the eating of the dish is ended.

title_abstract: DEVICE AND PROGRAM FOR CUISINE RESIDUAL QUANTITY DETECTION PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To provide a device and a program for cuisine residual amount detection capable of correctly grasping completion of each cuisine and providing the next cuisine at a suitable timing.SOLUTION: A detection device for cuisine residual amount includes: a container used for a meal storing the cuisine photographed by a camera and input means for inputting an image of the cuisine stored in a container; residual amount detection means for detecting the residual amount of the cuisine that is left inside the container from the image inputted by the input means; completion determination means for determining whether or not the meal of the cuisine is completed or not from the residual amount of the cuisine detected by the residual amount detection means; and information output means for outputting information indicating that the meal of the cuisine is completed when determined that the meal is completed for the cuisine by the completion determination means.
title_abstract_original: 料理残量検出装置及びプログラム 【課題】本発明が解決しようとする課題は、各料理の終了を正しく把握し、適切なタイミングで次の料理を提供できる料理残量検出置及びプログラムを提供することである。【解決手段】実施形態の料理残量検出装置は、カメラが撮像した料理を収容する食事に用いる容器と当該容器に収容された料理の画像を入力する入力手段と、前記入力手段によって入力された前記画像から、前記容器内に残された前記料理の残量を検出する残量検出手段と、前記残量検出手段が検出した料理の残量から、当該料理の食事が終了したか否かを判断する終了判断手段と、前記終了判断手段が前記料理の食事が終了したと判断した場合、当該料理の食事を終了したことを示す情報を出力する情報出力手段と、を備える。【選択図】図９

title_abstract: Blood-pressure-lowering peptide of tuna roe and application of blood-pressure-lowering peptide The invention discloses a tuna-roe blood-pressure-lowering peptide with angiotensin converting enzyme (ACE) inhibiting activity and a preparation method and application thereof. An amino acid sequence of the blood-pressure-lowering peptide is Trp-Pro-Phe-Ala-Cys-Ser (WPFACS), and the molecular weight assayed by ESI/MS is 709.8Da. The tuna-roe blood-pressure-lowering peptide prepared by the invention has remarkable ACE inhibiting activity and can be applied to related drugs or health-care foods for treating hypertension. According to the tuna-roe blood-pressure-lowering peptide and the preparation method and application thereof, the blood-pressure-lowering peptide with ACE inhibition is prepared by taking tuna roes as raw materials and utilizing an enzymolysis process and a chromatographic preparation technology, and a technical support is provided for high-value utilization of the tuna roes.
title_abstract_original: 一种金枪鱼鱼卵降血压肽及其应用 本发明公开了一种具有血管紧张素转化酶(ACE)抑制活性的金枪鱼鱼卵降压肽及其制备方法和用途，该降压肽的氨基酸序列为Trp‑Pro‑Phe‑Ala‑Cys‑Ser(WPFACS)，ESI/MS检测分子量为709.8Da。本发明制备的金枪鱼鱼卵降压肽具有显著的血管紧张素转化酶(ACE)抑制活性，可应用于治疗高血压相关的药物或保健食品。本发明以金枪鱼鱼卵为原料，利用酶解工艺和色谱制备技术制备得到了一种具有ACE抑制的降血压肽，为金枪鱼鱼卵高值化利用提供技术支持。

title_abstract: GENERATING RECOMBINANT AFFINITY REAGENTS WITH ARRAYED TARGETS Methods for screening of affinity reagents for many target proteins of interest simultaneously. Arrayed targets (e.g., peptide, protein, RNA, cell, etc.) are used in affinity selection experiments to reduce the amount of target needed and to improve the throughput of discovering recombinant affinity reagents to a large collection of targets.

title_abstract: DEVICE AND METHOD FOR COMMUNICATION DEVICES A method determines an operating mode for a first communications device to communicatively connect to a second communications device. The method includes transmitting, by a first communications device to a wireless services manager arrangement (WSMA), contact identification data associated with a second communications device. The method includes determining, by the WMSA, association data as a function of the contact identification data and a contact identification database. The method includes determining, by the WSMA, one of a plurality of operating modes for the first communications device as a function of the association data. The method includes communicatively connecting the first communications device with the second communications device utilizing the determined operating mode.

title_abstract: DYNAMICALLY SWITCHING BETWEEN CALL PATHS FOR OUTGOING CALLS COMPRISING PBX-PATH FOR ENTERPRISE CALLS AND CELLULAR-PATH FOR PERSONAL CALLS The application relates to mobile phones which are used for both enterprise and personal calls. A conventional phone may be used for both type of calls, referred to as "operating modes". However, currently, the mode to be used must be performed manually prior to a call being placed or be configured in a predetermined manner based upon known conditions that generally indicate which operating mode should be used. In the first case, the user is always required to place the communications device in the proper operating mode prior to each call being placed using the communications device. In the second case, a current configuration to set the communications device may be a time of day in which when a call is made from the communications device between a certain time (e.g., 8:30am - 5:00pm), the enterprise mode is used. Outside the time window, the communications device may be set with the personal mode. Thus, the user may always be forced to utilize a particular operating mode such as always using the enterprise mode despite being a personal call during the predetermined time window. The application proposes to determine the operating mode in a dynamic manner by a so-called Wireless Services Manager Arrangement WSMA. Therefore, the calling phone transmits to the WSMA e.g. the phone number of the party to be called (215). The WSMA consults a database comprising the phone numbers of all parties directly or indirectly related to the enterprise. When the phone number is found in the database, the phone call is considered to be an enterprise call, otherwise it will be considered to be a personal call. The WSMA transmits a corresponding reply to the calling phone (230) which subsequently either dials over the cellular network (245) in case of a personal call or dials via a PBX (240) in case of an enterprise call.
title_abstract_original: DYNAMICALLY SWITCHING BETWEEN CALL PATHS FOR OUTGOING CALLS COMPRISING PBX-PATH FOR ENTERPRISE CALLS AND CELLULAR-PATH FOR PERSONAL CALLS The application relates to mobile phones which are used for both enterprise and personal calls. In the first case, the user is always required to place the communications device in the proper operating mode prior to each call being placed using the communications device. In the second case, a current configuration to set the communications device may be a time of day in which when a call is made from the communications device between a certain time (e.g., 8:30am - 5:00pm), the enterprise mode is used. Outside the time window, the communications device may be set with the personal mode. Thus, the user may always be forced to utilize a particular operating mode such as always using the enterprise mode despite being a personal call during the predetermined time window. The application proposes to determine the operating mode in a dynamic manner by a so-called Wireless Services Manager Arrangement WSMA. Therefore, the calling phone transmits to the WSMA e.g. the phone number of the party to be called (215). The WSMA consults a database comprising the phone numbers of all parties directly or indirectly related to the enterprise. When the phone number is found in the database, the phone call is considered to be an enterprise call, otherwise it will be considered to be a personal call. The WSMA transmits a corresponding reply to the calling phone (230) which subsequently either dials over the cellular network (245) in case of a personal call or dials via a PBX (240) in case of an enterprise call.

title_abstract: DYNAMICALLY SWITCHING BETWEEN CALL PATHS FOR OUTGOING CALLS COMPRISING PBX-PATH FOR ENTERPRISE CALLS AND CELLULAR-PATH FOR PERSONAL CALLS The application relates to mobile phones which are used for both enterprise and personal calls. A conventional phone may be used for both type of calls, referred to as "operating modes". However, currently, the mode to be used must be performed manually prior to a call being placed or be configured in a predetermined manner based upon known conditions that generally indicate which operating mode should be used. In the first case, the user is always required to place the communications device in the proper operating mode prior to each call being placed using the communications device. In the second case, a current configuration to set the communications device may be a time of day in which when a call is made from the communications device between a certain time (e.g., 8:30am - 5:00pm), the enterprise mode is used. Outside the time window, the communications device may be set with the personal mode. Thus, the user may always be forced to utilize a particular operating mode such as always using the enterprise mode despite being a personal call during the predetermined time window. The application proposes to determine the operating mode in a dynamic manner by a so-called Wireless Services Manager Arrangement WSMA. Therefore, the calling phone transmits to the WSMA e.g. the phone number of the party to be called (215). The WSMA consults a database comprising the phone numbers of all parties directly or indirectly related to the enterprise. When the phone number is found in the database, the phone call is considered to be an enterprise call, otherwise it will be considered to be a personal call. The WSMA transmits a corresponding reply to the calling phone (230) which subsequently either dials over the cellular network (245) in case of a personal call or dials via a PBX (240) in case of an enterprise call.

title_abstract: SYSTEMS AND METHODS FOR MEAT BONDING Systems and methods for forming raw meat structures from a plurality of meat pieces. Meat pieces of diverse shape, size, and quality are coated with a bonding agent such as a transglutaminase and then pressurized at low temperature. The pressure, temperature and bonding agent cause the meat pieces to form a composite, uncooked meat structure that is suitable for cutting, extruding, shaping, and other meat processing.
title_abstract_original: SYSTEMS AND METHODS FOR MEAT BONDING Systems and methods for forming raw meat structures from a plurality of meat pieces. Meat pieces of diverse shape, size, and quality are coated with a bonding agent such as a transglutaminase and then pressurized at low temperature. The pressure, temperature and bonding agent cause the meat pieces to form a composite, uncooked meat structure that is suitable for cutting, extruding, shaping, and other meat processing.

title_abstract: Full-automatic vacuum dynamic desalting equipment and vacuum desalting method The present invention provides full-automatic vacuum dynamic desalting equipment which comprises a desalting unit, a material conveying unit, a vacuum unit and a water circulating unit. The desalting unit comprises a desalting tank, a water level monitor, a vacuum branch pipe, a pressure monitor and an air inlet pipe; the material conveying unit comprises a material feeding assembly and a material taking-out assembly which are arranged on the two sides of the desalting unit respectively; the vacuum unit is arranged at one end of the desalting unit and comprises a vacuum pump and a vacuum buffer tank; and the water circulating unit is arranged at the other end of the desalting unit and is used for circulating and heating desalting water. A numerical control operation platform can be used for automatically regulating and controlling the desalting equipment. The vacuum desalting method adopting the full-automatic vacuum dynamic desalting equipment comprises the following steps: feeding materials, injecting water, carrying out water circulation and water heating, vacuumizing, desalting, draining water, introducing air, taking out the materials and the like. According to the invention, the production cycle can be shortened, the production water is saved, the material adaptability is wide, the automatic control is realized, the production efficiency of the desalination section is effectively improved, and the labor cost is saved.
title_abstract_original: 一种全自动真空动态脱盐设备及真空脱盐方法 一种全自动真空动态脱盐设备，包括脱盐单元、物料运输单元、真空单元、水循环单元。脱盐单元包括脱盐罐、水位监测器、真空支管、压力监测器、空气进管；物料运输单元包括分别设于脱盐单元两侧的物料送入组件和物料取出组件；真空单元设于脱盐单元一端，包括真空泵、真空缓冲罐；水循环单元设于脱盐单元另一端，用于循环并加热脱盐用水。数控操作平台可对脱盐设备进行自动调控。采用全自动真空动态脱盐设备的一种真空脱盐方法，包括步骤：送入物料、注水、进行水循环和水加热、抽真空、脱盐、排水、放入空气、取出物料等。本发明可缩短了生产周期，节约了生产用水，物料适应性广泛，实现自动化控制，有效提高了脱盐工段生产效率，节约人力成本。

title_abstract: System control method and device, COMPUTER READABLE STORAGE MEDIUM The invention discloses a system control method and a device thereof, and a computer-readable storage medium, which relate to property system management. The system control method comprises the following steps: when a preset management event is triggered, a target identifier is queried from an associated database; when the preset management event is triggered, a target identifier is queried from an associated database. Outputting preset property class data corresponding to the correlation information if the correlation database includes relevant information of the target identifier; performingdetailed information traversal on the preset property category data; displaying the traversed detailed information in a preset display interface; in the state of the preset display interface, if preset input information is received, the associated database is updated to characterize the property matters pointed to by completing the preset input information. By the invention, the management efficiency of the property system can be improved.
title_abstract_original: 系统控制方法及装置、计算机可读存储介质 本发明公开了种系统控制方法及装置、计算机可读存储介质，涉及物业系统管理，其中，所述系统控制方法包括：在预设管理事件触发时，向关联数据库查询目标标识符；若所述关联数据库包括所述目标标识符的相关信息，则输出与所述相关信息对应的预设物业类别数据；对所述预设物业类别数据进行详情信息遍历；将遍历的所述详情信息在预设显示界面中显示；在所述预设显示界面状态下，若接收到预设输入信息，则对所述关联数据库进行更新以表征完成所述预设输入信息所指向的物业事项。通过本发明，可提升物业系统的管理效率。

title_abstract: Method for predicting land market bubbles based on hypothetical development method and gray CM11 model The invention discloses a method for predicting land market bubbles based on a hypothetical development method and a gray CM11 model. The method includes the following steps: performing data collection: collecting data of residence land transactions of each city every month, the data collection being performed automatically through a computer; performing data processing: distributing the originaldata obtained in the step 1 to price estimators in the cities for data adjustment; predicating the price of real estate on the basis of a gray CM11 model, and collecting macroscopic data, basic information of real estate, price information and GIS information of the cities around the country; establishing an LBI algorithm model, comparing and analyzing model evaluation results according to the Delphi method, and keeping correcting the model so that the result is closer to the actual price; performing LBI distribution result display, that is to say, after model evaluation in the fourth step isfinished, distributing an index calculation result, and analyzing and displaying product results after GIS landing points. The method of the invention can reflect bubbles of the price of sold land through the deviation degree between the actual land price of the sold land and the balanced market price.
title_abstract_original: 基于假设开发法与灰色CM11模型预测土地市场泡沫的方法 本发明公开基于假设开发法与灰色CM11模型预测土地市场泡沫的方法，包括如下步骤：数据采集，收集全国各城市每月成交的宅地数据，数据收集采用计算机自动化收集；数据处理，根据步骤1得到的原始数据，分发给各城市估价师进行数据调整；基于灰色预测GM11模型预测房地产价格，对全国各城市宏观数据、楼盘基础信息、价格信息及GIS信息进行收集；LBI指数算法模型建立，根据德尔菲法，对比分析模型评估结果，并不断修正模型，使其结果与真实价格更加接近；LBI分布结果展示，对于步骤4对模型评估完成后，发布指数计算结果，并根据GIS落点后对产品成果进行分析及展示。本发明能通过出让地块的真实地价与均衡市场地价的偏差程度来反映出让地块地价泡沫。

title_abstract: POWER DISTRIBUTION NETWORK DEVICE The purpose of the present disclosure is to provide a power distribution network device allowing the construction of a highly portable power line network without maintaining an infrastructure. A power distribution network device 1 of the present disclosure is characterized in that: the power distribution network device 1 is provided with a plurality of circuit elements each having a first connector 20a, a second connector 20b and a conductive portion 40 for electrically connecting the first connector 20a and the second connector 20b; the plurality of circuit elements each include an environmental power generation element 60 as a circuit element capable of outputting power obtained by environmental power generation, and a load element 70 as a circuit element capable of consuming the power input thereto; the plurality of circuit elements are mechanically and electrically detachable via the first connector 20a and the second connector 20b; and at least some of the environmental power generation elements 60 and the load elements 70 are capable of performing power line data communications via power lines including the first connectors 20a, the second connectors 20b and the conductive portions 40.
title_abstract_original: 電力配線ネットワーク装置 本開示は、インフラストラクチャーを整備することなく、携帯性に優れた電力線ネットワークを構築することが可能な電力配線ネットワーク装置を提供することを目的とする。本開示の電力配線ネットワーク装置１は、第１コネクタ２０ａと、第２コネクタ２０ｂと、第１コネクタ２０ａと第２コネクタ２０ｂとを導通させる導電部４０とを有する回路要素を複数備え、複数の回路要素は、環境発電による電力を出力可能な回路要素としての環境発電要素６０と、入力される電力を消費可能な回路要素としての負荷要素７０とを含み、複数の回路要素は、第１コネクタ２０ａ及び第２コネクタ２０ｂを介して機械的かつ電気的に着脱可能であり、環境発電要素６０、及び負荷要素７０の少なくとも一部は、第１コネクタ２０ａ、第２コネクタ２０ｂ及び導電部４０を含む電力線を介した電力線データ通信が可能であることを特徴とする。

title_abstract: POWER DISTRIBUTION NETWORK DEVICE The purpose of the present disclosure is to provide a power distribution network device allowing the construction of a highly portable power line network without maintaining an infrastructure. A powerdistribution network device (1) of the present disclosure is characterized in that: the power distribution network device (1) is provided with a plurality of circuit elements each having a first connector (20a), a second connector (20b) and a conductive portion (40) for electrically connecting the first connector (20a) and the second connector (20b); the plurality of circuit elements each includean environmental power generation element (60) as a circuit element capable of outputting power obtained by environmental power generation, and a load element (70) as a circuit element capable of consuming the power input thereto; the plurality of circuit elements are mechanically and electrically detachable via the first connector (20a) and the second connector (20b); and at least some of the environmental power generation elements (60) and the load elements (70) are capable of performing power line data communications via power lines including the first connectors (20a), the second connectors (20b) and the conductive portions (40).
title_abstract_original: 电力布线网络装置 本发明的目的在于提供一种电力布线网络装置，其能够构建便携性优异的电力线网络而无需配备基础设施。本发明的电力布线网络装置(1)的特征在于具有多个电路元件，该电路元件具有第一连接器(20a)、第二连接器(20b)以及使第一连接器(20a)和第二连接器(20b)导通的导电部(40)，多个电路元件包含作为能够输出通过环境发电所产生的电力的电路元件的环境发电元件(60)和作为能消耗被输入的电力的电路元件的负载元件(70)，多个电路元件能经由第一连接器(20a)及第二连接器(20b)进行机械且电拆装，环境发电元件(60)及负载元件(70)的至少一部分能够经由包括第一连接器(20a)、第二连接器(20b)以及导电部(40)的电力线进行电力线数据通信。

title_abstract: POWER DISTRIBUTION NETWORK DEVICE The present disclosure aims to provide a power wiring network apparatus capable of constructing a highly portable power wiring network, without the need to maintain infrastructure. A power wiring network apparatus (1) of the present disclosure includes circuit elements each including a first connector (20a), a second connector (20b), and a conductive portion (40) electrically connecting the first connector (20a) and the second connector (20b). The circuit elements include energy harvesting elements (60) as circuit elements capable of outputting power generated by energy harvesting and load elements (70) as circuit elements capable of consuming inputted power. The circuit elements are mechanically and electrically attachable via the first connector (20a) and second connector (20b). At least some energy harvesting elements (60) and load elements (70) are capable of power line data communication via a power line including the first connector (20a), second connector (20b), and conductive portion (40).
