title_abstract: Wireless long-distance electro-hydraulic remote-control system of engineering driller robot Along with the development of modern engineering construction technological requirements and the artificial intelligence technology, the engineering driller robotized technology is born at the right moment. In order to adapt the bad working environment of the engineering driller robot, and improve the operation safety and the working efficiency, a control system for the engineering driller robot with the long-distance control and the state monitoring is developed. The invention discloses a wireless long-distance electro-hydraulic remote-control system of the engineering driller robot. The wireless long-distance electro-hydraulic remote-control system of the engineering driller robot is formed by a remote control emitting end and an airborne monitoring end. The remote control emitting end uses a manual operation mode. The airborne monitoring end is installed on the engineering driller robot. The remote control emitting end and the airborne monitoring end are in the signal communication through the wireless communication mode. The remote control emitting end is used for emitting a control signal, and the airborne monitoring end is used for receiving the control signal. An electro-hydraulic element of the engineering driller robot is driven to execute the action, so the drilling function is finished. The system has the advantages of strong anti-interference, accurate control, good instantaneity, and convenient operation.
title_abstract_original: 工程钻机机器人无线远程电液遥控系统 随着现代工程施工工艺要求和人工智能技术的发展，工程钻机机器人化技术应运而生。为了适应工程钻机机器人恶劣工作环境，提高操作的安全性和工作效率，研发出种具有远程遥控、状态监测的工程钻机机器人控制系统迫在眉睫。本发明公开种工程钻机机器人无线远程电液遥控系统，由遥控发射端和机载监控端组成。遥控发射端采用人工操作方式，机载监控端安装于工程钻机机器人上；遥控发射端和机载监控端之间通过无线通信方式进行信号的通信。遥控发射端发射控制信号，机载监控端接收控制信号，驱动工程钻机机器人的电液元件执行动作，完成钻孔功能。该系统具有抗干扰性强、控制精准、实时性好、操作方便的优点。

title_abstract: Graphical display method and equipment used for optical transmission network The invention relates to the communicaton field and especially relates to a graphical display method and equipment used for an optical transmission network. Each sub network in the optical transmission network is taken as an object and every two adjacent station in station sequence of the sub network are taken as a segment and routing and carrying relations on the each segment of the station sequence of each service are displayed between the two stations of the segment. Since the routing and carrying relations of the services are displayed in a way of station segments, conditions of skip-level mapping and mixed mapping of the services on each segment are displayed and the carrying relations and the routing state of the services on each segment are displsyed graphically.
title_abstract_original: Graphical display method and equipment used for optical transmission network The invention relates to the communicaton field and especially relates to a graphical display method and equipment used for an optical transmission network. Each sub network in the optical transmission network is taken as an object and every two adjacent station in station sequence of the sub network are taken as a segment and routing and carrying relations on the each segment of the station sequence of each service are displayed between the two stations of the segment. Since the routing and carrying relations of the services are displayed in a way of station segments, conditions of skip-level mapping and mixed mapping of the services on each segment are displayed and the carrying relations and the routing state of the services on each segment are displsyed graphically.

种光传送网的图形化显示方法及设备 本发明涉及通信领域，特别涉及光传送网的图形化显示方法及设备，以所述光传送网中的每个子网作为对象，以所述子网的站点序列的每相邻两个站点作为个分段，将各业务在所述站点序列的每个分段上的路由及承载关系显示在所述分段的两个站点之间；由于通过站点分段的方式显示业务的路由及承载关系，因此，可在每个分段上展示出业务的跨级映射及混合映射等情况，并且能把业务在每个分段上的承载关系及路由形态进行展示。

title_abstract: GRAPHICAL DISPLAY METHOD AND DEVICE FOR OPTICAL TRANSPORT NETWORK The present invention relates to the field of communications, and in particular, to a graphical display method and device for an optical transport network. With each subnetwork in the optical transport network acting as an object and with every two adjacent sites of a site sequence of the subnetwork as a subsection, the routing and the bearing relationship of each service on each subsection of the site sequence are displayed between two sites of the subsection. Since the routing and the bearing relationship of a service are displayed by means of a site subsection, conditions such as cross-level mapping and blend mapping of the service can be exhibited on each subsection, and the bearing relationship and routing form of the service on each subsection can be exhibited.
title_abstract_original: PROCÉDÉ D'AFFICHAGE GRAPHIQUE ET DISPOSITIF ASSOCIÉ À UN RÉSEAU DE TRANSPORT OPTIQUE La présente invention se rapporte au domaine des communications et concerne en particulier un procédé d'affichage graphique et un dispositif associé à un réseau de transport optique. Selon l'invention, chaque sous-réseau du réseau de transport optique servant d'objet et toutes les paires de sites adjacents d'une séquence de sites du sous-réseau servant de sous-section, le routage et la relation de transport de chaque service sont affichés entre deux sites de la sous-section sur chaque sous-section de la séquence de sites. Puisque le routage et la relation de transport d'un service sont affichés au moyen d'une sous-section de sites, des conditions telles qu'un mappage de niveau croisé et un mappage de mélange du service peuvent être présentées sur chaque sous-section, et la forme de relation de transport et de routage du service peut être présentée sur chaque sous-section.

title_abstract: Real estate investment risk quantification method and device and storage medium The invention discloses a real estate investment risk quantification method and device and a storage medium. The method comprises the following steps of acquiring risk data and a confidence level input to the client as basic data; acquiring a composite quantization model composed of a VaR model and two ES models; setting corresponding weighting coefficients for a VaR model and the ES models. The problem of low reserve capital can be solved through the VaR model. The problem of insufficient reserve fund during large-scale risk quantification can be solved through the ES models, and the VaR model is mutually corrected through the two ES models with different confidence levels, so that the risk quantification during large capital amount and mobile capital in real estate investment is realized, and risk underestimation is effectively avoided.
title_abstract_original: 一种房地产投资风险的量化方法、装置和存储介质 本发明公开了一种房地产投资风险的量化方法、装置和存储介质，获取风险数据和输入至客户端的置信水平作为基础数据，并获取由VaR模型和2个ES模型所组成的复合量化模型，对VaR模型和ES模型设置对应的加权系数，通过VaR模型能解决储备资本较低的问题，通过ES模型能解决大型风险量化时准备金不足的问题，通过2个不同置信水平的ES模型对VaR模型实现互相修正，从而实现了房地产投资中资金量大、流动性资金时的风险量化，有效避免了风险低估。

title_abstract: SYSTEM FOR TRADING ELECTRONIC TRADED PROPERTIES A programmed computer for facilitating trades of electronic traded properties (ETP) including a memory and a processor executing program code stored in the memory. The program code includes code for receiving a number of shares and rentable building area for an ETP, code for generating an indifference factor for the ETP based on the number of shares and the rentable building area, code for receiving and displaying in real time a price expressed in price per share for the ETP, and code for generating and displaying in real time a price expressed in price per square foot based on the price expressed in price per share and the indifference factor.

The program code includes code for receiving a number of shares and rentable building area for an ETP, code for generating an indifference factor for the ETP based on the number of shares and the rentable building area, code for receiving and displaying in real time a price expressed in price per share for the ETP, and code for generating and displaying in real time a price expressed in price per square foot based on the price expressed in price per share and the indifference factor.

title_abstract: SERVER OF PROVIDING BUILDING CONSTRUCTION PREDICTION INFORMATION AND METHOD PERFORMING THE SAME According to the present invention, a building construction prediction information providing server includes: a land database storing a location of land received through a geographic information system (GIS); a reference information database storing information about surroundings of the land located within a specific radius from each location of the land stored in the land database and architecture legislation information thereof; a land price prediction part creating a land list based on each piece of the land stored in the land database and the land corresponding to a sale offer list received from a real estate agency terminal, and then, extracting reference information from the reference information database with respect to each piece of the land on the land list, and then, predicting a reasonable price for the corresponding land based on the reference information; a building size prediction part predicting size information and constitution information of a building buildable on the land based on additional information of the building and the reference information data; a building construction price prediction part predicting a building construction price based on the size information and constitution information of the building; and a revenue price prediction part predicting a revenue prediction price of the buildable building based on the reference information database. Therefore, the present invention is capable of processing a large amount of information faster through computation than human calculation.
title_abstract_original: 건축물 시공 예측 정보 제공 서버 및 이를 실행하는 방법 본 발명에 따른 건축물 시공 예측 정보 제공 서버는 GIS(Geographic Information System) 시스템을 통해 수신된 대지의 위치가 저장되어 있는 대지 데이터베이스, 상기 대지 데이터베이스에 저장된 각각의 대지의 위치를 기준으로 특정 반경에 위치하는 대지 주변 정보 및 건축물 건축 법률이 저장되어 있는 참조 정보 데이터베이스, 상기 대지 데이터베이스에 저장된 각각의 대지 및 부동산 중개 업체 단말로부터 수신된 매물 리스트에 해당하는 대지를 이용하여 대지 리스트를 생성한 후, 상기 대지 리스트 상의 대지 각각에 대해서 상기 참조 정보 데이터베이스에서 참조 정보를 추출한 후 상기 참조 정보를 이용하여 해당 대지의 적정 구입 금액을 예측하는 대지 금액 예측부, 상기 건축물의 부가 정보 및 상기 참조 정보 데이터를 이용하여 상기 대지에 건축 가능한 건축물의 규모 정보 및 구성 정보를 예측하는 건축물 규모 예측부, 상기 건축물의 규모 정보 및 구성 정보를 이용하여 건축물 시공 가격을 예측하는 건축물 시공 가격 예측부 및 상기 참조 정보 데이터베이스를 이용하여 상기 건축 가능한 건축물의 수입 예상 가격을 예측하는 수입 가격 예측부를 포함한다.

一种面向国土空间规划编制的健康风险评估方法及系统 本发明涉及一种面向国土空间规划编制的健康风险评估方法及系统。该方法包括：获取评估方案的空间尺度；根据所述空间尺度，确定开展健康风险评估的栅格单元；获取健康风险基础数据；根据所述健康风险基础数据，确定风险要素数据和背景要素数据；根据所述栅格单元对所述风险要素数据和所述背景要素数据分别进行健康影响赋值，得到各类风险要素影响分析图和风场模拟分析图；对各类所述风险要素影响分析图和所述风场模拟分析图进行空间叠加分析处理，得到健康风险综合分析栅格图；根据所述健康风险综合分析栅格图，确定规划优化建议。本发明能够综合地评估国土空间现状环境或规划方案对居民带来的消极健康影响。

title_abstract: HEALTH RISK ASSESSMENT METHOD AND SYSTEM FOR TERRITORIAL SPATIAL PLANNING A health risk assessment method and system for territorial spatial planning. The method comprises: obtaining a spatial scale of an evaluation scheme (101); according to the spatial scale, determining a grid unit for carrying out health risk assessment (102); acquiring health risk basic data (103); determining risk factor data and background factor data according to the health risk basic data (104); respectively performing health impact assignment on the risk factor data and the background factor data according to the grid units to obtain various risk factor impact analysis graphs and wind field simulation analysis graphs (105); performing spatial superposition analysis on the various risk factor impact analysis graphs and the wind field simulation analysis graph to obtain a health risk comprehensive analysis grid graph (106); and determining planning optimization suggestions according to the health risk comprehensive analysis grid graph (107). The method and the system may comprehensively evaluate the negative health impact of the current territorial spatial environment or a planning scheme on residents.
title_abstract_original: 一种面向国土空间规划编制的健康风险评估方法及系统 一种面向国土空间规划编制的健康风险评估方法及系统。该方法包括：获取评估方案的空间尺度（101）；根据所述空间尺度，确定开展健康风险评估的栅格单元（102）；获取健康风险基础数据（103）；根据所述健康风险基础数据，确定风险要素数据和背景要素数据（104）；根据所述栅格单元对所述风险要素数据和所述背景要素数据分别进行健康影响赋值，得到各类风险要素影响分析图和风场模拟分析图（105）；对各类所述风险要素影响分析图和所述风场模拟分析图进行空间叠加分析处理，得到健康风险综合分析栅格图（106）；根据所述健康风险综合分析栅格图，确定规划优化建议（107）。所述方法及系统能够综合地评估国土空间现状环境或规划方案对居民带来的消极健康影响。

title_abstract: Health risk assessment method and system for territorial space planning The invention relates to a health risk assessment method and system for territorial space planning. The method comprises the steps of obtaining a spatial scale of an evaluation scheme; determining a grid unit for carrying out health risk assessment according to the spatial scale; acquiring health risk basic data; determining risk factor data and background factor data according to the health riskbasic data; performing health influence assignment on the risk factor data and the background factor data according to the grid units to obtain various risk factor influence analysis graphs and wind field simulation analysis graphs; performing spatial superposition analysis processing on the various risk factor influence analysis graphs and the wind field simulation analysis graph to obtain a health risk comprehensive analysis grid graph; and determining planning optimization suggestions according to the health risk comprehensive analysis grid map. The method can comprehensively evaluate the negative health influence of the territorial space current situation environment or planning scheme on residents.
title_abstract_original: 一种面向国土空间规划编制的健康风险评估方法及系统 本发明涉及一种面向国土空间规划编制的健康风险评估方法及系统。该方法包括：获取评估方案的空间尺度；根据所述空间尺度，确定开展健康风险评估的栅格单元；获取健康风险基础数据；根据所述健康风险基础数据，确定风险要素数据和背景要素数据；根据所述栅格单元对所述风险要素数据和所述背景要素数据分别进行健康影响赋值，得到各类风险要素影响分析图和风场模拟分析图；对各类所述风险要素影响分析图和所述风场模拟分析图进行空间叠加分析处理，得到健康风险综合分析栅格图；根据所述健康风险综合分析栅格图，确定规划优化建议。本发明能够综合地评估国土空间现状环境或规划方案对居民带来的消极健康影响。

title_abstract: Determining a closest estimated market value of a real estate property The disclosure is directed to determining, among a number of estimated market values of a real estate property, an estimated market value (EMV) that is closest to an EMV computed by an application (“application-computed EMV”). The application receives a property profile from a user, e.g., a seller, having pictures and description of a real estate property, e.g., a house. The application publishes the property profile to multiple member agents, e.g., real estate agents, who can provide an EMV of the real estate property based on their opinion. The application determines the application-computed EMV based on a variety of property data, e.g., sales and/or tax history of the real estate property or other related real estate properties, obtained and/or derived from various third party systems. The application then compares the application-computed EMV with member agent-provided EMVs to determine a member agent-provided EMV that is closest to the application-computed EMV.

title_abstract: SYSTEM, METHOD AND COMPUTER READABLE RECORDING MEDIUM FOR PROVIDING AN ANALYSIS SERVICE ABOUT LOCATION REQUIREMENTS AND TRADE AREA ACCORDING TO TYPES OF REAL PROPERTY PURPOSE: A marketing area analysis service providing system, a method, and a computer readable recording medium thereof are provided to offer diverse information related to real estate by standardizing and normalizing information based on detailed data. CONSTITUTION: A DB(database) server(103) stores information related to map data and real estate positions. A cell index generating module(210) provides indexes to cells separated in an entire map area. A data generating module(220) generates one or more data from the information. An item evaluation module(250) computes evaluation results for the one or more real estate positions from the generated data. title_abstract: Compositions for smoking Puffed milo is used alone or with tobacco to provide smoking materials.
title_abstract_original: Compositions for smoking Puffed milo is used alone or with tobacco to provide smoking materials.

title_abstract: Stowing shield for mechanised roof support - has two cylinders attaching it pivotably to floor part of roof support Stowing shield arrangement on mechanised roof support includes cylinders (3, 6) pivotably mounted with their piston rod on floor rails (4, 4') or bottom end of props of the roof support and pivotably attached with cylinder end to bottom part and top part of the stowing shield. The shield may be constructed of two separate parts sliding into each other and bolted together. This enables several size variations to be achieved between an inclined and vertical position.

title_abstract: Tunnel ventilation refrigeration air conditioning device The invention discloses a tunnel ventilation refrigeration air conditioning device. The tunnel ventilation refrigeration air conditioning device comprises a heat exchange module, a water inlet collecting and distributing chamber, a water outlet collecting and distributing chamber and a supporting frame, wherein the heat exchange module comprises heat exchange copper pipes and fin plates installedon the heat exchange copper pipes, and the heat exchange copper pipes are evenly distributed in the supporting frame; the water inlet collecting and distributing chamber and the water outlet collecting and distributing chamber are located at the lower end of the supporting frame; the water inlet collecting and distributing chamber comprises a water inlet copper pipe and a water inlet, the water outlet collecting and distributing chamber comprises a water outlet copper pipe and a water outlet, and the water inlet copper pipe and the water outlet copper pipe are connected to the two ends of theheat exchange copper pipes; and a ventilation window is arranged on the side face of the supporting frame. The tunnel ventilation refrigeration air conditioning device serves as a ventilation cooler of a tunnel ventilation air conditioning system, belongs to an air quality treatment component of a secondary ventilation refrigeration air conditioner, and is mainly used for cooling heat generated bya tunnel air conditioner, smooth operation of the tunnel air conditioner is guaranteed, energy consumption is reduced, and then the temperature of a tunnel construction site is effectively adjusted.
title_abstract_original: 一种隧道通风制冷空调装置 本发明公开了一种隧道通风制冷空调装置，包括换热模块、进水集散腔室、出水集散腔室和支撑架，其中，所述换热模块包括换热铜管以及安装在换热铜管上的翅板，所述换热铜管均匀分布在所述支撑架内部；所述进水集散腔室和出水集散腔室位于所述支撑架的下端；所述进水集散腔室中包括进水铜管和进水口，所述出水集散腔室中包括出水铜管和出水口，所述进水铜管和出水铜管连接至换热铜管的两端；所述支撑架的侧面设置通风窗口。本申请作为隧道通风空调系统的通风冷却器，属于二次通风制冷空调的空气质量处理部件，主要对隧道空调产生的热量进行冷却，确保隧道空调的顺利运行，降低能耗，进而有效调节隧道施工现场的温度。

title_abstract: Remote vehicle searching method and device, electronic equipment and storage medium The invention discloses a remote vehicle searching method and device, electronic equipment and a storage medium, and relates to the technical field of vehicles. The method comprises the steps that a vehicle searching instruction is received, the vehicle searching instruction carries self-defined projection information, based on the vehicle searching instruction, a projection device is controlled to carry out projection in the target direction of a vehicle, so that a projection picture is formed on a target medium in the target direction of the vehicle, projection is carried out in the target direction of the vehicle, and the vehicle can be prevented from being blocked by other vehicles; and the user can find the vehicle under the condition that the user is far away from the vehicle, so that the remote vehicle finding efficiency is improved.
title_abstract_original: 远程寻车方法、装置、电子设备以及存储介质 本申请公开了一种远程寻车方法、装置、电子设备以及存储介质，涉及车辆技术领域。该方法包括：接收寻车指令，其中，所述寻车指令携带有自定义的投影信息，基于寻车指令，控制投影装置在车辆的目标方向进行投影，以在车辆的目标方向的目标介质上形成投影画面，在车辆的目标方向进行投影，可以避免被其它车辆挡住，并可以使用户在距离车辆较远的情况下，也可以找到车辆，提高远程寻车的效率。

title_abstract: Controllable delay unit with high power supply rejection ratio The invention discloses a controllable high power supply rejection ratio delay unit, and the unit comprises an even number of cascaded inverter delay units, wherein each inverter delay unit is connected with a current source, and the output end of each cascaded inverter delay unit is connected with a parasitic capacitor; and the current source connected with each phase inverter delay unit is opened when the input of the corresponding phase inverter delay unit is 1, and is closed when the input of the corresponding phase inverter delay unit is 0. Time delay control is achieved by controlling the current value of the current source, if the current source is a constant current source, accurate control over delay can be achieved, and meanwhile due to the fact that when the inverter delay unitdischarges to the output port, the discharging time of the inverter delay unit is only related to the current value of the current source connected with the inverter delay unit and is irrelevant to jitter of a power source, the power consumption is reduced. Therefore, the power supply noise is well suppressed, i.e., the power supply rejection ratio is high.
title_abstract_original: 一种可控的高电源抑制比延迟单元 本发明公开了一种可控的高电源抑制比延迟单元，高电源抑制比延迟单元包括：偶数个级联的反相器延迟单元，每个反相器延迟单元均连接一个电流源，每个级联的反相器延迟单元的输出端均连接一个寄生电容；每个反相器延迟单元连接的电流源在对应的反相器延迟单元输入为1时开启，为0时关闭。本发明通过控制电流源的电流值实现延时控制，若电流源为恒流源，则可以实现对延迟的精确控制，同时，由于反相器延迟单元在对输出端口放电时，其放电时间只和相连的电流源的电流值有关，而与电源的抖动无关，因此对电源噪声有很好的抑制，即具备高电源抑制比。

title_abstract: Cherilee jelly The invention provides cherilee jelly. The cherilee jelly consists of the following raw materials in parts by weight: 25-35 parts of cherilee, 10-20 parts of white granulated sugar, 12-18 parts of glucose, 6-8 parts of jelly powder, 8-16 parts of mangoes, 0.6-0.8 part of citric acid, 0.2-0.4 part of xanthan gum, 3-10 parts of smoked plums, 10-14 parts of mung bean powder, 0.1-0.3 part of malic acid, 3-5 parts of carrageenin, 0.2-0.4 part of xanthan gum, 0.1-0.3 part of vitamin C and 25-30 parts of water. The cherilee jelly is rich in cherilee fragrance and mango fragrance, is refreshing and smooth in mouth feel, chewy and high in tenacity and the nutrient value of the jelly is increased.
title_abstract_original: 种车厘子果冻 本发明提供种车厘子果冻，由以下按照重量份的原料组成：车厘子25‑35份、白砂糖10‑20份、葡萄糖12‑18份、果冻粉6‑8份、芒果8‑16份、柠檬酸0.6‑0.8份、黄原胶0.2‑0.4份、乌梅3‑10份、绿豆粉10‑14份、苹果酸0.1‑0.3份、卡拉胶3‑5份、黄原胶0.2‑0.4份、维生素C 0.1‑0.3份、水25‑30份。本发明具有浓郁的车厘子味和芒果味，口感爽滑，弹性、韧性强，增加了果冻的营养价值。

title_abstract: ON DEMAND ANNULAR PRESSURE TOOL A downhole tool (1) includes a bore isolation valve (4), a sensor (15) configured to receive a downlink signal, an annular pressure sensor (7), a valve actuation mechanism (12) coupled to the bore isolation valve (4) and responsive to the downlink signal, a pressure relief mechanism (9) configured to provide a negative pressure pulse signal indicative of the annular pressure by venting fluid from a bore (5) of the tool body, and a battery (17). A method includes drilling a well with a drill bit coupled to an on demand annular pressure tool (1) initially in a deactivated mode, and activating the tool (1) by a downlink signal when fluid flow out of the annulus drops below the fluid flow into the well to close a bore (5) of the tool (1), pressurizing the drill string, holding pressure in the drill string, measuring annular pressure with the tool (1), and sending a negative pressure pulse signal indicative of the annular pressure.
title_abstract_original: ON DEMAND ANNULAR PRESSURE TOOL A downhole tool (1) includes a bore isolation valve (4), a sensor (15) configured to receive a downlink signal, an annular pressure sensor (7), a valve actuation mechanism (12) coupled to the bore isolation valve (4) and responsive to the downlink signal, a pressure relief mechanism (9) configured to provide a negative pressure pulse signal indicative of the annular pressure by venting fluid from a bore (5) of the tool body, and a battery (17). A method includes drilling a well with a drill bit coupled to an on demand annular pressure tool (1) initially in a deactivated mode, and activating the tool (1) by a downlink signal when fluid flow out of the annulus drops below the fluid flow into the well to close a bore (5) of the tool (1), pressurizing the drill string, holding pressure in the drill string, measuring annular pressure with the tool (1), and sending a negative pressure pulse signal indicative of the annular pressure.

title_abstract: Swamp morningglory root Qi-circulation-promoting cactus calcium fortified jelly and preparation method thereof The invention discloses swamp morningglory root Qi-circulation-promoting cactus calcium fortified jelly and a preparation method thereof. The swamp morningglory root Qi-circulation-promoting cactus calcium fortified jelly is prepared from the following raw materials in parts by weight: 95-110 parts of water, 8-12 parts of cactus, 6-10 parts of skimmed milk powder, 4-8 parts of sucrose, 18-22 parts of fermented milk, 0.2-0.3 part of casein phosphopeptides, 1.5-2.5 parts of sodium alginate, 2.5-3.5 parts of calcium phosphate, 3-5 parts of wheat grains, 5-7 parts of shrimp shell, 2-4 parts of swamp morningglory roots, 1-3 part of buckwheat, 1-3 parts of sorghum, and 1-3 part of radish juice. According to the invention, the cactus peel and the cactus meat are reasonably utilized, so that the prepared jelly product is uniform and smooth in texture, good in flexibility, refreshing, smooth and delicious, and palatable in the sour and sweet taste, and the shrimp shell and other raw materials are reasonably treated, not only is the waste utilized, but also the jelly is also added with the fortified calcium nutrition. The swamp morningglory roots and the radish juice are added into the raw materials, so that the jelly has the health-care effects of promoting the circulation of Qi and the like.
title_abstract_original: 种蕹菜根行气仙人掌钙强化果冻及其制备方法 本发明公开了种蕹菜根行气仙人掌钙强化果冻及其制备方法，各原料组分间的重量配比为：水95‑110、仙人掌8‑12、脱脂奶粉6‑10、蔗糖4‑8、发酵乳18‑22、酪蛋白磷酸肽0.2‑0.3、海藻酸钠1.5‑2.5、磷酸钙2.5‑3.5、麦粒3‑5、虾壳5‑7、蕹菜根2‑4、荞麦1‑3、高粱1‑3、萝卜汁1‑3。本发明将仙人掌皮和仙人掌肉合理利用，做出果冻产品质地均匀、光滑，柔韧性好、爽滑可口,酸甜适口，并且合理处理虾壳等原料，不仅废物利用，而且还为果冻增添了强化钙营养的优点。原料中增添了蕹菜根、萝卜汁，也使得果冻具备了行气等保健功效。

title_abstract: Device for the protection of a pressure space against dynamic overload The invention relates to a device for the protection of a pressure space against dynamic pressure overload, with a rock-burst valve of differential type which is provided with a shut-off element which is pressed against the seat by a spring element. The object of the invention is to provide a substantially more effective device having an improved operating characteristic and smaller dimensions. The invention achieves this object owing to the fact that the rock-burst valve has a shut-off element which is formed from a head piece which is displaceably and tightly mounted in the hollow space of the body of the rock-burst valve, that the extension piece is attached to the head piece on the side remote from the seat, the outer surface of which extension piece is displaceably and tightly mounted in the body of the rock-burst valve or in its bush in such a way that its outside touches the spring element, and that the inlet of the rock-burst valve, with a passage which is arranged in the shut-off element, is connected to the hollow space of the body via the head piece.
title_abstract_original: EINRICHTUNG FUER DEN SCHUTZ EINES DRUCKRAUMES GEGEN DYNAMISCHE UEBERLASTUNG The invention relates to a device for the protection of a pressure space against dynamic pressure overload, with a rock-burst valve of differential type which is provided with a shut-off element which is pressed against the seat by a spring element. The object of the invention is to provide a substantially more effective device having an improved operating characteristic and smaller dimensions. The invention achieves this object owing to the fact that the rock-burst valve has a shut-off element which is formed from a head piece which is displaceably and tightly mounted in the hollow space of the body of the rock-burst valve, that the extension piece is attached to the head piece on the side remote from the seat, the outer surface of which extension piece is displaceably and tightly mounted in the body of the rock-burst valve or in its bush in such a way that its outside touches the spring element, and that the inlet of the rock-burst valve, with a passage which is arranged in the shut-off element, is connected to the hollow space of the body via the head piece.

title_abstract: Sounds remote control Bluetooth The present invention relates to a remote control capable of interlocking with a cellphone through Bluetooth, which can solve a problem of no way to find a remote control when lost due to the difficulties of storage by saving finding time and purchase costs when failing to find. The remote control comprises: a remote control main body which is formed in a stick shape in order to be easily gripped by a hand; a Bluetooth module which includes a light emitting unit at the top part of the remote control main body for Bluetooth pairing with a cellphone; a speaker which is embedded in the bottom of the remote control main body in a size of 1 x 1.5 cm in order to make sounds upon completion of the Bluetooth pairing with the cellphone; and a Bluetooth function (local area wireless technology for exchanging information by mutually connecting portable devices) of a cellphone, which is to be paired with the Bluetooth module of the remote control.
title_abstract_original: 핸드폰과 블루투스 연동가능한 리모컨 본 발명은 핸드폰과 블루투스 연동가능한 리모컨에 관한 것으로서 찾는 시간을 절약할수 있고, 찾지 못했을때 구입비용절감하도록 함으로써 기존의 보관이 어려워 잃어 버리게 되면 찾을 방법이 없다는 문제점을 해소 하도록 한 것이다.즉 본 발명은, 리모컨에 있어서 손으로 편하게 잡을수 있게 막대형으로 형성한 리모컨 본체, 핸드폰의 블루투스 페어링이 될수있게 리모컨 본체 상단 부분에 발광부와 블루투스 모듈 구성한 블루투스 모듈, 핸드폰과의 블루투스 페어링후 소리가 날수있게 리모컨 본체 하단부에 1cm x 1.5 cm 크기의 스피커 탑재한 스피커, 핸드폰의 블루투스 기능으로 리모컨의 블루투스 모듈과 페어링 할수있게 핸드폰의 블루투스 기능(휴대기기를 서로 연결해 정보를 교환하는 근거리 무선 기술)한 핸드폰의 블루투스 기능으로 구성한 것이다.따라서, 본 발명은 찾는 시간을 절약할수 있고, 찾지 못했을때 구입비용절감하도록 함으로써 기존의 보관이 어려워 잃어 버리게 되면 찾을 방법이 없다는 문제점을 해소하도록 한 효과를 갖는 것이다.

title_abstract: Method for making a continuing call in an intelligent network call In a method according to one intelligent network recommendation, when B subscriber has hung up the phone, a Service Switching Point (SSP) sends a message to a Service Control Point (SCP) about the hanging up. The SCP responds with a request to disconnect the B leg. A separate request increases unnecessary signalling. In another known method, after B subscriber has hung up, a timer is started and the B leg is disconnected only after a set period of time. This waiting time is annoying to A subscriber, especially when there are many calls to be made. In the method according to the invention, A subscriber can make a continuing call without waiting or without causing unnecessary signalling so that after a Service Control Function (SCF) receives information about the break off of the call, it sends a message to a Service Switching Function (SSF) containing a request to collect the dialling by A subscriber relating to a new B subscriber. The Service Switching Function (SSF) directs the telephone network to disconnect the connection to B subscriber and create a connection to a new B subscriber.

The Service Switching Function (SSF) directs the telephone network to disconnect the connection to B subscriber and create a connection to a new B subscriber.

title_abstract: Open-air deep-hole blasting water spaced-coupled charge blasting method The invention discloses an open-air deep-hole blasting water spaced-coupled charge blasting method. The method comprises the following steps that firstly, a water column bag is filled with water, anda spaced charge section and a coupled charge section are separately prepared; secondly, a spaced water column section is placed to the bottom of a blasting hole which is well drilled, and the coupledcharge section and the spaced water column section are alternately loaded into the blasting hole in sequence; and finally, the blasting hole is filled with drill cuttings, clay or coarse sand. The spaced water column section is made in the manner that the water column bag filled with water is rolled into a cylinder; and the coupled charge section is characterized in that explosive is arranged to be in a column shape, and the exterior is wrapped with the water column bag filled with the water. The method adopts water coupling and water spacing modes for charging, the incompressibility of the water is reasonably used, and energy generated by explosion of the explosive is uniformly transmitted to the position around the blasting hole; release of energy in the water in the explosion action process is urgently needed for strengthening the rock breaking effect, meanwhile, the energy utilization rate of the explosives is improved, and the requirement for the idea of fine blasting is met.
title_abstract_original: 露天深孔爆破水间隔-耦合装药爆破方法及专用水柱袋 本发明公开了种露天深孔爆破水间隔‑耦合装药爆破方法，包括以下步骤：首先，将水柱袋充水，分别制备间隔装药药段和耦合装药药段；然后，在钻好的爆破孔中将段间隔水柱段置入爆破孔底部，再将耦合装药药段和间隔水柱段依次交替装入爆破孔，最后用钻屑、黏土或者粗沙填塞爆破孔。间隔水柱段是，将充满水的水柱袋卷成圆柱制成；耦合装药药段是，将炸药摆成柱状，外面裹附充满水的水柱袋。本发明方法采用水耦合与水间隔方式装药，合理的利用水的不可压缩性，使得炸药爆炸后的能量均匀传递在炮孔周围；爆炸作用过程中水中急需能量的释放加强岩石的破碎作用，同时提高炸药的能量利用率；满足了“精细爆破”理念要求。

露天深孔爆破水间隔-耦合装药爆破方法及专用水柱袋 本发明公开了一种露天深孔爆破水间隔‑耦合装药爆破方法，包括以下步骤：首先，将水柱袋充水，分别制备间隔装药药段和耦合装药药段；然后，在钻好的爆破孔中将一段间隔水柱段置入爆破孔底部，再将耦合装药药段和间隔水柱段依次交替装入爆破孔，最后用钻屑、黏土或者粗沙填塞爆破孔。间隔水柱段是，将充满水的水柱袋卷成圆柱制成；耦合装药药段是，将炸药摆成柱状，外面裹附充满水的水柱袋。本发明方法采用水耦合与水间隔方式装药，合理的利用水的不可压缩性，使得炸药爆炸后的能量均匀传递在炮孔周围；爆炸作用过程中水中急需能量的释放加强岩石的破碎作用，同时提高炸药的能量利用率；满足了“精细爆破”理念要求。

title_abstract: Cooking oven having curved heat exchanger A cooking oven includes a housing that encloses a chamber having an inlet and an outlet. A conveyor extends between the inlet and the outlet and through the chamber. The cooking oven additionally includes an air distribution system positioned in fluid communication with the chamber and a curved heat exchanger positioned in fluid communication with the chamber, the curved heat exchanger directing air from the air distribution system through the chamber.

title_abstract: Blowout prevention device and method for oil well The invention discloses an oil well blowout prevention device and method, and belongs to the field of oil exploitation. By means of the oil well blowout prevention device, inner blowout prevention in the tail pipe descending process can be achieved, and safe and efficient under-pressure operation is achieved in a time-saving and labor-saving mode. According to the operation method, an underground switch is connected to the bottommost tail pipe, and at the moment, the underground switch is turned off. After the tail pipes are put down, the oil well blowout preventer is installed on the uppermost tail pipe, the upper baffle of the oil well blowout preventer is pushed to move downwards, the upper baffle drives the valve element to move downwards to compress the elastic connecting piece to leave the valve seat, and at the moment, the blocking tool is in an open state. When an underground switch is opened and the union is detached through pressing of well killing fluid, under the combined action of the elastic connecting piece and well pressure, the valve element moves upwards to seal the valve seat, the oil well blowout prevention device is closed, and therefore blowout prevention in a pipe column is achieved, and safe and clean operation under pressure is achieved.
title_abstract_original: 油井防喷装置和方法 本申请公开了一种油井防喷装置和方法，属于石油开采领域。利用本申请提供的油井防喷装置可以实现下尾管过程中的内防喷，实现省时省力、安全高效带压作业。操作方法是在下最下面一根尾管上连接一个井下开关，此时井下开关是关闭的。尾管下完后，在最上一根尾管上安装该油井防喷装置，推动油井防喷装置的上挡板下移，上挡板带动阀芯下移压缩弹性连接件离开阀座，此时堵塞工具为打开状态。通过压井液打压，实现井下开关打开，卸开油壬的同时，阀芯在弹性连接件和井压共同作用下，阀芯上移封闭阀座，实现油井防喷装置关闭，从而实现管柱内防喷，实现安全、清洁带压作业。

title_abstract: FLUID HANDLING APPARATUS A fluid handling apparatus having a two-sided channel plate with channel ports extending from one side to the other. Fluid channels on both sides of the channel plate connected to the channel ports direct fluid through the channel plate in a desired fluid path, and the first face and the second face of the channel plate are sealed to fluidly encase the fluid channels.

title_abstract: IMMUNOTHERAPY OF MULTIPLE SCLEROSIS USING MBP83-99 PEPTIDE ANALOGUES AND MANNAN A first aspect of the invention relates to a peptide comprising the amino acid sequence of formula (I), ENPVVHFFK91NIVTP96RTP (I) wherein at least one of K91 and P96 is substituted by a natural or unnatural amino acid. A second aspect of the invention relates to a peptide comprising the amino acid sequence of formula (I), ENPVVHFFK91NIVTP96RTP (I) which is in cyclic form. Further aspects of the invention relate to conjugates of the above described peptides with mannan, pharmaceutical compositions and methods of treating autoimmune disorders.
title_abstract_original: ΠΕΠΤΙΔΙΚΑ ΑΝΑΛΟΓΑ ΤΗΣ MBP83-99 ΜΕ ΜΑΝΝΑΝΗ ΓΙΑ ΧΡΗΣΗ ΣΤΗΝ ΑΝΟΣΟΘΕΡΑΠΕΙΑ ΤΗΣ ΣΚΛΗΡΥΝΣΗΣ ΚΑΤΑ ΠΛΑΚΑΣ Μια πρώτη άποψη της εφεύρεσης σχετίζεται με ένα πεπτίδιο που περιέχει αλληλουχία των αμινοξέων της φόρμουλας (I), ENPVVHFFK91NIVTPJ96RTP (I). 'Οπου, τουλάχιστον ένα εκ των Κ91 και Ρ96 αντικαθίσταται από ένα φυσικό ή μη-φυσικό αμινοξύ. Μία δεύτερη άποψη της εφεύρεσης σχετίζεται με ένα πεπτίδιο που περιέχει την αλληλουχία αμινοξέων της φόρμουλας (I), ENPWHFFK91NIVTP96RTP (I) το οποίο έχει κυκλική μορφή. Επιπλέον όψεις της εφεύρεσης σχετίζουν συζεύξεις των παραπάνω περιγραφόντων πεπτιδίων με μαννάνη, φαρμακευτικές συνθέσεις και μεθόδους θεραπείας αυτοάνοσων δυσλειτουργιών.

title_abstract: Edible fresh keeping agent as well as preparation method and application thereof The invention discloses an edible fresh keeping agent as well as a preparation method and application thereof. The fresh keeping agent is an aqueous solution of chitosan and food grade vitamin C, wherein the chitosan is edible grade chitosan and consists of chitosan of which the number average molecular weight is 10 thousand, chitosan of which the number average molecular weight is 50 thousand, and chitosan of which the number average molecular weight is 150 thousand; the vitamin C and the chitosan are dissolved in the water to form the solution. According to the edible fresh keeping agent, macromolecular compound chitosan having dual characteristics of bacteriostasis and restraining respiration is used as a core fresh keeping component, and various kinds of the chitosan of different molecular weights are compounded to make the edible fresh keeping agent which is really environmental-friendly, is easy to clean and free from residues.

title_abstract: Method and unit for feeding elongated elements A method of feeding cigars to a hopper of a wrapping machine, wherein the cigars are housed in bulk and in orderly manner inside containers; each container has a top opening by which to receive and unload the cigars in the aforementioned orderly manner; a full container of cigars is picked up and inverted at the hopper by means of a manipulating device so that the opening faces downwards; and the full container is rested on a supporting surface having a passage smaller than the opening, so as to partly close the opening and provide for controlled unloading of the cigars.

title_abstract: Method for the determination of Streptococcus mutans A test kit and method is disclosed for the semi-quantitative detection of Streptococcus mutans from the oral cavity of a patient. Saliva from a patient is introduced into a diluent solution to which has been added just before the saliva a predetermined powdered amount of bacitracin. Then the diluent solution is contacted with a sterile media-coated paddle, the media-coated paddle containing the diluent and test saliva is incubated, and Streptococcus mutans in the test saliva is semi-quantitively determined by comparing the percent of colony density with a standard Streptococcus mutan colony density chart.

title_abstract: TEST KIT AND METHOD FOR THE DETERMINATION OF STREPTOCOCCUS MUTANS The semi-quantitive detection of Streptococcus mutans from the oral cavity of a patient in vitro involves introducing saliva from a patient into a diluent solution to which has been added just before the saliva a predetermined powdered amount of bacitracin, and contacting the diluent solution with a sterile medium-coated paddle, then incubating the medium-coated paddle containing the diluent and test saliva, and thereafter semi-quantitively determining the amount of Streptococcus mutans in the test saliva by comparing the percent of colony density on the paddle with a standard Streptococcus mutans colony density chart. The amount of Steptococcus mutans in the oral sample is indicative of the patient's predispostion towards dental caries. A test kit for the determination of Streptococcus mutans includes an asceptic first vial (12) having a paddle (20) bearing a coating of medium (22) comprising agar and sucrose, a second asceptic vial (14) containing a buffered saline solution, a predetermined amount of bacitracin (28) e.g. in pellet form, a carbon dioxide generating composition (26), and standard Streptococcus mutans colony density charts (30).

title_abstract: Application buffering of packets by fog computing node for deterministic network transport In one embodiment, a method comprises: storing, by a computing device in a non-deterministic data network, a plurality of data packets originated by a source device into a mass storage medium associated with the computing device; receiving, by the computing device, a data request originated by an access point device providing deterministic reachability to a deterministic device in a deterministic data network providing reachability to multiple deterministic devices, the request specifying one or more deterministic constraints associated with reaching the deterministic device; and supplying, by the computing device, a selected one of the data packets to the access point device for delivery of data stored therein to the deterministic device according to the one or more deterministic constraints.

title_abstract: Methods and Systems for Using Atlas Frames to Process Data Representative of a Scene An exemplary image generation system accesses a full atlas frame sequence that incorporates a set of image sequences combined within the full atlas frame sequence as atlas tiles. The system generates a first partial atlas frame sequence that incorporates a first subset of image sequences selected from the set of image sequences incorporated in the full atlas frame sequence, as well as a second partial atlas frame sequence that incorporates a second subset of image sequences selected from the set of image sequences. The second subset includes a different combination of image sequences than the first subset and includes at least one image sequence in common with the first subset. The system provides the first partial atlas frame sequence to a first video encoder and the second partial atlas frame sequence to a second video encoder communicatively coupled with the first video encoder. Corresponding methods and systems are also disclosed.

title_abstract: Video encoding methods and systems for color and depth data representative of a virtual reality scene An exemplary video encoding system accesses an image set that includes first and second consecutive color data images depicting a virtual reality scene from a particular vantage point, and first and second consecutive depth data images corresponding to the color data images. The system performs a first-pass video encoding of the image set by identifying motion vector data associated with a transformation from the first to the second color data image, and abstaining from analyzing a transformation from the first to the second depth data image. The system then performs a second-pass video encoding of the image set based on the identified motion vector data by encoding the first and second color data images into a color video stream to be rendered by a media player device, and the first and second depth data images into a depth video stream to be rendered by the media player device.

利用CRISPR-CAS9技术敲除NRK细胞Slc22a2基因的方法 本发明提供一种利用CRISPR‑CAS9技术敲除NRK细胞Slc22a2基因的方法。根据大鼠Slc22a2基因序列，构建基于CRISPER‑Cas9系统的gRNA表达载体，以此作为Slc22a2基因打靶载体，转入NRK细胞中，获得Slc22a2基因敲除的NRK细胞，其可作为理想的细胞模型，模拟人体肾脏环境中OCT2蛋白的缺失，用于研究OCT2蛋白在药物、毒素以及其他小分子物质转运方面的应用。

title_abstract: Method of knocking out NRK cell Slc22a2 gene by utilizing CRISPR-CAS9 The invention provides a method of knocking out an NRK cell Slc22a2 gene by utilizing CRISPR-CAS9. According to an Slc22a2 gene sequence, a gRNA expression vector based on a CRISPER-Cas9 system is constructed, is taken as an Slc22a2 gene targeting vector and is transported into an NRK cell to obtain an Slc22a2 gene knocked-out NRK cell. The Slc22a2 gene knocked-out NRK cell can be used as an ideal cell model to simulate deletion of OCT2 protein in a human kidney environment and is used for studying application of the OCT2 protein in the aspect of transportation of drugs, toxins and other small molecule substances.
title_abstract_original: 利用CRISPR‑CAS9技术敲除NRK细胞Slc22a2基因的方法 本发明提供种利用CRISPR‑CAS9技术敲除NRK细胞Slc22a2基因的方法。根据大鼠Slc22a2基因序列，构建基于CRISPER‑Cas9系统的gRNA表达载体，以此作为Slc22a2基因打靶载体，转入NRK细胞中，获得Slc22a2基因敲除的NRK细胞，其可作为理想的细胞模型，模拟人体肾脏环境中OCT2蛋白的缺失，用于研究OCT2蛋白在药物、毒素以及其他小分子物质转运方面的应用。

title_abstract: Breeding method of mudskippers The invention discloses a breeding method of mudskippers. The method comprises the steps of 1, pond selection, 2, fingerling stocking, 3, feed feeding, and 4, day-to-day management; in step 1, a low-yielding, salt-salted land is selected and fine ploughed for 1 to 2 times, the appropriate depth is 20 to 30 centimeters, and the land is leveled into furrows; an intertidal zone is directly levelled into the furrows, and an escape prevention net is arranged outside; in step 2, the seedling releasing stage is optimally set from April to May, the seedling specification can be white seedlings with body lengths of 1 to 2 centimeters, if the breeding period is in summer and autumn, the seedling releasing period should be from June to September; in step 3, at the initial stage of seedling releasing,feeding is conducted once a week, 50 kilograms of rice bran is fed each time each mu, the feeding additive is 2 kilograms, splashing is fully and uniformly carried out, the depth of pool water is kept at 8 to10 centimeters, and when the body lengths of the mudskippers are about 5 to 7 centimeters after having been raised for 45 days, deeper canals are built. The breeding method of mudskippers hasthe advantages of reducing the breeding cost, increasing the production profit of farmers and shortening the breeding cycle.
title_abstract_original: 弹涂鱼的养殖方法 本发明公开种弹涂鱼的养殖方法，包括以下步骤：(1)池塘选择：选择低产田、盐咸地精耕1次‑2次，深度以20cm‑30cm为宜，整平成畦；滩涂直接整平成畦，外设防逃网；(2)鱼种放养：放苗期以4月‑5月为佳，苗种规格可为体长1cm‑2cm的白苗，若是夏秋季养殖，放苗应为6月‑9月；(3)饲料投喂：刚放苗时，每星期投喂1次，每次每亩投喂米糠50千克，饲料添加剂2千克，全面均匀泼洒，池水深度保持在8厘米‑10厘米，养殖到45天以后，体长约5厘米‑7厘米时，要建较深的孔道；(4)日常管理。本发明具有降低了养殖成本，提高了养殖户的生产利润，缩短了培养周期等优点。

title_abstract: DIFFERENTIAL GENE EXPRESSION FOR DETECTING AND/OR DIFFERENTIATING LUNG DISEASE Disclosed herein are methods, constructs, kits, and the like, which can be used for detecting and/or differentiating interstitial lung disease. For example, idiopathic pulmonary fibrosis (IPF) and nonspecific interstitial pneumonia (NSIP) can be detected and/or differentiated using at least one biomarker.
title_abstract_original: DIFFERENTIAL GENE EXPRESSION FOR DETECTING AND/OR DIFFERENTIATING LUNG DISEASE Disclosed herein are methods, constructs, kits, and the like, which can be used for detecting and/or differentiating interstitial lung disease. For example, idiopathic pulmonary fibrosis (IPF) and nonspecific interstitial pneumonia (NSIP) can be detected and/or differentiated using at least one biomarker.

title_abstract: Physical simulator of thick oil thermal extraction based on vacuum method and working method of physical simulator Provided are a physical simulator of thick oil thermal extraction based on a vacuum method and a working method of the physical simulator. The physical simulator comprises a vacuum thermal insulation cabin which can be vacuumized, an experimental model which is arranged in the vacuum thermal insulation cabin and used for injecting steam to simulate a process of the thick oil thermal extraction, a steam generating part and an output liquid recovery pipeline, wherein the experimental model comprises quartz sand, an injection well and a production well, the steam generating part is arranged outside the vacuum thermal insulation cabin and connected with the experimental model through a pipeline, and the output liquid recovery pipeline is used for recovering output liquid in the thick oil thermal extraction process. The physical simulator of thick oil thermal extraction based on a vacuum method and a working method of the physical simulator not only can achieve continuous collection of temperature data at different positions of the experimental model and continuous tracking of the location of a steam-crude oil interface, but also greatly reduce experimental error due to the excellent vacuum insulation performance of the physical simulator, and provide great convenience for direct observation and theoretical analysis of the formation and expansion of a steam chamber in the steam-injected thermal production process of oil; moreover, the obtained experimental results are real and reliable.
title_abstract_original: 种基于真空法的稠油热采物理模拟装置及其工作方法 种基于真空法的稠油热采物理模拟装置及其工作方法，包括：真空隔热舱：将隔热舱内抽真空；实验模型：设置在所述真空隔热舱内，用于注入蒸汽模拟稠油热采过程；所述实验模型包括：石英砂、注入井和生产井；蒸汽发生部：设置在所述真空隔热舱的外部，通过管路与所述实验模型相连；产出液回收管路：用于回收稠油热采过程中的产出液。本发明不但可以实现对实验模型不同位置处温度数据的连续采集以及对蒸汽‑原油界面位置的连续追踪，而且其优良的真空隔热性能在很大程度上减小了实验的误差。本发明还为直观观察和理论分析注蒸汽热力采油中蒸汽腔的形成与扩展提供了较大的便利，其所得的实验结果较为真实可靠。

title_abstract: Ultra-deep punching cast-in-place pile construction system and method suitable for large-water-head soft foundation The invention discloses an ultra-deep punching cast-in-place pile construction system and method suitable for a large-water-head soft foundation, the construction system comprises a soft base layer pile casing unit, a hoisting unit, a percussion drill unit, a slurry changing unit and a protective cylinder unit, the soft base layer pile casing unit is arranged in a soft foundation layer, and the hoisting unit is arranged in the soft foundation layer; the hoisting unit is arranged on the surface of a soft foundation layer on the outer side of the soft foundation layer pile casing unit and connected to the top of the percussion drill unit, a punched hole is punched in the soft foundation layer in the soft foundation layer pile casing unit through the percussion drill unit, the slurry changing unit extends into the punched hole, and the protective cylinder unit is arranged in the punched hole in a matched mode; the problems that the perpendicularity of a pile body of a punching cast-in-place pile is poor, and slurry of a large-water-head seepage stratum runs out are solved, correction is conducted in time through cooperation of a balance weight ring and a righting assembly in the drill bit, and the perpendicularity of a drilled hole wall is further guaranteed; the slurry deslagging device has good deslagging capacity, the effective height of slurry deslagging is increased through a follow-up type segmented deslagging mode, and the slurry deslagging efficiency and quality are guaranteed.
title_abstract_original: 一种适用于大水头软基的超深冲孔灌注桩施工系统及方法 本发明公开了一种适用于大水头软基的超深冲孔灌注桩施工系统及方法，此施工系统包括，软基层护筒单元、吊装单元、冲击钻单元、换浆单元和防护筒单元，其中，软基层护筒单元设置于软基地层中，吊装单元设置于软基层护筒单元外侧的软基地层的表面，其连接于冲击钻单元的顶部，通过冲击钻单元在软基层护筒单元内的软基地层中冲砸出冲孔，换浆单元延伸于冲孔内，防护筒单元配合设置于冲孔内；本发明解决了冲孔灌注桩的桩体垂直度较差、大水头渗流地层泥浆跑浆的问题，通过钻头中配重环和扶正组件的配合，及时纠偏，进一步保证了钻孔壁的垂直性；具有良好的排渣能力，通过跟进式分段排渣的方式，提高了泥浆排渣的有效高度，保证了泥浆排渣效率和质量。

title_abstract: Preparation method of low-sugar type ferrum-folic acid tablets The invention discloses a preparation method of low-sugar type ferrum-folic acid tablets. The preparation method comprises the following steps of uniformly mixing ferrous fumarate with ferrous gluconate, a folic acid compound and edible corn starch so as to obtain a premix; and uniformly mixing mint with sodium carboxymethyl starch, maltodextrin and microcrystalline cellulose, adding the premix and magnesium stearate, performing uniform mixing, and performing tabletting so as to obtain the low-sugar type ferrum-folic acid tablets. The folic acid compound is prepared through the following technology: uniformly mixing folic acid with cholesterol, Tween 80 and egg yolk lecithin, adding anhydrous ethanol, performing stirring, adding a phosphate buffer solution, continuing performing stirring, performing evaporation to remove ethanol, performing cooling, adding sodium carboxymethyl cellulose, and performing homogenizing treatment so as to obtain the folic acid compound. The obtained ferrum-folic acid tablets are good in mouth feel, extremely low in sugar content, easy to disintegrate after entering the intestines and the stomach, and easy to digest and absorb by human bodies, can effectively complement folic acid and ferrum, and have the effects of being fresh in breath and promoting the health of oral cavities after being eaten, and the defects of similar products in the market at present are overcome.
title_abstract_original: 种低糖型铁叶酸片的制备方法 本发明公开了种低糖型铁叶酸片的制备方法，包括如下步骤：将富马酸亚铁、葡萄糖酸亚铁、叶酸复合物、食用玉米淀粉混合均匀得到预混料；将薄荷、羧甲基淀粉钠、麦芽糊精、微晶纤维素混合均匀，加入预混料、硬脂酸镁混合均匀，压片得到低糖型铁叶酸片。叶酸复合物采用如下工艺制备：将叶酸、胆固醇、吐温80、蛋黄卵磷脂混合均匀，加入无水乙醇搅拌，加入磷酸盐缓冲液，继续搅拌，蒸发除去乙醇，冷却，加入羧甲基纤维素钠，匀质处理得到叶酸复合物。本发明所得铁叶酸片口感好，含糖量极低，而且进入肠胃后易于崩解，更易于人体消化吸收，能有效补充叶酸与铁，同时食用后具有口气清新、促进口腔健康的作用，克服了目前市场上类似产品的不足。

title_abstract: A method and system for identifying customer attributes The invention discloses a method for identifying customer attributes, comprising the following steps: a, acquiring the MAC information of the customer mobile phone and comparing the MAC information with the pre-stored MAC information of the mobile phone; if the comparison is consistent, executing the next step; otherwise, judging that it is the new customer, executing the step d; b, collecting face image information and comparing it with the preserved face image information; if the comparison is consistent, executing the next step; otherwise, judging that it is a new customer, executing the step d; (c) comparing whether that binding relationship between the MAC information of the client mobile phone and the face image information is consistent with the pre-stored binding relationship, if the binding relationship is inconsistent, judging that it is a new client, and executing step (d); sending a new customer visit reminder. The invention obtains the MAC information of the customer's mobile phone and the face image information, determines whether the visiting customer is a new customer by data comparison, thereby providing data support for the salesperson, and analyzes and confirms the preference degree of the customer, so as to improve the precision of the sales.
title_abstract_original: 种识别客户属性的方法及系统 种识别客户属性的方法，包括以下步骤：a、获取客户手机MAC信息且与预存的手机MAC信息进行对比，对比致则执行下步，否则判定为新客户人，执行步骤d；b、采集人脸图像信息并与预存的人脸图像信息的进行对比，对比致则执行下步，否则判定为新客户人，执行步骤d；c、对比客户手机MAC信息与人脸图像信息的绑定与预存的绑定关系是否致，不致则判定为新客户人，执行步骤d；d、发出新客户到访提醒信息。本发明通过获取客户手机MAC信息和人脸图像信息，通过数据对比确定来访客户是否为新客户，从而为销售人员提供数据支撑，还有对客户喜好程度进行分析确认，提高销售的精准性。

title_abstract: Method for remotely supervising and accepting house decoration The invention provides a method for remotely supervising and accepting house decoration, and the method comprises the steps: carrying out the real-time monitoring of a monitoring region through an artificial intelligence camera, and recognizing the door and window of a to-be-decorated house, and positioning lines, such as a connection line between walls, and the like; and the background server aligns the monitoring video with the three-dimensional decoration design drawing according to the positioning line, marks the position of each decoration project in the monitoring video by using a square frame, edits a local video of each decoration project from the monitoring video, and stores the local video as a historical video of the decoration project. According to the invention, a three-dimensional reconstruction technology is not needed, the real-time monitoring video of the house can be aligned with the decoration design drawing only through an artificial intelligence technology, decoration items in the decoration design drawing can be marked in the monitoring video, the cost is low, and the method is suitable for popularization; the owner not only can check the real-time progress condition and the historical playback video of each decoration project in real time, but also can compare the real-time progress condition and the historical playback video with the decoration design drawing, so that the decoration project can be supervised and accepted more conveniently.
title_abstract_original: 一种远程监督及验收房屋装修的方法 本发明提供了一种远程监督及验收房屋装修的方法，人工智能摄像头对监控区域进行实时监控，并识别待装修房屋的门窗、墙与墙的连接线等定位线；后台服务器根据定位线将监控视频与三维装修设计图对齐，在监控视频中用方框标示每个装修项目的位置，并将每个装修项目的局部视频从监控视频里剪辑出来，保存为该装修项目的历史视频。本发明无需三维重建技术，仅通过人工智能技术就能将房屋的实时监控视频与装修设计图对齐，还能把装修设计图中的装修项目标示在监控视频中，成本低廉，适合推广；业主不仅能实时查看每个装修项目的实时进展情况和历史回放视频，还能与装修设计图作对比，监督和验收装修工程更加方便。

title_abstract: MATCHING REAL ESTATE RENTERS WITH PROPERTY A renter and landlord friendly system ad method to compare property qualification scores for a renter, including having a renter fill out an online application to rent property; the application is submitted via renter's computing device to server; the server's decisioning engines process the application, verify submitted qualification data producing a score; and, renter interacts with user interface and estimates different sub scores which are used to generate a possible score.
title_abstract_original: MATCHING REAL ESTATE RENTERS WITH PROPERTY A renter and landlord friendly system ad method to compare property qualification scores for a renter, including having a renter fill out an online application to rent property; the application is submitted via renter's computing device to server; the server's decisioning engines process the application, verify submitted qualification data producing a score; and, renter interacts with user interface and estimates different sub scores which are used to generate a possible score.

title_abstract: THYRISTOR BLOCKING CIRCUIT AND METHOD OF BLOCKING A THYRISTOR The invention relates to a high-power thyristor blocking circuit, comprising a high-power thyristor (1) having an anode (A), a cathode (K) and a gate (G), a gate driver (M)configured to control the gate of the thyristor (1); and a circuit configured to apply a negative voltage (V AK ) between the anode and the cathode of the thyristor (1), wherein the gate driver (M) is configured to apply a negative voltage (V GK ) between the gate and the cathode of thyristor (1) after the lapse of a predetermined delay time from a time that the voltage (V AK ) between the anode and the cathode has become negative.
title_abstract_original: THYRISTOR BLOCKING CIRCUIT AND METHOD OF BLOCKING A THYRISTOR The invention relates to a high-power thyristor blocking circuit, comprising a high-power thyristor (1) having an anode (A), a cathode (K) and a gate (G), a gate driver (M)configured to control the gate of the thyristor (1); and a circuit configured to apply a negative voltage (V AK ) between the anode and the cathode of the thyristor (1), wherein the gate driver (M) is configured to apply a negative voltage (V GK ) between the gate and the cathode of thyristor (1) after the lapse of a predetermined delay time from a time that the voltage (V AK ) between the anode and the cathode has become negative.

title_abstract: System and Method of Providing An Alert In a particular embodiment, a method of providing an alert related to visual ticker data for display at a display device is disclosed. The method includes receiving media content at a destination device. The media content includes video data, audio data, and visual ticker data. The method also includes generating an alert related to the visual ticker data, providing the media content to a display device and selectively providing data related to the alert to a selected device based on a user preference.
title_abstract_original: System and Method of Providing An Alert In a particular embodiment, a method of providing an alert related to visual ticker data for display at a display device is disclosed. The method includes receiving media content at a destination device. The media content includes video data, audio data, and visual ticker data. The method also includes generating an alert related to the visual ticker data, providing the media content to a display device and selectively providing data related to the alert to a selected device based on a user preference.

title_abstract: OMNI-103 CRISPR NUCLEASE The present invention provides a non-naturally occurring composition comprising a CRISPR nuclease comprising a sequence having at least 95% identity to the amino acid sequence of SEQ ID NO: 1 or a nucleic acid molecule comprising a sequence encoding the CRISPR nuclease.

title_abstract: METHOD AND SYSTEM FOR PERFORMING OWNER ASSOCIATION ANALYTICS Computer-based processes are disclosed for mining and analyzing owner association (OA) data associated with a plurality of real estate properties and generating an OA amount model that can be used to estimate OA amounts for a subject property. The OA data may also be analyzed to identify OA ratings, OA recommendations, OA delinquency actions, OA contacts information, OA services information, etc. The disclosed processes can also use the generated OA amount model to identify OA amount trends, and determine valuations and investment metrics for real estate properties.

The OA data may also be analyzed to identify OA ratings, OA recommendations, OA delinquency actions, OA contacts information, OA services information, etc. The disclosed processes can also use the generated OA amount model to identify OA amount trends, and determine valuations and investment metrics for real estate properties.

用于分析样品的系统和方法 本发明提供了用于确定预定义类别的量的系统和方法。获得样品，该样品包括来自该预定义类别的核酸和来自除了该预定义类别之外的来源的核酸。将包含核酸的已知量的内部对照材料添加到该样品中。对包括该内部对照材料的该样品进行测序。获得包括来自该预定义类别的序列读段和来自该内部对照材料的序列读段的测序数据集。确定来自该预定义类别的序列读段的使用第一目标核苷酸长度进行归一化的第一读段计数和来自该内部对照材料的序列读段的使用第二目标核苷酸长度进行归一化的第二读段计数。基于该第一读段计数、该第二读段计数和该内部对照材料的该已知量来对该样品中的该预定义类别的该量进行计算。

title_abstract: SYSTEMS AND METHODS FOR ANALYSIS OF SAMPLES Systems and methods for determining an amount of a predefined category are provided. A sample is obtained, including nucleic acids from the predefined category and nucleic acids from a source other than the predefined category. A known quantity of an internal control material comprising nucleic acids is added to the sample. The sample, including the internal control material, is sequenced. A sequencing dataset including sequence reads from the predefined category and sequence reads from the internal control material is obtained. A first read count, normalized using a first target nucleotide length, of sequence reads from the predefined category, and a second read count, normalized using a second target nucleotide length, of sequence reads from the internal control material are determined. The amount of the predefined category in the sample is calculated based on the first read count, the second read count, and the known quantity of the internal control material.
title_abstract_original: SYSTEMS AND METHODS FOR ANALYSIS OF SAMPLES Systems and methods for determining an amount of a predefined category are provided. The amount of the predefined category in the sample is calculated based on the first read count, the second read count, and the known quantity of the internal control material.

title_abstract: Cigarette core capable of preventing cigarette burning cone from dropping and method for manufacturing same Disclosed is a cigarette core capable of preventing a cigarette burning cone from dropping, comprising the following materials: tobacco stalks, tobacco waste or tobacco substitute, a leaven, a sugar flavor and an adhesion material. The tobacco stalks are tobacco stems after tobacco leaves are removed in the course of manufacturing flue-cured tobacco; the tobacco waste is tobacco slag and wasted tobacco leaves generated during cigarette production; the tobacco substitute is additives which does not affect sensory quantity of tobacco; the leaven is one type of biological fermentive enzymes; the sugar flavor is a natural flavor; the adhesion material is one type of tobacco-used natural adhesives. The cigarette core capable of preventing the cigarette burning cone from dropping and the method for manufacturing the same reduce environmental pollution, break the limit of unitary packaging of present cigarette product and the bottleneck of the interaction between the addition amount of cut stem and the quality of cigarette packaging, and improves the quality and brand characteristics of the tobacco product as avoiding cigarette burning cone dropping.

title_abstract: Land mortgage loan method, system, device, medium and program product The invention relates to a land mortgage loan method, system and device, a medium and a program product, and belongs to the technical field of financial information services. The method comprises the following steps: obtaining to-be-mortgage land information and a loan amount, and sending the to-be-mortgage land information and the loan amount to a client, so that the client determines loan information according to the to-be-mortgage land information and the loan amount, and the loan information comprises a loan amount and target land information; a land mortgage handling request is generated according to the loan information, and the land mortgage handling request is sent to a land circulation system, so that the land circulation system generates land mortgage information according to the loan information, and the land mortgage information comprises a mortgage right number; and carrying out lending operation according to the land mortgage information. According to the land mortgage loan method provided by the invention, the handling efficiency of the land mortgage loan can be improved.
title_abstract_original: 土地抵押贷款方法、系统、设备、介质及程序产品 本申请涉及一种土地抵押贷款方法、系统、设备、介质及程序产品，属于金融信息服务技术领域。该方法包括：获取待抵押土地信息和贷款额度，并将待抵押土地信息和贷款额度发送至客户端，以供客户端根据待抵押土地信息和贷款额度确定贷款信息，贷款信息包括贷款金额和目标土地信息；根据贷款信息生成土地抵押办理请求，并将土地抵押办理请求发送至土地流转系统，以供土地流转系统根据贷款信息生成土地抵押信息，土地抵押信息中包括抵押权证编号；根据土地抵押信息进行放贷操作。本申请提供的土地抵押贷款方法，可以提高土地抵押贷款的办理效率。

title_abstract: INFORMATION PROCESSING DEVICE, INFORMATION PROCESSING METHOD, INFORMATION PROCESSING PROGRAM, AND INFORMATION PROCESSING SYSTEM To provide an information processing device, an information processing method, an information processing program, and an information processing system capable of efficiently searching for favorite properties.SOLUTION: An information processing device according to the present invention includes: a receiving unit that receives a selection of an image or a video of a property; a score giving unit that gives a score to the property according to the selection received by the receiving unit; an extraction unit that extracts an image or a video from a storage unit in which two or more images or videos are stored for each property, according to the score given by the score giving unit; and an output unit that outputs the image or the video extracted by the extraction unit.SELECTED DRAWING: Figure 1

title_abstract: INFORMATION PROCESSING DEVICE, INFORMATION PROCESSING METHOD, INFORMATION PROCESSING PROGRAM, AND INFORMATION PROCESSING SYSTEM Provided are an information processing device, an information processing method, an information processing program, and an information processing system, that enable efficient search of a preferred property. The information processing device according to the present invention comprises a memory unit for storing two or more kinds of images or videos for each property, and a transmission unit for transmitting images or videos to two or more kinds of user terminals for each property.
title_abstract_original: 情報処理装置、情報処理方法、情報処理プログラム及び情報処理システム 効率よく好みの物件を探すことができる情報処理装置、情報処理方法、情報処理プログラム及び情報処理システムを提供すること。 本発明に係る情報処理装置は、物件ごとに２種類以上の画像又は動画を記憶した記憶部と、画像又は動画を物件ごとに２種類以上ユーザ端末へ送信する送信部と、を備える。

title_abstract: Method for reducing wireless communication frame loss and equipment thereof The invention provides a method for reducing wireless communication frame loss and equipment thereof. The method comprises the steps that a master access point is selected for a terminal; one or multiple slave access points are selected for the terminal; and the slave access points forward traffic from the terminal received by the slave access points. The equipment comprises the master access point which is selected for the terminal; one or multiple slave access points which are selected for the terminal; and intermediate equipment which receives the traffic from the terminal from the master access point and the slave access points and forwards the traffic. According to the method and the equipment, wireless communication frame loss, especially the problem of high frame loss rate existing in an application of voice videos having high requirement for an uplink, can be reduced.
title_abstract_original: 种减少无线通信丢帧的方法和设备 种减少无线通信丢帧的方法和设备，所述方法包括：为终端选择主接入点；为所述终端选择个或多个从接入点；以及所述从接入点转发其接收到的来自于所述终端的流量。所述设备包括：为终端选择的主接入点；为所述终端选择的个或多个从接入点；以及中间设备，其从所述主接入点和所述从接入点接收来自于所述终端的流量，并转发所述流量。根据本发明的方法和设备，能够减少无线通信丢帧，尤其是针对例如语音视频等对上行链路有较高性能要求的应用中存在的丢帧率高的问题。

title_abstract: PROCESS FOR IMPROVING TASTE OF FOOD PRODUCT The invention relates to a process for improving organoleptic properties of a spread containing at least one sterol and/or stanol ester and/or at least one biologically active peptide by using milk fat and/or milk solids nonfat components. The invention also relates to a process for preparing a low-sodium spread containing at least one sterol and/or stanol ester and at least one bio- logically active peptide.

title_abstract: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR INTERLEAVING A DATA STREAM USING QUADRATURE PERMUTATION POLYNOMIAL FUNCTIONS (QPP) A semiconductor device (200) comprising processing logic (210). The processing logic (210) is arranged to configure interleaver logic (220) to re-order data symbols of a data stream (240) according to a quadrature permutation polynomial (QPP) function. The processing logic (210) is further arranged to: divide a cyclic group of values defined by the QPP function into a set of subgroups, the set of subgroups being capable of being defined by a set of linear functions; derive inverse functions for the set of linear functions defining the subgroups; and configure the interleaver logic (220) to load the data symbols of the data stream (240) into a buffer (230) at locations within the buffer (230) corresponding to a cyclic group of values representative of the inverse function for the QPP function based on the inverse functions of the set of linear functions defining the subgroups.
