title_abstract: Variable rate optional security measures method and apparatus for wireless communications network A method for implementing variable rate optional security measures in a wireless communications network, the communications network having a plurality of nodes for communication with mobile subscribers, includes the following steps. A capacity constraint of at least one node of the network is first determined. A load list is dynamically maintained for each node as a function of the capacity constraint, the load list indicating any overload states of the nodes. Lastly, at least one optional security measure is performed on the network as a function of the load list, wherein the at least one optional security measure is selected from a plurality of optional security procedures. An apparatus for implementing variable rate optional security measures in a wireless communications network is also disclosed.
title_abstract_original: Variable rate optional security measures method and apparatus for wireless communications network A method for implementing variable rate optional security measures in a wireless communications network, the communications network having a plurality of nodes for communication with mobile subscribers, includes the following steps. A capacity constraint of at least one node of the network is first determined. A load list is dynamically maintained for each node as a function of the capacity constraint, the load list indicating any overload states of the nodes. Lastly, at least one optional security measure is performed on the network as a function of the load list, wherein the at least one optional security measure is selected from a plurality of optional security procedures. An apparatus for implementing variable rate optional security measures in a wireless communications network is also disclosed.

title_abstract: Control method and system for appointing freshness retaining by ultrasonic wave and cooking utensil The invention provides a control method and system for reservation of freshness retaining by ultrasonic wave and a cooking utensil. The method comprises the steps that instruction of choosing freshness retaining reservation function by ultrasonic wave is received; the working parameter information of freshness retaining reservation by the ultrasonic wave is acquired; the instruction of starting the freshness retaining reservation function by the ultrasonic wave is received, and working is carried out according to the acquired working parameter information of freshness retaining reservation bythe ultrasonic wave. According to the control method for reservation of freshness retaining by the ultrasonic wave, ultrasound technology is used for controlling the freshness retaining reservation ofthe cooking utensils, the sterilization rate of food materials is improved, the reservation time of the cooking utensil is prolonged, and the user experience is improved. Furthermore, the cooking utensil can automatically complete the freshness retaining reservation according to the reasonable working parameter information of freshness retaining reservation by the ultrasonic wave, and the operation of the user is simple and convenient. Furthermore, according to individual needs, the user can set their own working parameters of reservation of freshness retaining by the ultrasonic wave to enhance the control flexibility of the cooking utensil.
title_abstract_original: 利用超声波预约保鲜的控制方法、控制系统和烹饪器具 本发明提供了种利用超声波预约保鲜的控制方法、控制系统和烹饪器具。其中，利用超声波预约保鲜的控制方法包括：接收超声波预约保鲜功能选择指令；获取超声波预约保鲜的工作参数信息；接收超声波预约保鲜功能启动指令，并根据获取的超声波预约保鲜的工作参数信息进行工作。本发明提供的利用超声波预约保鲜的控制方法，实现采用超声波技术控制烹饪器具进行预约保鲜，提高食材的杀菌率，延长烹饪器具的预约时间，提升用户的使用体验。进步地，烹饪器具按照合理的超声波预约保鲜的工作参数信息自动完成预约保鲜工作，用户的操作简单、方便。进步地，用户根据自己的个性化需求，自行设置超声波预约保鲜的工作参数，增强烹饪器具的控制灵活性。

title_abstract: Security management system for rented house The invention relates to a security management system for a rented house. The system comprises a water, electricity and gas data acquisition unit, a central processing unit, a lessee information registration unit and an early warning unit, wherein the lessee information registration unit registers identity information of lessees corresponding to a rented house and the number of the lessees when a lease contract is established; the water, electricity and gas data acquisition unit acquires data information of a water meter, an electricity meter and a gas meter of the rented house in real time and transmits the data information to the central processing unit; the central processing unit processes the data information transmitted from the water, electricity and gas data acquisition unit to obtain consumption information corresponding to different time segments, judges the consumption information and a data threshold range of the corresponding time segment in a feature database, generates an early warning signal according to a judgment result, and transmits the early warning signal to the early warning unit; and the early warning unit performs security management on the rented house according to the early warning signal.
title_abstract_original: Security management system for rented house The invention relates to a security management system for a rented house. The system comprises a water, electricity and gas data acquisition unit, a central processing unit, a lessee information registration unit and an early warning unit, wherein the lessee information registration unit registers identity information of lessees corresponding to a rented house and the number of the lessees when a lease contract is established; the water, electricity and gas data acquisition unit acquires data information of a water meter, an electricity meter and a gas meter of the rented house in real time and transmits the data information to the central processing unit; the central processing unit processes the data information transmitted from the water, electricity and gas data acquisition unit to obtain consumption information corresponding to different time segments, judges the consumption information and a data threshold range of the corresponding time segment in a feature database, generates an early warning signal according to a judgment result, and transmits the early warning signal to the early warning unit; and the early warning unit performs security management on the rented house according to the early warning signal.

title_abstract: SYSTEMS AND METHODS FOR REAL-TIME ALLOCATION OF RESOURCES A method for processing a resource request is disclosed. The method includes: receiving a first resource request including a quantity of a first resource that is requested, an identity of a requester, and first asset data for a first asset; accessing a first database to identify two or more second assets different from the first asset based on determining that location information associated with the second assets satisfies at least one predetermined condition relating to the location information associated with the first asset; retrieving second asset data for the second assets; transmitting a second request to an asset valuation database to obtain real-time asset value data for the first asset based on the retrieved second asset data; receiving the asset value data for the first asset; generating approval data indicating whether the first resource request is approved; and transmitting the approval data to the first client device.
title_abstract_original: SYSTEMS AND METHODS FOR REAL-TIME ALLOCATION OF RESOURCES A method for processing a resource request is disclosed. The method includes: receiving a first resource request including a quantity of a first resource that is requested, an identity of a requester, and first asset data for a first asset; accessing a first database to identify two or more second assets different from the first asset based on determining that location information associated with the second assets satisfies at least one predetermined condition relating to the location information associated with the first asset; retrieving second asset data for the second assets; transmitting a second request to an asset valuation database to obtain real-time asset value data for the first asset based on the retrieved second asset data; receiving the asset value data for the first asset; generating approval data indicating whether the first resource request is approved; and transmitting the approval data to the first client device.

title_abstract: Biomass processing method The invention provides a biomass processing method. Ammonia water is adopted in preprocessing of biomass raw materials for separating lignin from cellulose and hemicellulose, and a certain amount of environmentally-friendly auxiliary agents is added to increase the removal rate of the lignin and enhance the subsequent conversion efficiency of an obtained solid substrate. The preprocessed solid substrate is rich in the cellulose and the hemicellulose, and can be hydrolyzed to monosaccharides and used for the fermentation of ethyl alcohol and other products. A preprocessing liquid obtained by the method is rich in lignin degradation products and a small amount of hemicellulose degradation products, and the lignin degradation products and the hemicellulose degradation products can be recycledby acid precipitation, centrifugation or membrane separation and other techniques. Most of the ammonia water and the auxiliary agents used in the preprocessing are in the preprocessing liquid, can beseparated by waste steam recovery, reduced pressure distillation and other methods, and can be reused for biomass preprocessing. By adopting the preprocessing method, the preprocessing effect of theammonia water on biomass is obviously improved by the addition of the small amount of low-cost auxiliary agents, and the preprocessing method has a relatively good application prospect.
title_abstract_original: 种生物质处理方法 本发明提供了种生物质处理方法，采用氨水对生物质原料进行木质素与纤维素、半纤维素分离的预处理时，通过添加定量的环保型助剂，以提高木素的脱除率，提高所得固体基质的后续转化效率。预处理后的固体基质富含纤维素和半纤维素，可水解为单糖，用于乙醇和其它产物的发酵。该法得到预处理液富含木素降解产物和少量半纤维素降解产物，可采用酸析、离心或膜分离等技术对其进行回收利用。预处理中采用的氨水和助剂大部分在预处理液中，可通过废蒸汽回收、减压蒸馏等方式分离出来，可继续回用于生物质预处理。该预处理方法通过添加少量低成本的助剂明显的改善了氨水预处理生物质的效果，具有较好的应用前景。

title_abstract: Ferment for inducing decomposition of calculi and its preparation method and use method The invention discloses ferment for inducing decomposition of calculi and its preparation method and use method. The ferment comprises, by mass, 1-30 parts of calculus compound enzyme, 1-30 parts of fruit and vegetable, 1-30 parts of Chinese herbal medicines, 1-10 parts of carboxylic acid, 1-10 parts of amino acid, 1-10 parts of polysaccharide, 1-30 parts of oligosaccharide and 1-30 parts of honey. The calculus compound enzyme is a mixed compound of at least two enzymes such as calculus enzyme. The ferment realizes combination of calculus enzyme, fruit and vegetable, Chinese herbal medicine, carboxylic acid, amino acid, polysaccharide and other enzymes and thus the ferment can assist the calculus enzyme to realize inducing decomposition of calculi in the human body in short time without any pain so that effects of inducing decomposition of calculi are improved, and the ferment can assist people with calculus physique to digest and absorb foods every day in long time, to promote organ work and cell metabolism and to keep human body health, and has good effects of conditioning and preserving health of people with calculus physique.

title_abstract: LITHOLYTIC ENZYME A litholytic enzyme and a preparation and use method thereof. The enzyme comprises 1-30 parts of a calculus complex enzyme, 1-30 parts of a fruit and vegetable, 1-30 parts of a Chinese herb, 1-10 parts of a carboxylic acid, 1-10 parts of an amino acid, 1-10 parts of a polysaccharide, 1-30 parts of an oligosaccharide and 1-30 parts of honey by mass part, wherein the calculus complex enzyme is a mixed enzyme comprising a calculus enzyme and comprising at least two enzymes.
title_abstract_original: 溶石酵素 一种消石的酵素及其制备方法、使用方法。该酵素按照质量份包含1～30份结石复合酶、1～30份果蔬、1～30份中草药、1～10份羧酸、1～10份氨基酸、1～10份多糖、1～30份低聚糖和1～30份蜂蜜，所述结石复合酶为包含结石酶且含有至少两种酶的混合酶。

title_abstract_original: 육수 슬러쉬 제조장치 본 고안은 육수 슬러쉬 제조장치에 관한 것으로, 그 구성은, 판상으로 형성되어, 바닥면에 육수저장고의 상면의 원형의 돌기에 대응되는 홈이 형성되는 베이스부와, 상기 베이스부에 설치되어, 전기적신호를 인가받아 동력을 발생시키는 모터부; 그리고, 상기 모터부의 동력을 전달받아, 원통형의 육수저장고의 내벽을 따라 이동하는 교반부;를 포함하여 구성되는 것을 특징으로 할 수 있다.

title_abstract: Systems and Methods for Mounts for Recording Devices Systems and methods for configuring the operation of recording devices that may be removably mounted to a mount. A mount may provide a unique identifier. The unique identifier may be used to select a configuration profile for configuring the operation of the recording device coupled to the mount. A recording device that is moved from one mount to another may receive a different profile in accordance with the identifier of the new mount to control the operation of the recording device while mounted to the new mount. A server may store, retrieve, and provide profiles to recording devices.

title_abstract: Affinity mature binding protein of EGFR and application The invention discloses an affinity mature binding protein of an anti-human EGFR and an application. The affinity mature binding protein is an aEG22C4 affinity mature binding protein with an amino acid sequence shown as SEQ ID NO: 4, or a binding protein formed by combining at least one of an aEG12E2 affinity mature binding protein with an amino acid sequence shown as SEQ ID NO: 2, an aEG13E8 affinity mature binding protein with an amino acid sequence shown as SEQ ID NO: 3 and an aEG11A6 affinity mature binding protein with an amino acid sequence shown as SEQ ID NO: 1 with the aEG22C4 affinity mature binding protein. The affinity mature binding protein has the advantages of high affinity, high specificity, low immunogenicity, better stability, simple structure, easiness in engineering transformation and the like, and can be better applied to development of binding protein drugs.
title_abstract_original: EGFR的亲和力成熟结合蛋白及应用 本发明公开了一种抗人EGFR的亲和力成熟结合蛋白及应用。该亲和力成熟结合蛋白是氨基酸序列如SEQ ID NO:4所示的aEG22C4亲和力成熟结合蛋白；或是氨基酸序列如SEQ ID NO:2所示的aEG12E2亲和力成熟结合蛋白、氨基酸序列如SEQ ID NO:3所示的aEG13E8亲和力成熟结合蛋白和氨基酸序列如SEQ ID NO:1所示的aEG11A6亲和力成熟结合蛋白中的至少一种与aEG22C4亲和力成熟结合蛋白组合形成的结合蛋白。该亲和力成熟结合蛋白具有高亲和力、高特异性和低免疫原性，并且具有较好的稳定性，结构简单，易于进行工程化改造等优点，可更好地应用于结合蛋白药物的开发。

title_abstract: Rock drill bit with helical evacuation grooves A new masonry drill has a shaft (2) with clearing spirals (3), the tip (5) being entirely in hard material, bonded to the end face of the shaft. It comprises a main- (6) and auxiliary cutters (7, 8) each located along diagonals of the drilling tip. The auxiliary cutters project axially beyond the main cutter (6). Preferably, the auxiliary cutters also project out radially beyond the main cutter. The two auxiliary cutters lie along a diagonal, intersecting that of the main cutter at less than 90 degrees , preferably at 10-50 degrees . The main cutter has an inverted V profile in its central region (9).
title_abstract_original: Gesteinsbohrmeissel mit wendelförmigen Abfuhrnuten Ein Gesteinsbohrer besitzt einen Bohrerschaft (2) mit wenigstens einer wendelförmig entlang seiner Längserstreckung verlaufenden Abfuhrnut (3) für abgetragenes Bohrgut und einen gesamthaft aus Hartmetall bestehenden Bohrkopf (5). Der Bohrkopf (5) ist mit dem Stirnende des Bohrerschafts (2) verbunden, beispielsweise verschweisst oder verlötet, und weist eine Hauptschneide (6) sowie wenigstens eine Zusatzschneide (7, 8) auf, die jeweils entlang von Diagonalen des Bohrkopfes angeordnet sind. Die Zusatzschneide (7, 8) überragt den peripheren Bereich (10, 11) der Hauptschneide (6) axial. <IMAGE>

title_abstract: ROCK DRILL PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To make load for each cutter part the most suitable, discharge drill cuttings and improve performance of a drill tool by making the main cutter and the auxiliary cutter of a drill head specific shapes. SOLUTION: A rock drill 1 mounted on a rotation impact drill device is constituted so that a drill head 5 is fixed on the edge of a drill shaft having the discharge groove 3 of drill cuttings. A main cutter 6 and auxiliary cutters 7, 8 are arranged on the diameter of the intersection angle of 10-50 degrees on the drill head, the main cutter 6 is molded by a center area 9 and peripheral areas 10, 11 positioned at both the sides, and projected from the auxiliary cutters 7, 8 providing a cutting edge. In addition, a groove and a gap are provided among each cutter 6, 7, 8 to be connected to the discharge groove 3 of drill cuttings. Thereby the auxiliary cutters 7, 8 mainly have cutting function at the time of rotation, the main cutter 6 mainly has centering function at the time of rotation and impact, and the discharge performance of the drill cuttings is improved.

title_abstract: Rock drill A rock drill has an axially extending drill shaft (2) with at least one helically shaped drilled material removal groove (3) and a drillhead (5) formed of a hard metal alloy. The drillhead (5) is secured to an end face of the drill shaft (2) such as by welding or soldering and has a main cutter (6) extending along a diagonal of the drillhead and at least one supplementary cutter (7, 8) extending along another diagonal of the drillhead. The supplementary cutter (7, 8) projects axially outwardly from a radially outer section of the main cutter (6).

title_abstract: PROCESS FOR PRODUCING FRUCTOSE-1,6-DIPHOSPHATE A process for producing fructose-1,6-diphosphate comprising the steps of: (a) enzymatically converting adenosine 5'-diphosphate to adenosine 5'-triphosphate using an acetate kinase-containing microorganism or an extract of the microorganism and phosphate donor; and (b) enzymatically converting a substrate capable of being converted to glucose or fructose to fructose-1,6-diphosphate using the adenosine 5'-triphosphate resulting from step (a) and the acetate kinase-containing microorganism or the extract of the microorganism.
title_abstract_original: PROCESS FOR PRODUCING FRUCTOSE-1,6-DIPHOSPHATE A process for producing fructose-1,6-diphosphate comprising the steps of: (a) enzymatically converting adenosine 5'-diphosphate to adenosine 5'-triphosphate using an acetate kinase-containing microorganism or an extract of the microorganism and phosphate donor; and (b) enzymatically converting a substrate capable of being converted to glucose or fructose to fructose-1,6-diphosphate using the adenosine 5'-triphosphate resulting from step (a) and the acetate kinase-containing microorganism or the extract of the microorganism.
Verfahren zur Produktion von Fruktose-1,6-diphosphat.

title_abstract: PRODUCTION OF FRUCTOSE-1,6-DIPHOSPHATE PURPOSE:To obtain the subject diphosphate useful as pharmaceuticals, etc., in high conversion efficiency on an industrial scale at a low cost without producing by-product by using microbial cell containing acetic acid kinase or extract of the cell as a catalyst. CONSTITUTION:Fructose-1,6-diphosphate is produced from (A) adenosine-5'- triphosphate derived from (B) adenosine-5'-diphosphate. The above reaction for the production of the objective diphosphate is carried out by using microbial cells containing acetic acid kinase (e.g. Bacillus stearothermophilus NCA-1503) or its extract as the catalyst for the reaction to produce the component A and the reaction to produce the objective diphosphate.

title_abstract: Method for separating fatty alcohols from alkyl glycoside crude product The invention discloses a method for separating fatty alcohols from an alkyl glycoside crude product, and belongs to the technical field of light chemical daily necessity separation. According to themethod, supercritical CO2 extraction separation technology is adopted; extracting and separating unreacted fatty alcohols are adopted to obtain a high-purity alkyl glycoside solid product; no organicsolvent is used, no post-processing is required, the cost is low, and large-scale enlarged production is easy to realize; a semi-permeable suspended barrel and an air cavity channel are adopted, on one hand, CO2 can be introduced into the air cavity channel, CO2 fluid containing the fatty alcohols is in a micro-boiling state, overflow of gaseous CO2 is accelerated, separation efficiency is accelerated, on the other hand, compared with the prior art wherein separated CO2 is discharged in one direction and gaseous CO2 is separated after CO2 feeding is stopped, the method in the invention can realize discharge outwards in multiple directions from the upper side and the air cavity channel, gaseous CO2 overflow moving path is reduced effectively, so that the separation efficiency of gaseous CO2and fatty alcohols is remarkably improved.
title_abstract_original: 一种分离烷基糖苷粗品中脂肪醇的方法 本发明公开了一种分离烷基糖苷粗品中脂肪醇的方法，属于轻化工日用品分离技术领域，一种分离烷基糖苷粗品中脂肪醇的方法，采用超临界CO2萃取分离技术，萃取分离未反应的脂肪醇，获得高纯度烷基糖苷固态产品，无需使用有机溶剂，不需要后处理，成本低，容易规模化放大生产，且通过半通透悬空桶和气腔通道的设置，一方面可以向其腔通道内通入CO2，使得含有脂肪醇的CO2流体内呈现微沸腾的情况，进而加速气态CO2的溢出，进而加快分离效率，另一方面，相较于现有技术的一个方向排出分离的CO2，在停止通入CO2后，分离的气态CO2，本发明既可以从上方以及气腔通道多向向外排出，还能有效降低气态CO2溢出时的运动路径，从而显著提高气态CO2与脂肪醇的分离效率。

一种液压支架执行动作的确定方法及装置 本发明实施例公开了一种液压支架执行动作的确定方法及装置。该方法包括：根据采煤机的运行方向变化和所述采煤机的左右滚筒的位置高度变化，判断采煤工艺的类型，所述采煤工艺的类型至少包括：中部正常割煤，割底煤，清浮煤，斜切进刀和割三角煤中的一种；根据所述采煤工艺类型，确定液压支架的执行动作。本发明实施例提高了采煤工艺类型确定的效率和准确度，以及液压支架跟机动作的准确性和实时性。

title_abstract: Determination method and determination device for execution action of hydraulic support The embodiment of the invention discloses a determination method and a determination device for an execution action of a hydraulic support. The method comprises the following steps: judging types of coal mining technologies according to the change of the moving direction of a coal mining machine and position and height changes of left and right rollers of the coal mining machine, wherein the types of the coal mining technologies at least comprise one of a middle normal coal cutting technology, a bottom coal cutting technology, a float coal clearing technology, a beveling feed technology and a triangle coal cutting technology; determining the execution action of the hydraulic support according to the types of the coal mining technologies. According to the embodiment of the invention, efficiency and accuracy of determining the types of the coal mining technologies as well as accuracy and real-time property of a machine following action of the hydraulic support are improved.
title_abstract_original: 种液压支架执行动作的确定方法及装置 本发明实施例公开了种液压支架执行动作的确定方法及装置。该方法包括：根据采煤机的运行方向变化和所述采煤机的左右滚筒的位置高度变化，判断采煤工艺的类型，所述采煤工艺的类型至少包括：中部正常割煤，割底煤，清浮煤，斜切进刀和割三角煤中的种；根据所述采煤工艺类型，确定液压支架的执行动作。本发明实施例提高了采煤工艺类型确定的效率和准确度，以及液压支架跟机动作的准确性和实时性。

Procédé et dispositif de mesure de l’usage d’un bâtiment connecté Procédé de mesure de l’usage d’un bâtiment connecté, mis en œuvre par un dispositif, caractérisé en ce qu’il comprend ce qui suit : collecter des données captées sur au moins un créneau horaire, lesdites données étant des données d’usage d’équipements et de mobilité d’au moins un utilisateur dudit bâtiment connectée, classer lesdites données collectées par espace de vie dudit bâtiment, réaliser au moins une analyse de similarité des données classées, sur la base d’au moins un référentiel, calculer au moins un indicateur d’usage d’un bâtiment sur ledit au moins un créneau horaire, sur la base de ladite au moins une analyse, communiquer au moins une notification selon le résultat dudit calcul. Figure pour l’abrégé : Fig 5.

title_abstract: METHOD, SYSTEM AND COMPUTER-READABLE ROCORDING MEDIUM FOR PROVIDING INFORMATION ON REAL ESTATE CONFIRMED AS GENUINE OBJECT FOR TRADE A method for supplying computer real estate trading information, a system thereof and a readable recording medium through network are provided to support online real estate transaction of transactions object real estate information efficiently. A real estate trading information providing system communicates with a user terminal(110) and an agent terminal(120). An interface unit(130) provides a graphic user interface for transmitting and receiving data relating to the real estate transaction. A control unit(140) controls the interface unit, and the flow of data between a processing unit and a database management unit.

title_abstract: Blasting device The invention belongs to the technical field of tunnel construction, and particularly relates to a blasting device. The blasting device comprises at least two cylindrical shells which are coaxially arranged, and two V-shaped energy gathering grooves which are sunken towards the center of the cylindrical shell are symmetrically formed in the circumferential face of each cylindrical shell; a first end seat and a second end seat are arranged at the two ends of the cylindrical shell correspondingly, and a positioning device is arranged on the first end seat; and the first end seat is provided witha bolt, and the second end seat is provided with a socket. According to the blasting device, the automatic positioning device is additionally arranged on the basis of an existing energy gathering pipe, the positioning device can be automatically ejected out when explosive arrives at the designated position of a blasthole, the positioning device presses the explosive on the inner wall of the blasthole, and the blasting precision of the energy gathering pipe blasting device is effectively guaranteed; and a plurality of explosive single bodies are detachably assembled together, explosive transferring and feeding are facilitated, separating devices are arranged between the explosive single bodies, after an explosive assembly enters a blasthole, the explosive single bodies are separated in sequence, and uniform distribution of the explosive is achieved.
title_abstract_original: 爆破装置 本发明属于隧道施工技术领域，具体涉及一种爆破装置；包括至少两根同轴设置的筒状壳体，筒状壳体的周面上对称设置有两条向筒状壳体中心凹陷的V形聚能槽；筒状壳体的两端分别设有第一端座和第二端座，所述第一端座上设有定位装置；第一端座上设有插销，第二端座上设有插孔。本发明在现有聚能管基础上增设了自动定位装置，当炸药到达炮眼指定位置时能够自动将定位装置弹出，定位装置将炸药压紧在炮眼内壁上，有效确保的聚能管爆破装置的爆破精度；本发明将多个炸药单体可拆卸的装配在一起，便于炸药的转运和上料，各炸药单体之间设有分离装置，当炸药组件进入炮眼后，各单体依次分离，实现炸药的均匀布设。

title_abstract:
LABELED PROTEIN AND METHOD FOR OBTAINING THE SAME

PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To obtain a labeled protein, especially to separate the labeled protein from the same unlabeled protein.

SOLUTION: There is provided the labeled protein including: a protein to be labeled having a target protein, one or more affinity interaction domains for binding to an affinity carrier, and one or more labeling sites; and a labeling reagent binding to at least one of the labeling sites; wherein the affinity of the labeled protein to the affinity carrier is different from that of the protein to be labeled to the affinity carrier.

title_abstract: Device for heating cigarettes through air and using method of device The invention discloses a device for heating cigarettes by air, which comprises two sleeves, namely an upper sleeve (1) and a lower sleeve (2), and a gap (3) is reserved between the sleeve walls of the upper sleeve (1) and the lower sleeve (2); the inner diameters of the upper sleeve (1) and the lower sleeve (2) are the same and are slightly greater than the outer diameter of a cigarette (5); the upper sleeve (1) and the lower sleeve (2) can move along the periphery of the cigarette (5) in the axial direction. The invention further discloses a using method of the device for heating the cigarettes through the air. By means of the device, the effective smoke release efficiency of the whole section of fuming matter is improved, and the taste of a smoker can be kept consistent front and back.
title_abstract_original: 一种空气加热烟支的装置及其使用方法 本发明公开了一种空气加热烟支的装置，所述装置包括：两个套筒、为上套筒(1)和下套筒(2)，所述上套筒(1)和下套筒(2)筒壁之间有间隙(3)；所述上套筒(1)和下套筒(2)的内径相同且略大于烟支(5)的外径；所述上套筒(1)和下套筒(2)能够沿烟支(5)外围沿轴向方向移动。本发明还公开了所述空气加热烟支的装置的使用方法。本发明的装置提高了整段发烟物质的有效烟气释放效率，使抽吸者口感能够保持前后一致。

title_abstract: Rotary excavating drill bit and drilling construction process The rotary excavating drill bit comprises a rotating cylinder, a high-pressure water pump, a water tank, a storage battery and a high-pressure water conveying pipeline, a connecting base used for being connected with a drill rod is arranged on the upper portion of the rotating cylinder, and a plurality of working heads distributed in the circumferential direction of the rotating cylinder are arranged on the lower edge of the rotating cylinder; the high-pressure water pump, the water tank and the storage battery are arranged at the upper end of the rotating cylinder, the storage battery supplies power to the high-pressure water pump, the water tank is used for providing a water source for the high-pressure water pump, and the high-pressure water conveying pipeline is used for conveying water flow output by the high-pressure water pump to the bottom edge of the rotating cylinder and achieving spraying of the high-pressure water flow from the bottom edge of the rotating cylinder. In the drilling process, gravel blocks or rock powder on the periphery of the working head can be effectively cleaned through the impact effect of high-pressure water flow, then in the drilling process, the probability that the working head is repeatedly rolled and broken can be greatly reduced, and then the overall drilling efficiency can be greatly improved.
title_abstract_original: 一种旋挖钻头及钻孔施工工艺 本发明给出了一种旋挖钻头及钻孔施工工艺，包括旋转筒、高压水泵、水箱、蓄电池、高压水输送管道，在旋转筒的上部设置一用于与钻杆相连接的连接底座，在旋转筒的下边缘处设置有若干沿其圆周方向分布的工作头，高压水泵、水箱、蓄电池均设置在旋转筒上端，蓄电池为高压水泵提供电源，水箱用于向高压水泵提供水源，高压水输送管道用于将高压水泵输出的水流输送到旋转筒的底部边缘处，并实现高压水流从旋转筒的底部边缘处的喷出。在钻进过程中，利用高压水流的冲击作用，可实现工作头周边碎石块或岩石粉末的有效清理，继而在钻进过程中，可大大降低工作头出现重复碾压、破碎现象的概率，继而可大大提高整体的钻进效率。

title_abstract: SOLVENT-FREE SYNTHESIS OF CYCLIC CARBONATES Disclosed is a process for production of a cycloaliphatic carbonate from a diol, triol or polyol and a carbon dioxide source, such as a dialkyl carbonate. Said process is performed in a solvent-free medium using a N-heterocyclic carbene or N-heterocyclic carbene complex as catalyst. Said N-heterocyclic carbene or carbene complex is preferably attached to a lipase. Said process comprises preferably a transesterification step and a thermal disproportionation step and yielded cycloaliphatic carbonate is in preferred embodiments a monocyclic carbonate having a five-membered or a six-membered ring.
title_abstract_original: SOLVENT-FREE SYNTHESIS OF CYCLIC CARBONATES Disclosed is a process for production of a cycloaliphatic carbonate from a diol, triol or polyol and a carbon dioxide source, such as a dialkyl carbonate. title_abstract: REASSIGNING EXIT INTERNET PROTOCOL ADDRESSES IN A VIRTUAL PRIVATE NETWORK SERVER A method for utilizing, by a virtual private network (VPN) server, a first exit internet protocol (IP) address to communicate data associated with a user device having an established VPN connection with the VPN server; suspending, by the VPN server for a given duration of time, utilizing the first exit IP address to communicate the data associated with the user device based at least in part on receiving a notification indicating that an amount of data communicated utilizing the first exit IP address satisfies a data threshold; and re-utilizing, by VPN server at an expiration of the given duration of time, the first exit IP address to communicate the data associated with the user device during the established VPN connection. Various other aspects are contemplated.
title_abstract_original: REASSIGNING EXIT INTERNET PROTOCOL ADDRESSES IN A VIRTUAL PRIVATE NETWORK SERVER A method for utilizing, by a virtual private network (VPN) server, a first exit internet protocol (IP) address to communicate data associated with a user device having an established VPN connection with the VPN server; suspending, by the VPN server for a given duration of time, utilizing the first exit IP address to communicate the data associated with the user device based at least in part on receiving a notification indicating that an amount of data communicated utilizing the first exit IP address satisfies a data threshold; and re-utilizing, by VPN server at an expiration of the given duration of time, the first exit IP address to communicate the data associated with the user device during the established VPN connection. Various other aspects are contemplated.

title_abstract: Reassigning exit internet protocol addresses in a virtual private network server A method for reassigning exit internet protocol (IP) addresses in a virtual private network (VPN), the method including selecting a first exit IP address for communicating data associated with a user device having an established VPN connection, receiving a notification that indicates occurrence of a network event associated with the first exit IP address, and communicating, during the established VPN connection, data associated with the user device using a second exit IP address, different from the first exit IP address. Various other aspects are contemplated.
title_abstract_original: Reassigning exit internet protocol addresses in a virtual private network server A method for reassigning exit internet protocol (IP) addresses in a virtual private network (VPN), the method including selecting a first exit IP address for communicating data associated with a user device having an established VPN connection, receiving a notification that indicates occurrence of a network event associated with the first exit IP address, and communicating, during the established VPN connection, data associated with the user device using a second exit IP address, different from the first exit IP address. Various other aspects are contemplated.

title_abstract: Reassigning exit internet protocol addresses in a virtual private network server A method for reassigning exit internet protocol (IP) addresses in a virtual private network (VPN), the method comprising activating a first exit IP address for communicating data associated with a user device having an established VPN connection; deactivating, during the established VPN connection, the first exit IP address based at least in part on determining that an amount of data communication associated with the first exit IP address satisfies a data threshold; and activating, during the established VPN connection, a second exit IP address, different from the first exit IP address, for communicating data associated with the user device based at least in part on deactivating the first exit IP address. Various other aspects are contemplated.
title_abstract_original: Reassigning exit internet protocol addresses in a virtual private network server A method for reassigning exit internet protocol (IP) addresses in a virtual private network (VPN), the method comprising activating a first exit IP address for communicating data associated with a user device having an established VPN connection; deactivating, during the established VPN connection, the first exit IP address based at least in part on determining that an amount of data communication associated with the first exit IP address satisfies a data threshold; and activating, during the established VPN connection, a second exit IP address, different from the first exit IP address, for communicating data associated with the user device based at least in part on deactivating the first exit IP address. Various other aspects are contemplated.

title_abstract: Reassigning exit internet protocol addresses in a virtual private network server A method for reassigning exit internet protocol (IP) addresses in a virtual private network (VPN), the method including receiving a message indicating an amount of communication data associated with a first exit IP address, determining that the amount of communication data satisfies a data threshold associated with the first exit IP address, and transmitting, based at least in part on the determining, a notification indicating that the amount of communication data satisfies the data threshold. Various other aspects are contemplated.

title_abstract: Filter method and apparatus for polar modulation A method includes providing an in-phase signal and a quadrature-phase signal (I/Q signals), processing the in-phase and quadrature phase signals to produce a magnitude signal and a phase signal, conditioning the phase signal to produce a conditioned phase signal, filtering the magnitude signal to produce a filtered magnitude signal, and amplifying the conditioned phase signal as a function of the filtered magnitude signal to produce a polar modulated signal. An apparatus includes a pair of I/Q channels, an I/Q to magnitude/phase circuit coupled to the pair of I/Q channels, a magnitude conditioning circuit coupled to the I/Q to magnitude/phase circuit; the magnitude conditioning circuit embodying a magnitude filter; a phase conditioning circuit coupled to the I/Q to magnitude/phase circuit, and an amplifier circuit coupled to the magnitude conditioning circuit and the phase conditioning circuit.
title_abstract_original: Filter method and apparatus for polar modulation A method includes providing an in-phase signal and a quadrature-phase signal (I/Q signals), processing the in-phase and quadrature phase signals to produce a magnitude signal and a phase signal, conditioning the phase signal to produce a conditioned phase signal, filtering the magnitude signal to produce a filtered magnitude signal, and amplifying the conditioned phase signal as a function of the filtered magnitude signal to produce a polar modulated signal. An apparatus includes a pair of I/Q channels, an I/Q to magnitude/phase circuit coupled to the pair of I/Q channels, a magnitude conditioning circuit coupled to the I/Q to magnitude/phase circuit; the magnitude conditioning circuit embodying a magnitude filter; a phase conditioning circuit coupled to the I/Q to magnitude/phase circuit, and an amplifier circuit coupled to the magnitude conditioning circuit and the phase conditioning circuit.

利用复合菌剂降解氨基酸发酵废液中有机质的工艺 本发明属于生物技术领域，公开了利用复合菌剂降解氨基酸发酵废液中有机质的工艺，其特征在于，所述复合菌剂包括啤酒酵母、粘红酵母以及安琪酵母任意二者或者二者以上的组合。利用复合酵母菌降低还原糖和整体有机质含量，因而可有效降低喷浆造粒过程中产生的焦糊味浓度。

title_abstract: Process for degrading organic matters in amino acid fermentation waste liquid by utilizing compound microbial inoculant The invention belongs to the technical field of biology, and discloses a process for degrading organic matters in an amino acid fermentation waste liquid by utilizing a compound microbial inoculant. The compound microbial inoculant is characterized by comprising a combination of any two or more than two selected from the group consisting of beer yeast, rhodotorula glutinis and Angel yeast. The compound yeast is utilized to reduce the contents of reducing sugar and overall organic matters, so the concentration of burnt flavor generated in the guniting granulation process can be effectively reduced.
title_abstract_original: 利用复合菌剂降解氨基酸发酵废液中有机质的工艺 本发明属于生物技术领域，公开了利用复合菌剂降解氨基酸发酵废液中有机质的工艺，其特征在于，所述复合菌剂包括啤酒酵母、粘红酵母以及安琪酵母任意二者或者二者以上的组合。利用复合酵母菌降低还原糖和整体有机质含量，因而可有效降低喷浆造粒过程中产生的焦糊味浓度。

title_abstract: COMMUNICATION METHOD FOR USER EQUIPMENT AND USER EQUIPMENT, AND COMMUNICATION METHOD FOR BASE STATION AND BASE STATION The present invention relates to sub-frame configuration information for half duplex frequency division duplex (HD-FDD) or time division duplex (TDD). The sub-frame configuration information indicates which of a predefined plurality of continuous sub-frames is a sub-frame for downlink reception, which of the plurality of continuous sub-frames is a sub-frame for uplink transmission, or which of the plurality of continuous sub-frames is a special sub-frame that includes at least one OFDM symbol for the downlink reception and at least one OFDM symbol for the uplink transmission.
title_abstract_original: PROCÉDÉ DE COMMUNICATION POUR ÉQUIPEMENT D'UTILISATEUR ET ÉQUIPEMENT D'UTILISATEUR, ET PROCÉDÉ DE COMMUNICATION POUR STATION DE BASE ET STATION DE BASE La présente invention concerne des informations de configuration de sous-trames pour le duplexage par répartition dans le temps en semi-duplex (HD-FDD) ou le duplexage par répartition en fréquence (TDD). Les informations de configuration de sous-trames indiquent quelle sous-trame, parmi une pluralité prédéfinie de sous-trames continues, est une sous-trame pour la réception en liaison descendante, quelle sous-trame, parmi la pluralité de sous-trames continues, est une sous-trame pour la réception en liaison montante, ou quelle sous-trame, parmi la pluralité de sous-trames continues, est une sous-trame spéciale qui contient au moins un symbole OFDM pour la réception en liaison descendante et au moins un symbole OFDM pour la réception en liaison montante.

title_abstract: COMMUNICATION METHOD FOR USER EQUIPMENT AND USER EQUIPMENT, AND COMMUNICATION METHOD FOR BASE STATION AND BASE STATION The present invention relates to subframe configuration information for half duplex frequency duplex (HD-FDD) or time division duplex (TDD). The subframe configuration indicates which of a predefined plurality of continuous subframes is a subframe for downlink reception, which of the plurality of contiguous subframes is a subframe for uplink transmission, or which of the plurality of contiguous subframes is a special subframe that includes at least one OFDM symbol for the downlink reception and at least one OFDM symbol for the uplink transmission.

title_abstract: Production process of creamy shitake mushroom crisp The invention discloses a production process of creamy shitake mushroom crisp. The production process comprises the following steps: a. pretreating shitake mushroom; b. conducting traying and quenching; c. conducting vacuum freezing and drying; d. conducting blanching and seasoning; e. conducting mixing; f. conducting tortilla processing; g. conducting baking; h. conducting bagging and vacuum sealing; i. conducting high temperature sterilization; j. conducting sorting; k. conducting metal detection; and l. conducting packing into the warehouse. The invention has the advantages that the nutrient components in the raw materials are easier for human body to digest and absorb, and the product has good nourishing and health care effects, and can effectively improve the edible taste and deliciousness of the creamy shitake mushroom crisp.
title_abstract_original: 奶油香菇脆生产工艺 本发明公开了奶油香菇脆生产工艺，其生产工艺如下：a、香菇预处理；b、铺盘急冻；c、真空冷冻干燥；d、漂烫调味；e、拌料；f、面饼加工；g、烘烤；h、装袋、真空封口；i、高温杀菌；j、分选；k、金属检测；l、装箱入库，本发明优点是：使得原料中的营养成分更易于人体消化吸收，并且具有很好的滋补保健功效，有效提升了本奶油香菇脆的食用口感和美味程度。

네트워크 개시 온 디맨드 제로 에너지 페이징 방법 및 장치 무선 송수신 유닛(WTRU)은 하나 이상의 안테나 및 안테나에 동작 가능하게 커플링되는 제1 트랜시버를 포함할 수도 있다. 하나 이상의 안테나 및 제1 트랜시버는 WTRU로부터 제로 에너지를 사용하여 네트워크로부터 제1 신호를 수신하도록 구성될 수도 있다. 하나 이상의 안테나 및 제1 트랜시버는 또한, 제1 신호로부터 에너지를 추출하도록 구성될 수도 있다. 제1 트랜시버는 또한, 제1 신호의 에너지 시그니처를 디코딩하기 위해 에너지 임계 이벤트들 사이의 분리를 검사하도록 구성될 수도 있다. 디코딩된 에너지 시그니처가 저장된 에너지 시그니처와 매칭되는 경우, 제1 트랜시버는 또한, 하나 이상의 안테나에 동작 가능하게 커플링되는 제2 트랜시버를 활성화하도록 구성될 수도 있는데, 여기서 제2 트랜시버는 WTRU에 의해 전력을 공급받는다. 하나 이상의 안테나 및 제2 트랜시버는 네트워크로부터 제2 신호를 수신하도록 구성될 수도 있다.

title_abstract: NETWORK INITIATED ON-DEMAND ZERO-ENERGY PAGING METHOD AND APPARATUS A wireless transmit/receive unit (WTRU) may include one or more antennas and a first transceiver operatively coupled to the antennas. The one or more antennas and the first transceiver may be configured to receive a first signal from a network using zero energy from the WTRU. The one or more antennas and the first transceiver may be further configured to extract energy from the first signal. The first transceiver may be further configured to examine a separation between energy threshold events to decode an energy signature of the first signal. The first transceiver may be further configured to activate a second transceiver operatively coupled to the one or more antennas if the decoded energy signature matches a stored energy signature, wherein the second transceiver is powered by the WTRU. The one or more antennas and the second transceiver may be configured to receive a second signal from the network.

title_abstract_original: 网络发起的按需零能量寻呼方法及装置 无线发射/接收单元(WTRU)可以包括一个或多个天线以及可操作地耦合到所述天线的第一收发信机。所述一个或多个天线和所述第一收发信机可以被配置为使用来自所述WTRU的零能量从网络接收第一信号。所述一个或多个天线和所述第一收发信机可以进一步被配置为从所述第一信号提取能量。所述第一收发信机可进一步被配置以检查能量阈值事件之间的间隔以解码所述第一信号的能量特征。所述第一收发信机还可以被配置成如果所解码的能量特征与所存储的能量特征相匹配，则激活可操作地耦合到所述一个或多个天线的第二收发信机，其中所述第二收发信机由所述WTRU供电。所述一个或多个天线和所述第二收发信机可以被配置为从所述网络接收第二信号。

ネットワークによって開始されるオンデマンドのゼロエネルギーページング方法および装置 【課題】ネットワークデバイスのバッテリー寿命を最大化することによってエネルギー効率を改善する。【解決手段】ＷＴＲＵは、少なくとも１つのアンテナと、少なくとも１つのアンテナに結合される第１のトランシーバおよび第２のトランシーバを備える。少なくとも１つのアンテナおよび第１のトランシーバは、ネットワークから第１の信号を受信するように構成される。第１のトランシーバは、第１の信号からエネルギーを抽出し、およびエネルギー閾値イベント間の時間の分離を比較することによって、第１の信号のエネルギー署名をデコードするようにさらに構成される。第１のトランシーバは、デコードされたエネルギー署名が、構成されているエネルギー署名にマッチする場合、第２のトランシーバをアクティブ化するように構成される。少なくとも１つのアンテナおよび第２のトランシーバは、ネットワークから第２の信号を受信するように構成される。【選択図】図３９

title_abstract: METHOD AND DEVICE FOR PAGING WITH ZERO POWER CONSUMPTION INITIATED BY NETWORK FIELD: electrical communication engineering.SUBSTANCE: invention relates to communication. Wireless transmit/receive module (WTRU) may include one or more antennae and a first transceiver operatively coupled to the antennae. One or more antennae and the first transceiver may be configured to receive a first signal from the network using zero power from the WTRU. One or more antennae and the first transceiver may be further configured to extract energy from the first signal. First transceiver may additionally be configured to analyze separation between threshold energy events to decode the energy signature of the first signal. First transceiver can be further configured to activate a second transceiver operatively coupled to one or more antennae, if the decoded energy signature matches the stored energy signature, wherein power to the second transceiver is provided by the WTRU. One or more antennae and a second transceiver may be configured to receive a second signal from the network.EFFECT: technical result of the invention is to increase energy efficiency of the transmission/reception device.20 cl, 3 tbl, 82 dwg
title_abstract_original: СПОСОБ И УСТРОЙСТВО ПЕЙДЖИНГА С НУЛЕВЫМ ЭНЕРГОПОТРЕБЛЕНИЕМ, ИНИЦИИРУЕМОГО СЕТЬЮ Изобретение относится к области связи. Технический результат изобретения заключается в повышении энергоэффективности устройства передачи/приема. Модуль беспроводной передачи/приема (WTRU) может включать в себя одну или более антенн и первый приемопередатчик, функционально связанный с антеннами. Одна или более антенн и первый приемопередатчик могут быть выполнены с возможностью приема первого сигнала от сети с использованием нулевой энергии от модуля WTRU. Одна или более антенн и первый приемопередатчик могут быть дополнительно выполнены с возможностью извлечения энергии из первого сигнала. Первый приемопередатчик может быть дополнительно выполнен с возможностью анализа разделения между пороговыми событиями энергии для декодирования энергетической подписи первого сигнала. Первый приемопередатчик может быть дополнительно выполнен с возможностью активации второго приемопередатчика, функционально связанного с одной или более антеннами, если декодированная энергетическая подпись совпадает с сохраненной энергетической подписью, причем электропитание второго приемопередатчика осуществляется посредством модуля WTRU. Одна или более антенн и второй приемопередатчик могут быть выполнены с возможностью приема второго сигнала от сети. 3 н. и 17 з.п. ф-лы, 3 табл., 82 ил.

ネットワークによって開始されるオンデマンドのゼロエネルギーページング方法および装置 無線送受信ユニット（ＷＴＲＵ）が、１つまたは複数のアンテナと、それらのアンテナに動作可能に結合されている第１のトランシーバとを含み得る。１つまたは複数のアンテナおよび第１のトランシーバは、ＷＴＲＵからのゼロエネルギーを使用してネットワークから第１の信号を受信するように構成されてよい。１つまたは複数のアンテナおよび第１のトランシーバは、第１の信号からエネルギーを抽出するようにさらに構成されてよい。第１のトランシーバは、エネルギー閾値イベント間の分離を検査して第１の信号のエネルギー署名をデコードするようにさらに構成されてよい。第１のトランシーバは、デコードされたエネルギー署名が、格納されているエネルギー署名にマッチする場合、１つまたは複数のアンテナに動作可能に結合されている第２のトランシーバをアクティブ化するようにさらに構成されてよく、第２のトランシーバは、ＷＴＲＵによって電力供給される。１つまたは複数のアンテナおよび第２のトランシーバは、ネットワークから第２の信号を受信するように構成されてよい。

title_abstract: NETWORK INITIATED ON-DEMAND ZERO-ENERGY PAGING METHOD AND APPARATUS
title_abstract_original: NETWORK INITIATED ON-DEMAND ZERO-ENERGY PAGING METHOD AND APPARATUS

title_abstract: Network initiated on-demand zero-energy paging method and apparatus A wireless transmit/receive unit (WTRU) may include one or more antennas and a first transceiver operatively coupled to the antennas. The one or more antennas and the first transceiver may be configured to receive a first signal from a network using zero energy from the WTRU. The one or more antennas and the first transceiver may be further configured to extract energy from the first signal. The first transceiver may be further configured to examine a separation between energy threshold events to decode an energy signature of the first signal. The first transceiver may be further configured to activate a second transceiver operatively coupled to the one or more antennas if the decoded energy signature matches a stored energy signature, wherein the second transceiver is powered by the WTRU. The one or more antennas and the second transceiver may be configured to receive a second signal from the network.

title_abstract_original: MÉTODO Y APARATO DE PAGINACIÓN A DEMANDA DE ENERGÍA CERO INICIADO POR LA RED. Una unidad de transmisión/recepción inalámbrica (WTRU) puede incluir una o más antenas y un primer transceptor acoplado operativamente a las antenas. La una o más antenas y el primer transceptor pueden configurarse para recibir una primera señal de una red usando energía cero de la WTRU. La una o más antenas y el primer transceptor pueden configurarse, además, para extraer energía de la primera señal. El primer transceptor puede configurarse, además, para examinar una separación entre eventos de umbral de energía para decodificar una firma energética de la primera señal. El primer transceptor puede configurarse, además, para activar un segundo transceptor acoplado operativamente a la una o más antenas si la firma energética decodificada coincide con una firma energética almacenada, en donde el segundo transceptor está energizado por la WTRU. La una o más antenas y el segundo transceptor pueden configurarse para recibir una segunda señal desde la red.

title_abstract: HIV-1 viral variants for improved animal models of HIV-1 pathogenesis The invention relates to HIV-1 viral variants and nucleic acids and polypeptides thereof having improved replication properties for development of suitable animal models for the study of HIV-1 pathogenesis, monkey models of HIV-1 infection comprising such variants, and methods for screening for agents that inhibit or control HIV-1 infection.
title_abstract_original: HIV-1 viral variants for improved animal models of HIV-1 pathogenesis The invention relates to HIV-1 viral variants and nucleic acids and polypeptides thereof having improved replication properties for development of suitable animal models for the study of HIV-1 pathogenesis, monkey models of HIV-1 infection comprising such variants, and methods for screening for agents that inhibit or control HIV-1 infection.

title_abstract: Tunnel lining anti-disengaging construction method The invention provides a tunnel lining anti-disengaging construction method. The tunnel lining anti-disengaging construction method comprises the following steps: S1, after primary supporting of a tunnel is completed, marking the position of the vault center line of the tunnel through field lofting, and mounting a plurality of pressure sensors along the vault center line at intervals, wherein thepressure sensors are used for collecting pressure values of installation positions of the pressure sensors in the concrete pouring process; S2, covering a plurality of pressure sensor hanging waterproof plates along the tunnel wall of the tunnel, and mounting a grouting pipe and an exhaust pipe on two sides of the pressure sensors along the longitudinal direction of the tunnel; and S3, constructing tunnel secondary lining in a manner of pouring and vibrating layer by layer and window by window by using a lining trolley, judging the fullness of the poured concrete at the mounting position of each pressure sensor according to the pressure value collected by the pressure sensor in the pouring process, and carrying out backfill grouting by using the grouting pipe, wherein under the condition that the fullness of the poured concrete at the mounting positions of all the pressure sensors reaches a designed threshold value, concrete pouring is stopped, and secondary lining is completed.
title_abstract_original: 隧道衬砌防脱空施工方法 本发明提供了一种隧道衬砌防脱空施工方法，包括以下步骤：S1)待隧道初期支护完成后，通过现场放样标记隧道的拱顶中线位置，并沿着拱顶中线间隔安装多个压力传感器，压力传感器用于在混凝土浇筑过程中采集其安装位置的压力值；S2)沿着隧道的隧道壁、覆盖多个压力传感器挂设防水板，并沿着隧道的纵向在压力传感器两侧安装注浆管及排气管；S3)通过使用衬砌台车逐层逐窗进行浇筑、振捣的方式施作隧道二次衬砌，在浇筑的过程中，根据每一压力传感器采集的压力值判断该压力传感器安装位置的浇筑混凝土的饱满度，并使用注浆管进行回填注浆，在所有压力传感器安装位置的浇筑混凝土的饱满度均达到设计阈值的情况下，停止混凝土浇筑，完成二次衬砌。

title_abstract: Miniature tea withering machine A withering machine body is mounted at the top end of a bottom plate, an air heater is mounted on one side of the top end of the bottom plate, an air cavity is formed in the bottom end of the interior of the bottom plate, a flattening mechanism is arranged in a storage cavity, and a lifting mechanism is arranged at the bottom end of the interior of the bottom plate. According to the invention, a shaking mechanism is arranged at the bottom end of a mounting ventilation plate, and a belt pulley structure, a first servo motor, a rotating shaft, an eccentric wheel, a movable sleeve, a connecting rod and a telescopic spring of the shaking mechanism are matched with each other, so that a spectrum collector is mounted at the bottom end of the lifting mechanism, and a spraying mechanism is arranged in the middle of the top end of the interior of the bottom plate; the tea leaf withering machine has the advantages that the tea leaves in the storage cavity can be turned over by driving the mounting ventilation plate and the storage cavity to shake up and down, so that the tea leaves are heated more uniformly during withering, the withering quality of the tea leaves is better, and the practicability of the withering machine during use is also improved.
title_abstract_original: 一种微型茶叶萎凋机 本发明公开了一种微型茶叶萎凋机，所述底板的顶端安装有萎凋机本体，所述底板顶端的一侧安装有热风机，所述底板内部的底端安装有气腔，所述储料腔的内部设置有摊平机构，所述底板内部的底端设置有升降机构，所述升降机构的底端安装有光谱采集器，所述底板内部顶端的中间位置处设置有喷洒机构，本发明在安装通气板的底端设置有抖动机构，利用抖动机构的皮带轮结构、第一伺服电机、转轴、偏心轮、活动套、连接杆和伸缩弹簧的相互配合，可带动安装通气板和储料腔上下抖动，对储料腔内部的茶叶进行翻转，使得茶叶在萎凋时受热更加均匀，使得茶叶萎凋的品质更好，也提高了该萎凋机在使用时的实用性。

title_abstract: Genetically engineered bacterium Z3 capable of increasing yield of 3 '-sialyllactose and application of genetically engineered bacterium Z3 The invention belongs to the technical field of recombinant microbial genetic engineering, and particularly relates to a genetically engineered bacterium Z3 capable of increasing the yield of 3 '-sialyllactose (3'-SL) and application of the genetically engineered bacterium Z3. According to the method, a high-yield N-acetylneuraminic acid (Neu5Ac) strain 3D6.2 is taken as an original strain, exogenous genes N-acyl neuraminic acid cytidyltransferase NeuA and alpha-2, 3-sialyltransferase Nst are integrated into a bacillus subtilis genome, a beta-galactosidase gene yesZ is knocked out, and a high-yield N-acetylneuraminic acid (Neu5Ac) strain 3D6.2 is obtained by performing high-yield fermentation on key enzymes N-acyl neuraminic acid cytidyltransferase NeuA and alpha-2, 3-sialyltransferase Nst. The 3 '-SL has the advantages that the 3'-SL is used as a raw material, the 3 '-SL Nst is subjected to promoter optimization to obtain the optimal expression quantity, the carbon source in the fermentation culture medium is optimized, and the optimal carbon source for synthesizing the 3'-SL is found, so that the yield of the 3 '-SL through shake-flask fermentation reaches 185.2 mg/L.
title_abstract_original: 一种提高3’-唾液酸乳糖产量的基因工程菌Z3及其应用 本发明属于重组微生物基因工程技术领域，特别是涉及一种提高3’‑唾液酸乳糖(3’‑SL)产量的基因工程菌Z3及其应用。本发明以高产N‑乙酰神经氨酸(Neu5Ac)菌株3D6.2为出发菌株，将外源基因N‑酰基神经氨酸胞苷酰转移酶NeuA和α‑2,3‑唾液酸转移酶Nst整合到枯草芽孢杆菌基因组中，敲除β‑半乳糖苷酶基因yesZ，对关键酶N‑酰基神经氨酸胞苷酰转移酶NeuA和α‑2,3‑唾液酸转移酶Nst进行了启动子优化获得了最优表达量，还对发酵培养基中的碳源进行了优化，寻找对3’‑SL合成最优的碳源，使得摇瓶发酵3’‑SL得产量达到185.2mg/L。

title_abstract: Apparatus for setting a high temperature packer Apparatus for sealing a well bore annulus. A mandrel includes non-elastomeric packer elements disposed thereabout. A first annular piston is received about the mandrel and is slidable upwardly against the packer elements to seal the same in a well bore. A bi-directional slip assembly is disposed about the lower portion of the mandrel and a second annular piston is slidable along the mandrel above the slip assembly for setting the same in response to downward piston action. The mandrel includes a pair of bores for communicating internal mandrel pressure to both pistons. An increase in mandrel pressure causes the first piston to move upwardly thereby sealing the packer elements in the bore and causes the second piston to move downwardly thereby setting the slips.

title_abstract: Tower top cellular communication devices and method for operating the same A communication network (100) and method are provided that reduce loses between a base transceiver station (BTS 102) and an antenna (114). Generally, the network (100) includes a tower (112) having a tower-top (110) on which the antenna (114) is supported, a BTS (102) and a separate amplifier (124) on the tower-top near to the antenna, the amplifier in a communication path between the BTS and the antenna. In one embodiment, the network (100) further includes a backhaul (122) on the tower-top (110) near the antenna (114), the backhaul configured to couple signals between the BTS (102) and a base station controller (BSC 108). Preferably, the backhaul (122) is integrated with the BTS (102). In another version, the backhaul (122) is configured to couple communication signals between the BTS (102) and the BSC (108) via a wireless communication system (128). More preferably, a photovoltaic cell (132) on the tower (112) supplies electrical power to the BTS (102), the amplifier (124) and the backhaul (122), thereby providing a self-contained tower-top node (134).

title_abstract: Screen Assembly A screen assembly that contains a tubular carrier and a gravel pack layer (containing gravel) is run in position in a stage of the well; and the screen assembly is expanded in the stage, an expansion that includes expanding the tubular carrier and the gravel pack layer.
title_abstract_original: Screen Assembly A screen assembly that contains a tubular carrier and a gravel pack layer (containing gravel) is run in position in a stage of the well; and the screen assembly is expanded in the stage, an expansion that includes expanding the tubular carrier and the gravel pack layer.

title_abstract: Screen assembly An apparatus that is usable with a well includes a string and a screen assembly, which is adapted to be run downhole on the string. The screen assembly includes a tubular carrier and a container. The container includes a gravel pack layer that includes gravel. The tubular carrier and the gravel pack layer are adapted to be radially expanded downhole; and the tubular carrier, container and the gravel pack layer are adapted to be run downhole as a unit.

title_abstract: Method for selectively enriching N-terminal serine/threonine peptide fragment The invention relates to a method for selectively enriching an N-terminal serine/threonine peptide fragment in a protein sample enzymatic hydrolysate on the basis of a hydrazide chemical process. The method comprises the following steps: preparing a biological sample, enzymatically hydrolyzing the biological sample by virtue of trypsin and removing a saccharide chain by virtue of a PNGase F enzyme; then, selectively oxidizing a peptide fragment that N-terminal is either serine or threonine in protein enzymatic hydrolysate into a peptide fragment that N-terminal is an aldehyde structure by virtue of sodium periodate, and enriching the oxidized peptide fragment by virtue of a hydrazide material; and finally, conducting LC-MS/MS analysis on the released peptide fragment so as to obtain a peptide fragment and protein identifying result. The method, which just selectively enriches the N-terminal serine/threonine peptide fragment, can be used for simplifying proteome sample enzymatic hydrolysate. The enriching method is simple in principle, easy to operate and high in enriching specificity.
title_abstract_original: 种选择性富集N-端丝氨酸/苏氨酸肽段的方法 本发明涉及种基于酰肼化学法的选择性富集蛋白样品酶解液中N-端丝氨酸/苏氨酸肽段的方法。取生物样品，使用胰蛋白酶Trypsin酶解，并用PNGase F酶去除糖链，然后用高碘酸钠将蛋白酶解液中的N-端为丝氨酸或者苏氨酸的肽段选择性氧化为N-端为醛基结构的肽段，之后利用酰肼材料富集氧化后的肽段并使用盐酸羟胺处理，最后对释放的肽段进行LC-MS/MS分析来获得肽段和蛋白的鉴定结果。由于只选择性富集其中的N-端丝氨酸/苏氨酸肽段，因此可用于蛋白质组样品酶解液的简化。该富集方法原理简单，容易操作，富集特异性高。

title_abstract: Real estate price fluctuation research method based on media effect The invention discloses a real estate price fluctuation research method based on a media effect. The real estate price fluctuation research method comprises the following steps: 1) obtaining real estate price data and initial media effect data through network search; 2) determining final media effect data; 3) utilizing a unit root test to analyze the stability of the final media effect data and the real estate price data, and when the requirements are met, carrying out first-order difference processing to obtain stable time sequence data; 4) determining whether a long-term coordination relationship exists between the media effect and the real estate price, and when the requirement is met, going to the step 5); 5) checking and determining the causal relationship between the media effect andthe real estate price; (6) establishing a VAR model, (7) verifying the stability of the VAR model, and (8) analyzing the impact and influence of different media effect indexes on the real estate price by utilizing a pulse response function in the VAR model. The method can realize accurate prediction of the fluctuation trend of the real estate price.
title_abstract_original: 一种基于媒体效应的房地产价格波动研究方法 本发明公开了一种基于媒体效应的房地产价格波动研究方法，包括以下步骤：1)通过网络搜索获取房地价格数据和初始媒体效应数据；2)确定最终媒体效应数据；3)利用单位根检验分析最终媒体效应数据和房地产价格数据的稳定性，当满足要求时，则进行一阶差分处理，得平稳的时间序列数据；4)确定媒体效应和房地产价格之间是否具有长期协整关系，当满足要求时，则转至步骤5)；5)检验确定媒体效应和房地产价格之间的因果关系；6)建立VAR模型；7)校验VAR模型的稳定性；8)利用VAR模型中的脉冲响应函数分析不同媒体效应指标对房地产价格的冲击和影响，该方法能够实现对房地产价格波动趋势的准确预测。

title_abstract: Image processing apparatus For preventing the occurrence of disjunction among a plurality of images in the magnification index in the main scanning direction, image data delivered from an external device through an input image data connector are converted by a P/S converter into serial data from parallel data, and then stored into a memory by a write controller. When the image data are cached, a read controller starts reading the image data. At the same time, a computation means starts counting time based on information set at a setting means by an external central processing unit. As soon as it reaches the initial insert interval, the read controller suspends reading of image data out of the memory to insert virtual data pixel. In the same procedure, the read controller inserts virtual data pixel at each of the insert intervals counted by the computation means. Image data that have undergone the above processing are delayed by a position correction means to have the plurality of image data aligned to a right positioning, and then transmitted through an output image data connector to an external image generator for printing.

title_abstract: IMAGE PROCESSOR PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To prevent main scanning magnification variation between a plurality of picture data. SOLUTION: An image processor is provided with an image input connection means 1 that can be connected to an outer device, a P/S conversion means 2 which performs serial/parallel conversion of image data, a writing control means 3 controlling the writing of image data, a storage means 4 which is controlled by the writing control means 3 and stores image data, a reading control means 5 reading image data from the storage means 4, a setting means 8 storing control information designated by an outer central processing unit, an operation means 7 calculating the addition time of an image in a prescribed pixel unit on the basis of the setting information of the setting means 8, a position correction means 6 adjusting the output timing of image data and an image output connection means 9 transmitting image data which are image processed to the outer device.

title_abstract: Sweet potato noodles and preparation method thereof The invention belongs to the technical field of food processing and particularly relates to sweet potato noodles and a preparation method thereof, mainly solving the technical problems that the existing sweet potato noodles have the defects of single nutrient, insufficient toughness and poor taste. The sweet potato noodles prepared from sweet potato starch, alkali, egg white and water as raw materials have rich nutrients, good toughness and good taste and are green and environment-friendly.
title_abstract_original: 种红薯粉条及其制备方法 本发明属于食品加工技术领域，具体涉及种红薯粉条及其制备方法，主要解决了现有红薯粉条存在营养单、韧性不足和口感差的技术问题。本发明以红薯淀粉、碱、蛋清和水为原料，制成的红薯粉条营养丰富、韧性好和口感好，绿色环保。

title_abstract: Method for producing beer containing antioxidants
title_abstract_original: Method for producing beer containing antioxidants

title_abstract: Method for producing beer containing antioxidants PURPOSE: A method for producing beer containing antioxidants is provided to prevent fermentation from being inhibited by antioxidants by regulating oxygen supply and sufficiently supplying yeast. CONSTITUTION: A method for producing beer containing antioxidants comprises the steps of: (1) heating a mixture of 30 to 150g/l of malt extract, 30 to 200g/l of starch syrup and 1 to 7 g/l of hop pellet at 100 deg. C for 0.5 to 1.5 hours and cooling the mixture to 2 to 25 deg. C; (2) inserting the malt extract mixture and a medicinal herb extract containing antioxidants into a fermenting vessel and supplying oxygen thereto using an air pump with a filter; (3) adding yeast into the fermenting vessel, blocking the oxygen supply using an air lock, and fermenting the mixture at 10 to 18 deg. C for 4 to 7 days; and (4) maturing the cultured medium at 0 to 2 deg. C for 3 to 7 days.
title_abstract_original: 항산화물질을 함유하는 맥주의 제조방법 본 발명은 맥주의 제조 공정 중 발효 공정에서 산소의 공급을 조절하고 효모를 충분히 공급하는 단계를 포함하여 항산화물질에 의한 발효 저해 현상을 극복함으로써 항산화물질의 함량을 증가시킨 맥주를 제조하는 방법에 관한 것이다. 본 발명의 맥주 제조방법에 따라 제조된 맥주는 맛과 향이 우수할 뿐만 아니라 기존의 맥주와 비교하여 항산화물질이 보다 다량으로 함유되어 있고, 항산화 활성 또한 높다는 이점이 있다.

title_abstract: SINGLE USE SETTING TOOL FOR ACTUATING A TOOL IN A WELLBORE A single use setting tool and associated method for actuating a tool in a wellbore may include an inner piston with an annular wall defining a piston cavity. A portion of the inner piston including the piston cavity may be positioned within a central bore of an outer sleeve, and the inner piston and the outer sleeve may be slidable relative to one another. A portion of the inner piston may extend beyond an end of the outer sleeve and have a shock absorbing wedge positioned thereon, and the end of the outer sleeve may have a cutout for receiving the shock absorbing wedge. A bi-directional gas-generating power charge may be positioned in the piston cavity and include a power charge having a booster positioned in an indentation adjacent each of a first end and a second end of the power charge.

title_abstract: METHOD FOR PREPARING HYDROLYZED SOLUTION OF SEA ALGAE CONTAINING DEPOLYMERIZED FUCOIDAN PURPOSE: A method for preparing a macroalgae extract containing low-molecularized fucoidan is provided to simplify a process without the separating and desalting steps of a polysaccharide breakdown enzyme. CONSTITUTION: A method for preparing a macroalgae extract containing low-molecularized fucoidan comprises the following steps of: adding Gamma-proteobacteria DS-01(KCTC-SD1006) culture fluid or enzyme liquid separated from the culture fluid to macroalgae; inducing the reaction under the condition of 30~45°C and pH 5~6 for 24-48 hours; filtering the generated enzyme reaction liquid; and obtaining the macroalgae extract containing low-molecularized fucoidan.

title_abstract: APPARATUS FOR CLOCKING DIGITAL DATA 1355495 Digital transmission; synchronizing A C COSSOR Ltd 18 Aug 1971 [18 Aug 1970] 39797/70 Heading H4P To reconcile the phase of clock pulses with that of input data, a number of phase displaced clock synchronous wave forms are generated, one of which is selected nearest to the phase of input data. Such arrangement is particularly suitable for equipment having a delay line the characteristics of which may change with time and/or temperature. The arrangement may be applied to various types of data modulation, i.e. NRZ, RZ, bipolar or phase reversal. The input data clocked by a timing system 18 is passed through a delay line 12 and buffer stage 20 which may be a limiting amplifier or an amplifier followed by a Schmidt trigger circuit, the output being clocked to a flip-flop 22, e.g. D type before entering a utilization apparatus 16. If the output 28 of system 18 is fixed and passed directly to a flip-flop 22, while some tolerance in the instance of arrival between these pulses and those from delay line 12 is permissible, at some point errors will occur. This system is known in the art. The disclosure resides in the provision of a number of phase displaced pulse trains synchronized with timing system 18, an appropriate train being selected by a decoder 48 and passed by line 26 to flip-flop 22. Selection is determined by a differentiator 36 which is sensitive to either negative or positive going edges from buffer 20 and produces negative going spikes at its output which are applied to an R-S flip-flop formed by gates 38, 40 also receiving pulses 28, the output being passed through an AND gate 46 enabled only when R-S is reset, thus after the reference pulse has finished a counter 44 will be pulsed through its states starting from zero which will continue until a spike from differentiator 36 resets R-S which locks the clockpulses to the counter thus the count is indicative of the interval between the back edge of the reference pulse and the next positive or negative data edge respectively. The count is recognized by decoder 48 and the appropriate input from 18 is selected and routed to flip-flop 22. Differentiator 36 may be omitted but the amount of compensation possible will be reduced. As the timing of flip-flop 22 is arbitrary with reference to the clock pulses in the block 16, a second flip-flop 32 may be inserted and receives a signal of constant phase displacement from system 18. As the short term stability of a delay line is normally good, reference pulses may be applied with relative infrequency. A simpler arrangement is described with reference to Fig. 3 (not shown). Data is circulated round a delay line twice i.e. incoming bits are interleaved with bits circulating a second time and split at the output of the line by two flip-flops, which are clocked with different pulses; a compensation circuit may be adapted to this type of configuration. This employs a third flip-flop (52) and a switch (54) which diverts alternate ones of double rate pulses to flip-flop (52) and the other alternate ones to flipflop 22.

title_abstract: Nucleic acid preserving fluid universally used for various samples The invention discloses a nucleic acid preserving fluid universally used for various samples. The nucleic acid preserving fluid contains the following solutes: 2-8 M of guanidine hydrochloride, 5-10 mM of Tris-HCl, 0.5-10 mM of EDTA (Ethylene Diamine Tetraacetic Acid), 0.5-1.0 g/100ml of NaCl, 0.5-10 g/100ml of N-methyl-N-cyclohexyl-2-amino-3,5-dibromobenzylamine hydrochloride. The nucleic acid preserving fluid mainly has the following three advantages: (1) the nucleic acid preserving fluid cracks cells and/or viruses to promote protein denaturation, so that the viruses are inactivated, and the nucleic acid preserving fluid has good safety; (2) the nucleic acid preserving fluid is universally suitable for various samples; and (3) long-term preservation of nucleic acid can be realized.
title_abstract_original: 一种通用于多种样本的核酸保存液 本发明公开了一种通用于多种样本的核酸保存液。本发明提供了一种核酸保存液，含有如下溶质：盐酸胍2‑8M，Tris‑HCl 5‑10mM，EDTA 0.5‑10mM，NaCl 0.5‑1.0g/100ml，N‑甲基‑N‑环己基‑2‑氨基‑3,5‑二溴苯甲胺盐酸盐0.5‑10g/100ml。本发明提供的核酸保存液，主要有三个优势：(1)裂解细胞和/或病毒，促使蛋白变性，使得病毒被灭活，从而具有良好的安全性；(2)通用适用于多种样本；(3)可以实现核酸的长期保存。

title_abstract: LINE IDENTIFICATION SYSTEM PURPOSE:To identify own line from other lines with a miniaturized small scale circuit by providing a code shift means shifting each scramble code respectively by a prescribed shift amount to set a shift amount differently for the own line from the other lines. CONSTITUTION:A fixed code series, e.g., a frame synchronism code generated from a frame code generating circuit 1 is used for a line identification bit system in a transmitter, a scramble code generated at a scramble code generating circuit 3 is shifted by a n-stage of shift register circuit 20, where the codes are scrambled and transmitted. The line identification bit train in a descrambled signal is compared with a frame synchronism signal outputted from a frame synchronism code generating circuit 1' at a comparator circuit 8 of the receiver. When the receiver of the own line receives a signal of other lines, since the signal is descrambled with the scramble code shifted by n-bit and the line identification bit string is not coincident with the frame synchronism code, it is decided that the signal is a signal of other lines by the comparator circuit 8.

title_abstract: VALVE ELEMENT FOR DRILLING ELEMENTS, DRILLING ELEMENTS AND METHOD FOR ASSEMBLING THE VALVE ELEMENT TO DRILLING ELEMENTS Valve element (2) for selectively opening and closing both a radial aperture (84) and an axial hole (82) comprised in a drilling element (8) for drilling mud circulation. The valve element (2) comprises: a fixing portion (22) adapted to allow the valve element (2) to be sealingly fixed to the drilling element (8) at said radial aperture (84); a body (3) comprising an inlet aperture (3A) and an outlet aperture (3B), and a duct (31) for putting such apertures (3A, 3B) in communication with each other, thereby defining a path for the drilling mud; a plug (5) adapted to selectively seal said inlet aperture (3A); a first sealing element (7), adapted to be positioned in a housing (86) formed in the axial hole (82) of the drilling element (8); and a shutter (4), pivoted to the body (3) and comprising a second sealing element (42), adapted to selectively and sealingly close said outlet aperture (3B) of the body (3). The shutter (4) is adapted to selectively and sealingly close said axial hole (82) by abutting against said first sealing element (7). The valve element (2) is designed in a manner such that said shutter (4) is adapted to keep said outlet aperture (3B) of the body (3) normally closed.

title_abstract: VALVE ELEMENT FOR DRILLING ELEMENTS, DRILLING ELEMENTS AND METHOD FOR ASSEMBLING THE VALVE ELEMENT TO DRILLING ELEMENTS A valve element selectively opens and closes a radial aperture and an axial hole in a drilling element for drilling mud circulation. The valve element includes a fixing portion allowing the valve element to sealingly fix to the drilling element at the radial aperture. A body has an inlet aperture and an outlet aperture, and a duct for putting the apertures in communication with each other, defining a path for the drilling mud. A plug selectively seals the inlet aperture. A first sealing element is positioned in a housing formed in the axial hole of the drilling element. A shutter pivoted to the body includes a second sealing element to selectively and sealingly close the outlet aperture. The shutter selectively and sealingly closes the axial hole by abutting against the first sealing element. The valve element is adapted to keep the outlet aperture of the body normally closed.

title_abstract: Fermented grain turning and cylinder inverting device in vinegar brewing process The present invention discloses a fermented grain turning and cylinder inverting device in a vinegar brewing process. The fermented grain turning and cylinder inverting device comprises bilaterally symmetrical clamping rods, the clamping rods are internally provided with a clamping device, each clamping device comprises clamping rotating rods which can rotate oppositely, bilaterally symmetrical abutting balls and clamping balls are fixedly arranged on each clamping rotating rod, the clamping balls are positioned at lower sides of the abutting balls, two fermentation cylinders are arranged at lower sides of the clamping rods, the device can be clamped on the two adjacent fermentation cylinders, vinegar fermented grains in the fermentation cylinder are conveyed into the other fermentation cylinder by rotation, horizontal movement and lifting of a movable rod, besides, an air extractor is cooperated to convey all the vinegar fermented grains out, waste is reduced, at the same time, conveying uniformity enables the vinegar fermented grains to conduct uniform aerobic reaction, speed and comprehensiveness of fermentation are improved, and besides, the device can be automatically turned over to carry out fermented grain turning on the two fermentation cylinders of the next group, does not need manual operation, and is convenient to use and high in efficiency.
title_abstract_original: 一种醋酿造过程中的翻赔倒缸装置 本发明公开的一种醋酿造过程中的翻赔倒缸装置，包括左右对称的夹持杆，所述夹持杆内设有夹持装置，所述夹持装置包括可相向转动的夹持转杆，所述夹持转杆上固定安装有左右对称的抵接球及夹持球，所述夹持球位于所述抵接球下侧位置，所述夹持杆下侧排列放置有两个发酵缸，本发明可夹持于相邻的两个发酵缸上，通过可输入醋赔的移动杆的转动、水平移动及升降将发酵缸内的醋赔输送至另一个发酵缸内，且配合抽气装置使得醋赔的全部输送，减少浪费，同时，输送的均匀性使得醋赔进行均匀的有氧反应，提高发酵的速度与全面性，其次，此装置可自动进行翻转，对下一组的两个发酵缸进行翻赔工作，无需人工操作，其使用便利，效率高。

title_abstract: Chat mode processing method and device for video conference and storage medium The embodiment of the invention provides a chat mode processing method and device for a video conference, and the method comprises the steps: receiving chat mode starting and stopping information of the video conference from a conference scheduling management application program; storing corresponding flag bit information in a database according to the chat mode start-stop information; reading flag bit information from the database after the conference management scheduling system is restarted; and setting the chat mode of the video conference according to the flag bit information. Even if the conference scheduling management system is restarted accidentally, the flag bit information stored in the database cannot be lost, so that after the conference scheduling management system is restarted, the flag bit information can be read from the database, and then the chat mode of the video conference is recovered according to the flag bit information. The situation that an administrator resets the chat mode of the video conference through the conference scheduling management application program is avoided, and the operation steps of the administrator are simplified.
title_abstract_original: 一种视频会议的聊天模式处理方法、装置和存储介质 本发明实施例提供了一种视频会议的聊天模式处理方法和装置，其中，所述方法包括：从会议调度管理应用程序接收视频会议的聊天模式启停信息；根据聊天模式启停信息在数据库中存储对应的标志位信息；当会议管理调度系统重启之后从数据库中读取标志位信息；根据标志位信息设置视频会议的聊天模式。即使会议调度管理系统意外重启，存储在数据库中的标志位信息也不会丢失，以便会议调度管理系统在重启之后，可以从数据库中读取出标志位信息，进而根据标志位信息恢复视频会议的聊天模式，避免管理员通过会议调度管理应用程序重新设置视频会议的聊天模式，简化了管理员的操作步骤。
Fremgangsmåde til fremstilling af 1-methyl-2-isopropyl-5-nitro-imidazol.

title_abstract: A novel imidazole derivative and a novel intermediate therefor The invention comprises the compounds 1-methyl-2-isopropyl-5-nitroimidazole and 2-isopropyl-4(or 5)-nitroimidazole. These compounds may be obtained by nitrating 2-isopropylimidazole and methylating the resulting compound. Veterinary compositions useful in the treatment of turkey blackhead disease and in combatting other protozoal infections, which may be administered orally mixed with the feed ration or drinking water and may be formulated as a premix or feed supplement or as tablets or capsules, contain 1-methyl-2-isopropyl-5-nitroimidazole as the active ingredient.
