title_abstract: Barley leaf rust resistant protein as well as coding gene and application thereof The invention discloses a protein related to barley leaf rust resistance as well as a coding gene and application thereof. The protein provided by the invention is protein A and/or protein B, wherein the protein A is a protein described as the sequence 1 or a leaf rust resistance-related protein of which the amino acid sequence is replaced and/or deleted and/or added through one or more amino acid residues; the protein B is a protein described as the sequence 2 or a leaf rust resistance-related protein of which the amino acid sequence is replaced and/or deleted and/or added through one or more amino acid residues. Experiment results prove that the transgenic barley plant simultaneously expressing Rlr1 gene and Rlr2 gene has obviously enhanced resistance for leaf rust; the barley leaf rust resistant protein has a wide market and application prospect in the industrial fields of genetic improvement of cash crops, particularly barley.

大麦抗叶锈病蛋白及其编码基因与应用 本发明公开了与大麦抗叶锈病相关的蛋白及其编码基因与应用。本发明所提供的蛋白质，为蛋白质A和/或蛋白质B；所述蛋白质A为序列1所示的蛋白质或其氨基酸序列经过个或几个氨基酸残基的取代和/或缺失和/或添加，且与抗叶锈病相关的蛋白质；所述蛋白质B为序列2所示的蛋白质或其氨基酸序列经过个或几个氨基酸残基的取代和/或缺失和/或添加，且与抗叶锈病相关的蛋白质。实验证明，同时表达Rlr1基因和Rlr2基因的转基因大麦植株，其对叶锈病的抗性明显加强。本发明在经济作物，特别大麦的遗传改良等行业领域具有广阔的市场和应用前景。

title_abstract: AUTOMATIC EQUALIZER PURPOSE:To make broader the field of application to the modulator which simultaneously delivers analog and digital information, by detecting the digital and analog information correctly in separation through the removal of the waveform distortion in the delivery line automatically. CONSTITUTION:In the method simultaneously delivering digital and analog information through the use of the radiation mapping method extending the orthogonal amplitude modulation which amplitude-modulates two carriers of sinusoidal and cosine waves at the same time, the delay elements 3 to 6 inputting the two base band signals with two axis synchronous detection from the terminals 1 and 2 are provided and the two dimension bridge type variable attenuators 13 to 15 inputting the output of the elements 3 to 6 are provided. Further, the output of the attenuators 13 to 15 is added to the adders 16 and 21, the sum of the real and imaginary part of the output of the attenuators 13 to 15 is obtained. The output is fed to the estimation unit 27 estimating the digital data to discriminate the polarity. The result of discrimination and the output of the adders 16, 21 are added to the tap gain correction circuit 23, and the output of the circuit 23 is fed to the attenuators 13 to 15 respectively.

title_abstract: COMPUTER IMPLEMENTED METHOD FOR DETERMINING LIENHOLDER IDENTITY AND MAKING A SHORT SALE OFFER A system and method for identifying a lienholder and making a short sale offer. Examples include a user interface, in which prospective buyers may submit queries to browse listed properties and submit bids and a lienholder determination component configured to ascertain property and lien information. Further examples can include an offer submission interface through which short sale offers may ultimately be submitted.

title_abstract: Method for controlling flowering time by regulating of SVP-FLM-β protein complex formation The present invention relates to a method of controlling the flowering time of a plant by regulating the formation of the SVP-FLM-β protein complex, based on the finding that the SVP-FLM-β protein complex is a regulating factor for plant flowering that senses small changes in ambient temperature. The FLM-β RNAi and SVP RNAi for controlling flowering time according to the present invention can be used to control flowering time by inhibiting the expression of FLM-β and SVP or regulating the interaction therebetween, and thus, they can prevent a decrease in crop production or a change in the ecosystem from being caused by a sudden change in temperature.

title_abstract_original: SVP-FLM-β 단백질 복합체의 형성 조절을 통한 식물의 개화시기 조절 방법 본 발명은 SVP-FLM-β 단백질 복합체가 주위 온도의 작은 변화를 감지하는 식물 개화 조절인자임을 규명한 것에 기초하여, SVP-FLM-β 단백질 복합체 형성을 조절하여 식물의 개화시기를 조절하는 방법에 관한 것이다. 본 발명의 개화 조절용 FLM-β RNAi 및 SVP RNAi를 이용하여 FLM-β와 SVP의 발현억제 또는 상호작용을 조절함으로써, 개화시기를 조절하여 갑작스런 기온 변화에 따른 작물 생산성 저하 및 생태계 변화를 막을 수 있는 효과가 있다.

The FLM-β RNAi and SVP RNAi for controlling flowering time according to the present invention can be used to control flowering time by inhibiting the expression of FLM-β and SVP or regulating the interaction therebetween, and thus, they can prevent a decrease in crop production or a change in the ecosystem from being caused by a sudden change in temperature.

The FLM-β RNAi and SVP RNAi for controlling flowering time according to the present invention can be used to control flowering time by inhibiting the expression of FLM-β and SVP or regulating the interaction therebetween, and thus, they can prevent a decrease in crop production or a change in the ecosystem from being caused by a sudden change in temperature.

title_abstract: METHOD FOR CONTROLLING FLOWERING TIME BY REGULATING OF SVP-FLM-BETA PROTEIN COMPLEX FORMATION The present invention relates to a method for controlling flowering time by regulating formation of an SVP-FLM-β protein complex based on identification that the SVP-FLM-β protein complex is a plant flowering regulating factor, which senses subtle change in the surrounding temperature. According to the present invention, flowering time is controlled by inhibiting expression of FLM-β and SVP or regulating interaction between FLM-β and SVP by using FLM-β RNAi and SVP RNAi for controlling flowering. Therefore, decrease in crop productivity and environmental change caused by sudden temperature change can be prevented.

title_abstract: Data Transmission Method and a Rfid Reader Provided With a Coil and a Control Circuit For Field Quenching Outside of a Communication Area The present invention relates to a method, a reading device and a system for transmitting data and/or energy between a reading device and a transponder unit. Via a first antenna coil of the reading device generating a first magnetic field data and/or energy are transmitted to the transponder unit. By means of a second antenna coil a second magnetic field with opposite sign is generated. Within a near field or communication range ( 12 ) of the reading device the second magnetic field is weaker than the first magnetic field. In a tap-proof range ( 13 ), i.e. outside the near field, the two magnetic fields have the same absolute value and cancel each other out due to the opposite signs.

Datenübertragungsverfahren und RFID-Lesegerät Die vorliegende Erfindung betrifft ein Verfahren, ein Lesegerät und ein System zur Übertragung von Daten und/oder Energie zwischen dem Lesegerät und einer Transpondereinheit. Über eine ein erstes Magnetfeld erzeugende erste Antennenspule des Lesegeräts werden Daten und/oder Energie an die Transpondereinheit übertragen. Mittels einer zweiten Antennenspule wird ein zweites Magnetfeld mit umgekehrtem Vorzeichen erzeugt. Innerhalb eines Nahbereichs bzw. Kommunikationsbereichs (12) des Lesegeräts ist das zweite Magnetfeld schwächer als das erste Magnetfeld. In einem abhörsicheren Bereich (13), d. h. außerhalb des Nahbereichs, besitzen die beiden Magnetfelder den gleichen Betrag und löschen sich aufgrund der unterschiedlichen Vorzeichen aus.

title_abstract: Program push method, set-top box and electronic program guide
title_abstract_original: Program push method, set-top box and electronic program guide

title_abstract: PROGRAM DELIVERY METHOD, SET-TOP BOX AND ELECTRONIC PROGRAM GUIDE A program delivery method, Set-Top Box (STB) and Electronic Program Guide (EPG) are provided in the present disclosure. The method includes the following steps: the STB sends a request message for downloading a program to the EPG according to the program selected by a user (S102); the STB receives information of a Content Delivery Network (CDN) agent transmitted from the EPG and saves the information of the CDN agent and the program download task in a download queue (S104); the STB executes the download according to the download queue (S106). The present disclosure achieves effects of reducing the load of streaming media servers and the communication network and improving user experience.
title_abstract_original: PROCÉDÉ DE LIVRAISON DE PROGRAMMES, BOÎTIER DÉCODEUR ET GUIDE DE PROGRAMME ÉLECTRONIQUE La présente invention se rapporte à un procédé de livraison de programmes, à un boîtier décodeur (STB) et à un guide de programme électronique (EPG). Le procédé selon l'invention comprend les étapes suivantes : le STB envoie un message de requête de téléchargement d'un programme au EPG sur la base du programme choisi par un utilisateur (S102); le STB reçoit des informations d'un agent de réseau de livraison de contenu (CDN) transmises par l'EPG et enregistre les informations de l'agent CDN et la tâche de téléchargement de programme dans une file d'attente de téléchargement (S104); le STB exécute le téléchargement conformément à la file d'attente de téléchargement (S106). La présente invention permet de réduire la charge sur les serveurs de données multimédia diffusées en continu et sur le réseau de communication. Elle permet en outre d'améliorer les sensations de l'utilisateur.

title_abstract: Program push method, set-top box and electronic program guide The invention discloses a program push method, a set-top box and an electronic program guide. The method comprises the following steps: the set-top box sends program download request information to the electronic program guide in accordance with the programs selected by a user; the set-top box receives the information of a content delivery network agent sent by the electronic program guide and stores the information and the download tasks of the programs in a download queue; and the set-top box implements downloading according to the download queue. The invention achieves the effects of lightening the burdens of the streaming media server and the communication network and improving the user experience.

title_abstract: BREAD PRODUCTION METHOD FIELD: food industry.SUBSTANCE: invention relates to baking industry. Bread production method includes preparation of raw material, recipe components mixing to produce dough, fermentation and baking, wherein components are used in ratio (pts.wt): 1 grade wheat flour - 95, bean proteins concentrate (powder) - 5, culinary food salt - 1.3, pressed yeast - 1. Proposed bread production method with addition of bean proteins concentrate provides high nutritional value due to proteins balanced composition by amino acids: lysine, threonine, tryptophane, which are limiting amino acids in composition of traditional bakery products.EFFECT: optimum amounts of indispensable amino acids in bean proteins concentrate and their action in such doses may be preventive for human body acetic-alkali equilibrium maintenance.1 cl, 3 tbl, 1 dwg
title_abstract_original: СПОСОБ ПРОИЗВОДСТВА ХЛЕБА Изобретение относится к хлебопекарной промышленности. Способ производства хлеба включает подготовку сырья, смешивание рецептурных компонентов с получением теста, выбраживание и выпечку, при этом компоненты используют в соотношении (масс.ч.): мука пшеничная 1/с - 95, концентрат белков фасоли (порошок) - 5, поваренная соль пищевая - 1,3, дрожжи прессованные - 1. Предлагаемый способ производства хлеба с добавлением концентрата белков фасоли позволяет обеспечить высокую пищевую ценность за счет сбалансированного состава белков по аминокислотам: лизину, треонину, триптофану, являющиеся лимитирующими аминокислотами в составе традиционных хлебобулочных изделий. Оптимальные количества незаменимых аминокислот в концентрате белков фасоли и их действие в таких дозах может быть профилактическим для поддержания кислотно-щелочного равновесия организма человека. 3 табл., 1 ил.

title_abstract:
MOVING IMAGE CODING DEVICE, AND MOVING IMAGE CODING METHOD

PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To utilize coding parameters of MPEG2 when determining coding parameters newly introduced in H.264.

SOLUTION: A moving image coding device includes: a decoding part 10 for decoding MPEG2 streams; a coding parameter extraction part 11 for extracting a coding parameter of MPEG2 from the MPEG2 streams; a coding parameter re-determination part 12 for determining the strength of correlation between image data coded by MPEG2 and its reference image on the basis of the coding parameter of MPEG2 extracted by the coding parameter extraction part 11 and determining a coding parameter of H.264 on the basis of the determination result; and a coding part 13 for using the coding parameter of H.264 determined by the coding parameter re-determination part 12 to code image data decoded by the decoding part 10, by H.264.

title_abstract: MOVING PICTURE CODING APPARATUS AND MOVING PICTURE CODING METHOD The moving picture coding apparatus according to the present invention includes: a decoding unit 10 which decodes an MPEG2 stream; a coding parameter extracting unit 11 which extracts a coding parameter of MPEG2 from the MPEG stream; a re-coding parameter determining unit 12 which judges, based on the coding parameter of MPEG2 extracted by the coding parameter extracting unit 11 , the degree of correlation between image data coded in MPEG2 and its reference picture and determines a coding parameter of H.264 based on the result of the judgment; and a coding unit 13 which codes, in H.264, the image data decoded by the decoding unit 10 , using the coding parameter of H.264 determined by the re-coding parameter determining unit 12.
title_abstract_original: MOVING PICTURE CODING APPARATUS AND MOVING PICTURE CODING METHOD The moving picture coding apparatus according to the present invention includes: a decoding unit 10 which decodes an MPEG2 stream; a coding parameter extracting unit 11 which extracts a coding parameter of MPEG2 from the MPEG stream; a re-coding parameter determining unit 12 which judges, based on the coding parameter of MPEG2 extracted by the coding parameter extracting unit 11 , the degree of correlation between image data coded in MPEG2 and its reference picture and determines a coding parameter of H.264 based on the result of the judgment; and a coding unit 13 which codes, in H.264, the image data decoded by the decoding unit 10 , using the coding parameter of H.264 determined by the re-coding parameter determining unit 12.

title_abstract: Fermentation composition for preparing plant enzymes having effects of prevention and regulation of high blood pressure, hyperlipidemia and hyperglycemia and daily maintenance and preparation method The invention provides a fermentation composition for preparing plant enzymes having effects of prevention and regulation of high blood pressure, hyperlipidemia and hyperglycemia and daily maintenance. The fermentation composition is composed of functional oligosaccharide, probiotics and traditional Chinese medicine extract. A method for preparing the fermentation composition and the prepared plant enzymes are further provided. The fermentation composition is a novel fermentation product and is a fermentation fungi bag for preparing the enzymes, and the fungi bag is convenient to use and suitable for industrial production and family manufacture of various plant enzymes.
title_abstract_original: 制备具有预防调理高血压、高血脂、高血糖及日常养护功效植物酵素的发酵组合物及制法 本发明提供了制备具有预防调理高血压、高血脂、高血糖及日常养护功效植物酵素的发酵组合物，由功能性低聚糖、益生菌和中药提取物组成；还提供了发酵组合物制备方法及其制备的植物酵素。该发酵组合物为新型发酵产品，是用于制备酵素的“发酵菌包”，该菌包使用方便，适宜各类植物酵素的工业化生产。

title_abstract: SYSTEMS AND METHODS FOR ENTITY REGISTRATION AND MANAGEMENT The disclosed embodiments contemplate an electronic storage system able to be rapidly deployed and subsequently used to receive and organize data entries. The system comprises a knowledge schema able to organize entries into a coherent form facilitating revision and review. The system may be implemented across a computer network such that users from a variety of locations may asynchronously review and update the database.

title_abstract: User access information processing method and device and terminal equipment The invention is suitable for the technical field of information processing, and provides a user access information processing method and device, and terminal equipment, and the method comprises the steps: obtaining a public platform identification of a user under the condition that the user is detected to access a target application program through a public platform; and under the condition of determining that the user accesses the target application program for the first time based on the public platform identifier, determining the service personnel to which the user belongs and the association relationship with the service personnel according to the path of accessing the target application program by the user. According to the invention, the user is bound with the service personnel, andthe association relationship is established between the user and the corresponding service personnel, so that information guidance can be provided for the service personnel to maintain the customer relationship with the user.
title_abstract_original: 用户访问信息处理方法、装置及终端设备 本申请适用于信息处理技术领域，提供了用户访问信息处理方法、装置及终端设备，该用户访问信息处理方法包括：在检测到用户通过公众平台访问目标应用程序的情况下，获取所述用户的公众平台标识；在基于所述公众平台标识确定所述用户为首次访问所述目标应用程序的情况下，根据所述用户访问所述目标应用程序的途径，确定所述用户所属的服务人员及与所述服务人员的关联关系。本申请将用户与服务人员进行绑定，并为用户与对应服务人员之间建立关联关系，能够为服务人员维护与该用户的客户关系提供信息指导。

房产交易税费自动对比方法及装置 本发明提供了一种房产交易税费自动对比方法及装置，其中，方法包括：接收经纪人输入的经纪人ID、客户证件ID、客户手机号以及房屋属性参数；根据所述房屋属性参数以及与各税种对应的预设计算模型分别对应计算各税种的税费预估值；接收经纪人输入的交易单编号、经纪人选择的税种以及经纪人上传的与选择的税种对应的税费缴纳单；对上传的税费缴纳单进行图像识别，以获取税费缴纳单上的实际缴费金额；将获取的税费预估值与获取的实际缴费金额进行对比计算出与经纪人选择的税种对应的税费差额。本发明能够自动完成税费对比，从而提高了工作效率。

title_abstract: Real estate transaction tax fee automatic comparison method and apparatus The invention provides a real estate transaction tax fee automatic comparison method and apparatus. The method comprises the steps of receiving a broker ID, a client certificate ID, a client mobile phone number and housing attribute parameters input by a broker; according to the housing attribute parameters and preset calculation models corresponding to tax categories, correspondingly calculatingtax fee estimation values of the tax categories; receiving a transaction ticket number input by the broker, a tax category selected by the broker and a tax fee payment ticket corresponding to the selected tax category and uploaded by the broker; performing image identification on the uploaded tax fee payment ticket to obtain an actual fee payment amount on the tax fee payment ticket; and comparingthe obtained tax fee estimation value with the obtained actual fee payment amount to calculate out tax fee balance corresponding to the tax category selected by the broker. The tax fee comparison canbe automatically finished, so that the working efficiency is improved.
title_abstract_original: 房产交易税费自动对比方法及装置 本发明提供了种房产交易税费自动对比方法及装置，其中，方法包括：接收经纪人输入的经纪人ID、客户证件ID、客户手机号以及房屋属性参数；根据所述房屋属性参数以及与各税种对应的预设计算模型分别对应计算各税种的税费预估值；接收经纪人输入的交易单编号、经纪人选择的税种以及经纪人上传的与选择的税种对应的税费缴纳单；对上传的税费缴纳单进行图像识别，以获取税费缴纳单上的实际缴费金额；将获取的税费预估值与获取的实际缴费金额进行对比计算出与经纪人选择的税种对应的税费差额。本发明能够自动完成税费对比，从而提高了工作效率。

title_abstract: A real estate mediating system and method
title_abstract_original: A real estate mediating system and method

title_abstract: A REAL ESTATE MEDIATING SYSTEM AND METHOD PURPOSE: A system for transmitting and registering real estate for sale, and a method thereof are provided to obtain information about a buyer who registers real estate of a seller as interesting real estate and accommodation agencies which is registered with real estate of a seller. CONSTITUTION: A joint relay server(101) manages real estate information registered in an accommodation agency. A normal transaction server(102) copies information about real estate registered in the joint relay server and a transaction information server. The normal transaction server registers the information copied. The joint relay server sets a condition of an accommodation agency about real estate which a general personal member registers and registers real estate. The joint relay server searches the accommodation agency corresponding to the preset condition among accommodation agencies registered.

title_abstract: Microservice based multi-device coordinated user experience Techniques are described for providing a simultaneous, multi-device user experience that employs computing devices with varying capabilities for data input and/or data output, using a microservice-based architecture. A user may register multiple devices with a service, which determines capabilities of the devices for data input and/or output. During a communication session involving the user and another user, such as a service representative, the service may receive input data collected through device(s) and/or provide output data to be presented on the same or other device(s), where such data input and data output is received and provided according to the input/output capabilities of the various devices. The data input and/or output may switch from device to device during a session. In some instances, data may be replicated for presentation through multiple devices simultaneously. Interactions with each device may be through a microservice that is associated with the device and/or its device type.

title_abstract: Mobile underground suction conveyor equipment The vacuum equipment has a suction nozzle (10) that is provided with wetting holes (11) near to the suction openings. The blower (4) has a flow delivery speed of 120 to 180 ms<-1> in the region of the suction nozzle. The separator is a cyclone (6) with a viscous material pump (9), and silencer (8) is arranged in the exhaust air duct (15). The wetting holes are joined to a water connection (12) and are arranged in a circular fashion around the suction openings of the nozzle.
title_abstract_original: Mobile underground suction conveyor equipment The vacuum equipment has a suction nozzle (10) that is provided with wetting holes (11) near to the suction openings. The blower (4) has a flow delivery speed of 120 to 180 ms<-1> in the region of the suction nozzle. The separator is a cyclone (6) with a viscous material pump (9), and silencer (8) is arranged in the exhaust air duct (15). The wetting holes are joined to a water connection (12) and are arranged in a circular fashion around the suction openings of the nozzle.

一种餐饮业用馒头制造设备 本发明涉及一种制造设备，尤其涉及一种餐饮业用馒头制造设备。技术问题：提供一种能够实现自动搅拌和切割，省时省力的餐饮业用馒头制造设备。技术方案如下：一种餐饮业用馒头制造设备，包括有承重板和承重桌，承重板一侧设有承重桌；往复机构，承重板和承重桌之间设有往复机构；切割机构，承重桌上设有切割机构。通过往复机构和切割机构之间的配合，可以实现自动将物料进行挤压和切割成小块，便于制作馒头。

title_abstract: Manufacture device for steamed bun in catering industry The invention relates to a manufacture device, in particular to a manufacture device for steamed bun in catering industry. A technical problem is to provide a manufacture device for steamed bun in catering industry. The manufacture device for steamed bun in catering industry realizes automatic stirring and cutting, and is time-saving and labor-saving. A technical scheme is as follows: a manufacture device for steamed bun in catering industry comprises a bearing plate, a bearing table, a reciprocating mechanism and a cutting mechanism; the bearing table is arranged on one side of the bearing plate; the reciprocating mechanism is arranged between the bearing plate and the bearing table; and the cutting mechanism is arranged on the bearing table. Through cooperation of the reciprocating mechanism and the cutting mechanism, materials can be automatically extruded and cut into small blocks, and steamed buns can be conveniently made.
title_abstract_original: 一种餐饮业用馒头制造设备 本发明涉及一种制造设备，尤其涉及一种餐饮业用馒头制造设备。技术问题：提供一种能够实现自动搅拌和切割，省时省力的餐饮业用馒头制造设备。技术方案如下：一种餐饮业用馒头制造设备，包括有承重板和承重桌，承重板一侧设有承重桌；往复机构，承重板和承重桌之间设有往复机构；切割机构，承重桌上设有切割机构。通过往复机构和切割机构之间的配合，可以实现自动将物料进行挤压和切割成小块，便于制作馒头。

title_abstract: Test construction method for studying influence of tunnel local damage on adjacent structure The invention discloses a test construction method for studying the influence of tunnel local damage on adjacent structures, which comprises the following steps: preparing a duct piece manufacturing mold, demolding and maintaining to obtain model duct pieces, and assembling the model duct pieces into a complete tunnel model according to an assembling mode adopted by actual engineering. The model tunnel segments are connected through iron wires of which the diameters are determined according to the similarity ratio; after model tunnel local damage simulation and test are started, the failure positions and number of the duct piece joints are determined in the duct piece joints, the iron wires with the determined positions are connected into a circuit, and high current is applied to the iron wires with the determined positions through related equipment, so that the iron wires are heated and fused, and the failure of the duct piece joints is simulated. According to the method, the failure of any number of joints at any part can be manually controlled at any time, so that the influence of the local damage of the tunnel on the adjacent structure is fully researched. The method not only widens the method for researching such accidents, but also provides a research thought for future research.
title_abstract_original: 一种研究隧道局部破坏对邻近结构影响的试验工法 本发明公开了一种研究隧道局部破坏对邻近结构影响的试验工法，包括制备管片制作模具，通过脱模、养护，从而制得模型管片，将模型管片按照实际工程采用的拼装方式拼装成为完整的隧道模型，模型隧道管片通过直径由相似比确定的铁丝相连；模型隧道局部破坏模拟，试验实施开始后，在管片接头中确定管片接头失效的位置和数量，将确定位置的铁丝接入电路，通过相关设备对确定位置的铁丝施加高电流，从而使铁丝发热而熔断，从而模拟该管片接头处的失效。通过本发明方法可以人为随时控制任意部位、任意数量的接头失效，来充分研究隧道局部破坏对其邻近结构的影响。本方法不仅拓宽了研究此类事故的方法，同时也为以后的研究提供了一种研究思路。

title_abstract: Beer-flavor pork biscuits and making technology thereof The invention discloses beer-flavor pork biscuits and a making technology thereof. The beer-flavor pork biscuits comprise biscuit crusts, the biscuit crusts wrap stuffing, and the beer-flavor pork biscuits are characterized in that the biscuit crusts comprise, by weight, 100 parts of low gluten wheat flour, 50-80 parts of maltose, 15-30 parts of vegetable oil, 15-30 parts of powdered sugar, 1-10 parts of beer, 1-10 parts of water and 0.5-5 parts of beer yeast; the stuffing comprises, by weight, 100 parts of sugar ice pork, 50-90 parts of wax gourd paste, 20-50 parts of white sesame seeds, 10-25 parts of cooked glutinous rice powder, 10-25 parts of barley flour, 1-15 parts of toasted fragrant minced garlic, 1-15 parts of chopped shallots, 1-8 parts of baijiu, 1-8 parts of hop oil and 0.5-4parts of edible salt. The aim is to overcome the defects in the prior art, the beer-flavor pork biscuits are unique in flavor and easy to make, and the making technology of the beer-flavor pork biscuits is provided.
title_abstract_original: 种啤酒味鸡仔饼及其制备工艺 本发明公开了种啤酒味鸡仔饼及其制备工艺，其中啤酒味鸡仔饼包括有饼皮，在饼皮内包裹有馅料，其特征在于：所述饼皮按重量百分比包括以下组分：低筋小麦面粉：麦芽糖：植物油：糖粉：啤酒：水：啤酒酵母＝100:50‑80:15‑30:15‑30:1‑10:1‑10：0.5‑5；所述馅料按重量百分比包括以下组分：糖冰肉：冬瓜蓉：白芝麻：三洋糕粉：大麦面粉：烤香蒜蓉：葱碎：白酒：酒花油：食盐＝100:50‑90:20‑50:10‑25:10‑25:1‑15:1‑15:1‑8:0.5‑4。本发明的目的是为了克服现有技术中的不足之处，提供种制备方法简单，风味独特的啤酒味鸡仔饼及其制备工艺。

title_abstract: Blade composition The invention relates to a blade composition. A blade comprises a stirring rod and stirring blades; the external wall of one end of the stirring rod is provided with stirring blades, the other end of the stirring rod is provided with a thread surface; each stirring blade is folded to form a contacting surface and an enhancing surface; the radial direction of the contacting surface and the axial direction of the stirring rod form an included angle of 30 to 45 degrees; the radial direction of the enhancing surface and the axial direction of the stirring rod form an angle of 90 degrees; the transition between the contacting surface and the enhancing surface is smooth, one end, cooperating with the stirring rod, of the contacting surface is provided with a fixing block (I), the other end of the contacting surface is provided with a fixing block (II), and a wave-shaped elastic structure is arranged between the fixing block (I) and the fixing block (II). The resistance of stirring blade during the working process is reduced by the following means: (1) the stirring blades are folded upwards to form contacting surfaces and enhancing surfaces with certain inclined angles therebetween; (2) the transitions between the contacting surfaces and the enhancing surfaces are smooth; (3) elastic structures are arranged on the stirring blades. Thus solved is the problem that a conventional stirrer with a conventional blade composition has a big resistant force when stirring the fermentation liquid.
title_abstract_original: Blade composition The invention relates to a blade composition. A blade comprises a stirring rod and stirring blades; the external wall of one end of the stirring rod is provided with stirring blades, the other end of the stirring rod is provided with a thread surface; each stirring blade is folded to form a contacting surface and an enhancing surface; the radial direction of the contacting surface and the axial direction of the stirring rod form an included angle of 30 to 45 degrees; the radial direction of the enhancing surface and the axial direction of the stirring rod form an angle of 90 degrees; the transition between the contacting surface and the enhancing surface is smooth, one end, cooperating with the stirring rod, of the contacting surface is provided with a fixing block (I), the other end of the contacting surface is provided with a fixing block (II), and a wave-shaped elastic structure is arranged between the fixing block (I) and the fixing block (II). The resistance of stirring blade during the working process is reduced by the following means: (1) the stirring blades are folded upwards to form contacting surfaces and enhancing surfaces with certain inclined angles therebetween; (2) the transitions between the contacting surfaces and the enhancing surfaces are smooth; (3) elastic structures are arranged on the stirring blades. Thus solved is the problem that a conventional stirrer with a conventional blade composition has a big resistant force when stirring the fermentation liquid.

title_abstract: Live pig feeding method The invention discloses a live pig feeding method. The method comprises the steps of pig farm building, piglet selection, piglet feeding, nursery pig feeding, growing pig feeding and fattening pig feeding. A green belt is planted outside a pig farm, so that outside air can be effectively blocked from entering the pig farm; the freshness of air in the pig farm is better; the opportunity that pigs are in too much contact with polluted air is reduced; thereby being beneficial to the pig health; through fermentation bed breeding, the breeding environment is improved; deodorization, sterilization,zero emission and no pollution are realized; a biological sterilization effect is achieved; the feed utilization rate is improved; the water and feed consumption is reduced; the feeding cost is reduced; natural organic matters are used as feed; the use of chemical feeds is avoided; meanwhile, a free-ranging mode is performed at the live pig stage and the fattening pig stage; the daily activity quantity of live pigs is increased; meanwhile, traditional Chinese medicinal materials are added into nursery feed; the immunity of the pigs is improved; the use of hormone is avoided; the pork quality is improved, so that the meat quality of fed xiang pigs is tender; the meat is tender; the taste is delicious.
title_abstract_original: 一种生猪饲养方法 本发明公开了一种生猪饲养方法，包括猪场的建设、猪苗选择、幼猪饲养、保育猪饲养、生长猪饲养、育肥猪饲养；本发明通过在猪场外部种植绿化带可以很好地阻挡外部空气进入猪场内，使猪场内空气新鲜度较好，减少猪过多接触到污染空气的机会，利于猪的健康；通过发酵床养殖能够改善养殖环境，除臭杀菌，零排放，无污染，起到生物消毒的作用，还能提高饲料利用率，节省用水用料，降低饲养成本；采用天然有机物作为饲料，避免化学饲料的使用，同时在生长猪阶段和育肥猪阶段进行散养，增加生猪的日常活动量，同时在保育饲料中添加中药材，提高了猪的免疫力，避免激素的使用，提高猪肉的品质，使养出的香猪肉质细嫩，肉嫩味香。

title_abstract: System and method for collecting and processing information of an internet user via IP-web correlation A method is provided for collecting and processing information of a target who is a user of a communication network. The method includes obtaining a first identifier of the target, accessing, based on a handle of the first identifier, a first public webpage associated with the target in a first Internet site identified based on a domain of the first identifier, extracting content of the first public webpage for including in target data of the target, obtaining a third identifier of the target, intercepting a document associated with the target from a private portion of communication network traffic identified based on a domain of the third identifier, extracting content of the document for including in the target data, determining a second identifier by searching the target data, associating the second identifier with the target based on a pre-determined criterion, and collecting information of the target based on the second identifier.
title_abstract_original: System and method for collecting and processing information of an internet user via IP-web correlation A method is provided for collecting and processing information of a target who is a user of a communication network. The method includes obtaining a first identifier of the target, accessing, based on a handle of the first identifier, a first public webpage associated with the target in a first Internet site identified based on a domain of the first identifier, extracting content of the first public webpage for including in target data of the target, obtaining a third identifier of the target, intercepting a document associated with the target from a private portion of communication network traffic identified based on a domain of the third identifier, extracting content of the document for including in the target data, determining a second identifier by searching the target data, associating the second identifier with the target based on a pre-determined criterion, and collecting information of the target based on the second identifier.

title_abstract: Identification of microorganisms, esp. Neisseria spp. - by colour reaction with specific substrate and dye Identification is carried out by (a) adding a predetermined amt. of a saline contg. the microorganism to a soln. contg. a diazonium dye detector and a substrate, (b) incubating in an aq. meidum with a buffer at 35 degrees C. for 5 hrs., and (c) detecting a positive or negative colour reaction. Specifically, the substrate is selected from beta-naphthyl-beta-D-galactopyranoside (I), N-L-glutamyl-beta-naphthyl-amide (II), L-hydroxyproline-beta-naphthylamide (III), L-serine-beta-naphthylamide (IV), L-arginine-beta-naphthylamide (V), glycine-glycine-beta-naphthylamide (VI), beta-naphthylphosphate (VII), beta-naphthyl valerate (VIII), 4-methoxy-leucine-beta-naphthylamide (IXe and glycine-beta-naphthylamide (X). Method is esp. useful for distinguishing between N. gonorrhoeae, N. meningitidis and N. lactamica. The identification can be made rapidly (e.g. 1-4 hr.) by comparison with a standard chart.
title_abstract_original: METHODE, REAGENTIA EN APPARATUUR VOOR DE SNELLE IDENTIFICATIE VAN NEISSERIA GONORRHOEAE EN NEISSERIA MENINGITIDIS. Identification is carried out by (a) adding a predetermined amt. of a saline contg. the microorganism to a soln. contg. a diazonium dye detector and a substrate, (b) incubating in an aq. meidum with a buffer at 35 degrees C. for 5 hrs., and (c) detecting a positive or negative colour reaction. Specifically, the substrate is selected from beta-naphthyl-beta-D-galactopyranoside (I), N-L-glutamyl-beta-naphthyl-amide (II), L-hydroxyproline-beta-naphthylamide (III), L-serine-beta-naphthylamide (IV), L-arginine-beta-naphthylamide (V), glycine-glycine-beta-naphthylamide (VI), beta-naphthylphosphate (VII), beta-naphthyl valerate (VIII), 4-methoxy-leucine-beta-naphthylamide (IXe and glycine-beta-naphthylamide (X). Method is esp. useful for distinguishing between N. gonorrhoeae, N. meningitidis and N. lactamica. The identification can be made rapidly (e.g. 1-4 hr.) by comparison with a standard chart.

title_abstract: RESOURCE ACCESS BASED ON AUDIO SIGNAL
title_abstract_original: RESOURCE ACCESS BASED ON AUDIO SIGNAL

title_abstract: RESOURCE ACCESS BASED ON AUDIO SIGNAL A resource server system (130) granting to users (Ri) access to a resource (140) based on the very fact that the users' computing systems (120) can demonstrate that they heard an audio signal (101). Specifically, the resource server system (130) detects receipt of a message (152) from a client computing system (120), and interprets the message (152) as representing that the client computing system (120) heard an audio signal (101). In response, the resource server system (130) grants a user (Ri) of the client computing system (120) access to the resource (120). This may be performed for multiple client computing systems (Ri) that each demonstrate that they heard the audio signal (101). Thus, the principles described herein allow for the granting of access to resources (140) to other computing systems (120) within the audible proximity of a computing system (110) that transmitted the audio signal (101).

title_abstract: RESOURCE ACCESS BASED ON AUDIO SIGNAL A resource server system (130) granting to users (Ri) access to a resource (140) based on the very fact that the users' computing systems (120) can demonstrate that they heard an audio signal (101). Specifically, the resource server system (130) detects receipt of a message (152) from a client computing system (120), and interprets the message (152) as representing that the client computing system (120) heard an audio signal (101). In response, the resource server system (130) grants a user (Ri) of the client computing system (120) access to the resource (120). This may be performed for multiple client computing systems (Ri) that each demonstrate that they heard the audio signal (101). Thus, the principles described herein allow for the granting of access to resources (140) to other computing systems (120) within the audible proximity of a computing system (110) that transmitted the audio signal (101).
title_abstract_original: 基于音频信号的资源访问 一种资源服务器系统(130)，其基于用户的计算系统(120)可以证明他们听到了音频信号(101)这一事实，准许用户(Ri)访问资源(140)。具体而言，资源服务器系统(130)检测到来自客户端计算系统(120)的消息(152)的接收，并且将该消息(152)解释为表示客户端计算系统(120)听到了音频信号(101)。作为响应，资源服务器系统(130)准许客户端计算系统(120)的用户(Ri)访问资源(120)。这可以针对多个客户端计算系统(Ri)执行，每个客户端计算系统都证明他们听到了音频信号(101)。因此，本文描述的原理使得能够准许发送音频信号(101)的计算系统(110)的可听邻近度内的其他计算系统(120)访问资源(140)。

title_abstract: METHOD , SYSTEM AND TERMINAL FOR PROVIDING CUSTOMIZED INFORMATION DURING CALL SETUP PROCESS IN TELECOMMUNICATION SYSTEMS. The present invention includes method and systems, and communication terminal, for transmitting a variety of information and contents (Ring-Back Information) such as music, songs, advertisements, sounds, voices, any audible resource edited by the subscriber, animation, and moving images, instead of the uniform ring-back tone (an mechanical tone) which has been provided to a calling party while the calling party is waiting for the called party's answer after the calling party executes a call setup request. According to the invention, the Ring-Back Information selected by the called party is provided to the calling party by inter-working of the terminating exchange (10-n) and the terminating terminal (20-n). When the terminating terminal (20-n) receives a call from the terminating exchange (10-n), the terminating terminal (20-n) transmits the Ring-Back Information to the terminating exchange and then the terminating exchange (10-n) delivers to the originating terminal the Ring-Back Information received from the terminating terminal (20-n).

title_abstract: METHOD FOR CONTINUOUS PRODUCTION OF ETHYL ALCOHOL FIELD: alcohol industry.SUBSTANCE: method involves performing, at a reduced pressure, continuous fermentation of the wort and removal of water-alcohol vapours and carbon dioxide, condensation of vapours, transfer of heat released during vapour condensation to the fermenting wort. Condensation is performed inside a sealed container on the outer surface of the evaporator of an refrigerating machine, located in the atmosphere of the container outside of the fermenting wort and on other internal surfaces with direct or indirect thermal contact with the evaporator of the refrigerating machine; condensation surfaces are blown using a gas-blowing apparatus providing circulation of the vapor-gas medium along the contour: condensation surfaces - fermenting wort mirror - condensation surfaces; intermediate collection of the condensed water-alcohol vapours is performed in a cooled condensate collector placed inside the sealed container; the heat released during vapour condensation is transferred by means of direct or indirect thermal contact of the condenser of the refrigerating machine with the fermenting wort.EFFECT: allows simultaneous continuous fermentation and removal of alcohol, water and carbon dioxide from the fermenting wort at a reduced pressure in a fermentation container.4 cl, 2 dwg
title_abstract_original: Способ непрерывного получения этилового спирта Изобретение относится к спиртовой промышленности. Способ предусматривает осуществление при пониженном давлении непрерывного сбраживания сусла и удаления водно-спиртовых паров и углекислого газа, конденсацию паров, передачу бродящему суслу тепла, выделяющегося при конденсации паров. Конденсацию осуществляют внутри герметичной емкости на внешней поверхности испарителя холодильной машины, размещенного внутри атмосферы емкости вне бродящего сусла и на иных внутренних поверхностях, имеющих прямой или опосредованный тепловой контакт с испарителем холодильной машины; осуществляют обдув поверхностей конденсации при помощи газодувного устройства, обеспечивающего циркуляцию парогазовой среды по контуру: поверхности конденсации - зеркало бродящего сусла - поверхности конденсации; осуществляют промежуточный сбор сконденсированных водно-спиртовых паров в охлаждаемом сборнике конденсата, размещенном внутри герметичной емкости; передачу тепла, выделяющегося в процессе конденсации паров, осуществляют путем прямого или опосредованного теплового контакта конденсатора холодильной машины с бродящим суслом. Изобретение позволяет проводить одновременно непрерывное сбраживание и удаление спирта, воды и углекислого газа из бродящего сусла при пониженном давлении в бродильной емкости. 3 з.п. ф-лы, 2 ил.

ALIMENTO MICROENCAPSULADO PARA LARVAS DE PECES Y PROCEDIMIENTO PARA SU ELABORACION. Alimento microencapsulado para larvas de peces y procedimiento para su elaboración. Con el presente invento se consigue una microcápsula que incluye una dieta completa para larvas de peces, particularmente para peces marinos, por medio de una técnica de bajo coste. Así mismo, se puede microencapsular células aisladas o ingredientes aislados que permite su utilización en estudios de nutrición. Las microcápsulas obtenidas tienen un tamaño y textura óptimos para ser utilizado por larvas de peces marinos, siendo aceptadas y digeridas tanto por larvas de especies pelágicas como bentónicas. Las microcápsulas conseguidas se dispersan fácilmente en agua y se pueden almacenar en seco durante largos periodos sin que se vean modificadas sus características.

title_abstract: MICROENCAPSULATED FOOD FOR FISH LARVAE AND PRODUCTION METHOD THEREOF The invention relates to a microcapsule containing a complete diet for fish larvae, preferably marine fish, which is produced using a low-cost method. In this way, isolated cells or isolated ingredients can be microencapsulated and used in nutritional studies. The microcapsules produced are provided with an optimum size and texture for use by marine fish larvae and said microcapsules are accepted and digested by both pelagic and benthic larvae. The inventive microcapsules disperse easily in water and can be dry-stored for long periods without the characteristics thereof being altered.

title_abstract: Preserving organic products - which contain water - in hermetically sealed, germ proof containers The product and the container are heated, to partially evaporate the water in the container, in a pressure-vessel which statically adsorbs the positive pressure in the container whereby the pressure vessel is mfd. from stable heat conductive material and can be heated by other than electrical or dielectrical means.

title_abstract: Sensing systems using quartz sensors and fiber optics A quartz sensing system includes a quartz sensor, an electromechanical converter, an optical source, an optical fiber and a signal processor. The quartz sensor responds to a pressure, and further responds to an electrical power signal, for providing a quartz sensor electrical signal containing information about the pressure. The electromechanical converter responds to the quartz sensor signal, for providing an electromechanical converter force containing information about the sensed voltage or current signal. The optical source for provides an optical source signal. The optical fiber responds to the electromechanical converter force, for changing an optical parameter or characteristic of the optical source signal depending on the change in length of the optical fiber and providing an electromechanical converter optical signal containing information about the electromechanical converter force. The signal processor responds to the electromechanical converter optical signal, for providing a signal processor signal containing information about the pressure. In one embodiment, the electromechanical converter includes a piezoelectric or magnetostrictive transducer that responds to the quartz sensor signal, for providing an piezoelectric or magnetostrictive transducer force containing information about the quartz sensor signal. In another embodiment, the electromechanical converter includes an acoustic transducer and a piezoelectric or magnetostrictive transducer. The acoustic transducer responds to the quartz sensor signal, for providing an acoustic transducer wave containing information about the quartz sensor signal. The piezoelectric or magnetostrictive transducer responds to the acoustic transducer wave, for providing a piezoelectric or magnetostrictive transducer force containing information about the acoustic transducer wave.

title_abstract: Apparatus for positioning a derrick and associated drilling equipment over a marine drilling site 1,089,313. Earth-drilling. BETHLEHEM STEEL CORPORATION. March 1, 1966 [March 2, 1965], No. 8859/66. Heading E1F. Apparatus for positioning drilling equipment on a platform 3 over a marine site comprises a lower carriage 2 movable along rails 4 and a upper carriage 6 supporting a derrick (not shown) and movable along rails 7 mounted on the carriage 2. Each carriage is moved along its respective rails by means of hydraulically actuated cylinders 26 and pistons 27 operating in conjunction with a ratchet mechanism 33 which engages holes 25 in a flange 14 on each rail the ratchet being reversible to allow movement of the carriages in either direction along the rails. The rails 4 may have continuations on an adjacent structure to permit transfer of the equipment from the platform to the structure.

title_abstract: Automatic analysis system and method for development charge The present invention relates to an automatic development charge analysis system and a method thereof. Moreover, the system includes: a permission target place input part inputting information of a permission target place to be checked about whether the place corresponds to a development charge imposition target; an avoidance type setting part setting an analysis range for a neighboring lot and an avoidance type to be compared to the permission target place among avoidance types avoiding a development charge imposition; a suspected lot analysis part analyzing a suspected lot matched with the set avoidance type by extracting a lot around the permission target place based on the set analysis range and comparing the lot to the permission target place; and a development charge imposition target determination part determining whether the place is a development charge imposition target by adding up the business extent of the suspected lot analyzed by the suspected lot analysis part and the business area of the permission target place. Therefore, a user can accurately determine a development charge imposition target without wasting much time and administrative force for sorting out development charge imposition targets.
title_abstract_original: 개발부담금 자동분석시스템 및 그 방법 본 발명은 개발부담금 자동분석시스템 및 그 방법에 관한 것이다. 또한, 본 발명은 개발부담금 부과대상에 해당하는지를 확인하고자 하는 허가 대상지의 정보를 입력하는 허가 대상지 입력부, 개발부담금 부과를 회피하는 회피유형들 중에서 허가 대상지와 대조하고자 하는 회피유형과 주변 필지의 분석 범위를 설정하는 회피유형 설정부, 기설정된 분석 범위를 기초로 허가 대상지 주변의 필지들을 추출하고 허가 대상지와 대조하여 기설정된 회피유형에 부합하는 의심필지를 분석하는 의심필지 분석부 및 의심필지 분석부로부터 분석된 의심필지의 사업면적과 허가 대상지의 사업면적을 합산하여 개발부담금 부과대상인지의 여부를 판정하는 개발부담금 부과대상 판정부를 구비하므로, 개발부담금 부과대상을 선별하는데 많은 시간과 행정력이 낭비하지 않으면서 개발부담금 부과대상을 정확하게 판정할 수 있다.

title_abstract: Integrated service delivery method Using the integrated management system of Buildings using for Application The present invention relates to a comprehensive information service method using a comprehensive management system of a building using an application, in which a house owner, a structure owner, or a building owner sends an information on a possessed building or a house to a server through an application, and a real estate broker checks the same comprehensively through the application so that a trader can allow a trader to easily check a sales information, thereby making a contract without being damaged by a false sales or defected sales. The method comprises: a step in which the house owner, the structure owner, or the building owner transmits the information of the building or a house by an application provided from the server through a terminal to the server providing an application and a database in order to open the information of the building or a house, receives the information of the building from the application and stores and provides the same in the server; a step in which the real estate broker confirms the information of the building provided by the server through the terminal and the application provided by the server; a step in which the real estate broker receives a desired building or a contact number of the owner of the structure, building, or house through the application by the terminal; and a step which receives the contact number of the building owner or the house owner of the building or the house through the application of the server, and confirms the state of the building or house through contact or requests the requirement through the application at the time of transaction.
title_abstract_original: 어플리케이션을 이용하는 건물의 종합 관리 시스템을 이용한 종합정보 제공서비스방법 본 발명은 집주인, 건축주 또는 건물주가 어플리케이션을 통해 소유한 건물 또는 집의 정보를 서버에 전송하고, 공인중개사가 어플리케이션을 통해 광범위하게 확인하도록 하여 공인중개사가 거래자에게 매물 정보를 쉽게 확인할 수 있도록 하며, 허위매물 또는 하자매물로 인한 피해를 입지않도록 거래가 가능하도록 하는 어플리케이션을 이용하는 건물의 종합 관리 시스템을 이용한 종합정보 제공서비스방법에 관한 것으로서, 집주인, 건물주 또는 건축주가 단말기를 통해 서버에서 제공되는 어플리케이션으로 소유 건물 또는 집의 정보를 공개할 수 있도록 어플리케이션 및 데이터베이스를 제공하는 서버에 전송하고, 상기 어플리케이션을 통해 건물의 정보를 입력받아 서버에서 저장 및 제공하는 단계; 상기 서버에서 제공되는 어플리케이션을 통해 공인중개사가 단말기를 통해 상기 서버에서 제공되는 건물의 정보를 확인하는 단계; 상기 공인중개사가 단말기를 통해 원하는 건물 또는 집의 건물주, 건축주 또는 집주인의 연락처를 어플리케이션을 통해 제공받는 단계 및 상기 서버의 어플리케이션을 통해 건물 또는 집의 건물주, 건축주 또는 집주인의 연락처를 제공받아 연락을 통해 건물 또는 집의 상태를 확인 또는 거래시 어플리케이션을 통해 요구사항을 요청하는 단계를 포함하는 것을 특징으로 한다.

title_abstract: Real estate sales target automatic setting method and device, server and storage medium The invention provides a real estate sales target automatic setting method and device, a server and a storage medium, and the method comprises the steps: obtaining historical transaction data, and generating a state time sequence according to a preset corresponding relation between a transaction volume and a state value; selecting a reference time period; respectively determining lag time betweeneach reference time period and the to-be-predicted time period, and determining an initial state value corresponding to each reference time period; determining transition probabilities of transition from the initial state value to different states according to the time delay, and weights corresponding to the reference time periods respectively; calculating the weighted sum of the transition to thesame state as the final transition probability of the same state; and selecting the state with the maximum final transition probability as a target transition state, determining a set transaction volume corresponding to the target transition state according to a preset corresponding relationship, and setting the sales task volume of the to-be-predicted time period according to the set transactionvolume. The future transaction volume can be effectively predicted, and reliable data reference is provided for developers, so that scientific and reasonable sales tasks are formulated.
title_abstract_original: 房地产销售目标自动设置方法、装置、服务器及存储介质 本发明提供一种房地产销售目标自动设置方法、装置、服务器及存储介质，通过获取历史成交数据，根据成交量与状态值之间的预设对应关系，生成状态时间序列；选择参考时段；分别确定各参考时段与待预测时段之间的滞时，以及确定各参考时段对应的初始状态值；根据滞时确定初始状态值转移到不同状态的转移概率，以及各参考时段分别对应的权重；计算转移至同一状态的加权和，作为同一状态的最终转移概率；选择最终转移概率最大的状态作为目标转移状态，根据预设对应关系确定该目标转移状态对应的设定成交量，根据设定成交量设置待预测时段的销售任务量。可有效预测未来的成交量，给开发商提供可靠的数据参考，从而制定科学合理的销售任务。

title_abstract: A method of treating molasses waste water under low-temperature conditions and synchronously producing energy by microalgae The invention discloses a method of treating molasses waste water under low-temperature conditions and synchronously producing energy by microalgae, and belongs to the field of waste water treatment. The method is to overcome a technical problem that waste water treatment under low-temperature conditions are low in treating efficiency and low in energy recovery rate. The method includes 1) controlling the growing temperature of the microalgae to be 10 DEG C or below by adopting a temperature progressive decreasing acclimation culture process; and 2) measuring molasses waste water, adjusting the pH value of the waste water, controlling the temperature of the waste water to be the growing temperature after the acclimation culture, then inoculating the microalgae acclimatized through the 1) step, performing shaking culture in a shaking table, collecting the microalgae and then extracting oil and grease. The waste water is fermented to produce energy resources, thus effectively treating the waste water, overcoming the substrate problem of culture of the microalgae and providing a method of synchronously recovering energy. The COD, TN, and TP removing rates for the waste water in the method are respectively 81%, 82% and 80%, and biomass and the content of oil and grease of the microalgae can be 30% and 2.9 g/L respectively.
title_abstract_original: 种微藻在低温条件下处理糖蜜废水同步产能的方法 本发明公开了种微藻在低温条件下处理糖蜜废水同步产能的方法，属于废水处理领域。本发明要解决低温条件下废水处理效率低、能源回收率低的技术问题。本发明方法：、采用温度递减驯化培养方法将微藻的生长温度控制在10℃以下；二、取糖蜜废水，调节pH值，将温度控制在驯化培养后的生长温度，然后接种经步骤驯化后的微藻，摇床中震荡培养，收集微藻后提取油脂。本发明利用废水进行发酵产能，不仅有效地处理了废水，解决了微藻培养的底物问题，也提供了种同步进行能源回收的方法。本发明对于糖蜜废水的COD、TN和TP去除率分别可达81％、82％和80％，微藻的生物量和油脂含量可达30％和2.9g/L。

title_abstract: System and Method for Facilitating Subterranean Hydrocarbon Extraction with Electrochemical Processes This disclosure includes systems and methods for extracting hydrocarbons from a geologic structure. Some systems use or include a well-bore that extends at least partially through the geologic structure, a first electrode disposed within the wellbore, an ionically conductive medium in fluid communication with the first electrode, a second electrode in electrical communication with the first electrode, and a power source configured to establish an electrical current between the first and second electrodes to cause an electrochemical reaction. Some systems are configured to facilitate extraction of hydrocarbons from a geologic structure.

title_abstract: Resource scheduling method and related products The embodiment of the invention discloses a resource scheduling method and a related product. The method comprises the step of adjusting a target beacon transmission time parameter of a first networkmode or a target beacon transmission time parameter of a second network mode under the conditions that the first network mode is started and the target beacon transmission time parameter of the secondnetwork mode conflicts with the target beacon transmission time parameter of the first network mode. In the embodiment of the invention, TBTT conflicts in the first network mode and the second network mode are staggered by adjusting a target beacon transmission time parameter of the first network mode or a target beacon transmission time parameter of the second network mode; the running time proportion allocated to the dual-network mode by the time allocation module is dynamically determined according to the respective actual business volume in the dual-network mode of the first network modeand the second network mode, so the business of the dual-network mode can be ensured to be scheduled and run in a time-sharing and fragmentation manner, the signal receiving and transmitting efficiency is improved, and the business is not influenced.
title_abstract_original: 一种资源调度方法及相关产品 本申请实施例公开了一种资源调度方法及相关产品。该方法包括：在第一网络模式已启动且第二网络模式的目标信标传输时间参数与第一网络模式的目标信标传输时间参数存在冲突的情况下，调整第一网络模式的目标信标传输时间参数或第二网络模式的目标信标传输时间参数。在本申请实施例中，通过调整第一网络模式的目标信标传输时间参数或第二网络模式的目标信标传输时间参数来错开第一网络模式和第二网络模式中TBTT的冲突，根据第一网络模式和第二网络模式的双网络模式中各自实际的业务量来动态决定时间分配模块分配给双网络模式的运行时间比例，从而可以保证双网络模式的业务能够分时分片调度运行，提高信号收发效率，使业务均不受影响。

title_abstract: Blast hole water injection detonation method The invention discloses a blast hole water injection detonation method. Stemming, nonel detonators, an upper charging layer and a lower charging layer are included. The stemming is located at the uppermost layer of a blast hole, a water bag-emulsion explosive-water bag horizontal non-coupled charging structure is the upper charging layer, emulsion explosive and water bags are arranged below the upper charging layer, the water bag-emulsion explosive-water bag vertical coupled charging structure is the lower charging layer, and the emulsion explosive is detonated through the nonel detonators. The emulsion explosive at the position of the lower charging layer is detonated firstly. The blast hole water injection detonation method solves the problems that according to an existing method, watermist is small, and the dust fall effect is common; and the water mist direction is uncontrollable, and the secondary dust fall effect is poor. The reliable theoretical basis exists, and operation is convenient.
title_abstract_original: 种炮孔注水爆破方法 本发明公开了种炮孔注水爆破方法，包括炮泥、导爆管雷管、装药上层和装药下层，所述炮泥位于炮孔最上层，所述“水袋‑乳化炸药‑水袋”的水平不耦合装药结构为装药上层，所述装药上层下方为乳化炸药及水袋，所述“水袋‑乳化炸药‑水袋”的垂直耦合装药结构为装药下层，所述乳化炸药均以导爆管雷管起爆。装药下层处的乳化炸药先被起爆，本发明解决了现有方法存在的水雾小，降尘效果般；水雾方向不可控，二次降尘效果较差等问题，有可靠理论依据，操作方便。

title_abstract: Automatic water valve for rock drills
title_abstract_original: Automatic water valve for rock drills

title_abstract: Multi-channel phase compensation circuit and method The invention relates to a multi-channel phase compensation circuit and a multi-channel phase compensation method. The multi-channel phase compensation circuit comprises N main channels, N calibration channels, a combiner and a calibration channel public unit, wherein the calibration channels are corresponding to the main channels one by one; each main channel comprises an A unit, a C unit and a radio frequency cable, the A unit comprises a main switch and a connector connected in sequence, and the C unit comprises a power amplifier (PA) and a band-pass filter (BPF) connected in sequence; the calibration channel public unit comprises a calibration switch which is connected with a calibration source CAL; each calibration channel comprises a C unit and a B unit, and the B unit comprises a coupler and a combiner connected in sequence; the output ends of the BPFs are connected with the couplers; the output ends of the BPFs are also connected with the main switches through the couplers; the connectors are connected with the radio frequency cables; and the combiner are connected with the calibration switches. In order to keep the consistency of the phases of N channels, the invention provides a quick phase compensation method.
title_abstract_original: Multi-channel phase compensation circuit and method The invention relates to a multi-channel phase compensation circuit and a multi-channel phase compensation method. The multi-channel phase compensation circuit comprises N main channels, N calibration channels, a combiner and a calibration channel public unit, wherein the calibration channels are corresponding to the main channels one by one; each main channel comprises an A unit, a C unit and a radio frequency cable, the A unit comprises a main switch and a connector connected in sequence, and the C unit comprises a power amplifier (PA) and a band-pass filter (BPF) connected in sequence; the calibration channel public unit comprises a calibration switch which is connected with a calibration source CAL; each calibration channel comprises a C unit and a B unit, and the B unit comprises a coupler and a combiner connected in sequence; the output ends of the BPFs are connected with the couplers; the output ends of the BPFs are also connected with the main switches through the couplers; the connectors are connected with the radio frequency cables; and the combiner are connected with the calibration switches. In order to keep the consistency of the phases of N channels, the invention provides a quick phase compensation method.

processo para fabricação de uma dispersão aquosa compreendendo farelo de mostarda, emulsão de óleo em água e processo de fabricação de uma emulsão de óleo em água a invenção se refere a um processo para a fabricação de uma dispersão aquosa que compreende farelo de mostarda compreendendo as seguintes etapas: provisão de uma dispersão aquosa que compreende partículas do farelo de mostarda e aplicação de tratamento de homogeneização de alta pressão para alterar a proporção molecular de açúcar das partículas do farelo de mostarda. a invenção se refere ainda a uma emulsão de óleo em água que compreende uma dispersão aquosa que pode ser preparada pelo processo mencionado acima.

СПОСОБ ПОЛУЧЕНИЯ ВОДНОЙ ДИСПЕРСИИ, ВКЛЮЧАЮЩЕЙ ГОРЧИЧНЫЕ ОТРУБИ, И ЭМУЛЬСИЯ МАСЛО-В-ВОДЕ, СОДЕРЖАЩАЯ ТАКУЮ ДИСПЕРСИЮ Изобретение относится к способу приготовления водной дисперсии, содержащей горчичные отруби, который включает следующие стадии: обеспечение водной дисперсии, содержащей частицы горчичных отрубей, и применение обработки гомогенизацией при высоком давлении для изменения соотношения сахарных остатков в частицах горчичных отрубей. Изобретение относится также к эмульсии масло-в-воде, содержащей водную дисперсию, которая может быть приготовлена вышеупомянутым способом.

title_abstract: PROCESS FOR THE MANUFACTURE OF AN AQUEOUS DISPERSION COMPRISING MUSTARD BRAN AND AQUEOUS DISPERSION COMPRISING MUSTARD BRAD The invention relates to a process for the manufacture of an aqueous dispersion comprising mustard bran comprising the following steps: providing an aqueous dispersion comprising mustard bran particles and applying a high pressure homogenisation treatment to alter the sugar moiety ratio of the mustard bran particles. The invention further relates to an oil-in-water emulsion comprising an aqueous dispersion that can be prepared by the aforementioned process.

Proceso para la fabricación de una dispersión acuosa que comprende salvado de mostaza, y emulsión aceite en agua que contiene dicha dispersión. LA INVENCIÓN SE REFIERE A UN PROCESO PARA LA FABRICACIÓN DE UNA DISPERSIÓN ACUOSA QUE COMPRENDE SALVADO DE MOSTAZA, EN DONDE EL PROCESO COMPRENDE LOS SIGUIENTES PASOS: PROVEER UNA DISPERSIÓN ACUOSA QUE COMPRENDE PARTÍCULAS DE SALVADO DE MOSTAZA, Y APLICAR UN TRATAMIENTO DE HOMOGENEIZACIÓN A ALTA PRESIÓN PARA ALTERAR LA RELACIÓN ENTRE LAS PARTES AZÚCARES DE LAS PARTÍCULAS DE SALVADO DE MOSTAZA. LA INVENCIÓN SE REFIERE, ADEMÁS, A UNA EMULSIÓN ACEITE EN AGUA QUE COMPRENDE UNA DISPERSIÓN ACUOSA QUE PUEDE PREPARARSE MEDIANTE EL PROCESO ANTERIORMENTE MENCIONADO.

title_abstract_original: PROCESO PARA LA ELABORACION DE UNA DISPERSION ACUOSA QUE COMPRENDE SALVADO DE MOSTAZA, Y EMULSION DE ACEITE EN AGUA QUE CONTIENE DICHA DISPERSION. La invención se refiere a un proceso para la elaboración de una dispersión acuosa que comprende salvado de mostaza, en donde el proceso comprende los siguientes pasos: proveer una dispersión acuosa que comprende partículas de salvado de mostaza, y aplicar un tratamiento de homogeneización a alta presión para alterar la proporción entre la fracción de azúcar de las partículas de salvado de mostaza. La invención se refiere, además, a una emulsión de aceite en agua que comprende una dispersión acuosa que puede prepararse mediante el proceso anteriormente mencionado.

The invention further relates to an oil-in-water emulsion comprising an aqueous dispersion that can be prepared by the aforementioned process.

The invention further relates to an oil-in-water emulsion comprising an aqueous dispersion that can be prepared by the aforementioned process.

Proceso para la fabricación de una dispersión acuosa que comprende salvado de mostaza y una emulsión de aceite en agua que contiene tal dispersión Proceso para la fabricación de una dispersión acuosa que comprende salvado de mostaza que comprende las siguientes etapas: a) proveer una dispersión acuosa que comprende salvado de mostaza, en el que el salvado de mostaza comprende partículas de salvado de mostaza, en el que las partículas de salvado de mostaza tienen un perfil de las fracciones de azúcares en el que la cantidad molar combinada de galactosa + manosa es al menos 0,85 veces la cantidad molar de arabinosa; b) aplicar cizallamiento a la dispersión provista en la etapa a) usando un homogeneizador de alta presión que opera a una caída de presión de al menos 30 MPa (300 bares) para proveer partículas de salvado de mostaza que tienen un perfil de las fracciones de azúcares en el que la cantidad molar combinada de galactosa + manosa es, como máximo, 0,80 veces la cantidad molar de arabinosa; en el que el perfil de las fracciones de azúcares de las partículas de salvado de mostaza se determina al aislar las partículas de salvado de mostaza por medio de centrifugación, hidrolizar los polisacáridos contenidos en las partículas, y analizar la composición de azúcares de los polisacáridos del salvado de mostaza hidrolizados por medio de 1H-RMN, usando el procedimiento especificado en la descripción.

processo para fabricação de uma dispersão aquosa compreendendo farelo de mostarda, emulsão de óleo em água e processo de fabricação de uma emulsão de óleo em água a invenção se refere a um processo para a fabricação de uma dispersão aquosa que compreende farelo de mostarda compreendendo as seguintes etapas: provisão de uma dispersão aquosa que compreende partículas do farelo de mostarda e aplicação de tratamento de homogeneização de alta pressão para alterar a proporção molecular de açúcar das partículas do farelo de mostarda. a invenção se refere ainda a uma emulsão de óleo em água que compreende uma dispersão aquosa que pode ser preparada pelo processo mencionado acima.

PROCESSO PARA FABRICAÇÃO DE UMA DISPERSÃO AQUOSA COMPREENDENDO FARELO DE MOSTARDA USANDO HOMOGENEIZAÇÃO DE ALTA PRESSÃO, EMULSÃO DE ÓLEO EM ÁGUA COMPREENDENDO TAL DISPERSÃO E PROCESSO DE FABRICAÇÃO DE TAL EMULSÃO PROCESSO PARA FABRICAÇÃO DE UMA DISPERSÃO AQUOSA COMPREENDENDO FARELO DE MOSTARDA, EMULSÃO DE ÓLEO EM ÁGUA E PROCESSO DE FABRICAÇÃO DE UMA EMULSÃO DE ÓLEO EM ÁGUA. A invenção se refere a um processo para a fabricação de uma dispersão aquosa que compreende farelo de mostarda compreendendo as seguintes etapas: provisão de uma dispersão aquosa que compreende partículas do farelo de mostarda e aplicação de tratamento de homogeneização de alta pressão para alterar a proporção molecular de açúcar das partículas do farelo de mostarda. A invenção se refere ainda a uma emulsão de óleo em água que compreende uma dispersão aquosa que pode ser preparada pelo processo mencionado acima.

title_abstract: ALL-POWERFUL TREATMENT SYSTEM The present invention is to provide an all-purpose processing system. According to the present invention, the all-purpose processing system comprises: a casing (10) in which a space part for receiving a processing object is included therein and an inlet (12) into which the processing object is injected is provided on at least one side surface thereof; a rotor (20) in which a plurality of support wings (22) for supporting the processing object are radially arranged with respect to the center and mounted inside the casing (10) to be rotatable, and which rotates the processing object around the center while being rotated by a rotation unit; and an element supply unit included inside the casing (10) to supply effective elements for processing the processing object mounted on the rotor (20).
title_abstract_original: 만능 가공 시스템 본 발명은 만능 가공 시스템을 제공하고자 하는 것으로, 본 발명에 의한 만능 가공 시스템의 구성은 내부에 가공 대상물이 투입되기 위한 공간부를 구비하고 적어도 일측면에는 가공 대상물을 투입하기 위한 투입구(12)가 구비된 케이싱(10); 가공 대상물을 지지하는 복수개의 서포트윙(22)이 중심부를 기준으로 방사 방향으로 배치되어 상기 케이싱(10) 내부에 회전 가능하게 장착되며 로테이션 유닛에 의해 회전되면서 상기 가공 대상물이 그 중심부를 기준으로 회전되도록 하는 로터(20); 상기 로터(20)에 장착된 상기 가공 대상물에 가공을 위한 유효 성분을 공급하도록 상기 케이싱(10)의 내부에 구비된 성분 공급부를 포함하는 것을 특징으로 한다.

title_abstract: Powder return prevention device for upward hole charging Aiming at the problem that powder returning rate is increased due to the fact that powder explosives are easy to fall off during underground blasting and charging, the upward hole charging powder returning preventing device is designed and comprises an industrial brush used for sealing a blast hole, a petal-shaped extensible device used for sealing a charging pipe and a buckle used for connecting the charging pipe and the upward hole charging powder returning preventing device. And the supporting rod is used for supporting the petal-shaped device to be closed and clamped in the blast hole. The device is arranged on a charging pipe in a sleeving mode before charging, moves along with the charging pipe in the charging process till charging is completed, and finally remains in a blast hole, so that the functions of hole sealing and powder returning prevention are achieved.
title_abstract_original: 一种上向孔装药防返粉装置 本发明是针对地下爆破，粉状炸药在装药时容易掉落，导致返粉率增大的问题，设计的一种上向孔装药防返粉装置，包括用于封闭炮孔的工业毛刷，用于封闭装药管的花瓣状可伸展装置，用于连接装药管与本装置的卡扣，用于可支撑花瓣状装置闭合以及卡在炮孔里面的撑杆。本发明在装药前套在装药管上，在装药过程中随装药管移动直至装药完毕，最终留在炮孔内，达到封孔、防返粉作用。

数据共享方法、装置、设备及计算机可读存储介质 本发明公开了一种数据共享方法、装置、设备及计算机可读存储介质。数据共享方法包括步骤：将第一节点触发的用于获取目标数据的请求信息传输至第二节点；获取第二节点根据请求信息反馈的允许获取目标数据的授权信息；建立连接第一节点和第二节点的安全信道；通过安全信道将目标数据传输至所述第一节点。当任何两个节点需要共享数据时或者更一个节点需要想从另一个节点进行数据采集时，将其中一个作为第一节点，另一个作为第二节点，在得到第二节点的授权之后，建立连接第一节点和第二节点的安全信道并将目标数据通过安全信道从第二节点传输至第一节点，从而实现多个节点之间的跨域数据共享。

title_abstract: Data sharing method, apparatus and device, and computer readable storage medium The invention discloses a data sharing method, apparatus and device, and a computer readable storage medium. The data sharing method comprises the steps of transmitting request information used for acquiring target data and triggered by a first node to a second node; obtaining authorization information which is fed back by the second node according to the request information and allows acquisitionof the target data; establishing a security channel for connecting the first node and the second node; and transmitting the target data to the first node through the security channel. When any two nodes need to share the data or one node needs to collect the data from the other node, one of the nodes is taken as the first node, and the other one is taken as the second node; and after authorization of the second node is obtained, the security channel for connecting the first node and the second node is established, and the target data is transmitted to the first node from the second node through the security channel, so that cross-domain data sharing among a plurality of nodes is realized.
title_abstract_original: 数据共享方法、装置、设备及计算机可读存储介质 本发明公开了种数据共享方法、装置、设备及计算机可读存储介质。数据共享方法包括步骤：将第节点触发的用于获取目标数据的请求信息传输至第二节点；获取第二节点根据请求信息反馈的允许获取目标数据的授权信息；建立连接第节点和第二节点的安全信道；通过安全信道将目标数据传输至所述第节点。当任何两个节点需要共享数据时或者更个节点需要想从另个节点进行数据采集时，将其中个作为第节点，另个作为第二节点，在得到第二节点的授权之后，建立连接第节点和第二节点的安全信道并将目标数据通过安全信道从第二节点传输至第节点，从而实现多个节点之间的跨域数据共享。

title_abstract: Method for sorting out of defective liquid capsule from flow of liquid capsules by sorting device of loading device in tobacco processing industry, involves conveying flow of liquid capsules on conveying path The method involves conveying a flow (13) of liquid capsules (10 to 12) on a conveying path (16), and directing a light (17) in a recording area on the liquid capsule. The fluidity is determined on the basis of images of filling level. The images are captured from an illuminated liquid capsule. The liquid capsule, which falls below the predetermined filling level, is sorted. The defective liquid capsule is sorted with a compressed air blast (19) from the flow of liquid capsules. Independent claims are included for the following: (1) a sorting device for tobacco processing industry; and (2) a loading device for tobacco processing industry.
title_abstract_original: Sortieren von Flüssigkeitskapseln durch Füllstandsprüfung für das Einbringen in Stränge der Tabak verarbeitenden Industrie Die Erfindung betrifft ein Verfahren zum Aussortieren von schadhaften Flüssigkeitskapseln (11) aus einem Strom (13) von Flüssigkeitskapseln (10–12). Die Erfindung betrifft ferner eine entsprechende Sortiervorrichtung der Tabak verarbeitenden Industrie. Das erfindungsgemäße Verfahren zeichnet sich dadurch aus, dass der Strom (13) von Flüssigkeitskapseln (10–12) auf einer Förderstrecke (16) gefördert wird, wobei Licht (17, 17‘) auf die jeweilige Flüssigkeitskapsel (10–12) gerichtet wird und anhand eines von den beleuchteten Flüssigkeitskapseln (10–12) aufgezeichneten Bildes der Füllstand der jeweiligen Flüssigkeitskapseln (10–12) mit Flüssigkeit bestimmt wird und anschließend die Flüssigkeitskapseln (11), die einen vorgebbaren Füllstand unterschreiten, aussortiert werden. Die erfindungsgemäße Sortiervorrichtung zeichnet sich dadurch aus, dass ein Vorratsbehälter (25) und ein Zwischenspeicher (26) für die Flüssigkeitskapseln (10–12) vorgesehen ist, wobei zwischen dem Vorratsbehälter (25) und dem Zwischenspeicher (26) eine Transportvorrichtung (20) vorgesehen ist, die Aufnahmen für die Flüssigkeitskapseln (10–12) aufweist, wobei eine Kamera (28) vorgesehen ist, die zur Transportvorrichtung (20) ausgerichtet ist und wobei ein Beleuchtungsvorrichtung (38, 38‘) vorgesehen ist, die zur Transportvorrichtung (20) ausgerichtet ist oder in der Transportvorrichtung (20) angeordnet ist und zur Beleuchtung von wenigstens einer Flüssigkeitskapsel (10–12) in einem Aufzeichnungsbereich der Kamera (28) vorgesehen ist, wobei die Kamera (28) mit einer Steuervorrichtung (39) verbunden ist, wobei eine Abgabevorrichtung (37) vorgesehen ist, die auf ein Aussortiersignal der Steuervorrichtung (39) eine Flüssigkeitskapsel (11) von der Transportvorrichtung (20) wegfördert.

title_abstract: APPARATUSES, METHODS AND SYSTEMS FOR AN ACTIVITY TRACKING AND PROPERTY TRANSACTION FACILITATING HUB USER INTERFACE The APPARATUSES, METHODS AND SYSTEMS FOR AN ACTIVITY TRACKING AND PROPERTY TRANSACTION FACILITATING HUB USER INTERFACE (“HUB”) facilitates the generation, evaluation, and recording of information and activities related to property transactions and associated communications. In one implementation, the HUB may allow for highly customizable mapping of spatiotemporal information in an integrated customer relationship management and real estate listing system; optimized scheduling of activities and/or appointments; efficient access to and economical display of contact information; dynamic sorting and filtering of searchable data; and/or the like.

In one implementation, the HUB may allow for highly customizable mapping of spatiotemporal information in an integrated customer relationship management and real estate listing system; optimized scheduling of activities and/or appointments; efficient access to and economical display of contact information; dynamic sorting and filtering of searchable data; and/or the like.

title_abstract: Real estate project liquidation audit method and system A real estate project liquidation audit method disclosed by the present invention comprises the steps of obtaining the economic index data of an architectural monomer; according to a comparison result of the economic index data and an economic index reasonable reference value, determining whether the comparison result exceeds a preset first threshold value; if the comparison result exceeds the first threshold value, turning over to a cost engineer to audit the project quantity, and generating a cost engineer audit table according to the audit recording; according to the audit recording of a tax accountant to the liquidation data, generating a tax accountant audit table; collecting the tax accountant audit table and the cost engineer audit table, calculating and generating a liquidation result. Meanwhile, the present invention also discloses a real estate project liquidation audit system. The real estate project liquidation audit method and the real estate project liquidation audit system of the present invention are flexible in project liquidation audit flows, are easy to adjust, by adopting an appropriate audit mode, facilitate grasping the audit emphasis, also enable the workload of the audit personnel to be reduced, and realize the effective and accurate fusion of the tax accountant audit result and the cost engineer audit result.
title_abstract_original: 种房地产项目清算审核方法及系统 本发明公开了种房地产项目清算审核方法，包括：获取建筑单体的经济指标数据；根据经济指标数据与经济指标合理参考值的比对结果，判断比对结果是否超出预设的第阈值；若超出第阈值，则移交造价师对工程量进行审核，并根据审核记录生成造价师审核表；根据税务师对清算资料的审核记录，生成税务师审核表；对税务师审核表和造价师审核表进行归集，计算并生成清算结果。同时，本发明还公开了种房地产项目清算审核系统。本发明的项目清算审核流程灵活、容易调整，通过采取适当的审核方式，既有利于抓住审核重点，又减小了审核人员的工作量，实现了对税务师审核结果和造价师审核结果的有效和准确融合。
DETERMINATION QUANTITATIVE ET IDENTIFICATION DE BACTERIES

title_abstract: Quantitative determination and identification of bacteria The invention relates to a process for the quantitative detection and identification of bacteria in a biological medium containing them, by amplification of the bacteria to be detected on a culture medium which is semi-selective with respect to the bacteria to be detected, followed by detection of the said bacteria, the said amplification being performed on a support which is either the surface of the culture medium, or a membrane support placed on the culture medium and the detection being performed either, where appropriate, on the membrane support which served as surface for amplification, or on another membrane support carrying the fingerprint of the colony of bacteria to be identified. The detection process of the invention exhibits a very high specificity and sensitivity and gives a response which is simultaneously quantitative, localised and which permits reisolation.
title_abstract_original: Quantitative determination and identification of bacteria The invention relates to a process for the quantitative detection and identification of bacteria in a biological medium containing them, by amplification of the bacteria to be detected on a culture medium which is semi-selective with respect to the bacteria to be detected, followed by detection of the said bacteria, the said amplification being performed on a support which is either the surface of the culture medium, or a membrane support placed on the culture medium and the detection being performed either, where appropriate, on the membrane support which served as surface for amplification, or on another membrane support carrying the fingerprint of the colony of bacteria to be identified.
