title_abstract: Forward-reverse wedge-shaped underholing blasting tunneling construction method The embodiment of the invention discloses a forward-reverse wedge-shaped underholing blasting tunneling construction method, and relates to the technical field of drilling and blasting method rock roadway tunneling. Comprising the following steps: arranging a first group of slotting holes, a second group of slotting holes and a central hole group below an intersection point of a tunnel arch camber line and a central line; the first set of slotting holes and the second set of slotting holes are formed in the two sides of the center hole set respectively and comprise a forward wedge-shaped slotting hole set, a reverse wedge-shaped slotting hole set and an auxiliary slotting hole set respectively, and the reverse wedge-shaped slotting hole set and the auxiliary slotting hole set are arranged on the two sides of the forward wedge-shaped slotting hole set respectively. The reverse wedge-shaped slotting hole set and the center hole set are adjacently arranged, each center hole is perpendicular to the working face, the forward wedge-shaped slotting holes and the reverse wedge-shaped slotting holes are obliquely crossed with the working face, and the forward wedge-shaped slotting holes and the reverse wedge-shaped slotting holes are transversely arranged in a staggered mode. The blasthole utilization rate can be improved, so that the blasting tunneling efficiency is improved; the device is suitable for blasting tunneling engineering operation of tunnels, roadways and the like.
title_abstract_original: 一种正-反楔形掏槽爆破掘进施工方法 本发明实施例公开一种正‑反楔形掏槽爆破掘进施工方法，涉及钻爆法岩巷掘进技术领域。包括：在巷道起拱线和中心线交点处下方布置第一组掏槽孔、第二组掏槽孔及中心孔组；第一组掏槽孔与第二组掏槽孔分设于中心孔组两侧，第一组掏槽孔与第二组掏槽孔分别包含：正楔形掏槽孔组、反楔形掏槽孔组及辅助掏槽孔组，反楔形掏槽孔组与辅助掏槽孔组分列于正楔形掏槽孔组的两侧，且反楔形掏槽孔组与中心孔组相邻设置，每个中心孔与工作面垂直设置，正楔形掏槽孔及反楔形掏槽孔分别与工作面斜交，且正楔形掏槽孔与反楔形掏槽孔横向错开设置。本发明有利于提高炮眼利用率，从而提高爆破掘进效率；适用于隧道、巷道等爆破掘进工程作业中。

title_abstract: WELLBORE FLUID SAVER ASSEMBLY A method for performing a service operation within a wellbore extending into a formation comprises sealing a first length of the wellbore to define a first isolated formation zone, flowing a pressurized fluid through a tubular string into the first isolated formation zone, and unsealing the first length of the wellbore without venting the pressurized fluid from the tubular string or awaiting depressurization of the first isolated formation zone. An assembly connected to a tubular string for performing a service operation in a wellbore comprises a mandrel with a flowbore in fluid communication with the tubular string, an upper sealing device, a lower sealing device, a selectively operable valve that enables or prevents fluid communication between the flowbore and the wellbore, and a selectively closeable bypass flow path.

title_abstract: STEVIOL GLYCOSIDE AGGLOMERATES AND PROCESS FOR PRODUCING Steviol glycoside agglomerate compositions are disclosed that do not include binding agents or carriers.
title_abstract_original: STEVIOL GLYCOSIDE AGGLOMERATES AND PROCESS FOR PRODUCING Steviol glycoside agglomerate compositions are disclosed that do not include binding agents or carriers.

title_abstract: Unidirectional filter for hydraulic systems A hydraulic system has a filter that filters only when the fluid is flowing in one direction. The filter is located in a flow passage between a hydraulic fluid source and a valve in a well. The source supplies hydraulic fluid pressure in a forward direction to keep the valve open. A bypass passage allows hydraulic fluid to bypass the filter. A check valve located in the bypass passage prevents forward flowing fluid from flowing through the bypass passage. If hydraulic pressure is lost, hydraulic fluid will return through the bypass passage, rather than flowing through the filter, to allow the valve to quickly close.
title_abstract_original: Unidirectional filter for hydraulic systems A hydraulic system has a filter that filters only when the fluid is flowing in one direction. The filter is located in a flow passage between a hydraulic fluid source and a valve in a well. The source supplies hydraulic fluid pressure in a forward direction to keep the valve open. A bypass passage allows hydraulic fluid to bypass the filter. A check valve located in the bypass passage prevents forward flowing fluid from flowing through the bypass passage. If hydraulic pressure is lost, hydraulic fluid will return through the bypass passage, rather than flowing through the filter, to allow the valve to quickly close.

title_abstract: Nouritrophoblast cell surface antigen 2 (TROP-2) antibodies The present application provides isolated antibodies and antigen binding fragments thereof that specifically bind to trophoblast cell surface antigen 2 (Trop-2). These Trop-2 antibodies or antigen-binding fragments thereof have high binding affinity for Trop-2, are capable of inducing antibody-dependent cell-mediated cytotoxicity (ADCC), have good tumor penetrability, can be internalized by Trop-2 expressing cells, and are useful in the diagnosis, prognosis and treatment of human diseases (e.g., neurological diseases) associated with Trop-2. Cancer, infectious disease, autoimmune disease, asthma, transplant rejection, and inflammatory disease).
title_abstract_original: 滋养层细胞表面抗原2(TROP-2)抗体 本申请提供了特异性结合滋养层细胞表面抗原2(Trop‑2)的分离的抗体及其抗原结合片段。这些Trop‑2抗体或其抗原结合片段对Trop‑2具有高结合亲和力，能够诱导抗体依赖性细胞介导的细胞毒性(ADCC)，具有良好的肿瘤穿透性，可以被表达Trop‑2的细胞内化，并且可用于诊断、预测和治疗与Trop‑2相关的人类疾病(例如，癌症、传染病、自身免疫性疾病、哮喘、移植排斥和炎性疾病)。

title_abstract: Medicinal lamb spine hot pot The invention relates to a medicinal lamb spine hot pot, belonging to the field of medicated food. The medicinal lamb spine hot pot has the efficacies of nourishing yin, clearing heat, nourishing the liver to improve visual acuity, moistening lungs, nourishing skin, maintaining beauty and inducing urination. According to the technical scheme, the medicinal lamb spine hot pot is prepared from the following main materials, auxiliary materials and seasonings in parts by weight, wherein the main materials include 450-550 parts of goat backbones, 8-16 parts of goat lungs and 25-35 parts of phaseolus calcaratus leaves; the auxiliary materials include 2.5-3.5 parts of wild pepper, 0.5-1.5 parts of cassia bark, 1-2 parts of aniseed, 8-15 parts of ginger, 8-15 parts of green onion, 10-20 parts of garlic and 2-5 parts of bay leaves; the seasonings include 3-6 parts of refined salt, 0.05-0.15 part of monosodium glutamate, 0.05-0.15 part of ground pepper, 0.2-1 part of minced cilantro and 0.1-0.5 part of chicken powder.

title_abstract: Strategy for improving malic acid production performance by regulating and controlling biofilm hybridization system The invention discloses a strategy for improving malic acid production performance by regulating and controlling a biofilm hybridization system, and belongs to the technical field of bioengineering. According to the strategy, a CdS nano material is functionally modified by combining phenol through a molecular biology means and a biofilm, so that electron transport is improved. A targeted biofilm hybridization system is introduced to construct a strain containing a CdS-biological hybridization system, so that the contact area between the CdS nano material and escherichia coli is remarkably increased, the NADH concentration is increased, and the malic acid production is improved. Under an illumination condition, the L-malic acid concentration and the production intensity are increased to 9.84g/L and 0.14g/L/h respectively. The strain is produced by fermentation in a 5L fermentation tank, the malic acid yield reaches 45.93g/L, and the strategy has a relatively good industrial application prospect.
title_abstract_original: 一种调控生物被膜杂合系统改善苹果酸生产性能的策略 本发明公开了一种调控生物被膜杂合系统改善苹果酸生产性能的策略，属于生物工程技术领域。本发明通过分子生物学手段，利用生物被膜，结合苯酚功能化修饰CdS纳米材料，达到提高电子传输。通过引入靶向生物被膜杂合系统，构建得到含有CdS‑生物杂合系统的菌株，显著提高了CdS纳米材料与大肠杆菌的接触面积，提高了NADH浓度，进而改善苹果酸生产。在光照条件下，L‑苹果酸浓度和生产强度分别提高到9.84g/L和0.14g/L/h。5L发酵罐发酵生产该菌株，苹果酸产量达到45.93g/L，具有较好的工业应用前景。

蛋糕果仁喷洒设备 本发明公开了一种蛋糕果仁喷洒设备，属于食品处理设备技术领域，包括破碎瓶体，破碎瓶体的内部形成一个下端开口的破碎空间，破碎瓶体包括瓶体本体，瓶体本体的侧面上开设有进料口，瓶体本体上设有能够打开或关闭进料口的密封盖，破碎空间的内部设有破碎头及其驱动破碎头正向或反向旋转的驱动装置，破碎头设置在瓶体本体的底部开口端，破碎头包括多个水平安装的刀片，刀片的一端为刀刃，另一端为破碎齿。本发明通过将果仁投入破碎瓶体内，推动推板将果仁推至靠近破碎头，调节破碎头正转或反转以及转速，破碎头对果仁切片或粉碎，将出料斗的开口端朝向蛋糕，分料板旋转带动处理后的果仁下落均匀，便于用果仁对蛋糕装饰。

title_abstract: Cake nut spraying equipment The invention discloses cake nutlet spraying equipment, and belongs to the technical field of food processing equipment.The cake nutlet spraying equipment comprises a crushing bottle body, a crushing space with an opening in the lower end is formed in the crushing bottle body, the crushing bottle body comprises a bottle body, a feeding port is formed in the side face of the bottle body, and a sealing cover capable of opening or closing the feeding port is arranged on the bottle body; a crushing head and a driving device for driving the crushing head to rotate forwards or reversely are arranged in the crushing space, the crushing head is arranged at the opening end of the bottom of the bottle body and comprises a plurality of blades which are horizontally mounted, one end of each blade is a cutting edge, and the other end of each blade is crushing teeth. According to the device, kernels are put into the crushing bottle body, the push plate is pushed to push the kernels to be close to the crushing head, the crushing head is adjusted to rotate forwards or reversely and rotate, the kernels are sliced or crushed through the crushing head, the opening end of the discharging hopper faces a cake, the material distributing plate rotates to drive the processed kernels to fall uniformly, and the cake can be conveniently decorated through the kernels.

title_abstract: Well production control system Apparatus for detecting fluid pound in a sucker-rod oil well, using values of sucker-rod position and of sucker-rod load to calculate a reference position and a selected load value. The apparatus continually updates the reference positions and selected load values to compensate for drift in characteristics of transducers used in determining rod load and rod position and for a gradual change in well characteristics. When the sucker-rod moves downward to the updated reference position, the actual rod load is checked against the updated selected value and a warning signal develops when the amount of load exceeds the updated selected value.

PROCEDE ET DISPOSITIF DE CONTROLE DU FONCTIONNEMENT D'UNE INSTALLATION DE POMPAGE D'UN PUITS

L'INVENTION CONCERNE LES TECHNIQUES DE POMPAGE POUR LES PUITS DE PETROLE.

UN DISPOSITIF DESTINE A DETECTER UNE CONDITION DE COGNEMENT SUR LE FLUIDE DANS UNE INSTALLATION DE POMPAGE POUR UN PUITS DE PETROLE UTILISE DES VALEURS DE POSITION DU TRAIN DE TIGES 16 ET DE LA CHARGE SUR LE TRAIN DE TIGES POUR CALCULER UNE POSITION DE REFERENCE ET UNE VALEUR DE CHARGE SELECTIONNEE. LE DISPOSITIF EFFECTUE UNE MISE A JOUR CONTINUELLE DES POSITIONS DE REFERENCE ET DES VALEURS DE CHARGE SELECTIONNEES POUR COMPENSER UNE DERIVE DANS LES CARACTERISTIQUES DES TRANSDUCTEURS 47, 53 UTILISES POUR DETERMINER LA CHARGE ET LA POSITION DU TRAIN DE TIGES. UN SIGNAL D'AVERTISSEMENT APPARAIT LORSQUE LA CHARGE REELLE DEPASSE LA VALEUR SELECTIONNEE AU MOMENT OU LE TRAIN DE TIGES ATTEINT LA POSITION DE REFERENCE MISE A JOUR, DANS LA COURSE DESCENDANTE.

APPLICATION A LA PRODUCTION DE PETROLE.

title_abstract: PREPARATION FOR SPEAKER DIAPHRAGM PURPOSE:To form a diaphragm shape without thinning the mounting part of a coil bobbin, by using a convex metallic mold which is provided with an elastic body being compressible and having a smaller end than a projection area, on the lower face of the projection. CONSTITUTION:To the lower face of the projection 7 of the convex metallic mold 5, a spiral spring 8 is installed, and also to the lower end of this spiral spring 8, a disk 9 consisting of an aluminum foil is installed. And, when the convex metallic mold 5 is made to go down, the disk 9 at the tip of the spiral spring 8 hits agaist the sheet 1, it further goes down, pushing this sheet 1. In this case, the outside circumferential part (b) of the part against which the disk 9 of the sheet 1 has hit is stretched. When the convex metallic mold 5 further goes down, the sheet 1 contacts with the concave metallic mold, also the spiral spring 8 is compressed, the sheet 1 is supported between the convex metallic mold 5 and the concave metallic mold 2, and it is formed to a cone shape.

title_abstract: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR DECIDING VIDEO PREDICTION MODE A method and an apparatus for deciding a video prediction mode are provided. The method includes providing n prediction modes, where n is a positive integer, selecting first prediction modes among the n prediction modes using a first cost function, and selecting a final prediction mode among the first prediction modes using a second cost function different from the first cost function. The first cost function includes a sum of absolute transformed difference (SATD) operation, and the second cost function includes a sum of squared difference (SSD) operation.

title_abstract_original: 영상을 부호화하기 위한 영상 예측 모드 결정 방법 및 장치 영상 예측 모드 결정 방법이 제공된다. 영상 예측 모드 결정 방법은, n(여기서, n은 자연수)개의 영상을 압축하고 부호화하기 위한 예측 모드를 제공하고, 제1 비용 함수를 이용하여, 상기 n개의 예측 모드 중에서 제1 예측 모드를 선택하고, 상기 제1 비용 함수와 다른 제2 비용 함수를 이용하여 상기 제1 예측 모드 중에서 최종 예측 모드를 선택하는 것을 포함하되, 상기 제1 비용함수는 SATD(Sum of Absolute Transformed Difference) 연산을 포함하고, 상기 제2 비용 함수는 SSD(sum of Squared Difference) 연산을 포함한다.

title_abstract: Full-cost inspection method and system The invention discloses a full-cost inspection method and system. The system comprises an enterprise resource planning (ERP) system, a key plan management (CPM) system and a business intelligence (BI)system. The CPM system reports the staging plan node information to a BI system, and the BI system generates inspection information and sends the inspection information to an ERP system; the ERP system extracts cost data according to the inspection information and pushes the cost data to the BI system; the BI system compares the target cost in the cost data with the dynamic cost to complete full-cost inspection; and the BI system generates a report according to the inspection result and returns the inspection result to the ERP system.
title_abstract_original: 全成本检查方法及其系统 一种全成本检查方法及其系统，包括企业资源计划ERP系统、关键计划管理CPM系统和商业智能BI系统。CPM系统将分期计划节点信息上报至BI系统，BI系统生成检查信息并将其发送到ERP系统；ERP系统根据检查信息提取成本数据，并推送到BI系统；BI系统对成本数据中的目标成本与动态成本进行比对，完成全成本检查；BI系统将检查的结果生成报表，并将检查结果返回ERP系统。

title_abstract: Method for providing real estate total service The present invention relates to a method for providing a real estate comprehensive service. According to an embodiment of the present invention, when a real estate comprehensive service server operated by a real estate comprehensive service company that provides real estate comprehensive services to customers, including landlords and tenants, is requested to manage real estate lease from a customer terminal used by the landlord or tenant, the method may comprise: a lease management service providing process of providing a lease management service of real estate through the customer terminal; a room finding service providing process of providing a room finding service through the customer terminal when a room finding request is received from the customer terminal; and a life service providing process of requesting a living service company terminal to provide a living service to the customer when a living service request is received from the customer terminal.
title_abstract_original: 부동산 종합 서비스 방법 본 발명의 실시 형태는 임대인 및 임차인을 포함하는 고객에게 부동산 종합 서비스를 제공하는 부동산 종합 서비스 회사가 운영하는 부동산 종합 서비스 서버가, 임대인 또는 임차인이 사용하는 고객 단말기로부터 부동산 임대 관리를 요청받는 경우, 고객 단말기를 통하여 부동산의 임대관리 서비스를 제공하는 임대관리 서비스 제공 과정; 고객 단말기로부터 방찾기를 요청받는 경우, 고객 단말기를 통하여 방찾기 서비스를 제공하는 방찾기 서비스 제공 과정; 및 고객 단말기로부터 생활 서비스를 요청받는 경우, 생활 서비스 업체 단말기에 고객에게 생활 서비스를 제공해줄 것을 생활 서비스 업체 단말기에 요청하는 생활 서비스 제공 과정;을 포함할 수 있다.

title_abstract: Payment processing system, apparatus and method in real estate transactions A web-based system for the capture and processing of payments in a real estate purchase and sale transaction comprising one or more user devices where user devices comprise one or more in the group of mobile phone, laptop, tablet and desktop PC and where users comprise Buyer, Buyer Agent, Seller, Seller Agent and Title Company Representative, an Application Server in communication with the one or more user devices via a browser over the Internet, the Application Server comprising a processor and data storage, data storage comprising information inputs relating to title companies, users, third party service providers/disbursees involved in real estate transactions, attributes of real properties and velocity controls relating to payment amount limits authorized for disbursements post closing to the third party service providers/disbursees, the Application Server in communication with a Title Company Processing Software and a Payment Processing Server.

title_abstract: CDNAS CODING FOR MEMBERS OF THE CARCINOEMBRYONIC ANTIGEN FAMILY A nucleic acid comprising a base sequence which codes for a CEA family member peptide sequence or nucleic acids having a base sequence hybridizable therewith, replicable recombinant cloning vehicles having an insert comprising such nucleic acid, cells transfected, infected or injected with such cloning vehicles, polypeptides expressed by such cells, synthetic peptides derived from the coding sequence of CEA family member nucleic acids, antibody preparations specific for such polypeptides, immunoassays for detecting CEA family members using such antibody preparations and nucleic acid hybridization methods for detecting CEA family member nucleic acid sequences using a nucleic acid probe comprising the above described nucleic acid.

title_abstract: Semi-matte gel candy rubber with easy chewing and high temperature resistance and preparation method thereof The invention relates to a candy rubber and a preparation method thereof, in particular to a semi-matte gel candy rubber which is easy to chew and high temperature and a preparation method thereof. It belongs to the field of food technology. The rubber includes the following components, in parts by weight: gelatin 100-110; glycerin 85-90; lactose 30-35; glucose monohydrate 3-5; glucose syrup 0.5-1.5; purified water 25-30; Also included are: microcrystalline cellulose 10-15. The gel candy rubber of the invention has improved the heat resistance of the final product rubber, solves the problem of transportation difficulty, and presents a faintly translucent state in appearance, which is very unique and beautiful, and is moisture-proof. The effect is also very good.

用于使机器能够移动的系统和方法 本发明提供了种用于使机器能够移动的系统和方法。该系统包括设置在机器上的支承部件。该支承部件构造成相对于机器的框架处于升起位置或降下位置。该系统还包括构造成选择性地使机器能够移动的致动模块。该系统还包括联接到致动模块和支承部件的使能阀。该使能阀构造成基于支承部件的位置而选择性地向致动模块发送先导信号。

title_abstract: SYSTEM AND METHOD FOR ENABLING MACHINE MOVEMENT A system and method for enabling movement of a machine are provided. The system includes a support member provided on the machine. The support member is configured to be in a raised position or a lowered position relative to a frame of the machine. The system also includes an actuation module configured to selectively enable the movement of the machine. The system further includes an enabler valve coupled to the actuation module and the support member. The enabler valve is configured to selectively send a pilot signal to the actuation module based on the position of the support member.

title_abstract: System for Accessing and Processing Information A method for procuring and tracking evidence of insurance, the method under control of one or more computer systems configured with executable instructions, includes a processor which operates to receive an evidence of insurance request from a user corresponding to a specific collateralized property, said request comprising information corresponding to the specific collateralized property; generate and assign a permanent unique code for the collateralized property corresponding to insurance information for the collateralized property; create a profile of insurance information on a first database corresponding to the collateralized property; access insurance information related to the collateralized property on a second database to obtain insurance information corresponding to the collateralized property; confirm the existence of insurance for the collateralized property; and generate an electronic evidence of insurance document.

title_abstract: UBIQUITIN CONJUGATING ENZYME E2 ISOLATED FROM MUNGBEAN PURPOSE: A novel ubiquitin-conjugated enzyme E2 is provided to have a pivotal role in a plant stress resistance reaction and to be used in molecular genetic research. CONSTITUTION: A ubiquitin-conjugated enzyme E2 comprises an amino acid sequence of sequence number 2. The ubiquitin-conjugated enzyme E2 is isolated from mung beans. The expression of ubiquitin-conjugated enzyme E2 is induced by stress. The stress is ABA(abscisic acid) or bittern. A gene encoding the ubiquitin-conjugated enzyme E2 comprises a base sequence of sequence number 1. A recombinant plasmid pBAD-MLT13 contains the gene encoding the ubiquitin-conjugated enzyme.
title_abstract_original: UBIQUITIN CONJUGATING ENZYME E2 ISOLATED FROM MUNGBEAN PURPOSE: A novel ubiquitin-conjugated enzyme E2 is provided to have a pivotal role in a plant stress resistance reaction and to be used in molecular genetic research. CONSTITUTION: A ubiquitin-conjugated enzyme E2 comprises an amino acid sequence of sequence number 2. The ubiquitin-conjugated enzyme E2 is isolated from mung beans. The expression of ubiquitin-conjugated enzyme E2 is induced by stress. The stress is ABA(abscisic acid) or bittern. A gene encoding the ubiquitin-conjugated enzyme E2 comprises a base sequence of sequence number 1. A recombinant plasmid pBAD-MLT13 contains the gene encoding the ubiquitin-conjugated enzyme.

title_abstract: A DECODING APPARATUS/METHOD AND DATA FORMAT FOR PROCESSING AND STORING ENCRYPTED VIDEO DATA A DECODER (25) CONDITIONAL ACCESS SYSTEM (115,130,50) INCORPORATES DIFFERENT ENCRYPTION SYSTEMS FOR PROVIDING ACCESS TO PROGRAMS DERIVED FROM DIFFERENT SOURCES. A CONDITIONAL ACCESS PROCESSOR (115,130,50) FOR PROCESSING ENCRYPTED PROGRAM DATA AND AN ASSOCIATED ENCRYPTION CODE INCLUDES A FIRST ALGORITHM MEANS (130,115) FOR DECRYPTING THE ENCRYPTION CODE TO PROVIDE AN ENCRYPTION KEY. THE CONDITIONAL ACCESS PROCESSOR ALSO INCLUDES A SECOND ALGORITHM MEANS (115,130) FOR ENCRYPTING THE ENCRYPTION KEY AND THE SECOND ENCRYPTION ALGORITHM IS DIFFERENT TO THE FIRST ENCRYPTION ALGORITHM. A DATASTREAM REPRESENTING THE PROGRAM IS GENERATED (33,115,110,60,65,50) FROM ENCRYPTED PROGRAM DATA AND AN ASSOCIATED ENCRYPTION CODE. THE ENCRYPTION CODE IS DECRYPTED (115,130) TO PROVIDE AN ENCRYPTION KEY USING A FIRST ALGORITHM. THE ENCRYPTION KEY IS ENCRYPTED (115,130) USING A SECOND ALGORITHM DIFFERENT TO THE FIRST ENCRYPTION ALGORITHM AND THE PROGRAM DATASTREAM IS FORMED FROM THE ENCRYPTED PROGRAM DATA AND THE ENCRYPTED ENCRYPTION KEY. THE PROGRAM DATASTREAM IS DECRYPTED BY SELECTING BETWEEN A FIRST AND A SECOND DECRYPTION ALGORITHM AND BY DECRYPTING (115,130) THE ENCRYPTION CODE TO PROVIDE AN ENCRYPTION KEY. THE ENCRYPTION KEY IS USED TO DECRYPT (50,115) THE ENCRYPTED PROGRAM. A STORAGE MEDIUM (105) DATA FORMAT FOR RECORDING ENCRYPTED PROGRAM DATA IS ALSO DISCLOSED.

"aparelho/método de decodificação e formato de dados para processamento e armazenagem de dados de vìdeo criptografados" "APARELHO/MéTODO DE DECODIFICAçãO E FORMATO DE DADOS PARA PROCESSAMENTO E ARMAZENAGEM DE DADOS DE VìDEO CRIPTOGRAFADOS" Trata-se de um sistema de acesso condicional (115, 130, 50) de decodificador (25) incorpora sistemas de criptografia diferentes para fornecer acesso a programas derivados de fontes diferentes. Um processador de acesso condicional (115, 130, 50) para processar dados de programa criptografados e um código de criptografia associado inclui um primeiro dispositivo de algoritmo (130, 115) para decriptografar o código de criptografia para produzir uma chave de criptografia. O processador de acesso condiconal também inclui um segundo dispositivo de algoritmo (115, 130) para criptografar a chave de criptografia e o segundo algoritmo de criptografia é diferente do primeiro algoritmo de criptografia. Um fluxo de dados representando o programa é gerado (33, 115, 110, 60, 65, 50) a partir dos dados de programa criptografados e um código de criptografia associado. O código de criptografia é decriptografado (115, 130) para fornecer uma chave de criptografia usando um primeiro algoritmo. A chave de criptografia é criptografada (115, 130) usando um segundo algoritmo diferente do primeiro algoritmo de criptografia e o fluxo de dados do programa é formado a partir dos dados de programa criptografados e da chave de criptografia criptografada. O fluxo de dados do programa é criptografado pela seleção entre um primeiro e um segundo algoritmo de decriptografia e pela decriptografia (115, 130) do código de criptografia para fornecer uma chave de criptografia. A chave de criptografia é usada para decriptografar (50, 115) o programa criptografado. Um formato de dados do meio físico de armazenagem (105) para gravar os dados de programa criptografados é também descrito.

title_abstract: A DECODING APPARATUS/METHOD AND DATA FORMAT FOR PROCESSING AND STORING ENCRYPTED VIDEO DATA A decoder (25) conditional access system (115, 130, 50) incorporates different encryption systems for providing access to programs derived from different sources. A conditional access processor (115, 130, 50) for processing encrypted program data and an associated encryption code includes a first algorithm means (130, 115) for decrypting the encryption code to provide an encryption key. The conditional access processor also includes a second algorithm means (115, 130) for encrypting the encryption key and the second encryption algorithm is different to the first encryption algorithm. A datastream representing the program is generated (33, 115, 110, 60, 65, 50) from encrypted program data and an associated encryption code. The encryption code is decrypted (115, 130) to provide an encryption key using a first algorithm. The encryption key is encrypted (115, 130) using a second algorithm different to the first encryption algorithm and the program datastream is formed from the encrypted program data and the encrypted encryption key. The program datastream is decrypted by selecting between a first and a second decryption algorithm and by decrypting (115, 130) the encryption code to provide an encryption key. The encryption key is used to decrypt (50, 115) the encrypted program. A storage medium (105) data format for recording encrypted program data is also disclosed.

title_abstract:
APPARATUS FOR PROCESSING DIGITAL VIDEO DATA

PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED: To provide a decoder (25) conditional access system (115, 130, 50) which incorporates different encryption systems for providing access to programs derived from different sources.

SOLUTION: A conditional access processor (115, 130, 50) for processing encrypted program data and an associated encryption code includes a first algorithm means (130, 115) for decrypting the encryption code to provide an encryption key. The conditional access processor also includes a second algorithm means (115, 130) for encrypting the encryption key and the second encryption algorithm is different from the first encryption algorithm. A datastream representing the program is generated (33, 115, 110, 60, 65, 50) from encrypted program data and an associated encryption code. The encryption code is decrypted (115, 130) to provide an encryption key using a first algorithm.

METODO Y APARATO DE DESCODIFICACION PARA TRATAR Y ALMACENAR DATOS DE VIDEO CIFRADOS. LA PRESENTE INVENCION SE REFIERE A UN SISTEMA DE ACCESO CONDICIONAL (115, 130, 50) DE DECODIFICADOR (25) QUE INCLUYE VARIOS SISTEMAS DE ENCRIPTACION QUE PERMITE EL ACCESO A UNOS PROGRAMAS DERIVADOS DE FUENTES DIFERENTES. UN PROCESADOR DE ACCESO CONDICIONAL (115, 130, 50) PROCESA LOS DATOS DE PROGRAMA CODIFICADOS Y UN CODIGO DE ENCRIPTACION ASOCIADO COMPRENDE UN PRIMER ORGANO DE ALGORITMO (130, 115) QUE DECODIFICA EL CODIGO DE ENCRIPTACION DE FORMA QUE SE OBTENGA UNA CLAVE DE ENCRIPTACION. EL PROCESADOR DE ACCESO CONDICIONAL COMPRENDE TAMBIEN UN SEGUNDO ORGANO DE ALGORITMO (115, 140) QUE CODIFICA LA CLAVE DE ENCRIPTACION, SIENDO EL SEGUNDO ALGORITMO DIFERENTE DEL PRIMERO. UN FLUJO DE DATOS QUE REPRESENTA EL PROGRAMA SE GENERA (33, 115, 110, 60, 65, 50) A PARTIR DE DATOS DE PROGRAMA CODIFICADOS Y DE UN CODIGO DE ENCRIPTACION ASOCIADO. SE DESCODIFICA EL CODIGO DE ENCRIPTACION (115, 130) PARA OBTENER UNA CLAVE DE ENCRIPTACION MEDIANTE EL PRIMER ALGORITMO. LA CLAVE DE ENCRIPTACION SE CODIFICA (115, 130) PARA OBTENER UNA CLAVE DE ENCRIPTACION DIFERENTE DEL PRIMERO Y SE FORMA EL FLUJO DE DATOS DEL PROGRAMA A PARTIR DE LOS DATOS DE PROGRAMA DECODIFICADOS Y LA CLAVE DE ENCRIPTACION CODIFICADA. SE DECODIFICA DE ENCRIPTACION PARA DESENCRIPTAR (50, 115) EL PROGRAMA CODIFICADO. ESTA INVENCION SE REFIERE TAMBIEN A UN FORMATO DE DATOS DE SOPORTE DE INFORMACIONES (105) QUE PERMITEN REGISTRAR DATOS DE PROGRAMA CODIFICADOS.

title_abstract: Decoding system and data format for processing and storing encrypted broadcast, cable or satellite video data A decoder conditional access system incorporates different encryption systems for providing access to programs derived from different sources. A conditional access processor for processing encrypted program data and an associated encryption code includes a first algorithm means for decrypting the encryption code to provide an encryption key. The conditional access processor also includes a second algorithm means for encrypting the encryption key and the second encryption algorithm is different to the first encryption algorithm. A datastream representing the program is generated from encrypted program data and an associated encryption code. The encryption code is decrypted to provide an encryption key using a first algorithm. The encryption key is encrypted using a second algorithm different to the first encryption algorithm and the program datastream is formed from the encrypted program data and the encrypted encryption key. The program datastream is decrypted by selecting between a first and a second decryption algorithm and by decrypting the encryption code to provide an encryption key. The encryption key is used to decrypt the encrypted program. A storage medium data format for recording encrypted program data is also disclosed.

title_abstract_original: Decoding apparatus/method and data format for processing and storing encrypted video data 一个解码器(25)条件存取系统(115，130，50)结合不同的加密系统，用于提供对于从不同节目源得到的节目的接入。用于处理包括加密的节目数据和一个加密码的一个条件接通处理器(115，130，50)包括第一算法装置(130，115)，用于解密该加密码，以便提供一个密钥以及第二算法装置(130，115)，用于加密该密钥，其中该第二加密算法不同于该第一加密算法。从加密的节目数据和相关的加密码产生表示该节目的数据流(33，115，110，60，65，50)。利用第一算法解密该加密码(115，130)以便提供一个密钥。利用不同于第一加密算法的第二算法加密该密钥(115，130)，并且从加密的节目数据和解密的密钥形成节目数据流。通过在第一和第二解密算法之间进行选择解密该节目数据流，并且通过解密(115，130)该加密码提供一个密钥。该密钥用于解密(50，115)该加密的节目。还公开了一种用于记录加密的节目的存储介质(105)的数据格式。

title_abstract: VOLTAGE LEVEL SHIFTER A voltage level shifter includes: in stages a pull-down driving unit suitable for receiving an input signal swinging between a ground voltage and a first supply voltage, and pull-down driving an output node to the ground voltage according to a voltage level of the input signal, wherein an output signal outputted through the output node swings between the ground voltage level and a second supply voltage level higher than the first supply voltage; a pull-up driving unit suitable for pull-up driving the output node, to the second supply voltage according to the voltage level of the input signal; a bias generation unit suitable for generating a bias voltage fixed to a preset voltage level; and a bias operation unit coupled between the output node and the pull-down driving unit, and suitable for lowering a voltage level of the output node in stages based on the bias voltage to supply the lowered voltage to the pull-down driving unit when a pull-down operation is performed by the pull-down driving unit.
title_abstract_original: VOLTAGE LEVEL SHIFTER A voltage level shifter includes: in stages a pull-down driving unit suitable for receiving an input signal swinging between a ground voltage and a first supply voltage, and pull-down driving an output node to the ground voltage according to a voltage level of the input signal, wherein an output signal outputted through the output node swings between the ground voltage level and a second supply voltage level higher than the first supply voltage; a pull-up driving unit suitable for pull-up driving the output node, to the second supply voltage according to the voltage level of the input signal; a bias generation unit suitable for generating a bias voltage fixed to a preset voltage level; and a bias operation unit coupled between the output node and the pull-down driving unit, and suitable for lowering a voltage level of the output node in stages based on the bias voltage to supply the lowered voltage to the pull-down driving unit when a pull-down operation is performed by the pull-down driving unit.

title_abstract: LEVEL SHIFTER The present technology relates to a level shifter which generates an output signal swinging between a second power level higher than a first power level and a ground voltage level in response to an input signal swinging between the first power level and the ground voltage level. The level shifter comprises: a pull-up drive unit which pulls up a node of an output signal to a second power level in response to an input signal; a pull-down drive unit which pulls down the node of the output signal to a ground voltage level in response to the input signal; a bias generation unit which generates a bias voltage fixed to a set level higher than a first power level and lower than the second power level; and a bias operation unit which is connected between the node of the output signal and the pull-down drive unit, and decreases a level applied to the node of the output signal in a stepwise manner in response to the bias voltage and then supplies the decreased level to the pull-down drive unit during a pull-down operation.
title_abstract_original: 레벨 쉬프터 본 기술은 레벨 쉬프터에 관한 것으로서, 제1 전원레벨과 접지전압레벨 사이에서 스윙하는 입력신호에 응답하여 제1 전원레벨보다 높은 제2 전원레벨과 접지전압레벨 사이에서 스윙하는 출력신호를 생성하는 레벨 쉬프터에 있어서, 입력신호에 응답하여 출력신호의 노드를 제2 전원레벨로 풀업 구동하기 위한 풀업 구동부와, 입력신호에 응답하여 출력신호의 노드를 접지전압레벨로 풀다운 구동하기 위한 풀다운 구동부와, 제1 전원레벨보다 높고 제2 전원레벨보다 낮은 설정된 레벨로 고정된 바이어스 전압을 생성하는 바이어스 생성부, 및 출력신호의 노드와 풀다운 구동부 사이에 연결되며, 풀다운 동작시 바이어스 전압에 응답하여 출력신호의 노드에 걸린 레벨을 단계적으로 하강시켜 풀다운 구동부에 공급하기 위한 바이어스 동작부를 포함한다.

title_abstract: Preparation method of broadleaf holly leaf The invention discloses a preparation method of broadleaf holly leaf. The preparation method comprises the following steps of (1) spreading and airing picked tea leaves; 2) steaming the tea leaves with steam until the leaves are semitransparent; 3) airing the tea leaves until 5-20% of water is left in the tea leaves; 4) grinding the tea leaves into powder; 5) continuously grinding the tea leaves at the temperature of 50-200 DEG C and rolling and extruding the tea leaves into paste; and 6) extruding the granular broadleaf holly leaves when 0.5-5% of water is left in the paste. The preparation method has the beneficial effects that the prepared broadleaf holly leaves are not easy to disperse after being soaked for a long time, transparent and bright in soup color, high in water extract and easy to store, and tea components are not easy to volatilize.
title_abstract_original: 苦丁茶制备方法 本发明公开了一种苦丁茶制备方法，包括有如下步骤：1）摊晾剔选采摘的茶叶；2）蒸汽蒸茶叶至叶片呈半透明；3）晾干至茶叶中剩余5～20%的水分；4）研磨成粉；5）在50～200℃温度下继续研磨并轧挤成膏体；6）轧挤至膏体中剩余0.5～5%的水分时，挤出颗粒状的苦丁茶。本发明的有益效果是：制得的苦丁茶颗粒形状久泡不易散，汤色透亮，水浸出物高，易储存，茶叶成分不易挥发。
苦丁茶制备方法 本发明公开了一种苦丁茶制备方法，包括有如下步骤：1）摊晾剔选采摘的茶叶；2）蒸汽蒸茶叶至叶片呈半透明；3）晾干至茶叶中剩余5～20%的水分；4）研磨成粉；5）在50～200℃温度下继续研磨并轧挤成膏体；6）轧挤至膏体中剩余0.5～5%的水分时，挤出颗粒状的苦丁茶。本发明的有益效果是：制得的苦丁茶颗粒形状久泡不易散，汤色透亮，水浸出物高，易储存，茶叶成分不易挥发。

title_abstract: DYNAMIC DISPLAY OF REPRESENTATIVE PROPERTY INFORMATION WITH INTERACTIVE ACCESS TO SOURCE DATA A system and method may aggregate into a data structure property information from multiple databases, e.g., from all records included in those databases, and upon selection of any subject property or a characteristic thereof curates the often imperfect and discrepant property information to create suggested values. Similarly, the system and method may perform an on-the-fly evaluation of any characteristic of a selected record, when the property information for that characteristic includes an unlikely value, by triggering from the data structure a dynamic extraction of property information corresponding to a subject property of the selected record, where the dynamic extraction further generates and compares a suggested value to the unlikely value.

title_abstract: Providing Method of real estate rental recommendations for loading products
title_abstract_original: 상품을 적재하기 위한 부동산 임대 추천 정보 제공 방법 실시예에 따른 상품을 적재하기 위한 부동산 임대 추천 정보 제공 방법은, 제1 기기로부터 상품의 박스 관련 정보를 수신하는 단계, 제2 기기로부터 촬영된 적재 공간 이미지를 포함하는 정보를 수신하는 단계, 상기 상품의 박스 관련 정보를 상기 적재 공간 이미지에 매칭하여 상기 적재 공간 이미지가 상기 상품의 박스 관련 정보에 매칭하는 유휴 공간을 가지는 지 여부를 판단하는 단계, 상기 적재 공간 이미지가 상기 유휴 공간을 가지는 것으로 판단하면, 상기 유휴 공간을 가지는 적재 공간을 상기 제1 기기의 사용자에게 임대 추천하기 위한 공간으로 결정하는 단계 및 상기 유휴 공간을 가지는 상기 적재 공간을 상기 제1 기기의 사용자에게 임대 추천하기 위한 임대 추천 정보를 생성하는 단계; 및 상기 임대 추천 정보를 상기 제1 기기의 사용자에게 전송하는 단계를 포함할 수 있다.

title_abstract: Commission allocation method and related devices The embodiment of the invention discloses a commission allocation method and a related device, which are applied to a server, and comprise the steps of obtaining customer index information associated with a target customer after checking that the target customer purchases a house and makes a transaction; determining a commission allocation configuration strategy for the target customer according to the customer index information, the commission allocation configuration strategy comprising at least one customer relationship determined according to a house purchase service acquired by the target customer, wherein the customer relationship comprises the target customer and an initiating object for providing the house purchase service for the target customer; determining a service commission of each initiating object in a plurality of initiating objects corresponding to the at least one customer relationship; and allocating the service commission to each initiating object. According to the embodiment of the invention, the method facilitates the accurate calculation of the commission distribution mode of a house property enterprise after the house purchase transaction is completed.
title_abstract_original: 佣金分配方法及相关装置 本申请实施例公开了一种佣金分配方法及相关装置，应用于服务器，包括：在检查到目标客户购房成交后，获取所述目标客户关联的客户索引信息；根据所述客户索引信息，确定针对所述目标客户的分佣配置策略，所述分佣配置策略中包括至少一个客户关系，所述至少一个客户关系为根据所述目标客户获取到的购房服务确定的，所述客户关系中包括所述目标客户和向所述目标客户提供所述购房服务的发起对象；确定所述至少一个客户关系对应的多个发起对象中每个发起对象的服务佣金；将所述服务佣金分配给所述每个发起对象。本申请实施例有利于帮助房产企业在购房交易完成后，准确的计算出佣金的分配方式。

title_abstract: Virtual reality space mobile positioning system and virtual reality space mobile positioning method for virtual house inspecting The invention discloses a virtual reality space mobile positioning system and a virtual reality space mobile positioning method for virtual house inspecting. The system comprises a virtual reality helmet, a handheld handle, infrared cameras, and a backpack host. The virtual reality helmet and the handheld handle are provided with reflective spots. The four infrared cameras face towards a moving area, and cover the whole moving area. A person moves in the moving area wearing the helmet. The infrared cameras capture the reflective spots on the virtual reality helmet and on the handheld handle and record the reflective spots as mark points. Virtual presentation is carried out according to the location information and rotation information of the mark points in the space. A virtual house inspecting scene including a virtual room, a house inspector and a virtual handle is constructed in a virtual reality presentation image, and virtual rays are projected to the virtual handle. Virtual house inspecting is realized. Dizzy feeling is avoided in virtual reality house inspecting. Interaction with outside personnel and the inside of a scene is increased. The problem that people cannot roam about all scenes due to the fact that the practical positioning space is smaller than a virtual space is solved.
title_abstract_original: 用于虚拟看房的虚拟现实空间移动定位系统及方法 本发明公开了种用于虚拟看房的虚拟现实空间移动定位系统及方法。包括虚拟现实头盔、手持手柄、红外相机和背包主机，虚拟现实头盔和手持手柄设有反光点，四个红外相机朝向移动区域并覆盖整个移动区域；人穿戴头盔在移动区域内移动，红外相机捕捉虚拟现实头盔和手持手柄上的反光点记录成标记点，根据标记点在空间中的位置信息和旋转信息进行虚拟呈现，虚拟现实呈现图像中构建包含虚拟房间、看房人和虚拟手柄的虚拟看房场景，对虚拟手柄投射虚拟射线。本发明实现了虚拟看房，解决了虚拟现实看房时候的晕眩感问题，增加了和外界人员、场景内部的互动，并解决因为实际定位空间比虚拟空间小而不能漫游全部场景的问题。

title_abstract: Pistachio nut rapid crushing device The invention discloses a pistachio nut rapid crushing device. The pistachio nut rapid crushing device comprises a support, a vertical guide post mounted on a support base, a press plate up and down movable along the vertical guide post, a material holding plate arranged on the lower side of the press plate, and an air cylinder arranged above the press plate; the air cylinder is mounted on the support and the push rod is connected with the press plate, a number of grooves are arranged on the upper side face of the material holding plate, a number of press blocks fitted with the grooves are arranged on the lower side face of the press plate, and the material holding plate is flexibly connected with the support base. The pistachio nut rapid crushing device has the advantages that through the design of continually replaceable material holding plate and the press structure, the single-time crushing of a whole plate of pistachio nuts can be achieved, uninterrupted operations are possible, the labor intensity of the operator is decreased, the operation time is greatly shortened, and the production cost of the pistachio nut is effectively reduced.
title_abstract_original: 开心果快速压裂装置 本发明公开了种开心果快速压裂装置，该开心果快速压裂装置包括支架、安装在支架底座的竖直导向柱、可沿竖直导向柱上下位移的压板、设置在压板下方的盛料盘、设置在压板上方的气缸，所述气缸安装在支架上且其推杆与压板连接，所述盛料盘上侧面设置有若干凹槽，所述压板下侧面上设置有若干可与凹槽配合的压块，所述盛料盘活动连接于支架底座上。本发明种开心果快速压裂装置的有益效果：通过设计可连续更换的盛料盘和压板结构，可实现整盘开心果的次性压裂，且可不间断作业，不仅减小了操作者的劳动强度，而且大大缩短了作业时间，有效降低了开心果的生产成本。

title_abstract: Clear and moist platycodon grandiflorum tea and preparation process thereof The invention discloses clearing and moistening platycodon grandiflorum tea which comprises the following raw materials in parts by weight: 8-10 parts of platycodon grandiflorum juice, 12-14 parts of pagoda flower honey, 10-15 parts of almond water, 3-5 parts of menthol, 5-8 parts of bulbus fritillariae cirrhosae, 3-4 parts of sea coconut, 10-15 parts of fresh mulberries and a proper amount of purified water. The tea has the advantages of being capable of relieving cough, reducing sputum, clearing away the lung-heat and moistening the throat, sweet and fresh in taste, free of side effects and suitable for adults and children to drink directly.
title_abstract_original: 一种清润桔梗茶及其制备工艺 本发明公开了一种清润桔梗茶，包括如下重量份的原料，桔梗汁液8‑10份、槐花蜜12‑14份、杏仁水10‑15份、薄荷脑3‑5份、川贝母5‑8份、海底椰3‑4份、新鲜桑葚10‑15份以及适量的纯净水。本发明具有如下优点：具有止咳化痰、清肺润喉的功效，且口感回甘清爽，无副作用，适合大人小孩直接饮用。

title_abstract: GENE ENCODING ORNITHINE DECARBOXYLASE PROTEIN FROM SPODOPTERA LITURA AND USES THEREOF PURPOSE: A Spodoptera litura-derived ODC(ornithine decarboxylase) is provided to repetitively and continuously kill worms. CONSTITUTION: A Spodoptera litura-derived ODC has an amino acid sequence of sequence number 2. A gene encoding ODC protein has base sequence of sequence number 1. A host cell is obtained by transforming a host cells with a recombinant vector containing the gene encoding ODC protein. The host cell is yeast. A method for normally recovering yeast proliferation and polyamine synthesis comprises: a step of knocking-out ODC gene in a yeast; and a step of transforming with the recombinant vector to overexpress ODC gene.

title_abstract: Method and computer program for providing map including real estate sales information Disclosed are a method for providing a map including new real estate sale information, to provide a user to a map expected when a real estate complex on sale is completed, and a computer program thereof. According to the present invention, the method comprises the following steps of: using a block plan of the real estate complex on sale to generate an image of the real estate complex on sale corresponding to the area of the real estate complex on sale; extracting information about a new road related to the real estate complex on sale and using the extracted new road information to add a road to be newly added in the image of the real estate complex on sale; acquiring real map data; overlaying the real map data with the image of the real estate complex on sale based on reference location information of the image of the real estate complex on sale to generate and display an expected map including the real estate complex on sale; when the user selects an apartment/house number of the real estate complex on sale, arranging the expected map with respect to the corresponding apartment/house number; extracting window information of the corresponding apartment/house number from plan view information of the selected apartment/house number; analyzing and providing sunshine amount information based on a window; and searching for a view photograph with respect to the corresponding window from a photograph database including a photographing position and azimuth to provide the searched view photograph.
title_abstract_original: 분양 정보를 포함한 지도를 제공하는 방법 및 컴퓨터 프로그램 신규 분양 정보를 포함한 지도를 제공하는 방법 및 이를 위한 컴퓨터 프로그램이 개시된다. 본 발명에 따른 지도 제공 방법은, 분양 단지의 단지배치도를 이용하여 분양 단지의 면적에 해당하는 분양 단지 이미지를 생성하는 단계와; 도시 계획 정보로부터 분양 단지와 관련된 신규 도로에 대한 정보를 추출하고, 추출된 신규 도로 정보를 이용하여 분양 단지 이미지에 신규로 건설될 도로를 추가하는 단계와; 실제 지도 데이터를 획득하는 단계와; 분양 단지 이미지의 기준 위치 정보를 기초로 실제 지도 데이터에 분양 단지 이미지를 오버레이하여 분양 단지가 포함된 예상 지도를 생성하여 디스플레이하는 단계와; 사용자가 분양 단지의 동호수를 선택하면 해당 동호수를 중심으로 예상 지도를 정렬하는 단계와; 선택된 동호수의 평면도 정보로부터 해당 동호수의 창문 정보를 추출하는 단계와; 창문을 기준으로 한 일조량 정보를 분석하여 제공하는 단계와; 촬영 위치 및 방위가 포함된 사진 데이터베이스로부터 해당 창문을 기준으로 한 조망 사진을 검색하여 제공하는 단계;를 포함한다.

title_abstract: Durian glutinous rice cakes and manufacture method thereof The present invention discloses durian glutinous rice cakes and a manufacture method thereof, and relates to the technical field of food. The durian glutinous rice cakes are prepared from the following raw materials in weight ratios: 1,000 g of cooked glutinous rice and 250 g of durian pulps. The manufacture method of the durian glutinous rice cakes is as follows: (1) the fresh durians are shelled, the pulps are taken out, the kernels in the pulps are removed, and the durain pulps are prepared for standby applications; (2) the glutinous rice is boiled into soft cooked glutinous rice and 1,000 g of the cooked glutinous rice taken for standby application; (3) 1,000 g of the cooked glutinous rice and 250 g of the durian pulps are rolled and blended evenly to prepare dough-shaped mixture; (4) the dough-shaped mixture is pressed into a plurality of oval-shaped cakes using molds, an appropriate amount of edible oil is added into a pan, and the oval-shaped cakes are fried using low heat until the cakes are golden; and (5) the fried durian glutinous rice cakes are loaded into dishes and the durian glutinous rice cakes can be eaten. The durian glutinous rice cakes have the fragrance and sweetness of the durians without losing the fragrance of the glutinous rice, and meet the needs of modern people's diversified taste requirements. The durian glutinous rice cakes are free of preservatives, any essences, and additives, fragrant, sweet and delicious, delicate in mouthfeel, rich in nutrition, and suitable for people at all ages.
title_abstract_original: 种榴莲糍粑及其制作方法 本发明公开了种榴莲糍粑及其制作方法，涉及食品技术领域，所述榴莲糍粑的重量配比为；糯米饭1000克，榴莲果肉250克。制作榴莲糍粑的方法是：（1）将新鲜榴莲去壳，取其果肉，去除果肉中的核，备用；（2）将糯米煮成柔软糯米饭，取1000克，备用；（3）将所述糯米饭1000克、榴莲果肉250克揉搓拌匀成面团状；（4）将所述面团状的混合物用模具压成椭圆形饼状数块，在平底锅中加入适量的食用油，小火煎制成金黄色为止；（5）将煎好的榴莲糍粑装入碟中即可食用。本发明所述的榴莲糍粑既具有榴莲的香甜，又不失糯香味，满足了现代人们口感多样化的需求。本发明所述榴莲糍粑不含防腐剂、无任何香精和添加剂，香甜可口、口感细腻、营养丰富、老少皆宜。

title_abstract: CUTTING ELEMENTS FOR A CUTTING TOOL AND METHODS OF MAKING AND USING SAME A cutting element (1) for a cutting tool has a sensor element, a body of super hard material (12) having a working surface, the sensor element being attached to a portion of the super hard material (12), and one or more conducting wires extending from the sensor element through one or more channels extending through the body of super hard material. The sensor element is bonded to the body of superhard material through a layer of ceramic adhesive.
title_abstract_original: CUTTING ELEMENTS FOR A CUTTING TOOL AND METHODS OF MAKING AND USING SAME A cutting element (1) for a cutting tool has a sensor element, a body of super hard material (12) having a working surface, the sensor element being attached to a portion of the super hard material (12), and one or more conducting wires extending from the sensor element through one or more channels extending through the body of super hard material. The sensor element is bonded to the body of superhard material through a layer of ceramic adhesive.

title_abstract: Chocolate hollow- or solid body product having a picture as motif similar to the babushka, comprises upper- and lower part and little figures in inside of the hollow body The chocolate hollow- or solid body product having a picture as motif similar to the babushka, comprises upper- and lower part and little figures in inside of the hollow body. The height of the external hollow body is 6-7 cm and the height of an internal hollow body is 2-3 cm. The external hollow body has two parts. The internal little figure to be seen is removed first after the decoration of the chocolate and the external figure to be seen is divided.

title_abstract: Cementing collar and method of operation The cementing collar described herein is designed primarily for cementing operations in oil or gas wells. The basic assembly includes a collar, an outer sleeve slidable in the collar, and an inner sleeve slidable in the outer sleeve. The collar and outer sleeve each have cementing ports therein. When the assembly is being run into the well casing, the collar and both sleeves are secured by shear pins in a position such that the cementing ports are closed. To open the cementing ports a trip bomb is dropped into the casing to engage a seat inside the outer sleeve. This causes the pins to shear and permits the outer sleeve to move down to a position in which the sleeve ports line up with the collar port. After cementing has been completed, a plug is flowed down the casing to engage the inner sleeve. Fluid pressure is applied behind the plug to shear the pins a second time. This moves the outer sleeve further down to a position in which the cementing ports are again closed.

title_abstract: Enclosed circulating thin layer spirulina cultivating apparatus The utility model relates to a hermetic spirulina cultivating device with circulating thin layer light. The device is formed by orderly connecting an overflowing eductor, an overflowing plate type photobiologic reactor, a liquid storage tank and a circulating pump. Supporting plates with baffles are arranged in the overflowing plate type photobiologic reactor which is made of transparent material, the supporting plates are horizontally arranged in multiple layers, and overflow ports at upper and lower layers are crosswise distributed. When the device is arranged indoors, the outside of the overflowing plate type photobiologic reactor can be provided with a daylight lamp tube which serves as a light source; when the device is arranged outdoors, natural light is utilized to serves as the light source. When the device is adopted, spirulina liquid receives light uniformly, the spirulina have higher yield and good quality, preparing cost is greatly reduced, and the utility model is easily popularized and applied.

title_abstract: CONSORTIUM OF BACTERIA THAT MINERALISE LIPIDS, STARCHES AND SUGARS (CARBOHYDRATES) AND ARE RESISTANT TO LETHAL DOSES OF THIODICARB (CARBAMATE) AND BIFENTHRIN (PYRETHROID) FOR INOCULATION INTO ORGANIC MATTER OF DIFFERENT ORIGINS The present invention provides a consortium of resistant microorganisms for biodegrading carbohydrates in the organic fraction of any source of solid waste. The genetic, metabolic and morphological structure of these resistant microorganisms works efficiently by biodegrading and mineralising solid biodegradable waste from municipal or harvest solid waste, reducing the production of gases and leachates. This compound enriches and increases the concentration of beneficial microorganisms, generating high-quality biological fertilisers suitable for use in agricultural production, in land recovery and conservation, under the parameters established in sustainable organic farming, which seeks to conserve, recover and use nature or the environment without generating the least negative impact.

CONSORCIO DE BACTERIAS RESISTENTES A TIODICARB (CARBAMATO) Y BIFENTRINA (PIRETROIDE) Y SU USO PARA DEGRADAR MATERIA ORGÁNICA CONTAMINADA CON ESTOS PESTICIDAS. El consorcio comprende bacterias de las especies Bacillus brevis, Bacülus subtilis, Bacillus thuringiensis y Arthrobacter globiformis que se han sometido a concentraciones crecientes de tiodicarb y bifentrina con objeto de hacerlos más tolerantes a estos compuestos, sin manipular su genoma. La aplicación del consorcio enriquece el suelo con bacterias que, además de ser resistentes al tiodicarb y a la bifentrina, degradan los hidratos de carbono presentes en la fracción orgánica de cualquier fuente de residuos sólidos.

title_abstract: Consortium of bacteria that mineralises lipids, starches and sugars (carbohydrates) and are resistant to lethal doses of thiodicarb (carbamate) and bifenthrin (pyrethroid) for inoculation into organic matter of different origins The present invention provides a consortium of resistant microorganisms for biodegrading carbohydrates in the organic fraction of any source of solid waste. The genetic, metabolic and morphological structure of these resistant microorganisms works efficiently by biodegrading and mineralising solid biodegradable waste from municipal or harvest solid waste, reducing the production of gases and leachates. This compound enriches and increases the concentration of beneficial microorganisms, generating high-quality biological fertilisers suitable for use in agricultural production, in land recovery and conservation, under the parameters established in sustainable organic farming, which seeks to conserve, recover and use nature or the environment without generating the least negative impact.

CONSORCIO DE BACTERIAS MINERALIZADORAS DE LÍPIDOS, ALMIDONES Y AZUCARES (HIDRATOS DE CARBONO); RESISTENTES A DOSIS LETALES DE TIODICARB (CARBAMATO) Y BIFENTRINA (PIRETROIDE) PARA SER INOCULADOS EN MATERIA ORGÁNICA DE DIFERENTE PRECEDENCIA La presente proporciona un consorcio de microorganismos resistentes para biodegradar los hidratos de carbono presentes en la fracción orgánica de cualquier fuente de residuos sólidos. La estructura genética, metabólica y morfológica de estos microorganismos resistentes, trabaja eficientemente biodegradando y mineralizando los residuos sólidos biodegradables procedentes de los residuos sólidos municipales pecuarios y agrícolas disminuyendo la producción de gases y de lixiviados. Este compuesto enriquece y aumenta. la concentración de microorganismos benéficos, generando abonos biológicos de alta calidad, aptos para ser utilizados en la producción agrícola, en la recuperación y conservación de tierras, bajo los parámetros establecidos en la agricultura orgánica sostenible donde se busca conservar, recuperar y utilizar la naturaleza o el ambiente sin generar el mínimo impacto negativo. Reivindicación 2: El consorcio de conformidad con la reivindicación 1, caracterizado porque estos organismos Bacillus brevis, Bacillus subtilis, Bacillus thuringiensis y Arthrobacter globiformis se han hecho resistentes a las trazas de tiodicarb (carbamato) y bifentrina (peritroide) que contienen los residuos orgánicos a tratar. Esta resistencia se logra con el trabajo científico y aplicación de protocolos de adaptación al que se sometieron durante periodos de entre 3 y más de 5 años a cada una de los microorganismos que conforman el consorcio con cantidades crecientes de trazas químicas del ingrediente de tiocarb y bifentrina.

consórcio de bactérias resistentes ao tiodicarbe (carbamato) e bifentrina (pirretroide) e sua utilização para degradar matéria orgânica contaminada com estes pesticidas ''consórcio de bactérias resistentes ao tiodicarbe(carbamato) e bifentrina (pirretroide) e sua utilização para degradar matéria orgânica contaminada com estes pesticidas''. o consórcio inclui bactérias das espécies bacillus brevis, bacillus subtilis, bacillus thuringiensis e arthrobacter globiformis que foram submetidas a concentrações crescentes de tiodicarbe e bifentrina para torná-las mais tolerantes a esses compostos, sem manipular seu genoma. a aplicação do consórcio enriquece o solo com bactérias que, além de resistentes ao tiodicarbe e bifentrina, degradam os carboidratos presentes na fração orgânica de qualquer resíduo sólido.

title_abstract: CONSORTIUM OF BACTERIA THAT MINERALISE LIPIDS, STARCHES AND SUGARS (CARBOHYDRATES) AND ARE RESISTANT TO LETHAL DOSES OF THIODICARB (CARBAMATE) AND BIFENTHRIN (PYRETHROID) FOR INOCULATION INTO ORGANIC MATTER OF DIFFERENT ORIGINS The present invention provides a consortium of resistant microorganisms for biodegrading carbohydrates in the organic fraction of any source of solid waste. The genetic, metabolic and morphological structure of these resistant microorganisms works efficiently by biodegrading and mineralising solid biodegradable waste from municipal or harvest solid waste, reducing the production of gases and leachates. This compound enriches and increases the concentration of beneficial microorganisms, generating high-quality biological fertilisers suitable for use in agricultural production, in land recovery and conservation, under the parameters established in sustainable organic farming, which seeks to conserve, recover and use nature or the environment without generating the least negative impact.
title_abstract_original: CONSORCIO DE BACTERIAS RESISTENTES A TIODICARB (CARBAMATO) Y BIFENTRINA (PIRETROIDE) Y SU USO PARA DEGRADAR MATERIA ORGÁNICA CONTAMINADA CON ESTOS PESTICIDAS El consorcio comprende bacterias de las especies Bacillus brevis, Bacülus subtilis, Bacillus thuringiensis y Arthrobacter globiformis que se han sometido a concentraciones crecientes de tiodicarb y bifentrina conobjeto de hacerlos más tolerantes a estos compuestos, sin manipular su genoma. title_abstract: CONSORTIUM OF LIPID MINERALIZING BACTERIA, STARCHES AND SUGARS (CARBOHYDRATES) RESISTANT TO LETHAL DOSE OF THIODICARB (CARBAMATE) AND BIFENTHRIN (PYRETHROIDS) TO BE INOCULATED INTO ORGANIC MATTER OF DIFFERENT ORIGIN. The present invention aims to provide a consortium of resistant microorganisms for biodegrading the carbohydrates present in the organic fraction of any solid waste source. The genetic, metabolic and morphological structure of said microorganisms works efficiently biodegrading and mineralizing the biodegradable solid residues coming from the municipal and harvest waste, thus decreasing the production of gases and leachates. Said compound enriches and increases the concentration of beneficial microorganisms generating biological fertilizers of high-quality. Also, it is suitable for the agricultural production, recovery, and conservation of land. The process is performed under the parameters established in sustainable organic agriculture seeking to conserve, recovering and using natural elements for avoiding generating a negative impact.

title_abstract: Nutrient health-care Chinese wolfberry fruit soybean milk The invention relates to nutrient health-care Chinese wolfberry fruit soybean milk. The nutrient health-care Chinese wolfberry fruit soybean milk is made from the following raw materials in percentage by weight: 10-20% of Chinese wolfberry fruits, 5-10% of radix angelicae sinensis, 15-25% of red jujubes without kernels and 45-60% of soybeans. The nutrient health-care Chinese wolfberry fruit soybean milk disclosed by the invention is convenient and swift to eat, balanced and unique in ingredients and pure in mouth feel, and the nutrients of the soybean milk are not destroyed.
title_abstract_original: 种枸杞营养保健豆浆 本发明是种枸杞营养保健豆浆，原料及重量比为：枸杞10~20%，当归5~10%，去核红枣15~25%，黄豆45~60%。本发明的枸杞营养保健豆浆食用方便快捷，不破坏豆浆营养，成分均衡独特，口感纯正。

title_abstract: Automatic cell culture box The invention relates to an automatic cell culture box. A refrigeration storage device, a CO2 conservation device, a culture medium box or a midway recycling bin, a central incubator, an activation box and a microscope camera structure are respectively connected with a center control system; the refrigeration storage device is arranged on one side in the box body; the CO2 conservation device is arranged on the other side in the box body; the refrigeration storage device and the CO2 conservation device are arranged at an interval by a clapboard in the box body. Compared with the traditional manual culture box, the automatic cell culture box provided by the invention has the advantages that the efficiency is improved by 30 percent, cell culture can be automatically controlled, completely closed culture is realized, an opening step does not exist any more, and the biological safety of cells is thoroughly guaranteed; uniform cell culture standard is realized, cell culture for more people can be simultaneously realized, the efficiency is improved, the labor intensity is reduced, the using amount of consumed materials is reduced, and the culture cost is reduced; the culture box can be used in an ordinary environment, and GMP (Good Manufacturing Practice) building and equipment purchasing costs are greatly reduced.

title_abstract: Telephone subscriber pair monitoring circuit - is mounted in subscriber's junction box and disconnects subscribers' appts. from protection against high voltage or current The unit monitors the line between the telephone exchange and the subscriber's appts. Similar circuits are used in each line. When an unacceptable current or voltage is detected on either line, the subscriber's appts. is disconnected and an electronic switch switches in a characteristic termination impedance across the exchange line connections. Each circuit consists of a voltage detector, current detector, protection device and an electronic circuit breaker. The protection device can be a resistance and Zener diode or a spark-gap in parallel. The impedance switch can be operated by either current detector.

title_abstract: Swelling tobacco Tobacco fragments in the form of strips, leaf or rods are impregnated with a composition which is capable of decomposing into a gas. The impregnated tobacco is subjected to treatment (heat) in order to liberate gas from the composition within the tobacco fragments thereby to swell the tobacco. Pref. gas is CO2.

The impregnated tobacco is subjected to treatment (heat) in order to liberate gas from the composition within the tobacco fragments thereby to swell the tobacco. Pref. gas is CO2.

title_abstract: ANTI-HUMAN-MESOTHELIAL-CELLULAR MONOCLONAL ANTIBODY PURPOSE:To obtain an anti-human-mesothelial-cellular monoclonal antibody specifically reacting with human mesothelial cells without reacting with other human normal cells and human tumor cells and thereby applicable to the diagnosis of sputum cells or thoracic fluid cells for lung cancer and to the diagnosis of ascites cells for abdominal tumor. CONSTITUTION:The splenic cells of a mouse immunized with human mesothelial cells are fused with mouse marrow cells to form hybridomas. A bybridoma producing a monoclonal antibody reacting with the human mesothelial cells is selected from the formed hybridomas and cultured in a medium or administered into a mouse to give ascites. The objective monoclonal antibody is obtained from the cultured product or the ascites.

title_abstract: porcelain enamal coating vessel for pickle PURPOSE: An enamel-coated container for a Kimchi refrigerator attached with a transparent plate at the upper part of the container to look into the inside without opening a container lid is provided, which has excellent adhesion, corrosion resistance and abrasion resistance and does not become rusty on its surface. CONSTITUTION: A transparent plate(4) is constructed on the lid(3) of a Kimchi container(1) made of carbon steel and an enamel layer containing 20 to 40% by weight of elvan, 7 to 10% by weight of feldspar, 7 to 20% by weight of sodalite, 3 to 5% by weight of fluorspar, 0.1 to 2% by weight of cobalt, 1 to 2% by weight of nickel oxide, 5 to 12% by weight of alumina, 15 to 20% by weight of borax and 0.5 to 3% by weight of manganese is coated on the surface of the Kimchi container.
title_abstract_original: 김치 냉장고용 법랑 김치통 본 발명은 김치 냉장고용 법랑 김치통에 관한 것으로, 금속(탄소강)재질의 용기에 세라믹 법랑층을 갖도록 한 것이다. 법랑유약은 세라믹 재질인 맥반석 20-40%에, 장석 7-10%, 규석 7-20%, 형석 3-5%, 코발트 0.1-2%, 산화니켈 1-2%, 알루미나 5-12%, 붕사 15-20%, 망간 0.5-3% 가 용융 혼합된 것으로, 칼라층을 얻기 위하여 안료를 선택적으로 첨가한 것이다. 특히, 본 발명의 김치통은 용기의 상단부에 투명판을 부착토록 하여 용기의 뚜껑을 열지 않아도 속을 들여다 볼 수 있도록 하므로서, 사용자가 아주 편리하게 사용할 수 있도록 한 것이다. 이와 같은 본 발명의 김치통은 법랑유약의 성분을 세라믹과 장석, 규석, 형석, 그리고 붕사 등으로 구성된 유약을 사용함으로서, 밀착성, 내식성 및 내마모성이 우수한 법랑 김치통이 되도록 한 것이다. 또한, 본 발명의 김치통은 법랑층이 세라믹이므로 세라믹에서 발산되는 원적외선에 의하여 김치가 잘 숙성되며, 또한 숙성된 김치는 그 맛을 오랫동안 보존할 수가 있는 것이다. 또한, 용기에 부식(녹)이 발생하지 않으며, 세척이 용이하며, 외관이 아름다워 고급스러운 형태를 갖는 것이다.

title_abstract: Retriever for auger earth boring tools
title_abstract_original: Retriever for auger earth boring tools

title_abstract: TENANT SCREENING METHOD AND SYSTEM USING PERSONALITY ASSESSMENT A system and method of using a computer and computer program for rapid tenant screening using a personality assessment. The personality assessment measures tenant characteristics then weights those characteristics to predict tenant behaviors of interest to landlords. The tenant is invited to participate in a personality assessment. The computer software and processor generates an assessment report for the landlord indicating the strengths and weaknesses of the tenant's profile. The landlord uses that profile as selection criteria affecting acceptance decision.

title_abstract: Novel cell recovery agent The invention discloses a novel cell recovery agent. The novel cell recovery agent comprises the following ingredients: 100 ng of a recombinant human epidermal growth factor, 200 ng of a recombinant human basic fibroblast growth factor, 3000 ng of vitamin D, 2 ml of a recombinant human serum albumin, and 8 ml of an RPMI-1640 culture medium. The novel cell recovery agent has the beneficial effects that (1) the novel cell recovery agent does not contain animal ingredients and is safe and reliable to use; (2) the ingredients are completely clear and definite, and the quality is convenient to control; (3) the novel cell recovery agent is a ready-to-use type, and the operation is more convenient; (4) the applicable cell type is not limited; and (5) better cell viability and thawing rate are achieved when the cell is recovered.
title_abstract_original: 种新型的细胞复苏试剂 本发明公开了种新型的细胞复苏试剂，各组成成分及用量分别为：重组人表皮生长因子100ng、重组人碱性成纤维细胞生长因子200ng、维生素D3000ng、重组人血白蛋白2ml、RPMI‑1640培养基8ml。本发明的有益之处在于：(1)不含动物成分，使用安全可靠；(2)成分完全明确，便于质量控制；(3)即用型，操作更加方便；(4)适用的细胞类型不限；(5)可以在细胞复苏时获得更好的细胞活性和复苏率。

种细胞复苏试剂 本发明公开了种细胞复苏试剂，各组成成分及用量分别为：重组人表皮生长因子100ng、重组人碱性成纤维细胞生长因子200ng、维生素D3000ng、重组人血白蛋白2ml、RPMI‑1640培养基8ml。本发明的有益之处在于：(1)不含动物成分，使用安全可靠；(2)成分完全明确，便于质量控制；(3)即用型，操作更加方便；(4)适用的细胞类型不限；(5)可以在细胞复苏时获得更好的细胞活性和复苏率。

title_abstract: SYSTEM AND METHOD FOR CONNECTING A POTENTIAL BUYER AND AN AVAILABLE REALTOR IN REAL TIME Systems and methods for establishing communication between at least one host system, at least one buyer device, and at least one realtor device are disclosed. The system determining a current location of the at least one buyer device using a device locator and sending at least one selectable indicator associated with a location of available realtors located within a determined distance of the current location of the buyer device. Upon selection of a selectable indicator, the system facilitates the showing of a property associated with the current location of the user device by connecting a realtor associated with the selectable indicator and buyer associated with the buyer device. Once the showing has been accepted, the system provides real-time updates of the realtors location as they travel to the showing.

Once the showing has been accepted, the system provides real-time updates of the realtors location as they travel to the showing.

title_abstract: Electronic process validation A system for electronic transaction processing, comprising a plurality of electronic documents, each having a plurality of elements, each element having one or more representation data field, one or more definition data field and one or more record data field, a consumer closing table providing access to a subset of the electronic documents and allowing a borrower that has been associated with the subset of the electronic documents to edit predetermined data fields and to view predetermined educational materials associated with one or more of the elements and a closing disclosure collaboration system configured to provide access to a closing disclosure document and to allow a settlement agent to edit predetermined data fields and to allow a lender to edit predetermined data fields.
title_abstract_original: 电子处理验证 种电子交易处理的系统，其包括：多个电子文档，每个电子文档具有多个元素，每个元素具有个或多个表示数据字段、个或多个定义数据字段和个或多个记录数据字段；消费结账表，其提供到所述电子文档的子集的访问，并允许已经与所述电子文档的子集相关的借款人编辑预定的数据字段和查看与个或多个所述元素相关的预定的教育材料；以及结账披露协作系统，其被配置为提供到结账披露文档的访问，并允许结算代理商编辑预定的数据字段和允许贷款人编辑预定的数据字段。

title_abstract: Interactive processing of real estate transactions The systems and methods dislcosed facilitate real estate transactions. The systems and methods preferably allow a participant in a real estate transaction process to create, access, and modify the content of property files associated with parcels of lands. The systems and methods preferably allow a user to administer access rights to access and modify the content of portions of the property files. The systems and methods preferably allow various participants in the real estate transaction process to integrate content into one or more portions of a property file.

title_abstract: INTERACTIVE PROCESSING OF REAL ESTATE TRANSACTIONS A real estate transaction system (110), preferably comprising a data management system (120), facilitates real estate transactions. The real estate transaction system (110) preferably allows a participant in a real estate transaction process to create, access, and modify the content of property files (130) associated with parcels of lands. The real estate transaction system (110) preferably allows a user to administer access rights to access and modify the content of portions of the property files (130). In one embodiment, the real estate transaction system (110) preferably administers access rights using a tree hierarchy (310). The real estate transaction system (110) preferably allows various participants in the real estate transaction process to integrate content (450) into one or more portions of a property file (130).

title_abstract: Technique for usage forecasting in a switched digital video system A plurality of digital video recorders are polled to extract data indicative of recordings scheduled thereon. The polling is carried out over a video content network by a component at a node in the video content network that is remote from the plurality of digital video recorders. At least a portion of the data is used to obtain a prediction of future switched digital video channel usage for the video content network. At least one network management activity is carried out on the video content network in response to the prediction of future switched digital video channel usage for the video content network.

title_abstract: AUTOMATIC MANAGED PRESSURE DRILLING UTILIZING STATIONARY DOWNHOLE PRESSURE SENSORS Undertaking a wellbore operation while monitoring wellbore pressure with stationary pressure sensors coupled to tubing extended within the wellbore and thereby generating downhole annulus signals in real-time. The wellbore pressure is also monitored at or near a surface location during the wellbore operation with surface pressure sensors that generate a measured wellhead pressure. The downhole annulus pressure signals are received at an outer loop controller that provides a desired wellhead pressure based on a difference between the real-time downhole annulus pressure signals and a desired pressure setpoint. The measured and desired wellhead pressures are received with an inner loop controller that provides command signals based on a difference between the measured and desired wellhead pressures. The command signals are received by flow control devices that adjust a backpressure within the wellbore based on the command signals.

PROCESO DE CONFORMACION DE CARCASA ESTANCA PARA ANTENAS DE COMUNICACIONES MARINAS Se describe un proceso mediante el que resulta posible la conformación de una carcasa estanca para proteger antenas del tipo de las que se utilizan en comunicaciones marinas. La carcasa está compuesta por dos semicarcasas, de forma preferentemente troncocónica y de material polimérico y radioeléctricamente transparente, de las que la superior alojará la totalidad de los elementos de la antena a excepción del cable de señal, que atravesará la semicarcasa inferior, para salir al exterior a través de un pequeño orificio de paso. Una vez colocados los elementos de la antena, la semicarcasa inferior se rellena totalmente con resina y se vincula permanentemente a la superior mediante pegado o similar.

title_abstract: Fabrication of a radio electrically transparent polymer type marine communication antenna casing has resin injected into the bottom half housing the signal cable before it is bonded to the top half of the casing Forming underwater case for marine communications antennas comprises preparing a protective outer casing of the antenna radio transparent material consisting of two half-shell (1,2) generally taking a tapered shape, bound by their larger bases through tight coupling, and which the lower half-shell (2) has a hole at its end opposite the coupling for sealing in the step signal cable.
