title_abstract: Production method of flower oil The invention specifically discloses a production method of flower oil. The technology is characterized by putting 90 to 99 parts by weight of edible vegetable oil in a steam jacketed kettle with a cover; pumping steam through a jacketed layer, and heating to 60 to 100 DEG C; putting and smashing flowers of which the water content is dried to be smaller than or equal to 2 percent into flower powder, adding 1 to 10 parts of flower powder in hot oil, stopping heating after frying for 1 to 10 minutes, and naturally cooling the flower powder; filtering and removing flower dregs by using a 80-mesh sieve after dipping for 10 days in a room temperature place, and then filtering by using a 120-mesh sieve, thus obtaining the flower oil. According to the production method disclosed by the invention, the flower oil is realized through a combination method of carrying out low-temperature frying and storage dipping technology on the flowers and the edible oil, so that not only is damage of high oil temperature on beneficial ingredients of the flowers avoided, but also the beneficial ingredients in the flower are enabled to be effectively extracted, nutritional substances of the flowers can be beneficially and effectively blended, and a new method for obtaining the nutrients of the flower is provided for people.
title_abstract_original: 种花卉油的生产方法 本发明具体公开了种花卉油的生产方法。其工艺是将重量份食用植物油90～99份置入带盖的蒸气夹层锅中，经夹层通入蒸气加热至60℃～100℃，再将烘干至含水量≤2%的花卉并粉碎成花卉粉1～10份加入热油中煎炸1～10分钟后，停止加热，让其自然冷却，置室温处浸渍10天后，先用80目筛过滤除去花卉渣，再用120目筛过滤得花卉油。本发明是将花卉与食用油用低温煎炸和贮存浸渍工艺结合的方法实现的，既避免了高油温对花卉有益成分的破坏，又保证其花卉中的有益成分得到有效地浸出，能够有益地将花卉的营养物质与食用植物油有效的融合，为人们提供了获取花卉营养的种新方法。

title_abstract: Bridge-type channel for fluidization mining of seabed natural gas hydration The invention discloses a bridge-type channel for fluidization mining of seabed natural gas hydration. Bridge-type channel bodies are mounted at the lower end of a screw pump and the upper end of a screw motor, connected with an external thread of an inner pipe of a continuous double-layer pipe, and connected with an internal thread of an outer pipe of the continuous double-layer pipe. Two Z-shaped flow channels are formed in the bridge-type channel bodies, one of the Z-shaped flow channels is a seawater flow channel, a seawater inject opening communicates with an external annulus of the continuous double-layer pipe, and a seawater drainage opening communicates with an inner cavity of the screw motor; and the other Z-shaped flow channel is a slurry flow channel, a slurry flow-in opening communicates with the external annulus of the continuous double-layer pipe, and a slurry pumping-in opening communicates with an inner cavity of the screw pump; the centers of the bridge-type channel bodies are provided with center holes, and a transmission shaft and a bearing are mounted, so that power of the screw motor can be transmitted to the screw pump. The bridge-type channel for fluidizationmining of the seabed natural gas hydration has the following advantages that (1) the structure is simple, and the shape dimension is small; and (2) a flow direction conversion channel is provided, sothat fluid movement is not interfered.
title_abstract_original: 种用于海底天然气水合物流化开采的桥式通道 本发明公开了种用于海底天然气水合物流化开采的桥式通道，桥式通道安装在螺杆泵的下端和螺杆马达的上端，与连续双层管内管的外螺纹连接，与连续双层管外管的内螺纹连接；在桥式通道的内部有两个“Z”字形流道，其中个为海水流道，海水注入口与连续双层管的外环空相通，海水排出口与螺杆马达的内腔相通，另个为浆体流道，浆体流入口与连续双层管的外环空相通，浆体泵入口与螺杆泵的内腔相通；在桥式通道的中心有个中心孔，安装传动轴和轴承，使得螺杆马达的动力能够传递给螺杆泵。本发明具有以下优点：（1）结构简单，外形尺寸小；（2）提供流向转换通道，使流体运动不发生干涉。

title_abstract: Business processing method of distributed equipment, business processing device of distributed equipment and distributed equipment The invention discloses a business processing method of distributed equipment, a business processing device of the distributed equipment and distributed equipment. The method includes the following steps that: sleep configuration information is obtained; a pre-configured sleep instruction is issued to a sleep business board according to the sleep configuration information, so that the sleep business board can delete a configuration table item which is pre-issued by a main control board according to the sleep instruction; an internal channel between the main control board and the sleep business board is closed, so that the configuration table item can be prevented from being issued to the sleep business board; and a packet discard mark is issued to the sleep business board, so that the sleep business board can discard a received message according to the packet discard mark. According to the business processing method of the distributed equipment, the business processing device of the distributed equipment and the distributed equipment provided by the invention, a business board which does not process business is configured to a sleep state, so that the CPU resources of the main control board can be saved, the overall performance of the distributed equipment can be improved, and the high-degree automation and intelligence of the distributed equipment can be realized.
title_abstract_original: 分布式设备的业务处理方法、装置及分布式设备 本发明公开了种分布式设备的业务处理方法、装置及分布式设备，该方法包括：获取休眠配置信息；根据所述休眠配置信息，向所述休眠业务板下发预先配置的休眠命令，以使所述业务板根据所述休眠指令，删除所述主控板预先下发的配置表项；关闭与所述休眠业务板之间的内部通道，以阻断向所述休眠业务板下发配置表项；向所述休眠业务板下发丢包标记，以使所述休眠业务板根据所述丢包标记丢弃接收到的报文。本发明提出种分布式设备的业务处理方法、装置及分布式设备，通过将未处理业务的业务板配置为休眠状态，实现节省主控板CPU资源的目的，提高该分布式设备的整体性能，实现该分布式设备的高度自动化、智能化。

分布式设备的业务处理方法、装置及分布式设备 本发明公开了一种分布式设备的业务处理方法、装置及分布式设备，该方法包括：获取休眠配置信息；根据所述休眠配置信息，向所述休眠业务板下发预先配置的休眠命令，以使所述业务板根据所述休眠指令，删除所述主控板预先下发的配置表项；关闭与所述休眠业务板之间的内部通道，以阻断向所述休眠业务板下发配置表项；向所述休眠业务板下发丢包标记，以使所述休眠业务板根据所述丢包标记丢弃接收到的报文。本发明提出一种分布式设备的业务处理方法、装置及分布式设备，通过将未处理业务的业务板配置为休眠状态，实现节省主控板CPU资源的目的，提高该分布式设备的整体性能，实现该分布式设备的高度自动化、智能化。

一种均衡堵塞与冲蚀的适度挡砂精度设计方法 本公开提供了一种均衡堵塞与冲蚀的适度挡砂精度设计方法，属于油气井防砂技术领域，该方法包括如下过程：以附加压降Δp表征堵塞、筛管冲蚀率ER表征冲蚀，构建挡砂精度的评价向量P(Δp,ER)；依据可选范围内各挡砂精度对应的评价向量构成决策矩阵；在决策矩阵中取砾石层压降最小值和筛管冲蚀率最小值构建最优向量、砾石层压降最大值和筛管冲蚀率最大值构建最劣向量；以各挡砂精度对应的评价向量距最优向量最近和最劣向量最远为原则，优选出最佳的评价向量，进而得出对应的均衡堵塞和冲蚀的适度挡砂精度。

title_abstract: Moderate sand blocking precision design method for balancing blockage and erosion The invention provides a moderate sand blocking precision design method for balancing blockage and erosion, and belongs to the technical field of oil and gas well sand prevention, and the method comprises the following steps: representing blockage by additional pressure drop delta p, representing erosion by sieve tube erosion rate ER, and constructing an evaluation vector P (delta p, ER) of sand blocking precision; forming a decision matrix according to the evaluation vector corresponding to each sand blocking precision in the selectable range; taking the minimum gravel layer pressure drop value and the minimum screen pipe erosion rate value from the decision matrix to construct an optimal vector, and taking the maximum gravel layer pressure drop value and the maximum screen pipe erosion rate value from the decision matrix to construct a worst vector; and taking the principle that the evaluation vector corresponding to each sand blocking precision is closest to the optimal vector and farthest from the worst vector as the principle, optimizing the optimal evaluation vector, and further obtaining the corresponding moderate sand blocking precision for balancing blockage and erosion.

title_abstract: SYSTEM AND METHOD FOR A BROADCAST RECOVERY CARRIER CHANNEL
title_abstract_original: SYSTEM AND METHOD FOR A BROADCAST RECOVERY CARRIER CHANNEL

title_abstract: SYSTEM AND METHOD FOR A BROADCAST RECOVERY CARRIER CHANNEL A method of providing a recovery channel for a common transmission network of remote devices comprising encoding data that contains information about a primary carrier signal, modulating the encoded information, spreading, the modulated encoded information such that a secondary carrier signal results, combining, the spread secondary carrier with the primary carrier signal such that the spread secondary carrier signal occupies at least a portion of a bandwidth of the bandwidth pool, transmitting the combined primary and secondary carrier signals across a communications link having a plurality of remote carrier signals also being transmitted across the communications link to a remote receiver and sharing a same bandwidth pool (or multiple bandwidth pools), and reestablishing the communications link with the primary carrier signal after a loss of the communications link using the information about the primary carrier signal contained in the secondary carrier signal to recover one or more network configuration parameters.
title_abstract_original: SYSTEM AND METHOD FOR A BROADCAST RECOVERY CARRIER CHANNEL A method of providing a recovery channel for a common transmission network of remote devices comprising encoding data that contains information about a primary carrier signal, modulating the encoded information, spreading, the modulated encoded information such that a secondary carrier signal results, combining, the spread secondary carrier with the primary carrier signal such that the spread secondary carrier signal occupies at least a portion of a bandwidth of the bandwidth pool, transmitting the combined primary and secondary carrier signals across a communications link having a plurality of remote carrier signals also being transmitted across the communications link to a remote receiver and sharing a same bandwidth pool (or multiple bandwidth pools), and reestablishing the communications link with the primary carrier signal after a loss of the communications link using the information about the primary carrier signal contained in the secondary carrier signal to recover one or more network configuration parameters.

title_abstract: WELLBORE SYSTEM AND METHOD USING A FLOW-ACTUATED DIVERTER VALVE A system and method facilitates the pumping of fluid from a wellbore. A downhole pumping system produces fluid through a diverter valve (24) and through tubing (26) to a desired collection location. If the flow of produced fluid is interrupted, the diverter valve automatically transitions to open an exit port (28) . This allows the fluid within the tubing, and any solids contained within the fluid, to flow back and exit directly into the wellbore without creating buildup of solids in the downhole pumping system.

title_abstract: Fluid control system A system for controlling fluid flow in a wellbore 29 comprises a wellbore fluid diverter valve 24 or check valve coupled to a tubing. The diverter valve 24 comprises a primary flow port 58 through which pumped fluid flows, an exit port 28 that opens a flow route between an interior of the diverter valve 24 and the wellbore 29, and a moveable mechanism 56 moveable by the pumped fluid to open the primary flow port 58 and to close the exit port 28, the mechanism being biased to close the primary flow port 58 and to open the exit port 28 upon stoppage of the pumped fluid. The mechanism may comprise a piston, a sliding sleeve or a ball valve. The device prevents solids within the liquid from falling back through the tubing and damaging the pump when the pump 22 is turned off.

The diverter valve 24 comprises a primary flow port 58 through which pumped fluid flows, an exit port 28 that opens a flow route between an interior of the diverter valve 24 and the wellbore 29, and a moveable mechanism 56 moveable by the pumped fluid to open the primary flow port 58 and to close the exit port 28, the mechanism being biased to close the primary flow port 58 and to open the exit port 28 upon stoppage of the pumped fluid. The mechanism may comprise a piston, a sliding sleeve or a ball valve. The device prevents solids within the liquid from falling back through the tubing and damaging the pump when the pump 22 is turned off.

title_abstract_original: Wellbore system and method using a flow-actuated diverter valve

title_abstract: DETECTION OF ANALYTES BY PROTEIN SWITCHES Compositions of matter, methods, devices, systems and apparatus for detecting analytes are disclosed including, for example, protein switches and their use in an in vivo sensor. The protein switch can be used to determine a level of an analyte that is diagnostic for health and/or well-being of a subject.

The protein switch can be used to determine a level of an analyte that is diagnostic for health and/or well-being of a subject.

title_abstract: Drilling robot drill bit mounting structure for intelligently mining coal mine rock burst The drilling robot drill bit mounting structure comprises a supporting shaft and a drill bit body, a storage hole is formed in the center of the bottom face of the supporting shaft, the storage hole is connected with the top end of the drill bit body, and a positioning ring is arranged on the outer side of the drill bit body. A positioning ring is installed on the outer side of the top end of the drill bit body and located in the containing hole, the positioning ring is fixedly connected with the inner wall of the supporting shaft, a distance ring is installed on the outer side of the top end of the drill bit body and located in the containing hole, and a positioning rod is fixedly installed in the center of the top face of the drill bit body. According to the drill bit mounting structure of the drilling robot for coal mine rock burst, a drill bit main body is firstly stably assembled with a supporting shaft through a positioning ring, meanwhile, the drill bit main body can push a distance ring to slide, a positioning rod on the drill bit main body slides into a positioning groove for positioning, and a limiting hole in the drill bit main body can be conveniently aligned with a straight rod; and the subsequent automatic positioning and assembling work is facilitated.
title_abstract_original: 一种智能化开采煤矿冲击地压用钻孔机器人钻头安装结构 本发明公开了一种智能化开采煤矿冲击地压用钻孔机器人钻头安装结构，包括支撑轴和钻头主体，所述支撑轴的底面中心设置有收纳孔，且收纳孔与钻头主体的顶端相互连接，所述钻头主体的外侧设置有定位环，且定位环位于收纳孔的内部，并且定位环与支撑轴的内壁固定连接，所述钻头主体的顶端外侧安装有隔环，且隔环位于收纳孔的内部，所述钻头主体的顶面中心固定安装有定位杆。该煤矿冲击地压用钻孔机器人钻头安装结构，钻头主体首先通过定位环与支撑轴进行平稳的组装工作，同时钻头主体可推动隔环进行滑动，且钻头主体上的定位杆滑进定位槽内进行定位，方便钻头主体上限位孔与直杆相互对齐，有利于后续的自动定位组装工作。

title_abstract: Seam control integrated volume fracturing method suitable for blocky pure shale oil reservoir The invention provides a seam control integrated volume fracturing method suitable for a blocky pure shale oil reservoir. The seam control integrated volume fracturing method comprises the following steps that horizontal section segmented multi-cluster perforation is performed on a target fracturing section of a target horizontal well after well completion; then in-section multi-scale fracture expansion is conducted through in-section fracturing, acid liquor is pumped in in the in-section fracturing process, propping agents with different particle sizes are injected for full-scale supporting of artificial fractures, and a four-stage fracture network structure acid etching micro-fracture-micro-fracture-secondary fracture-main fracture full-expansion network structure is formed; injection of the propping agents with different particle sizes for full-scale supporting of an artificial fracture comprises the following steps that a propping agent of 70-140 meshes are injected to support a micro-fracture, a propping agent of 40-70 meshes are injected to support a secondary fracture and a toe end of a main fracture, a propping agent of 30-50 meshes are injected to support a middle-toe end of the main fracture, a propping agent of 20-40 meshes are injected to a near-well end of the main fracture, and a near-well zone is filled; the in-section fracturing selects super-cutting fracturing with the fracture cluster spacing smaller than 10 m.
title_abstract_original: 一种适用于块状纯页岩油藏的缝控一体化体积压裂方法 本发明提供了一种适用于块状纯页岩油藏的缝控一体化体积压裂方法。该方法包括：完井后的目标水平井目标压裂段进行水平段分段多簇射孔；而后通过段内压裂进行段内多尺度裂缝扩展，在段内压裂过程中泵入酸液，并注入不同粒径的支撑剂进行人工裂缝的全尺度支撑，形成四级裂缝网络结构酸蚀微缝‑微裂缝‑次生裂缝‑主裂缝全扩展的网络结构；其中，注入不同粒径的支撑剂进行人工裂缝的全尺度支撑包括：注入70‑140目支撑剂支撑微裂缝，注入40‑70目支撑剂支撑次生裂缝及主裂缝趾端，注入30‑50目支撑剂支撑主裂缝中‑趾端，注入20‑40目支撑剂主裂缝近井端并填充近井筒地带；其中，段内压裂选用裂缝簇间距小于10m超密切割压裂。

一种适用于块状纯页岩油藏的缝控一体化体积压裂方法 本发明提供了一种适用于块状纯页岩油藏的缝控一体化体积压裂方法。该方法包括：完井后的目标水平井目标压裂段进行水平段分段多簇射孔；而后通过段内压裂进行段内多尺度裂缝扩展，在段内压裂过程中泵入酸液，并注入不同粒径的支撑剂进行人工裂缝的全尺度支撑，形成四级裂缝网络结构酸蚀微缝‑微裂缝‑次生裂缝‑主裂缝全扩展的网络结构；其中，注入不同粒径的支撑剂进行人工裂缝的全尺度支撑包括：注入70‑140目支撑剂支撑微裂缝，注入40‑70目支撑剂支撑次生裂缝及主裂缝趾端，注入30‑50目支撑剂支撑主裂缝中‑趾端，注入20‑40目支撑剂主裂缝近井端并填充近井筒地带；其中，段内压裂选用裂缝簇间距小于10m超密切割压裂。
